ZPCVV.name: andBeyond Vira Vira
ZPCVV.description: On an expansive, forested estate surrounded by the rainforests of national parks, evergreen Araucaria monkey puzzle trees, some over 1,000 years old, and awe-inspiring glacial lakes reflecting snow-capped volcanoes nearby, this magnificent wooden lodge at the gateway to Patagonia features floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the spacious interiors with natural light. All accommodations are individually decorated with a selection of curated objects and traditional artifacts and richly textured rugs, wall hangings, and fabric. Other highlights of the resort include: - 6 comfortable suites, 12 split-level villas with a separate living room, and a 5-bedroom, exclusive-use Hacienda for up to 10 guests - Farm-to-table dining with fresh produce and ingredients from the flourishing on-site organic vegetable garden, modern working farm, and boutique cheese factory - Guided visits to a traditional ruka (house) to learn about the unique way of life, cuisine, and heritage of Chile’s Mapuche people - Forest therapy, pampering treatments at the wellness center, and 2 outdoor hot tubs In this adventure-seeker haven, a range of excursions hosted by expert and engaging guides offer a wide range of seasonal adventures, from snowmobiling, heliskiing, snowshoeing, and snowboarding to trekking scenic trails in Villarrica and Huerquehue National Parks, birdwatching, floating down the river on a drift boat, catch-and-release fishing, paddleboarding, horseback riding, and whitewater rafting. Each activity is specifically tailored to the guest’s interests and personal fitness levels.

QXPAM.name: Arenas Del Mar
QXPAM.address_raw: Road to Arenas del Mar, Manuel Antonio
QXPAM.description: Next door to Manual Antonio National Park, find the perfect secluded beachfront resort in Arenas Del Mar. Take a quick walk to experience the park’s diverse jungle life, or stretch out on one of the two private beaches to enjoy Costa Rica’s natural biodiversity. Find the perfect guestroom or suite for your group with views of the water or the jungle and a private hot tub. The hotel honors its commitment to preservation with every detail from its natural spa products to sourcing ingredients locally for the restaurant. Embrace “pura vida” with a tour of the National Park or a rejuvenating spa treatment. At a Glance: - Choose either beach to swim, surf, and relax on a chaise - Explore the forest with a night walk, a bird-watching tour, or a horseback ride - Dine on fresh seafood with your toes in the sand at the beachfront restaurant - Dip in the infinity pool to cool off, and watch for whales on the horizon - Indulge in a spa treatment with the soothing noises of the jungle - Stroll the farmers market to learn about local medicinal herbs and pick up homemade tortillas

IOAAM.name: Aristi Mountain Resort
IOAAM.description: Blending seamlessly into the quaint surrounding villages, Aristi Mountain Resort welcomes visitors to Greece for an authentic and sustainable getaway. The natural materials and warm colors adorning each guestroom set a soothing tone for your stay. Venture outdoors to embrace the local wonders by hiking, horseback riding, rafting, or birdwatching. With a spa, cooking classes, and a photography workshop, create the perfect balance of activity and relaxation, all set against sweeping mountain views. Wander into nearby villages to watch craftsmen at work or soak up the ancient history of the Zagori region. At a Glance: - Taste local flavors with free-range meat and fresh-caught fish at Salvia - Join a photography workshop with Costas Zissis to capture the surrounding landscapes and charming architecture - Paddle the Voidomatis River on a raft or kayak and spot some of the famous local oxen - Take a dip at the indoor pool with views of the rolling mountains - Gather your own organic ingredients, then learn to prepare a feast during a cooking workshop - Relax with a reflexology massage at the spa

OVDAA.name: ARTIEM Asturias
OVDAA.description: RECOVER BALANCE AND WELL-BEING ON SPAIN’S RUGGED NORTHWEST COAST Surrender to the serenity at ARTIEM Asturia where comfort, relief, and the passion for a healthy lifestyle come together luxuriously amid the lush valleys, hidden beaches, and striking 16th-century cathedrals of Asturias, just ten minutes from vibrant Gijón. Conceived as a wellness club, from the spacious guestrooms and the exclusive wellness club and spa to the authentic dishes at THE GREEN: restaurant lounge, ARTIEM Asturias embodies the balance between body and mind.

JACBI.name: Bentwood Inn
JACBI.description: Just outside of Jackson Hole, Wyoming, Bentwood Inn welcomes guests to a hotel as scenic as its surroundings. No matter the season, explore the West’s natural wonders from this charming home base. The reclaimed logs from Yellowstone National Park recall the past and set the scene for a hotel focused on local conservation and sustainability. The rustic guestrooms offer modern comforts with touches of artisan décor and Western antiques. Pack your lunch and spend a day in Grand Tetons National Park or Yellowstone National Park. At a glance: - Savor a four-course seasonal dinner at the Bentwood Bistro - Meet the concierge to schedule outdoor activities such as hiking, skiing, fishing, dog sledding, and horseback riding - Hop on a complimentary bike for some fresh air - Take your breakfast in the Great Room, or if the weather is pleasant, enjoy your coffee on the back porch - Borrow a book from the hotel’s library to learn about the indigenous people of the Wind River Indian Reservation

BZEBL.name: Blancaneaux Lodge
BZEBL.address_raw: Mountain Pine Ridge Reserve, Cayo District
BZEBL.description: On the banks of Privassion Creek, set among tropical pines, oaks, palmetto, craboo, and ancient melastome shrubs, this Coppola Family Hideaway was once an exclusive family retreat before it opened to the public in 1993. Explore the ancient civilization of the Maya in this remote mountain setting and enjoy luxurious thatched roof accommodations with rich Guatemalan décor, hidden within the dense foliage of the Mountain Pine Ridge Reserve beneath a jungle canopy where waterfalls tumble into turquoise pools. Other highlights of the resort include: - 20 cabañas and spacious villas include luxury cabañas that offer private plunge pools, open-air living rooms, and full kitchens - The Francis Ford Coppola Villa, where the film director spent many days writing and reading quietly, is the resort’s crown jewel - Treatments, wraps, and massages at Waterfall Spa are performed by staff trained in ancient techniques at the Sacred Wat Pho Temple in Bangkok - The lodge’s freshwater infinity pool, crystal streams, swimming holes, and waterfalls of Privassion Creek provide excellent options for a refreshing swim Explore the area’s natural beauty on horseback or by foot with expert guides who will lead you through the jungle-clad hills of Elijio Panti National Park, along trails overlooking the creek and waterfalls, on sunrise birdwatching expeditions, and on a unique orchid trek, hunting approximately 150 orchid species found in a 10-mile radius of the lodge in the Mountain Pine Ridge. Take home a piece of living culture—local crafts of Belize and the Maya region of Mesoamerica, including hand-painted wooden masks and one-of-a-kind hand-embroidered huipils produced by local residents supported by the lodge and the Coppola family.

IBZCL.name: Can Lluc Boutique Country Hotel & Villas
IBZCL.address_raw: Ctra. Sant Rafel a Santa Agnès km 2, Ibiza
IBZCL.description: The family-owned Can Lluc Boutique Country Hotel & Villas is a special destination that is rooted in heritage yet enhanced by modern comforts. Set in a more than 200-year-old country house once inhabited by the owner’s grandfather, the exclusive retreat provides an authentic way to experience Ibiza, away from the tourist traps and electric parties. The welcoming spirit of the estate will leave guests feeling right at home with boutique-style guestrooms and private villas. Surrounded by rolling hills and Mediterranean gardens filled with ancient olive trees, the picturesque setting is complemented by an infinity swimming pool, wellness treatments, regional cuisine, and more.

MILSE.name: Starhotels E.c.ho.
MILSE.description: In the heart of the Porta Nuova neighborhood of Milan, the family-friendly Starhotels E.c.ho. welcomes visitors from all over the world to embrace sustainability in action. The hotel’s dedication to the planet and the Centrale District impresses with responsible materials, complex composting, tap water filtration, and sourcing low-carbon amenities. After a day of exploring the fashion capital of Italy, return home to an organic meal and goose-down Starbeds. Meet with the concierge to tour Milan’s highlights or book travel from the rail station just outside. At a glance: - Savor meals prepared with “slow food” delicacies in a zero-waste kitchen - Exercise with a panoramic view of Milan in the fitness center - Lounge on the patio with a warm cup of coffee or a refreshing aperitif - Borrow a bike or scooter to check out the Porta Nuova neighborhood - Enjoy sweeping city views from your private balcony

GROTP.name: Talaia Plaza EcoResort
GROTP.address_raw: Carretera Platja de Sa Riera, S/N, Begur
GROTP.description: Perched on a hillside overlooking the dreamy Mediterranean Sea, Talaia Plaza EcoResort marries local culture and elevated amenities for an unforgettable stay. Wander among the pines to dip in the pool or meet your companions for an al fresco meal. Sleep in at the lodges or in a grand camping tent with modern perks and sleek Spanish décor. The resort’s dedication to conservation is evident from the food preparation to the products available in each guestroom. Prepare to fall in love with all the activity of the Catalonian coast, just north of Barcelona. At a glance: - Treat yourself to an outdoor yoga class or a therapeutic massage - Savor fresh fish and paellas while gazing at the blue sea in the distance - Head to the beach for snorkeling, kayaking, and other water sports - Join a guided tour to learn about native plants and animals on the Spanish coast - Shake up a new recipe at a cocktail class in the nearby village

YYJPA.name: The Parkside Hotel & Spa
YYJPA.description: The Parkside Hotel & Spa, an unexpected green getaway centrally located in downtown Victoria, surprises and delights. Enter through the open atrium, bathed in natural light, and find a koi pond and a warm welcome from the attentive staff. Each well-appointed suite intertwines luxury and sustainability with the comforts of home. Step outside the hotel to explore beautiful downtown Victoria following a Family Fun map or Adult Tasting map, available at the front desk, or hop on a complimentary bike with a Happy Trails map to cruise the network of paths around the city. At a Glance: - Treat yourself to a facial or full-body massage at the carbon-positive spa - Roast a marshmallow at one of the firepits in the rooftop garden - Swim laps at the pool or get your sweat on at the gym - Sip one of the three essential beverages: espresso, ale, or wine at Tre Fantastico

SNARL.name: The Ranch at Laguna Beach
SNARL.description: Set in the stunning Aliso Canyon just minutes from the coastal village of Laguna Beach, The Ranch at Laguna Beach offers guests a blend of natural beauty and classic California style. Across 87 acres of unique coastal California landscape with quite spots for relaxation and reflection, The Ranch immerses travelers into the SoCal lifestyle with luxury accommodations, farm-to-table cuisine, a full-service spa, an array of amenities and activities, and even a biodynamic farm. Highlights of The Ranch include: - 97 cottage-inspired accommodations with stunning natural views - A 9-hole golf course designed for maximum sustainability - A large heated outdoor pool with poolside bar offering drinks and snacks - Dining options include a gourmet restaurant serving farm-fresh cuisine and more - An indulgent spa offering treatments ranging from facials to cryo skin therapy

MXWTC.name: Three Camel Lodge
MXWTC.description: Admire the spectacular peaks of the Gobi Altai Mountains and embrace an earth-friendly lifestyle at Three Camel Lodge in South Gobi, Mongolia. Visit the famous Flaming Cliffs or spend time with a local herding family to see the natural beauty and culture of the remote region. Sleep each night in a ger (also known as a yurt) with luxurious upgrades and intricate, hand-carved furniture. Taste Mongolian delicacies prepared with fresh ingredients sourced from local nomadic families while feasting your eyes on the sweeping views. At a Glance: - Hike or drive through Yol Valley National Park to see petroglyphs and wild ibex - Sip whiskey from all over the world at the thirsty Camel Bar - Hop into the saddle to ride the expansive Gobi Desert on horseback - Delight in traditional music and dance performances by the students of the Gobi Hanhongor School - Stay up late for an unbeatable view of the stars - Gather in Dino Hall to play a Mongolian game or relax with a good book - Rejuvenate at the spa with a deep tissue massage or a body wrap - Catch a movie in the private screening room

PLJTI.name: Turtle Inn
PLJTI.description: Tucked in the quiet beach town of Placencia, Turtle Inn is the ultimate waterfront destination in Belize. The location is perfect for jungle adventures and exploring the largest barrier reef in the Western Hemisphere. This Family Coppola Hideaway emphasizes sustainability and elevates the Caribbean experience. The guest cottages and bungalows dot the idyllic shoreline, offering privacy, luxury, and a memorable view of the cerulean waters. With an array of bars and restaurants, as well as a spa, two infinity pools, and a host of water activities, Turtle Inn delivers the best of Belize. At a Glance: - Dine on seafood and Italian favorites at Mare Restaurant - Indulge in a Thai massage in the open-air spa - Sip a cocktail at the beach bar with your toes in the sand - Snorkel or scuba the nearby reef to see marine life, including sharks and turtles - Cool off with a scoop at the Kid’s Gelato Bar - Indulge in a vintage selection from the wine cellar containing over 1,200 selections - Lend a hand at one of the cleanups or tree plantings hosted by the hotel

LGABM.name: Bear Mountain Inn
LGABM.description: Situated at the base of Bear Mountain and overlooking the shores of Hessian Lake, the historic Bear Mountain Inn, is the centerpiece of a unique park system that stretches from the edge of New York City through the Hudson Valley. As one of the earliest rustic-style lodges built to take advantage of a natural setting, Bear Mountain Inn is a fabulous contemporary of the great National Park lodges. Guests of the Inn can: - Discover the historic Bear Mountain Inn and Overlook Lodge, a 1915 stone-built structure overlooking Hessian Lake - Dine on excellent dishes with a side of panoramic views and fine hospitality at Restaurant 1915 - Spend a day hiking the area's winding wooded trails with exceptional vistas and vantage points - Immerse yourself in local area activities like boating, fishing, and visiting nearby galleries and art shops - See the great stone arches of this rustic-style lodge and its accompanying traditional stone cottages

SAVBL.name: Bellwether House
SAVBL.description: Along a quiet street shaded by old trees dripping in Spanish Moss, Bellwether House and its 16 gracious and unique hotel rooms sits regally amid the historic grandeur, iconic architecture, and fascinating attractions and activities of Savannah, Georgia. Housed in the more than 160-year-old preserved mansion, Bellwether House bed and breakfast hotel offers a new take on this classic form of hospitality. Guests of Bellwether House can: - Rest in light-filled accommodations bosting high ceilings and truly unique, historic layouts - Enjoy breakfast each morning, daily afternoon high tea, and evening champagne toasts - Relax at the Greenhouse Spa and indulge in a signature facial, massage, or reiki treatment - Take part in complimentary morning yoga on the patio to start your day off right - Explore the surrounding peaceful neighborhoods and lush tree-lined squares A blend of luxury hotel amenities with the intimacy and unique qualities of a bed and breakfast, Bellwether House offers travelers a stay replete with everything you could want in a five-star stay, including the longest contiguous porch in the city’s Historic District.

MSYBH.name: Bienville House
MSYBH.description: True southern hospitality meets French Quarter mystique at Bienville House in New Orleans. The intimate lobby, with its hand-painted murals and French furnishings, is just a taste of what is to come. Guestrooms feature wrought-iron balconies and modern conveniences mixed with sumptuous Old World style reminiscent of its storied history as an 18th-century warehouse and summer residence for visiting nobles. It is a perfect base to stay and play as you wander along the banks of the Mississippi, ride a streetcar through the city, or indulge in Cajun cuisine. - The hotel’s 80 refined guestrooms and suites feature plush beds, Italian linens, and white Carrara marble bathrooms; suites have separate living areas - Swim in the heated, outdoor saltwater pool in the beautiful flagstone courtyard - Enjoy a prime location in the lively French Quarter, famed for nightlife and dining - Feel like you’re in a French manor with elegant Old World style and décor - Dine at Latitude 29, renowned for original cocktails and Tiki-inspired cuisine - Walk to Bourbon Street, Woldenberg Park on the Mississippi River, and historic Jackson Square Step outside to explore the French Quarter, where Royal Street antique shops sit alongside late-night jazz clubs, and voodoo shops compete for attention with the city’s 40 museums. With its bold, boutique style and elaborate furnishings, Bienville House embodies the essence of elegant French charm in the center of the city.

LITCH.name: Capital Hotel
LITCH.description: Considered 'the front porch of Little Rock,' the historic Capital Hotel has been a beacon to Southern culture since it first opened its doors in 1870. Originally famous for having a newfangled invention called electricity and an elevator large enough to fit a horse, this downtown Little Rock hotel has reinvented itself continuously over the last 140 years to maintain the highest standards of modern comfort. Its 94 spacious guestrooms, including four suites, are the quintessential home-away-from-home, with fresh flowers brightening every room, custom-designed mattresses to ensure a good night’s rest and spectacular views of downtown through expansive floor-to-ceiling windows. Experience a treasured classic among Little Rock Arkansas hotels, where contemporary sophistication is touched with old-world charm. With exquisitely styled guestrooms, two restaurants, and five state-of-the-art meeting rooms, the historic Capital Hotel is noted among luxury Little Rock hotels for its traditional Southern hospitality and quiet sense of grace. The hotel's unusually large elevator is rumored to have been created to convey President Grant and his horse to his room. Original Property Opened: 1873 111 West Markham Street (corner of W Markham St and S Louisiana Street) Little Rock, AR 72201

LNSCF.name: Cork Factory Hotel
LNSCF.description: A visit to Lancaster County feels like an adult version of a field trip – but better. As its name implies, Cork Factory Hotel is a converted cork factory, and in its heyday it was the world’s largest cork supplier. That is, until bottle caps came around. Although the cork caps are long gone, the towering silo, industrial-style windows, and exposed brick motifs pay homage to the hotel’s history (we have a feeling Chip and Joanna Gaines would love this hotel). And of course you can’t leave without a visit to Amish Country (AKA Pennsylvania Dutch Country). Rolling green hills, farmland, and the occasional horse and buggy will transport you to another time entirely. Leave plenty of room in your suitcase for souvenirs because the Amish are famous for their homemade marmalades, handcrafted woodwork, and hand-sewn quilts that can sometimes take thousands of hours to make. Oh, and be sure to try the baked goods before you leave - you can’t go wrong with a chocolate whoopie pie. - Grab breakfast at The Baker’s Table - they have the best Penn-Dutch pastries that we’re still dreaming of to this day - With a plethora of local vineyards and microbreweries nearby—well—we’re glad we’re not Amish - Lancaster is home to America’s oldest farmer’s market where we snagged some artisanal jams and teas to remember our visit - Broadway in the Quaker state? The plays at the Fulton Theatre are worthy of a standing ovation

CHSFL.name: Fulton Lane Inn
CHSFL.description: A hidden gem, secluded and quiet, just steps from the energy and excitement of Charleston’s King Street, the historic Fulton Lane Inn offers all the natural beauty, graciousness, and charm of the Lowcountry. The building was first built in 1889 for the YMCA, then expanded in 1992 to include the three-story yellow brick building next door, and finally transformed into a one-of-a-kind destination for discerning travelers who want to explore the history, cuisine, and culture of the Holy City. Accommodations include: - 45 luxuriously appointed guestrooms and suites, providing a comfortable place to rest – some offering a cozy seating area with a fireplace - Complimentary breakfast delivered daily - A nightly wine and cheese reception - Innovative dishes and handcrafted cocktails at delightful restaurants tucked into the charming alleyways, including nearby Hutson Alley at 39 John Street On a stroll through Charleston’s historic district, look for the distinctive houses unique to the city that seem to sit sideways, designed to make the best use of small lots and to take full advantage of the cooling southerly winds in hot summers.

ABEGC.name: Glasbern
ABEGC.description: Glasbern Country Inn is a historic inn and restaurant, located in Lehigh Valley. This cozy, but luxurious Pennsylvania country inn offers guests peace and seclusion on a 130-acre, 19th-century farm. Glasbern was originally founded in 1787 with the original plot of land, and the first structure, the spring house, was built as early as 1870. Today, many of the original historic buildings remain, having been thoughtfully and meticulously restored and renovated. Guests relax in the spa, take a dip in the outdoor heated swimming pool, or dine on authentic farm-to-table cuisine. Glasbern Country Inn mixes rustic charm with modern amenities for a stay that is both relaxing and fulfilling. This charming Lehigh Valley inn is ideal for romantic getaways, memorable times with family and friends, and weddings and business meetings in the event and banquet rooms. Glasbern is Old English for “glass barn.” The property was so named after the owners realized that the south side of the main barn was one made mostly of glass. Original Property Opened: 1870 Contact Information: Street Address: 2141 Packhouse Road Fogelsville, PA 18051

CHSJR.name: John Rutledge House Inn
CHSJR.description: A National Historic Landmark, the John Rutledge House Inn was built in 1763 by John Rutledge, a noted signer of the U.S. Constitution, Governor of South Carolina, and briefly, Chief Justice of the Supreme Court. The historic inn incorporates two carriage houses plus the distinctive home. Restoration has enhanced the graceful ironwork and original elaborate interiors, which include carved Italian marble fireplaces and inlaid floors. The John Rutledge House Inn is one of only 15 homes of signers of the Constitution that stand to this day.

CHSKC.name: Kings Courtyard Inn
CHSKC.description: Charleston’s antebellum hotel, Kings Courtyard Inn, is designed in the Greek Revival style with unusual Egyptian accents. Built in 1853, it is one of King Street’s oldest historic buildings and has served many roles in its 150-year history, from housing popular shops, to a private residence and an inn catering to plantation owners and merchants. Now restored with attention to historical and architectural accuracy, each guestroom is furnished with early 19th Century reproductions, high ceilings and Oriental rugs over original hardwood floors. Some of the historic inn’s rooms circle two inner courtyards and a rear garden. The hotel's King Street location places it within easy walking distance of Charleston’s historic homes, gardens, churches and a multitude of galleries shops, and restaurants. Original Build Date: 1853 Contact Information: Street Address: 198 King Street Charleston, SC 29401

PWMPR.name: Portland Regency Hotel & Spa
PWMPR.description: Historic beauty blends perfectly with modern amenities at this quaint boutique hotel in the heart of Portland, Maine. Portland Regency Hotel & Spa has charmed guests since opening its doors over 30 years ago with its tree-lined entrance, warm decor, and thoughtful details throughout. Tucked right in the center of the downtown Old Port neighborhood, visitors will be just moments from the waterfront and within walking distance of many of Portland’s top attractions. Come see why guests have a hard time leaving and how it earned the distinction of one of the best The Best Maine Escape by Travel Channel. - Ideally located in downtown Portland — a quaint and lively neighborhood known for its artistic and cultural atmosphere - Retreat back to beautifully designed boutique guestrooms and suites, each equipped with plush furnishings and luxurious amenities - Explore the surrounding area to find top attractions such as the Victoria Mansion, the Portland Symphony Orchestra, and the Portland Museum of Art - Grab a delicious American-New England meal at the hotel’s signature restaurant after you’ve relaxed with a classic cocktail and appetizer from the bar and lounge - After a day exploring the city, unwind in the steam room and sauna or work up a sweat at the on-site fitness center with the latest in cardiovascular machines and strength-training equipment - Pamper yourself at the full-service spa and choose from large a menu of treatments to indulge in

MSPSJ.name: St. James Hotel MN
MSPSJ.description: Built in 1875, the St. James Hotel is a historic Minnesota landmark, boasting 62 rooms and suites, each named after a 19th century riverboats that tinkered about the Mississippi. The original hotel was built by city business leaders in the 1870s to accommodate the influx of business being done in the town of Red Wing. With no two rooms alike, accommodations at the St. James Hotel are evocative with the addition of modern conveniences and luxuries to leave you feeling pampered and at home. While at the St. James Hotel MN you can: - Relax and rest in exquisitely designed, individually decorated Victorian-style guest rooms - Take in spectacular view of the Mississippi River and downtown Red Wing - Dine at two restaurants offering casual meals with dishes for every taste - Explore the charming town of Red Wing with its dining, entertainment, and outdoor activities Perfect for every type of traveler from couple seeking a romantic getaway to business travelers, wedding parties, and families, the St. James Hotel MN proudly welcomes guests with personalized and detailed service in a truly immersive atmosphere.

MDTLV.name: The Inn at Leola Village Est. 1867
MDTLV.description: Nestled in the heart of Pennsylvania's Dutch Country, The Inn at Leola Village, Est. 1867, is an idyllic destination for business travel, a leisurely weekend, group outings, or a romantic escape. This historic hotel offers two on-site restaurants, a full service spa and salon, first class service, and a collection of unique shops and galleries. For those in town on business, The Inn at Leola Village, Est. 1867 is located near Greenfield Corporate Center, Case New Hollad, Bosch, and numerous other corporations. For others, Pennsylvania's Dutch Country offers Amish quilt shops, horse-and-buggy rides, world-class antique shops, and plenty of museums.

BTVMI.name: The Middlebury Inn
BTVMI.description: The Middlebury Inn blends modern conveniences with a rich history to present a charming, and elegantly refurbished environment which boasts expansive meeting spaces and attentive service. This delightful Vermont hotel was built in 1827 and operated as a pub for many years. Remnants of that bygone era present themselves in the form of ornate period fixings, the original front desk, high ceilings, and wide hallways. The Middlebury Inn famously integrates the integrity of architectural and historic elements while offering modern comfort and conveniences.

WGOMI.name: The Mimslyn Inn
WGOMI.description: The classic Georgian Revival architecture of the Mimslyn Inn rises gracefully from the rolling hills of the historic Shenandoah Valley. The warmth and charm of this historic property have been welcoming guests since 1931. Today, the Inn is fully renovated and offers 45 guestrooms and suites, a Manor House, historic cottages, and luxury cottage collection. The Mimslyn Inn also provides Shenandoah visitors the finest guest experience with dining establishments, outdoor pools, spa treatments, and much more. The Inn’s accommodations are perfect for events, as well as overnight stays, and it is in close proximity to all of the area’s signature attractions, including Luray Caverns and Shenandoah National Park.

HVNWE.name: Water's Edge Resort and Spa
HVNWE.description: With beautiful landscaped gardens, a private stretch of white-sand beach, and an idyllic beachfront location, Water’s Edge Resort and Spa, overlooking Long Island Sound, is the perfect seaside getaway. Unwind on a chaise lounge in the sun. Enjoy a cocktail at the beach bar. Swim in the seaside pool. Whether you are looking for a romantic retreat, a family vacation, or a relaxing trip to a classic New England location, with six on-site eateries and bars to choose from, a luxurious spa to indulge in, and a range of seaside suites and beachfront villas to call home, Water's Edge Resort and Spa guarantees a memorable stay. - Choose from 120 waterfront accommodations, with guestrooms, suites, and beach cottages around the main hotel, and 20 private villas - Walk among the lush manicured gardens, or go barefoot along the private beach - Plan a memorable event for up to 300 people in one of the 12 meeting rooms or three ballrooms - Go paddle-boarding in the gentle waves, or try your hand at windsurfing - Book a sea salt and citrus body scrub at The Spa at Water’s Edge - Challenge the family or fellow guests to a tennis tournament on the on-site courts Water's Edge Resort and Spa is the quintessential New England resort, offering you a unique and laid-back experience that characterizes the outdoorsy spirit of coastal Connecticut. Relax on the private beach and admire the view, play a competitive game of tennis with a backdrop that features lush trees, and reward yourself with the resort’s legendary Sunday Brunch, which features classic seaside fare, as well as new twists. View Water's Edge Resort and Spa's cleanliness policy.

AAHPQ.name: Parkhotel Quellenhof Aachen
AAHPQ.description: Set amid one of Europe’s oldest cities, Parkhotel Quellenhof Aachen harnesses its surrounding historic and cultural heritage in preserving its ornate exterior, while also embracing the power of modern hospitality and comfort through its offerings of sleek, streamlined, and neutrally-decorated interiors and accommodations. Welcoming travelers into an atmosphere infused with subtle Asian influences that reflect a genuine warmth, the hotel offers a suite of amenities and highlights including: Beautifully appointed and warm guest rooms and suites offering an inviting atmosphere Modern and regionally-inspired dishes at the hotel's Bistro with outdoor terrace and bar Creative cocktails and more refreshing drinks at the welcoming Elephant Bar A serene and soothing spa with treatments to help unwind, relax, and refresh When not taking full advantage of everything Parkhotel Quellenhof Aachen has to offer, set out to explore the city known for being the setting of the crowning of the first Holy Roman Emperor, Charlemagne, and the 31 other Kings of the Germans that followed him. Take a morning or afternoon to walk the surrounding neighborhood. Admire and experience its impressive cathedral, spa gardens, historic town hall, and more.

LONTB.name: The Bentley London
LONTB.description: In a leafy corner of Kensington in a building dating from 1880, The Bentley London delivers an inviting mix of tranquility and indulgence. Crystal chandeliers hang high in the marbled foyer and set the tone for the rest of the hotel, where you will find silk wallpaper, polished woods, and deeply comfortable furnishings, all helping to create a premier, stately experience. The decadence continues in the marbled Le Kalon Spa with its unique treatments, and in the Louis XV-inspired award-winning Peridot brasserie. If you are looking to explore London’s best shops or finest cultural attractions, The Bentley London is in one of the most fashionable parts of the capital. - Enjoy a sense of grandeur and opulence in one of 64 beautiful and spacious guestrooms and suites - Let off steam in the traditional Turkish hammam, and enjoy Karin Herzog products in the spa - Sip amazing cocktails in the Malachite cocktail bar, including its signature Malachite Martini - Book a party in the magnificent 1880 Room, one of four eye-catching event spaces - Get tailored recommendations from the reputable concierge team, members of the illustrious Society of Golden Keys The Bentley Hotel London has an exclusive feel, like a best-kept secret, hidden away in this hugely fashionable part of south-west London. Stay here for true five-star treatment and lose yourself in this compelling sanctuary.

ISTAH.name: Ajwa Hotel Sultanahmet
ISTAH.address_raw: Emin Sinan Mahalleshi, Pierloti Caddesi No 30, Istanbul
ISTAH.description: In the heart of Old Istanbul, Ajwa Hotel Sultanahmet incorporates bygone Ottoman splendor with all the comforts of a contemporary five-star hotel. Enter the double-height lobby with its intricately handcrafted furniture and beautiful Persian rugs, and the scene is set for a truly refined and lavish stay. Settle into your spacious guestroom or your impressive suite before dining on authentic Azerbaijani dishes at Zeferan Restaurant, framed by views of the Sea of Marmara. Conveniently located, the hotel places you well within walking distance of the world-famous Grand Bazaar and the historic mosaics of Hagia Sophia. - Indulge in Ottoman luxury at one of 61 intricately styled guestrooms and suites - Behold the incredible craftsmanship of the handmade furniture throughout the hotel - Feast on authentic Azerbaijani cuisine at top-floor Zeferan Restaurant - Try a traditional Turkish hammam at Afiya Spa or swim in the heated indoor pool - Stay in the largest sea-view suite on the Old Istanbul peninsula, The Sultan Suite - Rent one of the hotel’s Bentley limousines to explore the city in ultimate comfort After discovering the cultural and historical delights of Old Istanbul, head back to the hotel to luxuriate in the indoor pool or indulge in a traditional Turkish hammam. Finish off your day in spectacular style with dinner at the top-floor restaurant overlooking the Sea of Marmara.

PRBAV.name: Allegretto Vineyard Resort
PRBAV.description: A crown jewel of the central coast, Allegretto Vineyard Resort offers a taste of Europe in the heart of California wine country. The luxurious estate is set on 20 acres of vineyards amid Mediterranean-style gardens, fruit orchards, and olive groves, welcoming guests with beauty and serenity from the moment of their arrival. Stay in luxe accommodations, many with fireplaces or sprawling terraces overlooking the vineyards, pool, and piazza. The resort also offers several enchanting amenities, including cuisine inspired by recipes from northern Italy, a spa sanctuary with holistic treatments, vineyard tours and wine tasting experiences, plus a wide range of activities to enjoy throughout your stay. Highlights of the resort include: - 171 beautifully appointed guestrooms and suites infused with the spirit of Paso Robles - Service-driven wine tasting room, plus immersive vineyard tours that also feature tastings - Creative dining inspired by the region’s bounty of fresh, farmed, and foraged ingredients - A boutique spa offering a selection of massages and treatments as well as a sauna and hot tub - Swimming pool surrounded by vineyards with seasonal cabana service, plus a fitness center - Activities ranging from sound healing and yoga to art tours, olive oil tastings, and garden walks

VCEAJ.name: Almar Lido Jesolo
VCEAJ.description: Welcoming travelers to one of Italy’s largest beach resorts is Almar Lido Jesolo, a contemporary marvel overlooking the sandy beaches of the country’s northern Adriatic coast. Less than an hour from the canals and ridges of Venice, this pristine contemporary resort offers guests every amenity, including a private beach, spacious rooms with water views, a world-class spa, multiple pools, and an array of dining options set to satisfy even the most discerning of foodies. Guests of Almar Lido Jesolo can: Enjoy a range of light-filled and airy accommodations from sea view rooms to loft suites Indulge in a full-service spa with steam rooms, saunas, and luxurious and restorative treatments Feast at multiple venues on traditional and seasonal wellness-focused Mediterranean food Delight in lounging at the private beach and the 70-meter heated and partially covered pool Take a day trip to Venice to see and experience the famed city’s best sites and attractions A true destination in its own right, Almar Lido Jesolo's attention to detail and dedication to wellness options that go above and beyond the traditional food and spa to include yoga, fitness options, bike rentals, and even customized multi-day programs, are a testament to the hotel’s exclusive focus on guest and traveler satisfaction.

OPOAP.name: Altis Porto Hotel
OPOAP.address_raw: R. Jorge de Viterbo Ferreira, 30, Porto
OPOAP.description: Nestled on a hill along the banks of the Douro River in Porto, Portugal, this contemporary hotel emphasizes beauty, comfort, and wellness within its walls. Each guestroom or suite comes with a yoga mat to promote well-being while views of the city, gardens, or river further promote this ambiance of tranquility. Guests can swim in a rooftop swimming pool, sip cocktails in a lobby bar, indulge in Portuguese cuisine, enjoy treatments or a water circuit at the spa, or squeeze in some group workout classes. Highlights of the hotel include: - 95 guestrooms and suites designed with contemporary style and comfort in mind - An elegant restaurant serving Portuguese cuisine crafted with local, seasonal ingredients - Asian-inspired wellness center offering treatments, sauna, a steam room, and more - Fitness gym with high-end equipment, an array of classes, and personal training - Rooftop bar and swimming pool deck offering views of the Porto skyline

PBIAO.name: Amrit Ocean Resort & Residences – Singer Island
PBIAO.description: Breathe in the ocean air at Amrit Ocean Resort & Residences – Singer Island, a waterfront oasis with a focus on health and wellness. Set on seven acres along the coastline of Palm Beach’s Singer Island, the resort features accommodations that take your well-being into conservation as well as sprawling ocean views, plant-forward restaurants, a tranquil spa, full-service salon, a state-of-the-art fitness center, cooking classes, outdoor activities, and round-the-clock concierge services. Highlights of the resort include: - 155 wellness-inspired guestrooms, suites, and residences with soaking tubs and balconies - Varied dining venues, including plant-forward restaurants, a lobby bar, and grab-and-go market - World-class spa with groundbreaking treatments, plus hydrothermal experiences and more - A state-of-the-art fitness center with a main cardio studio and other spaces for group classes - Private, white sand beach with breezy cabanas and heated rooftop pool with plush daybeds - Active adventures ranging from snorkeling, kayaking, and paddleboarding to fishing

NAPAM.name: Ara Maris
NAPAM.description: A jewel just steps from the Mediterranean Sea in the heart of Italy’s iconic southern city of Sorrento, Ara Maris welcomes guests with contemporary style and an opulent experience enriched with lavish amenities, captivating dining options and an unrivaled location that provides easy access to Naples, Capri, Ischia, and the breathtaking Amalfi Coast. Highlights of the hotel include: - 49 spacious rooms and suites offering enchanting sea views or serene garden vistas - A rooftop cocktail bar and lounge with unparalleled views of the Gulf of Naples - An outdoor pool and solarium with loungers, perfect for a quiet moment of relaxation - Restorative therapies and experiences at the indulgent and restorative Thala Spa - A prime setting near shopping, galleries, historical sites, and natural splendor With an emphasis on refinement and meticulous attention to detail, Ara Maris serves as the perfect gateway to exploring the city of Sorrento and the captivating attractions of the Sorrentine Peninsula. Immerse yourself in the allure of Ara Maris – a haven where modern elegance meets timeless Italian charm.

STOAS.name: At Six
STOAS.description: At Six is more than just a hotel — it’s a stylish, sensual destination where contemporary art, fine dining, and exquisite interior design meet to create a unique space in central Stockholm. Housed in a former Brutalist-style high-rise bank, the chic retreat offers luxurious experiences, including a rooftop entertainment space, an innovative art gallery, avant-garde cuisine, and a wine bar. From the impressive Jaume Plensa Almeria marble figurehead in the lobby to the hotel’s monochrome interiors featuring blackened steel, fine timber, and polished granite, every detail of At Six is designed to treat the senses. Highlights of the hotel include: - 343 contemporary guestrooms, suites, and apartments that treat guests to comfort and style - Experimental restaurant offering a menu with compelling flavor and texture combinations - A vibrant rooftop park that provides entertainment with a 360-degree view of Stockholm - Work out in the 24-hour fitness room or enlist the help of a personal trainer during your stay - Marvel at the curated art collection, including works by Sol LeWitt, Tacita Dean, and more

AXAAU.name: Aurora Anguilla Resort & Golf Club
AXAAU.description: Set on a sandy beach overlooking the Anguilla channel with views of nearby St. Martin, Aurora Anguilla Resort & Golf Club is a Caribbean paradise composed of crystal-clear waters, bright and airy accommodations, and welcoming island hospitality. Highlights of the hotel include: - A beachfront setting with the turquoise waters of Rendezvous Bay as a sparkling backdrop - Multiple food and drink options including a beach bar and elegant fine dining restaurant - An array of accommodation types from Tower Rooms to multi-bedroom private Villas - A 27,000 sq ft spa, Anguilla's only golf courses, fitness center, entertainment complex, and opulent pool - Estate options for guests seeking a longer stay with all the comforts of home At Aurora Anguilla Resort & Golf Club, a Caribbean playground awaits with every amenity and activity that goes along with one of the best resorts in the Lesser Antilles. Enjoy delicious local food, outstanding water sports, lively entertainment, and a welcoming atmosphere so memorable that check-out will seem but a distant dream.

JKTAM.name: AYANA Midplaza Jakarta
JKTAM.description: Explore Indonesia's capital and largest city from a luxurious hotel located in Jakarta's central business district — the AYANA Midplaza Jakarta. This 2018 TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence recipient provides business and leisure travelers alike a window into the colorful world of Indonesian culture, food, and hospitality. At AYANA Midplaza Jakarta, guests can: - Experience a culinary journey around Asia at one of seven bars and restaurants - Host a wedding, meeting, event, or conference in any one of the property's event spaces - Swim in the rooftop pool and work out in the state-of-the-art fitness center - Stay in suites with stunning views, marble bathrooms, and soaking tubs - Play a game of tennis on the open-air courts after sunset when the weather is cool - Treat yourself to Balinese-inspired wellness at the SPA at AYANA For guests who seek a quiet oasis among the urban jungle of Jakarta — whether you're a businessman seeking solace after a long day of meetings or a couple together on a romantic getaway — the hotel's elegantly manicured garden features floating decks and walkways with seating areas nestled among lush trees strung with paper lanterns.

JNPBB.name: Balboa Bay Resort
JNPBB.description: Located on 15 scenic waterfront acres in the heart of Newport Beach, Balboa Bay Resort stands as a premier, year-round destination, embracing its role as the self-proclaimed “Host of the Coast.” With sweeping bayfront views, casual coastal cuisine, a full-service spa, and an array of amenities, the resort curates a refined coastal retreat for every visitor. Enjoy recreation activities on land and sea, from electric Duffy boat rentals and private yacht charters to stand-up paddleboarding and beach cruisers that make every stay memorable. Highlights of the hotel include: - 160 luxurious guestrooms and suites, all with private balconies - Locally sourced tide-to-table cuisine presented in a waterside setting - Elegant pool deck featuring ample opportunities for lounging with private cabanas - A tranquil spa with a selection of signature treatments crafted from the finest ingredients - Explore the yacht-filled harbor on one of the hotel’s electric Duffy or private charter boats

SIRHB.name: BEAUSiTE Zermatt
SIRHB.description: Perched above bustling Zermatt for more than 100 years, BEAUSiTE Zermatt entices guests to enjoy and experience a second Golden Age of Alpinism at this traditional Grand Dame upgraded for the 21st century. Enjoy a blend of Swiss Alpine traditions, regional culinary products, and spa culture at this ultimate European mountain experience. With its beautifully appointed accommodations, prime location in the village, and filling dining options, BEAUSiTE Zermatt is the perfect mountain retreat for exploring Switzerland’s stunning Alpine natural wonders, world-class skiing, and unforgettable views. Highlights of the lodge include: - Refined mountain-style accommodations ranging from single rooms to luxurious suites - Multiple gourmet dining options featuring local cuisine and spirits such as Schnapps - An indulgent spa and wellness facility including saunas, indoor and outdoor pools, and gym - Convenient location within walking distance to Zermatt’s town center and nearby ski lifts

FLRBP.name: Bernini Palace Hotel
FLRBP.description: With a rich history dating back to the 15th century, Hotel Bernini Palace blends Old World charm with contemporary accommodations and amenities in the medieval district of Florence. Enjoy breakfast in evocative Sala Parlamento with its beautiful frescoed ceiling, lounge in the Tuscan-inspired interior of your guestroom, or sample an artisan cocktail in the lively, upscale lounge. As one of the most exclusive hotels in the city, this five-star landmark near the banks of the Arno attracts celebrities, politicians, and discerning travelers from all over the world. - Unwind in one of 74 elegant guestrooms or suites, each individually decorated with vaulted ceilings, four-poster beds, and classic Italian décor - Admire the stunning views of Palazzo Vecchio from the rooftop terrace - Savor Florentine cuisine at La Chiostrina or a signature cocktail at the Lounge Bar - Consult with the Clefs d’Or concierge to plan day trips, wine tastings, and truffle hunting excursions - Walk to landmarks such as Uffizi Gallery, Florence Cathedral, and Ponte Vecchio - Explore Florence’s famed statue of David, Piazzas, galleries, museums, and shops Make the most of your stay in the “cradle of the Renaissance” at Hotel Bernini Palace Hotel in the heart of the former capital of Italy. The 13th-century Palazzo Vecchio, the Ponte Vecchio, and the Duomo — Florence's iconic cathedral — are all within easy walking distance, as are many other cultural sites. The hotel is a beautiful base for any Tuscan stay, capturing the warmth and romance of the surrounding city and countryside.

MUCBG.name: BEYOND by Geisel
MUCBG.description: When planning your first (or next) visit to the Bavarian capital of Munich, make sure to put BEYOND by Geisel firmly on your itinerary. As a multi-award-winning exclusive, boutique hotel offering just 19 luxurious rooms and suites, you’ll be pampered by personalized service, a dazzling location in the heart of the city, and beautifully designed, spacious accommodations as welcoming as they are refined. Guests of BEYOND by Geisel can: Relax in a selection of warmly decorated suites with views of City Hall and St. Peter’s Church Have a glass of merlot or pinot in the hotel’s Wine Lounge with views overlooking Marienplatz Read a book or have a conversation with friends and family in the multi-story Library Step out and immediately start exploring Munich’s beautiful city center A unique concept like no other in the city, BEYOND by Geisel’s dedication to exclusivity, privacy, and an atmosphere of luxurious serenity is ushering in a new style of hospitality where choice and intimacy reign supreme. And, for those seeking an even more private affair, whether that be a wedding, family reunion, or business event, you can reserve the entirety of the hotel as one “Residence,” enjoying all its perks and amenities alongside your closest friends, relatives, and colleagues.

MIATB.name: Biltmore Hotel
MIATB.description: Surround yourself with lavish Mediterranean-inspired architecture and the East Coast’s largest hotel pool at Biltmore Hotel, where Old Florida charm blends with contemporary luxury hospitality. Built in and set on 150 acres of lush tropical landscape crowned by a restored Donald Ross 18-hole golf course, each of the hotel’s 271 rooms are designed and decorated to provide you a holiday as elegant as the architecture and amenities. Guests of Biltmore Hotel can: Relax in spacious and well-appointed rooms in a variety of categories, including suites Spend a day in the sun by the impressively large hotel pool with tropical drink in hand Play a round of golf at a 71-par championship course with lush natural elements Experience fine dining or have your fill of comfort food at seven restaurants and bars Treat yourself to a revitalizing spa day with personalized healing services At Biltmore Hotel, not only will you experience luxurious amenities and beautiful rooms, you’ll also feel like you’ve stepped back in time to the roaring 20s when gangsters made Miami their winter home because it was at the resort on March 7, 1929, Gangster Thomas J. “Fatty” Walsh was shot dead in the hotel’s 13th-floor tower suite, with speculation that the mob pulled off the hit. And, while the mob life has left the hotel for good, the tower suite remains, ready to welcome intrepid travelers with a taste for history.

CHOBH.name: Boar’s Head Resort and Birdwood Mansion
CHOBH.description: Stay and play at this Charlottesville retreat, which offers ample activities to delight solo travelers, couples, families, and business travelers. Elegant accommodations range from classic guestrooms to suites and standalone cottages while various dining venues serve fresh fare to fuel your adventures. Relax at the spa or stay active on the golf courses, at The Sports Club, or with thrilling adventures in the great outdoors. Nestled at the foot of the Blue Ridge Mountains, natural beauty abounds, from mountain views to walking paths that showcase the region’s forests, lakes, and wetlands. Highlights of the hotel include: - 168 guestrooms, suites, and cottages offering timeless charm and modern amenities - Seasonal Southern cuisine that places an emphasis on regional ingredients - Inviting spa with massages, a heated outdoor pool, steam room, and relaxation areas - A sports club offering tennis, basketball, rock climbing, aquatics, fitness classes, and a gym - Birdwood Golf facility, with 18-hole championship and 6-hole approach courses - Adventurous activities, including kayaking, falconry, ax throwing, geocaching, cycling, and more

PVRBP.name: BON Hotel at VidantaWorld Nuevo Nayarit
PVRBP.address_raw: Av. Paseo de las Moras S/N, Nuevo Vallarta
PVRBP.description: Located within a luxurious resort complex on the Mexican coastline that is open only to hotel guests and club members, BON Hotel at VidantaWorld Nuevo Nayarit pairs exclusivity with entertainment near the Pacific Ocean. Your visit will be unparalleled. Soak up the sun on a private beach, rest and rejuvenate with serene spa treatments, stay active in the fitness centers, or lounge by a different pool every day. Many different dining venues await so that your day-to-day experience can be different throughout your stay. The resort is also home to multiple golf courses, luxe shops, and a forthcoming theme park. Highlights of the hotel include: - 79 stylish lofts and suites decorated in ocean-inspired blues and grays - Dining ranging from international and Mediterranean dishes to casual poolside bites - Three premier golf courses, plus a driving range, golf academy, simulator, and more - An array of swimming pools, spas, fully equipped fitness centers, and a beauty salon - Thrilling theme park connected to the hotel, opening in 2026 - Experiences including themed nights, boutique shopping, pool lounging, and tequila tastings

BKIBE.name: Borneo Eagle Resort
BKIBE.description: Arrive at Borneo Eagle Resort, settle into your secluded white-sand beach villa overlooking the South China Sea, and release your cares to the wind. Each of the 13 villas is well-appointed with minimalist style but maximum approach to meeting your needs. This unique destination off the coast of Malaysia offers exploration and adventure at its front doors or a restful experience on the island as a whole. Explore the coral reefs teeming with sea life or choose to be pampered in the comfort of your own room. - Find romance, restoration, and rejuvenation on this private island in the South China Sea - Accommodations are simple and beautifully appointed, catering to your everyday needs, with a complimentary minibar, Nespresso machine, and Bose home theater system - Spa therapists offer facial and body treatments within the comfort of your villa - Remain active during your stay with state-of-the-art cardio machines and personal Pilates and yoga trainers - Soak in the beautiful details of this secluded island resort and indulge in the simplicity of architecture and nature

LYSBH.name: Boscolo Hotel Lyon & Spa
LYSBH.description: Plan a stay in this stately heritage building in the heart of Lyon, where sophisticated spaces beckon travelers for a timeless stay that blends history with refined luxury. Built in the 1890s, this long-standing hotel has witnessed key historical moments, including a meeting between Martin Luther King Jr. and local activists in the 1960s. It has since been meticulously restored with contemporary touches and features bright accommodations, a stylish bar, gourmet Italian restaurant, spa and wellness area, indoor pool, and other thoughtful interiors that embrace comfort. Highlights of the hotel include: - 132 chic guestrooms and suites full of character, with bold artwork and gold accents - Contemporary Italian-inspired restaurant with dishes featuring seasonal, quality ingredients - A serene wellness sanctuary inspired by Roman thermal baths with vaulted stone walls - A 24-hour fitness room with ellipticals, stationary bikes, treadmills, and an array of weights - Amenities for families, ranging from cribs and babysitting services to puzzles and board games

NPTBH.name: Brenton Hotel
NPTBH.description: Brenton Hotel in Newport, Rhode Island, is the town's first new-build hotel in nearly 30 years. Just across the street from the harbor marina and its population of sailboats, yachts, and sloops, entering the Brenton Hotel is like taking a step back in time to an era when ships and sailing were integral to the city's economy and culture. While at Brenton Hotel, guests cannot only explore the quaint historic town and its Gilded Age mansions, you're invited to: - Indulge in luxurious rooms with stunning views of Narragansett Bay and Newport Harbor - Golf like a pro with preferred access to Newport National Golf Club - Let the concierge order an in-room spa treatment or make reservations for a traditional day spa - Dine on locally sourced seafood and produce at the refined Living Room restaurant and bar Presiding over the corner of America's Cup Avenue and Long Wharf Street, this ultra-modern building was designed with Newport's history of grand architecture in mind. Taking cues from local landmarks like the 18th century Old Colony House and the 19th century Opera House, the hotel's style is a mélange of the contemporary and historic: huge floor-to-ceiling windows take up a majority of the façade are punctuated by nautical elements familiar to East Coasters like mullioned windows, white trim, and balconies echoing the idiosyncratic widow's walks of eras past. Shiplap adorns the hotel's rounded entry tower, evocative of Cape Cod lighthouses and New England clapboard-sided homes, adding one more nautical touch to take you back to the world of colonial merchant ships, pirates, mansions, and yacht races.

BKIBR.name: Bungaraya Island Resort
BKIBR.address_raw: Polish Bay, Gaya Island, Kota Kinabalu
BKIBR.description: Created by local craftsmen on the gently sloping hillside, the timbered villas at Bungaraya Island Resort overlook a coral reef island teeming with aquatic life. This boutique resort reveals the true unspoiled natural beauty of Malaysia but keeps luxury at its heart. Indulge in the warm waters of a private bay, pamper yourself with treatments at the indigenous spa, and experience decadent waterfront dining after a day of exploring your island hideaway. - Scuba dive or snorkel to unearth the secrets of the coral reef - Retreat to a spacious villa with a private balcony and a plunge pool - Indulge in luxurious treatments using indigenous plants at The Echo Wellness Spa - Explore the jungle from above with an exhilarating zip line through the rainforest - Dine along the South China Sea in the hotel’s private and romantic beachside pavilion Bungaraya Island Resort is a place for special moments, unexpected experiences, and memories of a lifetime. For the ultimate romantic evening, book the beachside pavilion for an intimate dinner under the stars. Arrange a private sunset cruise, follow the trails into the heart of the Malaysian jungle, or just relax to the sound of the lapping waves.

INNBV.name: Burg Vital Resort
INNBV.description: Set amid beautiful flower meadows on a plateau in the Austrian Alps, Burg Vital Resort is an idyllic chalet-style retreat with a focus is on fitness, wellness, and mountain adventures. Near the picturesque village of Lech, this luxury hotel puts you in the heart of the surrounding wilderness: set off for a day’s skiing, snowshoeing, or hiking amid the majestic peaks and mountain streams, and then unwind with an Ayurvedic or Far East-inspired treatment at the opulent, three-level Vital Spa. In the evening, sip a rare vintage at Wine Cellar or dine on refined European dishes at one of the hotel's Gault Millau-recognized restaurants. - Experience world-class health and beauty treatments at the award-winning Vital Spa, with saunas, steam baths, solarium, and heated pools - Relax in one of 62 luxurious guestrooms rooms and suites with natural wood floors; some have open fireplaces, cockle stoves, or saunas - Listen to live music and sip herbal cocktails by a blazing log fire at the Chimney Bar - Savor seasonal local produce cooked with classical flair at flagship restaurant Griggeler Stuba, created by executive chef Sebastian Jakob - Work out at the state-of-the-art fitness center, play indoor golf, and swim in the indoor and outdoor pools (seasonal) - Unwind in total seclusion at the Private Spa Suite, with a steam bath, bio-sauna, flotation tub, and complimentary fruit and drinks - Go on a guided Nordic walking tour or guided mountain bike tour Burg Vital Resort offers the perfect balance of indoor spa treatments and outdoor adventures. In summer, expert hiking and Nordic walking guides will lead you to forests, lakes, and Alpine peaks. In winter, explore 190 mi / 305 km of ski runs, as well as freestyle and snowboarding parks. You can even hire ski equipment from the resort. The youth room has billiards and darts, and childcare is available when you want some private time. The hotel also has meeting and event space for up to 220 people — it’s an impressive site for your next meeting or event.

TOSCD.name: Cala del Porto Punta Ala
TOSCD.address_raw: Via Cala del Pozzo snc, Castiglione Della Pescaia
TOSCD.description: Warm sunshine and sea breezes welcome guests to this Italian hotel, which is mere steps away from the Punta Ala marina. Relax and embrace a slow pace of living at Cala del Porto Punta Ala, providing luxury on the Tuscan coastline with sophisticated accommodations and several dining options. Unique gemology treatments are available, combining skin care with the healing elements of gemstones, while guests can also lounge by the pool, exercise in the fitness center or with a yoga workshop, or enjoy outdoor activities in the surrounding area. Highlights of the hotel include: - 41 historic guestrooms and suites, many with private terraces and sea views - An all-day dining venue offering Italian fare, plus an inventive bar and poolside terrace - Luxurious gemology beautique offering modern skin care services using precious gemstones - Outdoor swimming pool overlooking the Tyrrhenian Sea and a fitness center with yoga classes - Partnerships with local businesses to provide golf play, wine tours, boat excursions, and more Carlo Ponti, an Italian film producer, originally helped develop Cala del Porto Punta Ala, which opened in the 1970s. His wife, actress Sophia Loren, was the face of the hotel for years, drawing in an array of movie stars ever since.

ECPCC.name: Camp Creek® Inn
ECPCC.description: Surrounded by native forest of oak, pine, and cypress, Camp Creek® Inn is a Gulf Coast resort where natural beauty, stunning beaches, and an array of activities and experiences combine to create a perfect Florida panhandle stay. Relax in the sight of native wildlife, enjoy a few rounds of your favorite game, sunbathe and swim in pools and beaches, and leave your cares behind at this Louisiana French Creole-inspired escape. Highlights of the Inn include: - 75 accommodations ranging from rooms with balconies to extra-spacious suites - Three restaurants including a poolside smokehouse offering Southern barbecue - A beach club with two oceanfront pools and 1,000 feet of soft, white-sand beach - Two golf courses offering challenging designs and beautiful landscaping - A wellness center, pickleball court, tennis court, basketball court, and sports field

PMICB.name: Can Bordoy Grand House & Garden
PMICB.address_raw: Forn de la Gloria 14, Palma de Mallorca
PMICB.description: A one-of-a-kind escape in Palma de Mallorca, Spain, the Can Bordoy Grand House & Garden is a secluded, all-suite oasis that takes you away from the crowds. Built around a private garden and sparkling pool, the property is peaceful and serene, the perfect place to unplug and unwind. Situated in the Old Quarter, the contemporary space melds with Old World charm, bringing art, architecture, and modern design to the forefront. Explore the manicured, shady paths and discover delights and surprises around every corner. Rooms even have botanical touches, bringing the outside in and creating a truly enchanting mood. - The hotel's experienced staff can arrange for activities year-round - Check-ins are done in one of the hotel's living rooms or directly in one of 24 suites, so you can settle in immediately - Bring along your four-legged friends; the hotel is pet-friendly - Personal butler service is available, making every stay feel like a true escape from the everyday - Plaza Mayor and Palma Port are just a short walk away Many of Mallorca's most popular destinations are just minutes away, but Can Bordoy's tranquil grounds make it feel worlds away from the crowds. Each room has its own parlor, though you may find the hotel's library and fireplace just as welcoming.

CTGCG.name: Capellan de Getsemani
CTGCG.address_raw: Calle de la Sierpe Sector Getsemani Cra 9 No. 29-52, Cartagena de Indias
CTGCG.description: Just beyond its beautiful Spanish Colonial exterior, guests of Capellan de Getsemani will find a contemporary hotel offering unparalleled service in the heart of Cartagena's historic Getsemani neighborhood. Perfectly positioned to cater to the needs of both business and pleasure travelers with easy access to all the city’s best sites (just a five-minute walk from the walled city), this hotel makes visiting Colombia’s Caribbean coast easy, comfortable, and stylish. Guests of Capellan de Getsemani can: Rest in spacious accommodations boasting colonial details and contemporary design Sip on cocktails while overlooking the city’s historic wall from the rooftop bar and terrace Savor a delicious, complimentary morning meal at the hotel’s Clero Restaurant Relax poolside with a drink in hand before heading to the hotel spa to relax Enjoy the relaxed, bohemian charm of the local neighborhood with its shops and cafes Set on one of the most photographed streets in the city, Capellan de Getsemani serves as a beautiful and welcoming home base from which to explore one of South America’s most magical and fascinating cities.

TRNCL.name: Casa di Langa
TRNCL.description: Explore northern Italy’s beautiful Piedmont region from the boutique Casa di Langa hotel surrounded by rolling vineyards, hazelnut trees, and gardens neighboring a UNESCO’s World Heritage. Located in the foothills of the Alps near the border with France, Casa di Langa offers a breathtaking location paired with farm-to-table dining and authentic activities. Whether you’re seeking a restorative spa stay or a fulfilling foodie adventure, guests of Casa di Langa will delight in the genuine hospitality of Northern Italy. While at Casa di Langa you can: Select from a variety of accommodation types across the hotel’s 39 rooms and suites Dine on delicious, traditional cuisine crafted from ingredients grown on-property Feel confident in the hotel’s sustainability promise – including a ban on single-use products Relax at the spa and experience a variety of soothing face, body, and spiritual treatments Swim in the outdoor heated pool, take a cooking class, go truffle hunting, and more With an impressive view of the Alps and a host of local and regional activities including wine-tasting and cooking classes, cycling, hiking, and exploring northern Italy’s quaint villages, Casa di Langa serves as a picturesque respite focused on relaxation, wellness, and engagement.

SAYCV.name: Castello di Velona Resort Thermal SPA & Winery
SAYCV.address_raw: Strada Provinciale della Badia di Sant'Antimo, Km 11+200,, Montalcino
SAYCV.description: Journey to a bygone era at Castello di Velona Resort, Thermal SPA & Winery, where you’ll be immersed in the history of Italy with a stay in a medieval fortress dating back to the 11th century. Unwind with your choice of historic or modern accommodations and enjoy delectable Tuscan fare and locally made wines from restaurants with incredible views of Tuscany’s vineyards and olive groves. A wellness sanctuary with a diverse lineup of wet areas and luxe treatments provides a chance for relaxation, but the hotel also offers a wide range of activities to captivate guests. Highlights of the hotel include: - 45 guestrooms, suites, and apartments, designed in either a castle or contemporary style - Gourmet restaurants that serve authentic Tuscan and bold Mediterranean cuisine - A spa oasis with treatment cabins, thermal pools, a panoramic sauna, and more - Prestigious winery offering Brunello di Montalcino reds, exclusively for castle guests - Experiences like wine tastings, cooking classes, truffle hunting, horseback riding, and yoga

PARCP.name: Castille Paris - Starhotels Collezione
PARCP.description: Located in the 1st Arrondissement, next to the iconic Chanel Maison, Castille Paris – Starhotels Collezione exudes charm and Parisian refinement. The alluring hotel occupies an 18th-century aristocratic building near exclusive boutiques and Parisian landmarks, including Musée de Louvre, the Place Vendôme, and the Champs Élysées. Step into elegant guestrooms decorated in quintessential French regalia and modern décor, build up a rapport with Les Clefs d'Or concierge and dine in the lovely Florentine courtyard during warmer months. - Relish the Parisian charm with a selection of rare afternoon teas in the elegant Salon de Thé - Catch up with colleagues and work in 1,776 sq ft of gorgeously decorated meeting space - Visit Maison de Chanel next door for Champagne, high-fashion clothing, shoes, sunglasses, and fine jewelry - Book a romantic package and savor Champagne and fresh fruit in your room every morning - Dine beneath the stars in the hotel’s enchanting inner courtyard Get to know the Clefs d’Or concierges who can plan extravagant experiences for you. Have breakfast in the courtyard and sample Michelin-starred Chef Ugo Alciati’s decadent dishes for dinner. Once you’ve experienced this warm, central Parisian gem, you’ll want to stay longer.

NRTCT.name: Cerulean Tower Tokyu Hotel
NRTCT.description: The 40-floor Cerulean Tower Tokyu Hotel dominates the skyline of Tokyo’s vibrant Shibuyu district, where Japanese culture, fashion, and entertainment intermix. Take in the views of the glittering cityscape from your sophisticated guestroom or suite. Dine at the hotel’s renowned restaurants and have a drink at the jazz bar. Enjoy an abundance of amenities from an art gallery to a spa and indoor pool. Highlights of the hotel include: - 408 guestrooms and suites featuring contemporary design with sweeping views - Dining options such as sashimi and Japanese cuisine at Sakuragaoka restaurant - Amenities such as a spa, beauty salon, fitness, indoor pool, hot tub, sauna, and more - A prime location near Shibuya Crossing, Tokyo’s answer to Times Square Set near the Meiji Jingu Shrine, a quiet escape surrounded by 100,000 trees, Cerulean Tower Tokyu Hotel invites travelers to explore one of the city's most serene spots before or after exploring the hotel's vibrant home neighborhood.

ACECL.name: César Lanzarote
ACECL.address_raw: Camino del, Cam. Barranco Por la Vegueta, 24, La Asomada- Lanzarote
ACECL.description: Located in the heart of La Geria Natural Park, this chic hotel is an enchanting place that makes travelers feel right at home with green-hued guestrooms and verdant open-air courtyards with lush plant life. The natural inspiration behind the accommodations is contrasted by the views of the azure ocean and powerful volcanoes just outside. Indulge in Canarian fare with a modern twist or delight in relaxation with volcanic-inspired spa treatments. The hotel also has its own vineyards and wine production facility on-site. After a day in the sun horseback riding, swimming, or hiking around the island, this oasis of relaxation is the perfect escape. Highlights of the hotel include: - 20 guestrooms and suites with nature-inspired design and panoramic views - A restaurant fusing Canarian culinary traditions with fresh ingredients and modern touches - Vast vineyards plus a production cellar where grapes grown on the island are turned into wine - A secluded spa that harnesses the natural energy of the surrounding volcanoes - Active adventures ranging from hiking, yoga, and horseback riding to swimming and boating

ATLCE.name: Chateau Elan
ATLCE.description: Set amid the rolling landscape of the North Georgia hills, Chateau Elan Resort brings European-inspired sensibilities and pleasures to the American South. As you make your approach to the resort, past lush vineyards, graceful fountains, and delightful gardens, the chateau’s 16th-century-style architecture comes into full view and hints at the pleasures to come. Dreamy days of golf, innovative dining, delicious wines, and luxurious accommodations are just a few of the highlights of this stately wonderland. - Winner of the TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence award five years in a row - Feel like an honored guest at any of the 290 luxurious, beautifully decorated guestrooms, fully renovated in 2019 - Enjoy a round of golf at Chateau Elan Golf, home to 45 holes of championship golf - Bike or hike your way around the stunning 3,500-acre property - Relax in absolute splendor in Atlanta's premier spa destination, set in an exclusive spa mansion beside a sparkling lake - Indulge in 10 onsite bars and restaurants as well as daily wine tastings at one of the East Coast's most-awarded wineries This is the place where European luxury meets Southern Hospitality touched with modern elegance. Come early, linger longer, and discover Chateau Elan. If you are in Atlanta for business, this is the only certified Conference Center in America with a full-production working winery and vineyards.

NAPCD.name: Covo Dei Saraceni
NAPCD.description: Built directly into the magnificent cliffs of the Amalfi Coast, the romantic, five-star Covo Dei Saraceni is an idyllic seaside oasis. Guestrooms are spacious and adorned with Mediterranean style décor, with balconies overlooking the glistening sea. Stretch out on plush seating arrangements spread throughout the lobby, soak in a private balcony hot tub, lounge by the pool with a cocktail, and dine on Italian favorites while admiring the sunset. - Retreat to one of the hotel’s 66 guestrooms and suites, which feature private balconies - Revel in the luxury of your own private balcony hot tub or infinity pool in one of the deluxe suites - Dine alfresco while admiring the beautiful view of the Amalfi Coast - Spend your days at the pristine beach or take an excursion to nearby towns - Sip on a refreshing cocktail by the pool with a view of the island of Li Galli Book a private excursion aboard the hotel yacht. Sunbathe on the golden, sandy beach. Head into town for some shopping, and don’t forget to stop by The Brasserie restaurant for the best pizza and gelato in Positano. Indulge in a lifestyle that feels exclusive.

MNLDP.name: Discovery Primea Manila
MNLDP.description: Designed by award-winning architect Kenzo Tange, Discovery Primea, Manila is an urban hotel unlike any other: effortlessly refined, exceptionally stylish, and with impeccable service throughout. Gleaming marble floors and a vintage tapestry welcome you to the lobby; guestrooms blend timeless elegance with superb connectivity; and a heated outdoor infinity pool, 24-hour gym, and Turkish-style spa help you to unwind. Other highlights of the hotel include: - 140 luxurious rooms and one- and two-bedroom suites featuring floor-to-ceiling windows - Terazi Spa and its array of restorative experiences including traditional Hammam and Hilot massage - Master chefs at Flame restaurant expertly create modern and sophisticated Asian fare - Sip handcrafted cocktails and watch Manila's lights from the 16th-floor al fresco restaurant and bar At Discovery Primea, Manila, the refined atmosphere and warm Filipino hospitality go hand in hand with contemporary business culture.

FCODO.name: DOM Hotel
FCODO.description: DOM Hotel is an intimate boutique property in the heart of Papal Rome in Regola, Italy. Sitting along Via Giulia, one of the city’s oldest and most iconic streets, this luxurious escape occupies a 17th-century palazzo that has been transformed into a sumptuous, metropolitan haven reminiscent of ancient Rome paired with contemporary, creative flair. Its idyllic location places you in the middle of the most artistic triangle of Italy’s capital city — with Piazza Navona steps away on one side and St. Peter’s Basilica, the Vatican, and Castel S. Angelo minutes away on the other. Enjoy unique offerings, elegant comforts, and cosmopolitan glamour all in one place. Whether in Rome for business or leisure, this is the perfect getaway in the Eternal City. - The hotel’s 18 gorgeous guestrooms and suites feature picturesque views over Via Giulia - Be greeted with a welcome aperitif, bottle of Champagne, and fresh fruit plate upon arrival - Enjoy a candlelit dinner or an Italian aperitivo on the fourth-floor terrace overlooking Roman rooftops - Explore Rome from the hotel’s central location tucked away in the heart of it all, yet just far enough from the hustle and bustle - Take a short walk to top cultural attractions such as Piazza Navona, St. Peter’s Basilica, the Vatican, and Castel Sant'Angelo - Sample some of the world’s most prestigious spirits including a 1786 Malaga, a 1944 port, and cognacs from 1920 at the Liquor Room Originally a 17th-century palace turned Claretian monastery, DOM is an abbreviation of 'Deo Optimo Maximo,' a Latin inscription found on the church adjacent to the property. Its entire restoration was undertaken by Italian architect, Antonio Girardi, who artfully blended design elements within the hotel’s interiors. The original exposed brick walls and coffered, wooden beam ceilings were preserved and served as the perfect backdrop to handmade furnishings by Italian master craftsmen and an eclectic collection of photographs.

QRLDC.name: Don Carlos Marbella
QRLDC.description: Discover the glamour of Spain’s stunning Costa del Sol coastline at this oceanfront hotel, located between Marbella and Malaga. Soak up the sun at the summer club or next to the resort swimming pool with a cocktail in hand. Play tennis at the hotel’s sport center or escape to nearby golf courses to play a round or two. Enjoy an array of restaurants with various types of fare, all with stunning coastal views, and escape to the spa for an afternoon of relaxation. By night, modern guestrooms, suites, and residences – many offering glimpses of the rolling ocean waves – encourage rest and rejuvenation before you wake up and do it all again. Highlights of the hotel include: - 284 guestrooms, suites, and 24 residences blending contemporary design with Andalusian charm - Dining experiences that delight the senses in a variety of picturesque settings - A refreshing swimming pool offering cocktails and a summer club, plus direct beach access - A luxurious spa with innovative treatments and a sophisticated water circuit - Tennis matches and training at the on-site Rafa Nadal Tennis Center

BOGEK.name: EK Hotel
BOGEK.description: With Bogotá’s most vibrant entertainment district on its doorstep, EK HOTEL is boutique chic, delivering five-star luxury for a memorable stay in this cosmopolitan city. From contemporary architecture to nature-meets-industrial interiors decorated in neutrals with bursts of bold color and art on the walls, this eight-story hotel epitomizes modern style.
