The casually elegant bar is the perfect place to gather friends and colleagues before venturing out to one of the neighborhood’s world-class restaurants or nightlife hot spots. - Open your curtains to magnificent urban views in one of 70 guestrooms and suites - Start each day with freshly prepared eggs, fruits, and bread at the breakfast buffet - Plan engrossing events in the hotel’s three meeting spaces for up to 80 people - Work out with spectacular city views in the rooftop gym - Sip a fresh Colombian coffee as you read your newspaper in the Café Bar At EK HOTEL, friendly smiles will greet you on arrival, and the personalized service continues throughout your stay, with experienced concierges dedicated to ensuring your trip is the perfect mix of rest, relaxation, and memorable experiences. Encounter the Colombian high life when you visit nearby Northern Bogotá’s glamorous shopping malls, gourmet restaurants, and fast-moving business district.

AGPEF.name: El Fuerte Marbella
AGPEF.description: Completely refurbished after 60 years of storied history, El Fuerte Marbella welcomes guests to its historic location on Costa del Sol, just 5 minutes from the center of Marbella’s Old Town. El Fuerte Marbella offers convenient access to all the shops, restaurants, and activities of the Mediterranean beachfront in a peaceful, welcoming atmosphere. Highlights of the resort include: - Warm, classic Mediterranean character reflected in 266 contemporary guestrooms and suites - Three pools, including one heated in the winter, offer an escape - International and Mediterranean cuisine menus featuring locally-sourced, seasonal ingredients at three restaurants - Location just steps from the bustling nightlife of El Puerto Deportivo, charming and historic Old Town, Plaza de Los Naranjos, and the Iglesia de la Encarnación church

MDZEC.name: Entre Cielos Wine & Wellness Hotel
MDZEC.description: Set among the Mendoza wine region’s famed vineyards with views of the snow-capped Andes Mountains, the award-winning Entre Cielos Wine & Wellness Hotel is an elegant retreat offering elegant accommodations in one of Argentina’s most beautiful landscapes. Settle into luxurious comfort at this boutique hotel, offering opportunities to savor local cuisine and traditional barbecue, relax at the authentic spa and hammam, and sample local vintages from nearby wineries as well as the hotel’s own cellar. Highlights of this boutique escape include: - 24 spacious guestrooms and suites, each with a private terrace overlooking the hotel vineyard - Delicious dining at a signature restaurant with fresh fare crafted from local ingredients - A serene spa with vinotherapy treatments that incorporate products derived from grapes - Tranquil swimming pool, plus activities ranging from yoga classes to vineyard tours and tastings - Outdoor adventures, including hiking, mountain biking, rock climbing, and horseback riding Surrounded by eight acres of Malbec vineyards, the hotel crafts its own in-house blend, EC Wine, presented as a welcome gift for guests taking advantage of this hotel’s exclusive location within one of the world’s best wine-producing regions.

FAOES.name: EPIC SANA Algarve
FAOES.address_raw: Pinhal do Concelho, Praia da Falésia, Albufeira
FAOES.description: With contemporary architecture, minimalist interiors, gourmet dining, a focus on health and wellness, and a prime location on the bluffs above one of Portugal’s most famous beaches, EPIC SANA Algarve embodies everything you could want in a vacation, whether you’re traveling solo, on a romantic getaway, or exploring with the whole family. Nestled between the sparkling Atlantic Ocean and a tranquil pinewood forest, the region’s natural beauty is complemented by memorable adventures ranging from tennis and volleyball to pool days, spa treatments, wine tastings, and more. Highlights of the hotel include: - 229 contemporary guestrooms and suites with large windows and ample natural light - Diverse restaurants with cuisine ranging from local farm-to-table fare to Asian and Italian - Revitalizing spa with sauna, steam bath, indoor pool, and Vichy shower, plus a fitness center - A multi-sports court that can be converted for tennis, volleyball, basketball, or futsal - Several swimming pools for both adults and children as well as private beach access

LISES.name: EPIC SANA Marques Hotel
LISES.address_raw: Av. Fontes Pereira de Melo, 8, Lisbon
LISES.description: Located in the center of Lisbon, EPIC SANA Marquês offers a luxury hotel perfect for guests seeking a romantic city stay. Set amid shops, landmarks, and other must-see sights, the hotel not only provides guests with an excellent location from which they can explore Lisbon, but also a destination with outstanding features and amenities. Highlights of the hotel include: - 369 guest rooms in a variety of styles for any type of traveler - Six restaurants and bars offering delicious meals and refreshing drinks - Wellness opportunities at the indulgent spa and full fitness center - A rooftop pool with an accompanying lounge, both with panoramic city views Perched in the picturesque hills of Lisbon, EPIC SANA Marquês offers a contemporary take on the capital city. A quick walk to parks, squares, markets, and museums—enjoy the luxury life in Lisbon’s perfect location. Toast each day in Portugal with fine dining and elevated comforts.

CPTEE.name: Erinvale Estate Hotel & Spa
CPTEE.description: With some of South Africa’s top wineries on its doorstep, Erinvale Estate Hotel & Spa is the perfect base from which to explore the Cape Winelands. Steeped in history with 300-year-old oak trees and beautiful indigenous gardens, this former Cape Dutch farmstead-turned-boutique country estate offers individually decorated guest rooms with eclectic and vibrant decor, modern luxury, and timeless style. Alongside these intimate spaces, there is superb food and wine to be enjoyed at Bloom, the Magnolia Social Dining Lounge, and al fresco dining at Oak Terrace – all renowned restaurants in Somerset West. Highlights of the hotel include: - 56 contemporary guest rooms and suites with aromatherapy bath and shower amenities - A relaxing spa with spacious treatment rooms, a nail studio, a lap pool, a thermal suite, and a gym - An alfresco terrace restaurant offering raw juices, seasonal salads, gourmet sandwiches, and more - Access to the iconic and challenging 18-hole, Gary Player-designed golf course - World-class outdoor activities, including hiking, mountain biking, environmental tours, and more - Close proximity to the Whale Coast and the famous Garden Route of the Western Cape With the surrounding region brimming with vineyards and local artisanal producers, Erinvale Estate Hotel & Spa is set in the heart of a region famed for its cultural heritage, culinary experiences, and natural beauty, offering travelers to South Africa a memorable place to rest, relax, explore, and enjoy during their visit to the Cape.

ORLEH.name: ette hotel - Orlando
ORLEH.description: No detail is too small at the Orlando area’s most discerning and impeccably put-together resort at ette hotel – Orlando. From the marble-clad lobby adorned with Venetian plaster walls and furnished with “sentient” velvet-lined handcrafted chairs to the spacious accommodations featuring luxury linens and designer bath amenities, every space both public and private is carefully curated for the best possible guest experience. Highlights of ette hotel – Orlando include: - A range of rooms and suites perfect for solo travelers, families, and everyone in between - A rooftop restaurant where sushi and creative mocktails are accented by floor-to-ceiling art - An abundance of wellness opportunities at The Spa at the ette, the fitness center, and more - An intimate, hidden pool with a dedicated menu of snacks and alcohol-free mocktails - An excellent location just minutes from the area’s theme parks and other attractions More than just a hotel, ette hotel – Orlando is an experience. Whether a guest becomes engulfed in an antique book at the in-house library, fascinated by the “Laundry Museum” and its open-concept facility, or literally cocooned in the hotel’s resting chamber dubbed “Serenity Cove,” they will never forget the elegant quirks and intentionally vibrant spirit of this central Florida getaway.

ISHEB.name: Excelsior Belvedere Hotel & SPA
ISHEB.description: Live la dolce vita when you check into Excelsior Belvedere Hotel & SPA on Italy's Ischia Island, just a short ferry ride off the coast from Naples. Set in a former 19th-century villa originally designed and built for Lord James Nimmo, the hotel was transformed into a luxury resort in the 1950s by Count Micangeli and has been one of the island's hottest spots ever since. Perched on a lush hillside overlooking the Gulf of Naples, with views to the distant Aragonese island castle, Excelsior Belvedere Hotel & SPA gives you the chance to live life like an Italian aristocrat. - Relax in rooms featuring brightly tiled floors, ultra-soft beds, and deluxe amenities - Rejuvenate at the hotel spa with a massage or a soak in its mineral-rich thermal baths - Dine on traditional Mediterranean cuisine with a distinctly health-focused spin - Explore a lively Italian island replete with history, heritage, and culture A 2020 TripAdvisor Travelers' Choice Award recipient and consecutive winner for the last four years, Excelsior Belvedere Hotel & SPA's modern, award-winning property and amenities go hand-in-hand with its storied past, where Italian film stars, famed musicians, and other European and American celebrities came to rest, relax, mingle, and party on one of the most beautiful shorelines on the Italian Mediterranean.

SSAFP.name: Fera Palace Hotel
SSAFP.description: Set in the historic center of Salvador, the first capital of Colonial Brazil and one of the first planned cities in the world, Fera Palace Hotel occupies a beautiful early 20th-century building created as the first luxury hotel in the state of Bahia. With a design inspired by the iconic Flatiron Building in New York, and a façade that combines Art Deco elements with Bahian flair, the hotel provides a grand and historic home from which to set out and explore the city’s famed cuisine, architecture, and Afro-Brazilian music scene. Guests can also delight in remaining at the hotel to enjoy impeccable dining in stunning settings, a relaxing spa treatment, a high-energy workout in the gym, or sunset sips on the rooftop above the Bay of All Saints. Highlights of the hotel include: - 81 contemporary guestrooms and suites ranging from compact in size to palatial expanses - Delectable dining at the signature restaurant, offering modern Mediterranean cuisine - A rooftop infinity pool for leisurely swims, plus an adjacent lounge with sweeping views - Soothing spa services selected from a dedicated massage menu and a fully outfitted gym - Proximity to Salvador’s finest sights, including the UNESCO-recognized city center Pelourinho

SBAFP.name: Fess Parker Wine Country Inn
SBAFP.description: Situated in the charming, stage coach era town of Los Olivos, the Fess Parker Wine Country Inn perfectly reflects Santa Barbara wine country’s reputation for fine wines, relaxed living, and effortless grace. Each of the 19 well-appointed rooms feature king beds, spacious bathrooms, hardwood floors, and fireplaces. The Inn is the perfect spot to get away from it all, relax and unwind. - Sample fine wines from the Fess Parker Winery, owned by the family of the Davy Crockett actor - Set a roaring fire in the hearth of your romantic guestroom - Explore Los Olivos’s nostalgic stagecoach-town character - Venture into wine country, head to the beach, or soak up Old West history — all on your doorstep The Fess Parker Wine Country Inn’s central location makes exploring Los Olivos on foot easy. Guests of the Inn are within walking distance of over 20+ wine-tasting rooms as well as excellent shopping and dining opportunities. Your stay includes complimentary wine tasting at both Fess Parker Winery, which is a 10-minute drive away, or the family’s Rhône house, Epiphany, a mere two blocks down the street. The Inn’s front desk staff is ready to assist guests with arranging everything from additional wine tastings, vineyard horseback rides on the Parker Family’s Home Ranch, or even reservations for Pedego electric bikes to explore the surrounding area. Nella Kitchen & Bar is located on property and features indoor and outdoor dining as well as a full bar.

PMIFH.name: Fontsanta Hotel Thermal Spa & Wellness
PMIFH.description: Embrace well-being and luxury at Fontsanta Hotel Thermal Spa & Wellness. Nestled on the Spanish island of Mallorca, where lush greenery and crystal blue waves welcome travelers, the resort offers thoughtfully designed accommodations with relaxation in mind. Pair this with Mediterranean cuisine, mindfulness activities like yoga, and a hydrotherapy circuit at the spa featuring healing, mineral-rich waters, and you have the recipe for a relaxing vacation that will elevate your body and mind. Highlights of the resort include: - 37 guestrooms and suites, each with a private courtyard or terrace - A restaurant serving fresh Mediterranean dishes featuring a Chilean flair - Revitalizing spa with a hydrotherapy circuit using water from natural thermal springs - Immersive activities ranging from yoga and Pilates to wine tastings and cooking classes

YHZFH.name: Fox Harb’r Resort
YHZFH.description: Set just a short walk from the Atlantic on the north shore of Nova Scotia, Canada, Fox Harb’r Resort is a premier seasonal escape offering the best that the country’s maritime provinces have to offer. Open from April through November, the resort delivers award-winning hospitality, an array of outstanding indoor and outdoor amenities, a world-class golf course, and more. With so much to see and do, Fox Harb’r sets the highest of standards when it comes to activities, entertainment, and relaxation on the Northumberland Coast. Highlights of the resort include: - 88 oceanview accommodations, from classic guestrooms to suites, townhomes, and villas - Seasonally inspired restaurants with a focus on fresh seafood and sustainable ingredients - An 18-hole hybrid golf course that pairs the front Ocean Nine with the inland Vineyard Nine - Restorative wellness center with spa treatments, a fitness studio, mineral pool, and more - Nearly endless activities such as fishing, boating, archery, ax-throwing, and pickleball

CUNGB.name: Garza Blanca Resort & Spa Cancun a Tafer Resort
CUNGB.address_raw: Carretera a Punta Sam Km 5.2, Cancun
CUNGB.description: Set on a pristine white sand beach just north of Cancun on Mexico’s Playa Mujeres, Garza Blanca Resort & Spa a Tafer Resort welcomes guests to one of the Caribbean’s most beautiful coasts. And with that beauty comes extraordinary services and amenities. Private balconies with hammock swings front spacious suites at this magical space surrounded by lush gardens and the soothing sounds of the sea. Highlights of the resort include: - Accommodations, all with private terraces or balconies, plus Residence options - Multiple food and drink spots with a variety of cuisines ranging from Mexican to Chinese - A suite of holistic treatments, services, and therapies at the relaxing Spa Imagine - Multiple pools, hot tubs, and shaded spaces perfect for both sunbathing and swimming Beyond the bounty of food and beverages and the wealth of beachfront amenities, Garza Blanca Resort also offers guests the chance to explore Mexico’s much-loved Yucatan peninsula. From the resort, enjoy easy access to the many Mayan archaeological sites that dot the landscape and never fail to amaze and inspire.

SJDGZ.name: Garza Blanca Resort & Spa Los Cabos – A Tafer Resort
SJDGZ.address_raw: Carretera Transpeninsular Km 17 5, Cabo San Lucas
SJDGZ.description: Welcome to paradise on the southern tip of the Baja California Peninsula at the Garza Blanca Resort & Spa Los Cabos, where views of the converging Sea of Cortez and the Pacific Ocean are as stunning as the sunsets. This luxurious, contemporary resort with an all-inclusive dining option offers a prime location between Cabo San Lucas and San José del Cabo, ocean-view suites, gourmet cuisine, and activities for adults and children alike. With eight pools, a world-class spa, a beautiful beach, a fitness center, tennis courts, an events hall, and more, it is an ideal vacation, wedding, or event destination. - The resort’s 315 suites include a selection of spacious ocean-view studios, one- and two-bedroom suites, and limited-edition lofts and penthouses with up to four bedrooms - Suites have large balconies or terraces with hammocks and most have a kitchen and living area - Swim in eight pools, including a kids’ pool and a rooftop infinity pool with music and cocktails - Dine at three gourmet restaurants, snack bars, or room service — all-inclusive dining is optional - Get a facial or massage at the full-service spa, try the hydrotherapy circuit, and relax in the sauna, spa tub, or steam room - Play tennis, work out at the gym, and enjoy water sports - Kids will love the children’s club - Go for a stroll on the beach or tee off at one of the nearby golf courses The resort is perfect for a romantic getaway, a wedding or event, a business team-building trip, or a memorable family vacation. Its custom-built family fun zone is a treat for your entire crew, and the children’s club ensures that you can get some alone time when you would like a romantic dinner, child-free adventure, massage at the spa, or simply relaxation time. The multiple outdoor terraces, with fire pits, lounges, and nighttime music and entertainment, are the perfect place to soak up the Baja climate.

GRXGC.name: Gran Hotel Claridge Granada
GRXGC.description: Located in the Andalusia region of southern Spain, Gran Hotel Claridge Granada is housed in a historic building in the city’s Plaza de Villamena. Steps away from the Granada Cathedral, the hotel puts guests in the heart of a region rich in Moorish heritage and flamenco culture. By day, indulge in Andalusian cuisine, pamper yourself with spa treatments or yoga sessions on a tranquil terrace, swim in the heated outdoor pool, and more. At night, enjoy restful sleep in accommodations designed to suit every style of traveler. Highlights of the hotel include: 70 guestrooms and suites offering carefully framed views of the city’s surroundings Culinary experiences rooted in Granada that whisk guests on a journey of flavors and moments A spa with curated treatments designed to revitalize, plus a water circuit and wellness terrace Places to unwind, including a heated outdoor pool, solarium, relaxation terraces, and a library A boutique fitness room, yoga with a view, curated cycling routes, and seasonal ski experiences

HAMGE.name: Grand Elysée Hamburg
HAMGE.description: Set in the heart of the city, the Grand Elysée Hamburg is an award-winning urban hotel near all of this Hanseatic destinations top shops, restaurants, and entertainment. And, just steps from the Metro, this elegant spot makes it easy to see the rest of this ancient city's historical sights, monuments, and museums. Highlights of the hotel include: - 510 guestrooms including 17 suites with sumptuous beds - Four restaurants offering delectable cuisine from around the world - An indulgent spa available to guests age 16 and older - A sauna, pool, solariums, and fully equipped fitness center - A private art collection showcasing works throughout the hotel Combining the convenience of a city-center location, luxurious amenities, and an idyllic, serene atmosphere, the Grand Elysée Hamburg offers guests to Hamburg the ultimate spot to rest and refresh before or after setting out to explore this quintessential north German destination.

CUNFA.name: Grand Fiesta Americana Coral Beach Cancun All Inclusive Spa Resort
CUNFA.description: Experience luxury without at limits at Grand Fiesta Americana Coral Beach Cancun All Inclusive Spa Resort where public spaces are imbued with high Mexican design and private areas are designed with lavish comfort in mind. Set on one of Cancun's most beautiful stretches of white-sand beach, the resort offers elevated and distinctive service in a beautiful and life-affirming destination. While at Grand Fiesta Americana Coral Beach Cancun All Inclusive Spa Resort, you can: - Enjoy an ocean view from any one of the 602 guestrooms and suites featuring private terraces - Treat your children to cooking classes and other outdoor activities at the 40,000 sq-ft Coral KidZ Club - Unwind with a 10-step hydrotherapy ritual or gemstone therapy at the award-winning GemSpa - Swim in the expansive outdoor lagoon-like pool, featuring cascading waterfalls and lush landscaping - Opt for the Infinite Luxury by Grand Fiesta Americana experience for a lavishly upgraded guest experience The Infinite Luxury program offers guests a tailored vacation experience ranging from the Infinite Romantic experience with an in-suite private chef, the Infinite Family experience with included and curated outdoor activities, or Infinite Wellness, which treats guests to all-day private wellness pursuits and pampering. Whichever stay option you choose, the resort's outstanding dining, impressive accommodations, award-winning service, and dedication to a luxurious all-inclusive stay, this resort offers discerning travelers an excellent choice for a Mayan Riviera holiday.

SIRGH.name: Grand Hotel Courmayeur Mont Blanc
SIRGH.description: Pristine beauty abounds at Grand Hotel Courmayeur Mont Blanc. Found in northern Italy’s Aosta Valley, surrounded by the jagged peaks and towering glaciers of the Alps, the resort is the ideal destination for both summer and winter travelers. After a day of hiking through meadows of wildflowers or skiing local slopes, return to the hotel to enjoy regional cuisine, relax in the tranquil wellness center, or simply wander the grounds. Highlights of the resort include: - 72 guestrooms and suites housed in modern chalets with sprawling mountain views - Elegant restaurant serving European-inspired dishes, plus a bar - Wellness haven with spa treatments, sauna, Turkish bath, swimming pool, and solarium - On-site activities ranging from a heated swimming pool and lawn games to yoga

GEMHD.name: Grand Hotel Djibloho
GEMHD.address_raw: Djibloho-Equatorial Guinea, Ciudad de la Paz
GEMHD.description: Set on the edge of Equatorial Guinea’s ultra-modern planned capital city of Ciudad de la Paz, Grand Hotel Djibloho is a contemporary retreat nestled between a high-tech ultra-modern urban hub and the natural wonders of the lush African jungle. Highlights of this destination hotel include: - 452 rooms, suites, and villas, each with marble baths and deep soaking tubs - Expansive dining options with nine restaurants and bars - Multiple outdoor activities from fishing, tennis, and more - A complimentary18-hole tropical golf course with river features - A Wellness Center with spa services, sauna, hammam, and pools Offering wide range of accommodations, a huge array of activities, and an ideal location just a short drive from the country’s newest airport, Grand Hotel Djibloho is the perfect West African destination for every type of traveler, from families to solo adventurers and even large groups or business conferences.

MLAEH.name: Grand Hotel Excelsior
MLAEH.description: At the Grand Hotel Excelsior, all the treasures of one of Europe's most ancient cities harmoniously coexist with contemporary elegance. Beautiful views of the Maltese capital's Marsamxett Harbor and Fort Manoel immerse you in its baroque architecture, and a first-rate concierge service directs you to both well-known and lesser-known Valletta attractions while also providing chauffeured tours and access to a private marina. This 439-room hotel puts Malta's extraordinary history and landscape at your feet, whether you're enjoying the view from the outdoor pool terrace or private beach. - Moor at a 30-berth private yacht marina, the venue for Malta's annual boat show - Relax in contemporary style on the edge of Valetta's UNESCO-listed old town - Sunbathe and swim at Valletta’s only private beach, with magnificent harbor views - Indulge in Le Grand Spa's signature treatment: a 90-minute Maharlika massage that draws on techniques from across Asia and the Pacific - Swim in an expansive terrace pool with spectacular views over Marsamxett Harbor and historic Fort Manoel Every moment at the Grand Hotel Excelsior is unique. You can arrive and depart by yacht, go swimming from a private beach, and sip your morning coffee while taking in views of Manoel Island and the city's cathedrals. Take a seat at the Tiki Bar & Restaurant's terrace as the sun sets for a leisurely dinner outside.

AMSGH.name: Grand Hotel Huis ter Duin
AMSGH.address_raw: Koningin Astrid Blvd. 5, Noordwijk aan Zee
AMSGH.description: Overlooking the North Sea across grass-covered sand dunes and a wide sandy beach, Grand Hotel Huis ter Duin is an iconic sight on Noordwijk’s peaceful coastline. It has been a chic beach retreat for more than a century, welcoming guests with a grand marble lobby and 254 stylish guestrooms, suites, and penthouses — many with stunning sea views. Michelin-starred Restaurant Latour adds to the hotel’s prestige, with its haute cuisine and fine wines. - 254 guestrooms, suites, and penthouses offer classic décor and magnificent countryside or sea views at this pet-friendly resort - Book an eleventh-floor penthouse for marble bathrooms and spacious living areas - Try unique spa treatments with award-winning QMS Medicosmetics at the MC Wellness spa, and enjoy the gym, indoor swimming pool, and sauna - Dine on refined, globally-influenced cuisine at Michelin-starred Restaurant Latour - Plan a successful event with over 67,000 sq ft / 6200 sq m of meeting space and a dedicated events and banqueting team - Relax on a sun lounger and lunch on a Japanese-style bento box at Breakers Beach House Whether you’re dreaming of romantic seaside strolls, family time on the sand, or indulgent dining and spa experiences, you'll find it all at Grand Hotel Huis ter Duin. With two superb restaurants and a relaxed beach bar, all with unbeatable sea views, plus sun loungers and watersports just a few steps away, it is the ideal choice for a restorative five-star beach break. Grand Hotel Huis ter Duin is committed to sustainability and participates in the NOW Force for Good Alliance to provide a sustainable travel experience and take responsibility for their impact on communities and the environment. To learn more about the hotel's efforts and directly book, click here .

PSAIF.name: Grand Hotel Imperiale
PSAIF.address_raw: Via Giuseppe Mazzini 20, Forte Dei Marmi
PSAIF.description: Just steps from the sandy beaches lining a picturesque coastal village set on northern Italy’s Tuscan Sea, Grand Hotel Imperiale in Forte dei Marmi is a contemporary oasis of luxury elegance, and sophistication. With the stunning Apuan Alps behind it and the blue Mediterranean a short walk away, the hotel invites guests to experience a place of natural beauty, history, and cultural charm. Highlights of the hotel include: - 46 rooms and suites, with some featuring sea and city views from private balconies - Two dining options including a Mediterranean-focused restaurant and glamorous lounge - An indulgent spa offering treatments, a pool, whirlpool, sauna, gym, and more - A private beach club featuring tents and bathing huts, a restaurant, and more - A wide array of activities and experiences such as surf lessons, city tours, and bike rentals

CTAGH.name: Grand Hotel San Pietro
CTAGH.description: Perched high atop a hill overlooking the bright blue waters of the Bay of Naxos, Grand Hotel San Pietro invites travelers to Sicily to experience a relaxing, sun-dappled retreat in a destination with as much history as beauty. Highlights of this luxury hotel set in an early 20th-century restored villa located upon an ancient Roman road include: - 63 guest rooms offering views of lush gardens, Mt. Etna, or the Ionian Sea - A fine dining restaurant with an atmospheric terrace offering spectacular vistas - An outdoor pool with lounge chairs and umbrellas overlooking the sea and bay below - An on-site spa with treatment rooms, a whirlpool tub, sauna, hammam, and more - Personalized service ranging from private dining to day cruises and island tours Along with thoughtful amenities, the hotel also offers the perfect spot to rest, relax, and simply enjoy time spent with friends or family. For picturesque seaside exploration, nearby villages can be reached by complimentary shuttle to the center of Taormina, where traditional restaurants and quaint shops line meandering hillside streets.

ZERHZ.name: Grand Hotel Zermatterhof
ZERHZ.description: A stay at Grand Hotel Zermatterhof is like a fairytale, starting with the horse-drawn carriage that transfers you in style from Zermatt station to car-free Zermatt. Step back in time as you enter into the historic hotel, which delivers a distinguished blend of historic charm and modern elegance through period features and contemporary luxuries. Indulge in meals at the three enchanting restaurants, enjoy the convivial atmosphere at the two sophisticated bars overlooking the village or the inspiring Matterhorn, and feel revitalized after treatment in the tranquil Vita Borni Alpine Spa. Swiss bliss is yours here at this alluring hotel full of charm. - The hotel is home to 69 cozy guestrooms and suites, some with fireplaces and balconies - Get an invigorating massage in the Alpine Spa’s ice grotto - Work out in the gym before heading out for outdoor adventures - Sip homemade hot chocolate in front of Ruden Bar’s fireplace or a cocktail at Stars Bar - Explore the Matterhorn’s Italian side with canapés and Campari on the terrace - Visit the fondue restaurant for a sweet treat and savor cheeses from the Valais region - Groom the hotel’s Lipizzaner horses for an unforgettable experience In a mountain town famous for its sophisticated service and magnificent rugged peaks, Grand Hotel Zermatterhof continues to stand out. Its dedication to elevating your experience means you can expect a traditional Swiss welcome and efficient service with style and graciousness.

HNLHW.name: Halepuna Waikiki by Halekulani
HNLHW.description: Set on a serene side street steps from the white sands of iconic Waikiki Beach, Halepuna Waikiki by Halekulani offers a new, one-of-a-kind refined tropical oasis. Your personal paradise starts with a step into the lavish lobby — featuring light and airy interiors, teak finishes, vaulted ceilings, expansive windows, and works of art from the Honolulu Museum of Art. Your stay is topped off with an award-winning spa, culinary delights, an infinity pool deck and bar with ocean views, a wellness program, engaged service, and proximity to all the best Waikiki has to offer. - 284 guestrooms and suites offer city and ocean views and luxurious interiors; many have private balconies - Dine on island delicacies and handmade baked goods on an open-air terrace overlooking the ocean - Head to the eighth-floor pool deck to swim laps, lounge on cabanas, relax in the Jacuzzi, or sip hand-crafted cocktails from the poolside bar - Focus on your mind, body, and spirit at the fitness center and renowned Spa Halekulani - Unwind in the private open-air lana’i garden featuring a reflexology path - Enjoy signature treats from the restaurant’s separate chocolate kitchen - Explore nearby attractions such as Waikiki Beach, popular hiking trails, the Nature Preserve, and Manoa Falls Halepuna Waikiki translates to 'House of Welcoming Waters' and is named after the nearby pool of water where past Hawaiian Royalty used to gather and relax. Upholding this tribute, the hotel offers a spirit and peaceful retreat like no other.

LEBHI.name: Hanover Inn Dartmouth
LEBHI.description: Located on the idyllic Dartmouth College campus, Hanover Inn Dartmouth in New Hampshire’s scenic Upper Valley is a delightful getaway, steeped in history and infused with New England charm. Dating from 1780, traditional character blends with modern comforts at this hotel where you can enjoy one of 108 sumptuous guestrooms, the highly acclaimed PINE restaurant, and nearby outdoor adventures. The only hotel on the historic Ivy League Dartmouth College campus, this is simply your perfect home base for touring Dartmouth College, sightseeing, enjoying the area’s abundant natural beauty, or visiting Hanover for business. - Awarded a TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence - Enjoy boutique comfort overlooking the idyllic Ivy League Dartmouth College campus - Delight in 225 years of history and discover the charms of rural New England - Dine at PINE, heralded the best farm-to-table restaurant by Yankee magazine and headed by award-winning chef Justin Dain - Choose from a wealth of attractions from golf and hiking to ski resorts and upscale shopping - Eco-friendly, from the food to the cleaning products, and pets are welcome - The gracious staff will greet you with freshly baked cookies before taking care of your every need The wild beauty of the Appalachian Trail is just outside, while indoors you can revel in glorious tradition. Settle back in your porch rocking chair and absorb two centuries of history while planning your stay.

CUNHR.name: Haven Riviera Cancun
CUNHR.description: A sanctuary of luxury and sophistication set on more than 250 acres overlooking the Caribbean Sea, the all-inclusive, all-suite Haven Riviera Cancun welcomes guests with exquisite design, exotic views, and unrivaled seclusion. Designed for relaxation and rejuvenation, the adults-only resort offers a quintessentially Mexican coastal experience filled with indulgent dining, an array of unforgettable activities, and the ultimate in tranquility. Highlights of the resort include: - 435 spectacular and spacious junior suites, including 114 swim-out suites - The MySenses Spa, a 15,700 square-foot sanctuary offering cutting-edge services and therapies - Delicious dining with six restaurants, one Marketplace buffet, and two snack bars - Four pools to cool down or relax in, including an infinity pool, oasis pool, and oversized whirlpool - A bevy of bars including three swim-up options, a mixology bar, a sports bar, a nightclub, and a lobby bar

MLMMS.name: Hotel & Spa Mansion Solis by HOTSSON
MLMMS.description: Make your journey to Morelia, the capital of the Central Mexican state of Michoacán a memorable one when you stay at Hotel & Spa Mansion Solis by HOTSSON. Located within the UNESCO World Heritage Centre that encompasses the entirety of the central city, this contemporary hotel offers 24 beautiful suites overlooking the city’s quaint streets, charming courtyard, and mile-long limestone aqueduct. Guests of Hotel & Spa Mansion Solis by HOTSSON can also: - Relax in all-suite accommodations with spacious baths and comfortable modern design - Enjoy a dip in the hotel’s guitar-shaped pool after a quick workout at the gym - Delight in after-dinner drinks at the rooftop bar with impressive sunset city views - Indulge in a quintessential restorative treatment at the full-service private spa - Dine on farm-to-table traditional Mexican cuisine at the hotel restaurant Travelers to Hotel & Spa Mansion Solis by HOTSSON will love the easy access to Morelia’s best sites and attractions, with the impressive cathedral and city center just a five-minute car ride away. And the city’s convention center and main shopping mall are 10 minutes from Mansion Solis’ front door.

SPUAS.name: Hotel Ambasador Split
SPUAS.description: Located on Split’s waterfront West Coast neighborhood’s Riva Promenade, Hotel Ambasador Split welcomes guests to Croatia’s second-largest city with an ultra-modern exterior fusing Mediterranean simplicity and contemporary style. Inside, the hotel’s light-filled accommodations offer stunning views of the Adriatic Sea and Split’s UNESCO-protected Old Town across the water. Other highlights of the hotel include: - 98 contemporary rooms and 2 suites with expansive windows and a minimalist style - Dining and drink options ranging from a rooftop bar to a Mediterranean restaurant - A rooftop pool with panoramic water and city views, plus a bar with drinks and snacks - An indulgent, full-service spa with treatments, therapies, saunas, a cold shower, and more From the moment guests step up to the 1,850-year-old reception desk carved from black oak found on the bed of the Sava River, the hotel’s in-house guest experience team, known as “Diplomats,” will take care of every need, including offering guidance on local sights and experiences and aiding with other services and amenities.

LSZHB.name: Hotel Bellevue
LSZHB.description: Located within a centuries-old pine forest on a stunning Croatian island, Hotel Bellevue offers an award-winning, ultra-chic stay experience with breathtaking views of the stunning Čikat Bay. From its bright and airy atrium to its gourmet restaurants and ultra-relaxing spa, Hotel Bellevue’s amenities and activities welcomes guests to enjoy the natural wonders with classic luxury in an unrivaled waterfront location. Highlights of the hotel include: - A range of accommodations including luxury suites with terraces and hot tubs - A world-class spa with advanced science, holistic therapies, and more - Multiple dining options including two restaurants, a pool bar, and beach club - A relaxing pool and luxe beach club set on a terrace over the crystal-clear sea

GOAHB.name: Hotel Bristol Palace
GOAHB.description: Located a mere few steps from the iconic bronze fountain of Piazza de Ferrari and upscale shops on bustling Via XX Settembre, Hotel Bristol Palace epitomizes the timeless elegance of Genoa. Fully renovated, the palace retains much of its regal charm, with a stained-glass ceiling, stunning antique furniture and art, and its famous elliptical staircase setting the scene. Enjoy fine dining at Ristorante Giotto, with its original marquetry floor and frescoed ceiling. Unwind in a stately suite decorated with antiques. A favorite of high society in the Belle Époque, Hotel Bristol Palace remains a discernible choice for a chic Genoan stay. - Relax in one of 133 guestrooms and suites with period features and high ceilings - Walk to the famous Ducal Palace, Carlo Felice Theatre, and impressive museums - Host stately events and meetings in eight well-equipped reception rooms - Admire original frescoes, sconces, and artwork throughout the hotel - Savor fresh Ligurian dishes in Ristorante Giotto's dining room, or enjoy your meal on the terrace - Climb the historic elliptical staircase toward the Art Nouveau stained-glass ceiling With its rich history, Hotel Bristol Palace is the ideal base for exploring sophisticated Genoa, its exclusive shops, and gourmet restaurants. On your return to the hotel, relax with a book in the charming reading room under wall sconces, chandeliers, and a restored 19th-century mirror.

SBAHC.name: Hotel Californian
SBAHC.description: Featuring Spanish Colonial Revival architecture and modern Moorish themed interior décor from celebrity designer Martyn Lawrence Bullard, the Hotel Californian is the new center of the Santa Barbara waterfront. Incorporating the façade of the original 1925 Hotel Californian, this 121-room seaside destination features a rooftop pool and event deck providing panoramic views of the coastline and the Santa Ynez Mountains. Located steps from the beach, one block from Santa Barbara Amtrak Station, and in the middle of Santa Barbara's vibrant Funk Zone, the Hotel Californian includes a luxurious Moroccan-inspired spa with hand-painted Moroccan tile, a fashion boutique, fresh and distinctive dining options, together with a best-in-class ballroom, event lawns and decks, and unique meeting spaces for weddings and group events. - Named on the Condé Nast Traveler Hot List and Travel + Leisure The It List - Stay in the re-imagined 1925 hotel with its unique Moroccan-inspired design - Choose from breathtaking Pacific Ocean, Santa Ynez Mountains, or intricately designed courtyard views from your private balcony - 121 uniquely styled guestrooms created by acclaimed Los Angeles designer Martyn Lawrence Bullard - Indulge in personalized treatments at the Moroccan-influenced Majorelle Spa - Dine at Blackbird with exquisite Mediterranean-influenced, locally sourced, and hyper-seasonal cuisine or experience Goat Tree, a café marketplace with al fresco seating offering fresh, local fare, including delicious pastries and baked goods, cold-pressed juices and coffee - Gaze into the sunset and sip libations at Tan-Tan, the rooftop pool at Hotel Californian

ANCCC.name: Hotel Captain Cook
ANCCC.description: With glorious views of the wilderness, an attentive and welcoming staff, and a famed fine dining restaurant, Hotel Captain Cook is one of Anchorage’s most prestigious establishments. Named after the explorer who first charted Alaska’s coastline, this stylish sanctuary offers contemporary adventures and the ultimate in comfort while being a gateway to the great outdoors. With an art collection dedicated to telling Captain James Cook’s story and boutiques selling the work of local artisans, Hotel Captain Cook celebrates the region’s heritage and flair for hospitality. - Relax in one of 546 guestrooms, including 96 suites with stunning panoramic views - Shop for Native American arts and crafts in one of 12 on-site boutiques - Discover the history of Captain James Cook through the hotel’s private art collection - Help yourself to more than 30 wines by the glass with the extremely popular self-serve wine dispensing system - Work up a sweat at one of the state-of-the-art Athletic Clubs, or relax in the sauna or steam room - Rent a bike and ride along the scenic Tony Knowles Coastal Trail that leads to Kincaid Park - Dine on king crab, Alaskan salmon, and Kodiak scallops at Crow’s Nest, the dashing penthouse restaurant featuring 360-degree views Feel pampered from the moment you arrive at this well-established, nautically inspired hotel. After admiring the unparalleled views of Cook Inlet, the Chugach Mountains, and downtown Anchorage, head into the city, as shops, museums, and fine dining experiences are only a short walk away.

TYOHC.name: Hotel Chinzanso Tokyo
TYOHC.description: Find serenity in the heart of bustling Tokyo at the beautiful Hotel Chinzanso Tokyo. This urban oasis' main highlight is its Meji-era garden filled with camellias, cherry trees, hot springs, a stunning three-story pagoda, and a 100-year-old tea house. Paying homage to Japan's traditional mountaintop gardens, the hotel offers a unique 'Sea of Clouds' experience where the central garden is filled with a layer of fog throughout the day, providing guests with both the view and experience of delicate and tranquil clouds drifting over the emerald ridges of Japan's famed mountains. This one-of-a-kind experience occurs throughout the year, along with another of the hotel's specialties, the Seven Seasons of Tokyo program. Following traditional Japanese seasonal divisions, the hotel splits the year into seven time periods, each focusing on a specific aspect of nature ranging from Cherry Blossom to Firefly Seasons. Other highlights of Hotel Chinzanso Tokyo include: - The 267 guestrooms and Victorian-style suites feature marble bathrooms and elegant décor - Indulge in restorative spa treatments, indoor/outdoor pool, Jacuzzi, and onsen (Japanese hot spring) - Try unique experiences like the firefly evening tea ceremony, kimono fitting, and samurai show - The hotel is a short walk to Tokyo attractions and 2 mi / 3 km from the train station - Five dedicated wedding facilities, a ballroom, and 36 banquet halls welcome lavish events Hotel Chinzanso Tokyo is the perfect home base to explore Tokyo or relax. Unwind in the lush gardens with a cocktail, work out in the 24-hour gym, or read a book at the rooftop Serenity Garden. Engage in traditional experiences like a Japanese language lesson, a kimono fitting, or a tea ceremony.

PMICM.name: Hotel Convent de la Missio
PMICM.address_raw: Carrer de la Missió, 7A, Palma de Mallorca
PMICM.description: Experience a historic hotel with an inviting ambiance at Hotel Convent de la Missio, a serene sanctuary tucked away on a quiet street in Palma’s Old Town. Located on Mallorca, the boutique, adults-only hotel offers a chance to unwind in comfortable accommodations, at the wellness center, or by the rooftop swimming pool. Dine on cuisine made from fresh, local ingredients or sip cocktails at the unique ArtBar after exploring all that the Spanish island has to offer. Highlights of the hotel include: - 27 minimalist guestrooms and suites decorated with a light color palette - A simple yet elegant Mediterranean restaurant incorporating the flavors of the island - Tranquil wellness center with massages, a sauna, an indoor pool, and relaxation room - A bar that doubles as an art gallery, exhibiting pieces by local contemporary artists - Rooftop terrace offering an outdoor swimming pool, solarium, and small gym Housed in a former 17th-century convent once used to train missionaries, and surrounded by narrow streets and greenery-filled courtyards in the center of Palma, Hotel Convent de la Missio offers a timeless atmosphere in a prime location.

LTTDP.name: Hotel de Paris Saint-Tropez
LTTDP.description: With its majestic arches and sweeping bay windows that overlook a sea of endless blue, the Hôtel de Paris Saint-Tropez has been a favorite of painters, writers, and movie stars since 1931. Just a two-minute walk from the harbor, this contemporary five-star hotel is the perfect place to relax and rejuvenate. Unwind with a glass of Champagne at the enchanting rooftop bar Les Toits. Spoil yourself with a treatment at the Spa by Clarins. Spend quality time in a vibrantly decorated guestroom, inspired by the stylish 1960s and 1970s. Conveniently located, it is the perfect place to discover the charms of the French Riviera. Highlights of the hotel include: - 52 guestrooms and 38 suites, featuring furniture from designers like Florence Knoll and Vladimir Kagan - An elevated restaurant, bar, and lounge serving sun-kissed cuisine on the hotel's rooftop - Signature massages and beauty treatments by the iconic French wellness brand at the Spa by Clarins - A heated rooftop pool with sweeping views over the Mediterranean Sea and romantic village rooftops - Elegant meeting space and option for private reception or celebration at The Patio or in the Dolce Vita Presidential Suite Guided by the local knowledge of some of the best ''Clefs d’Or'' concierges in the business, you will be in good hands at this luxurious boutique hotel. The Hôtel de Paris Saint-Tropez is the perfect gateway to all that Saint-Tropez has to offer.

STOHD.name: Hotel Diplomat
STOHD.description: Experience Scandinavian hospitality enveloped in beautiful Art Nouveau architecture and contemporary Swedish design at Hotel Diplomat. With stunning views of Stockholm Harbor, an early 1900s Art Nouveau façade with romantic Juliette balconies, and a contemporary interior embracing both the historic and the modern, Hotel Diplomat offers visitors to the Swedish capital an elegant and award-winning stay in the city center. Guests of Hotel Diplomat can: Rest and relax in 130 rooms and suites featuring timeless décor and original features Dine on sophisticated, Mediterranean-influenced Scandinavian dishes at the hotel restaurant Sip a craft cocktail or aged Scotch at the hotel’s atmospheric cocktail bar Spend a private hour at The Retreat with its sauna, mosaic shower, and hammam Explore all Stockholm has to offer from a prime location in the middle of it all House in a historic building that formerly played host to foreign diplomats, the aptly named Hotel Diplomat’s storied presence imbues each and every stay. Slip into a world where Art Nouveau style and fresh art and design come together to create a welcoming and wondrous atmosphere you won’t want to miss.

YULGH.name: Hotel Gault
YULGH.description: With 30 stylish, spacious suites and a distinguished level of refined service, Hotel Gault offers an exclusive stay in the heart of Old Montreal. From the welcome note and cookies that greet you on arrival to the delicious brunch at Gault Restaurant and thoughtful amenities for people and pets, this luxury boutique hotel — housed in a beautiful 1871 Greystone building — is a prime place to explore the area’s best sights, attractions, and nightlife. - Named one of the top five Canadian hotels by TripAdvisor’s Travelers’ Choice awards - Choose from 30 spacious, industrial-chic lofts, suites, terrace suites, and apartments featuring heated bathroom floors, large windows, and luxury linens - Admire custom-made furniture and Québécois and Canadian artwork in the sleek lobby - Host an event here, with six meeting spaces and halls for up to 150 guests - Work out in the well-equipped gym, or relax with access to the nearby Scandinave Spa - Start your day with a French crepe, salmon gravlax, or omelet at Gault Restaurant - Wander the cobbled streets of Old Montreal, filled with historic buildings from the 1600s Just moments from the Palais des Congrès de Montréal and Square Victoria, Hotel Gault is an ideal gateway to Montreal, whether you are in the city for business, for a romantic getaway, or for a family break. From the 24-hour dining service and library space with a fireplace to loaner iPads and standalone soaking tubs in suites, this chic boutique gem will delight you at every turn.

YYJGP.name: Hotel Grand Pacific
YYJGP.description: A stay at the Hotel Grand Pacific gives you the best of two worlds: the serenity of a coastal getaway and the dynamism of an urban metropolis. Combining European charm and stately décor, the hotel overlooks Victoria's beautiful natural harbor. Take in the waterside views and feel refreshed, whether from the private balcony of a suite or while having afternoon tea on the restaurant's terrace. Walking distance from downtown, the Hotel Grand Pacific is the perfect place for making the most of British Columbia's capital, whether on business or on leisure. - Choose from 304 guestrooms with plush furnishings and inspiring vistas - Swim in the 25-m / 82-ft lap pool in the Victoria Athletic Club fitness center - Try a fresh, seafood-forward meal while overlooking the Pacific - Discover the city by bike with the hotel’s complimentary loan service - Unwind with a cocktail and a soundtrack of live jazz in the hotel’s cozy lounge Arrive at the hotel in style by boat, and be greeted with far-reaching views of the harbor from your room. Explore Victoria’s attractions by day, and dine out on the harbor-side terrace of the Pacific restaurant by night.

SPCHH.name: Hotel Hacienda de Abajo
SPCHH.address_raw: Calle Miguel de Unamuno, 11, Villa y Puerto de Tazacorte
SPCHH.description: Just off the coast of Western Africa lies a chain of Spanish islands where hospitality has reigned for hundreds of years. Hotel Hacienda de Abajo, on the Canary Island of La Palma, is one of the archipelago’s most historic sugar plantation estates where that same Old World welcome still mingles with modern amenities and priceless art. Hosting travelers since the 1700s, the original Hacienda building of the estate welcomes guests through massive antique doors into a realm of 32 individually decorated guestrooms spread throughout four buildings surrounding a lushly landscaped courtyard. Guests of the Hotel will not only enjoy island breezes and volcanic views but they can also: Sleep peacefully in rooms and suites with private balconies offering sea views Dine on local Canarian dishes with international influence at the ethereal El Sitio restaurant Pamper yourself with saunas, Jacuzzis, massages, and more at the Bathhouse spa Stroll through the botanical garden-like grounds before visiting a nearby beach Admire more than 1,300 art pieces from 1st to 21st Century displayed throughout the hotel As an adults-only resort, romantic couples, solo travelers, and groups will love the quiet of the resort’s sparkling pool, the comfort of the property’s beautiful accommodations, and the stunning location overlooking the sea with a backdrop of forested mountains.

PARHK.name: Hotel Keppler
PARHK.description: An intimate four-star oasis, Hotel Keppler’s traditional Parisian glamour combined with modern touches create a dignified pied-à-terre in the world’s most fashionable city. Designed by the legendary Pierre-Yves Rochon, each meticulous guestroom embraces his passion for texture, unique fabrics, and natural light. Sculptural accents and pops of color define the hotel’s astonishing attention to detail, which extends into its warm welcome and first-class service. - Stay in one of 39 designer guestrooms or suites, with luxury amenities and stunning views - Enjoy a Parisian breakfast in the elegant dining room overlooking the private courtyard - Enhance your experience with a workout or steam at the fitness center - Let the expert concierge be your guide to experiencing Paris’ hidden gems - Stroll to top sights like the Arc de Triomphe, Champs Élysées, and Lido de Paris - Gather round the fireplace for a nightcap and convivial conversation at the library bar Enjoy the best of Paris’ arts, culture, shopping, dining, and nightlife from Hotel Keppler’s central location. Walk over to some of the most historic landmarks or dine in style at nearby Michelin-starred restaurants. Head back and unwind in the sauna room, before retreating to your elegant guestroom for a relaxing soak using your luxury HEELEY toiletries.

XJSHK.name: Hotel Kitzhof – Mountain Design Resort
XJSHK.description: Rustic charm meets comfortable luxury at Hotel Kitzhof – Mountain Design Resort, an authentic Tyrolean ski lodge nestled in the Alps in western Austria. Light wood paneling, sprawling views of peaks and gardens, and tranquil settings can be found around every corner, with several dining venues offering cuisine crafted with local ingredients. When not resting in your guestroom, venture out to explore the region with a number of dynamic outdoor experiences or remain at the hotel to indulge in tranquil treatments at the spa. Highlights of the hotel include: - 160 stylish guestrooms, studios, and suites with antique wooden design and modern furnishings - Various restaurants serving healthy Tyrolean dishes with ingredients from nearby farms - A serene day spa with soothing treatments, a swimming pool, and a sauna complex - Active adventures ranging from hiking, mountain biking, and skiing to lake swimming - Stunning scenery with panoramic views of the Austrian Alps, hotel gardens, and waterfalls

CTGLI.name: Hotel Las Islas
CTGLI.description: For an immersive tropical vacation that puts nature at the forefront, visit Hotel Las Islas in Colombia. Located on the island of Baru, part of the Rosario Islands National Park, this eco-friendly resort puts natural scenery on stunning display from the comfort of its luxurious Treetop or Sea-Level Bungalows. Embrace the landscape with snorkeling or scuba diving excursions, kayaking trips through the mangroves, bioluminescent night tours, astronomy sessions, and more. Alternatively, find relaxation by enjoy all that the resort itself has to offer, from fresh fare and a lavish wellness center to swimming pools, a fitness center, a boutique shop, and more. Highlights of the resort include: - 65 jungle and seaside bungalows with views of the stunning natural landscape - Varied restaurants that draw from the seaside location to present fresh, delicious cuisine - A transformative wellness spa with soothing treatments, Turkish bath, sauna, pool, and hot tub - Ample activities ranging from astronomy experiences and scuba diving to cooking classes - Tours of nearby Cartagena, the Archipelago of San Bernardo, and the Rosario Islands

SCLHM.name: Hotel Magnolia
SCLHM.description: Take in the flavor and color of Santiago from Hotel Magnolia, a historic building converted into a contemporary hotel in the heart of the city’s historic district. The 1920s building maintains pieces of its past, from the original façade to architectural elements and stained glass. Relax in refined, comfortable rooms adorned in light wood, then venture out to the varied dining venues at the hotel. Wellness activities, romantic experiences, and more await without ever having to leave the hotel, but its proximity to the bustling town is an added bonus. Highlights of the hotel include: - 40 guestrooms and suites that feature heritage details, such as stained-glass windows - Restaurants offering innovative dishes in stunning indoor or outdoor settings - An exclusive massage room designed to offer respite from city life with relaxing treatments - An intimate, 24-hour fitness center allowing guests to stay active while traveling - Special experiences, from romantic evenings and friend getaways to a night out at the theater

AGBDM.name: Hotel Maximilian's
AGBDM.description: In the ancient and picturesque town of Augsburg, Germany, Hotel Maximilian's dates from 1722 and sits on the city's main street, Maximilianstrasse, where colorful northern Renaissance and Rococo buildings nobly line the cobbled thoroughfare. The hotel has seen its share of celebrity guests over the centuries, including Mozart, Emperor Napoleon I and his wife Josephine, Czar Nicholas I, and more. At this TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence recipient, steep yourself in South German culture and Bavarian hospitality and: - Sleep in one of 132 tranquil, individually decorated rooms and suites - Dine at Michelin-starred Gourmet Restaurant Sartory - Enjoy a soak and steam at the hotel's Steinborn SPA - Hold a wedding, conference, or seminar at one of the hotel's 12 event spaces and ballroom - Spend an afternoon people watching at the terrace lounge - Delight in zwetschgendatschi, a renowned local plum tart The hotel's ethos of 'historical inspiration, modern interpretation' is apparent in its simplified, traditional design sensibility with rich woods, textured fabrics, and polished floors, all paired with outstanding amenities. Enjoy an aroma-sole-steam bath, Finnish Sauna, Biological Sauna, and relaxation room, dine on outstanding dishes crafted from local ingredients, or simply enjoy a nightcap at the inviting hotel bar.

BCNMM.name: Hotel Miramar Barcelona
BCNMM.description: Originally built for the Universal Exposition in 1929, this Art Deco palace turned five-star hotel has lost none of its original splendor. Perched atop the majestic Montjuïc hill, the hotel’s lofty location affords it a tranquil exclusivity, enhanced by manicured grounds and unbeatable views. The old-world grandeur of the palace façade gives way to avant-garde interiors, modern luxuries, and chic, light-filled guestrooms, many featuring private terraces. Dine on creative Mediterranean and Catalan cuisine at Studio Miramar, and relax in the spa or pool. - 75 guestrooms with stylish décor, floor-to-ceiling windows, and sleek bathrooms with designer tubs - Admire the Art Deco façade of the former palace before stepping into the avant-garde interior - Exclusive location overlooking the city with easy access to its most renowned attractions - Work out in the large gym, with complimentary water and towels - Savor Catalan and Mediterranean cuisine at Studio Miramar - Indulge in a Provence-inspired treatment at Spa By L'Occitane Presiding over the city atop Montjuïc hill, Hotel Miramar Barcelona offers both a peaceful location and convenient proximity near the action. You can lounge by the pool or stroll the picturesque gardens one moment, then hit Barcelona’s boutiques, restaurants, and vibrant nightlife the next.

PVRHM.name: Hotel Mousai Puerto Vallarta – A Tafer Resort
PVRHM.address_raw: Carretera a Barra de, Puerto Vallarta
PVRHM.description: On a secluded hillside overlooking Banderas Bay, cutting-edge Hotel Mousai - A Tafer Resort is an ultra-modern, adults-only paradise. Steps away from the warm sands of the bay, the city’s first and only AAA Five Diamond resort invites you to stay at an avant-garde guestroom with dazzling views of the Pacific Ocean. Start your vacation right by simply swinging in the hammock on your private terrace or with a dip in the rooftop infinity pool overlooking the dreamy coastline. - Relax outdoors in private, as each of the 144 suites features a terrace with views of the Pacific Ocean - Enjoy a soothing Kundalini yoga lesson on the golden sands of Banderas Bay - Explore the coastline, whether by bird-watching, hiking, kayaking, or paddle boarding - Get your heart pumping with a basketball tournament or a day at Xtreme Outdoor Camp - Go for a tequila or wine tasting as well as a class of healthy juicing tips - Treat your taste buds to a celebrated variety of cuisines at the multiple on-site eateries - Indulge in a massage at Spa Imagine, with 360-degree views of unspoiled ocean and lush rainforest At Hotel Mousai - A Tafer Resort, the sandy shores of the Pacific Ocean meet lush coastal greenery, with thrilling and relaxing activities offered for both land and water. For instance, spend a morning on a leisurely photography tour around the stunning Garza Blanca Preserve capturing the picturesque landscape, and then go for an afternoon dive into turquoise waters on a snorkel spree to see angel fish, eels, and manta rays.

MUCMP.name: Hotel München Palace
MUCMP.description: A striking blend of contemporary and classical styles, the five-star Hotel München Palace offers a charming Bavarian ambiance with elegant, modern flair. Located in Munich’s prestigious Bogenhausen quarter near the Isar River, this family-run boutique hotel offers impeccable service, deluxe accommodations, and upscale amenities. Explore the lush garden. Have afternoon tea with a Bavarian twist at Palace Bar. Relax at the wellness center with direct access to the rooftop terrace, work out at the gym, and have drinks, coffee, and cake in the light and open Wintergarten. - Stay in one of 89 sophisticated guestrooms and suites — some with private balconies - Book the Maisonette Suite for a private rooftop terrace or the Presidential Suite for a fireplace and Steinway piano - Dine at three on-site eateries or order a basket of chef-prepared delicacies for a picnic - Reinvigorate in the fitness center and melt away stress in the steam bath and sauna - Host a successful event or meeting at the hotel’s banquet and meeting facilities - Schedule an in-room massage and then explore Munich on a loaner bike from the hotel - Relax in the airy Palace Wintergarten with access to the tranquil and idyllic garden, one of Munich's most unique spots The hotel’s prime location places you near the lovely Isar River and the city’s sprawling English Gardens, as well as many of Munich’s top cultural attractions and museums. Head to a concert at the nearby Munich Philharmonic, cross the river to explore Munich's charming old town (Altstadt), or do as the locals do and explore the city with its sprawling English Garden by bicycle — rentals are complimentary with your stay. Munich’s city center is just a short walk from the hotel.

PARNA.name: Hotel Napoleon Paris
PARNA.description: With all the elegance and splendor of a grand Parisian mansion, the five-star Hotel Napoleon Paris, set in the fashionable 8th Arrondissement, feels magisterial and tastefully lavish. Admire the collection of art, which is also featured in the sumptuous guestrooms and suites inspired by Parisian Empire design. Cozy up to the chic bar 1807 for a cocktail. Explore Paris from the hotel’s prime location and bask in its alluring ambiance. It even has a romantic past of its own — it was a wedding gift from a Russian businessman to his Parisian bride. - Choose from 96 guestrooms and elegant suites designed in an Empire style - Enjoy breathtaking views of the Arc de Triomphe and Eiffel Tower in some suites - Sip on classic and traditional cocktails and wines at the hotel's 1807 bar - Work out at the fitness center or book a rejuvenating massage - Book your next meeting or event here in a private, large house, or in eight luxurious salons - Take your breakfast on the heated terrace by the fashionable Avenue de Friedland Make your stay at Hotel Napoleon Paris all the more memorable by opting for a package that offers additional perks. Surprise your other half with a Romance in Paris, which includes Champagne, chocolates, and flowers; or opt for the Family package and its connecting rooms to enjoy what is uncommon in the Champs-Elysées area: space. A truly Parisian flat only for you!

TYONO.name: Hotel New Otani Tokyo 'The Main'
TYONO.description: Waterfalls, lagoons, and a traditional Japanese garden with a 400-year-old history set the scene for a memorable stay at Hotel New Otani Tokyo, “The Main”. Located in the heart of downtown Tokyo, this elegant retreat has an impressive collection of facilities and services that will nourish, revitalize, and keep you pleasantly occupied. Dine on classic French cuisine in a grand setting at Tour d’Argent Tokyo, swim in the serene outdoor pool, or book time at the driving range or spa. Make every second count at this impressive hotel. - The newly renovated Shin-Edo rooms are equipped with cypress wood bathtubs and offer an enriched Japanese stay experience with exclusive amenities such as complimentary sake - Swim in the indoor or outdoor pool, or work out in the state-of-the-art fitness center - Delight in sizzling wagyu steaks and market-fresh seafood at Sekishin-Tei, an exquisite teppanyaki restaurant within the Japanese garden - Conduct important meetings in one of the spacious event rooms - Make the most of the hotel’s convenient location and excellent transport links - Choose from an incredible array of bars and restaurants, from French fine dining to a buffet restaurant with unforgettable panoramic views The Japanese garden at Hotel New Otani Tokyo, “The Main” offers pure escapism from the bustle of the capital. The peaceful, flower-filled garden dates back 400 years and is one of Tokyo’s most celebrated attractions.

GROPR.name: Hotel Peralada
GROPR.description: Draped in verdant strands of ivy, Hotel Peralada invites guests to unwind and indulge from the first glance. A warm, elegant design throughout the boutique hotel allows travelers to feel right at home during a relaxing stay in Spain’s Catalonia region. The charming getaway is part of the larger Peralada Resort, placing some of the medieval town’s most incredible heritage offerings right at the forefront. During your visit, explore a 14th-century castle, embrace wellness at the wine spa, play a round of golf on a dynamic course, savor Michelin-starred dining, and sip wine from a premier heritage vineyard located nearby. Highlights of the hotel include: - 64 harmonious guestrooms and suites that capture the essence of relaxation - A medieval castle boasting a museum, lush gardens, casino, and a private art collection - Creative dining that reflects a love for the land and the bright flavors of the Mediterranean - A scenic 18-hole golf course suitable for all levels of players, plus a 9-hole Pitch & Putt course - Revitalizing spa featuring ancient wine-inspired therapies and a light, bright cellar water zone - Outdoor swimming pool, a gym, bicycle rentals, on-site shops, and activities like cheese tastings

ATLPC.name: Hotel Phoenix Atlanta
ATLPC.address_raw: 70 Centennial Olympic Park Drive NW, Atlanta
ATLPC.description: As the premier hotel of Centennial Yards, a revitalization of Atlanta’s downtown, Hotel Phoenix Atlanta seamlessly blends modern luxury with the city’s rich culture and signature Southern hospitality. Featuring thoughtfully designed accommodations, elevated dining experiences, a vibrant outdoor pool, and an event lawn, the hotel serves as a dynamic destination for both travelers and locals. Not far from the hotel lies the Atlanta Zero Mile Post, marking the terminus of the Western and Atlantic Railroad. This historical point has inspired the design of the hotel’s interiors, with motifs reminiscent of America’s railroad heritage permeating shared spaces. The contemporary high-rise hotel offers the perfect base for exploration of Atlanta, located right in the middle of the action. Highlights of the hotel include: - 292 contemporary guestrooms, suites, and a Presidential penthouse - Diverse dining, from a signature brasserie and a poolside restaurant to a lobby coffee shop - Outdoor swimming pool and well-equipped fitness center - Tours of the hotel’s art collection, plus programming to coincide with nearby events

PARHR.name: Hotel Regina Louvre
PARHR.description: In one of the most exquisite parts of Paris, and the backdrop to over a dozen films, Hotel Regina Louvre is the epitome of Parisian five-star refinement, defined by its charm, history, and elegance. Originally built in 1900 and completely renovated, the hotel seamlessly blends contemporary comfort with traditional Belle Époque panache. This is a magnificent space where you can ease into sumptuous surroundings, relax in opulent guestrooms, and take in magnificent views of the Eiffel Tower and Tuileries Garden. - Sleep like royalty in one of 98 sumptuous guestrooms - Experience French cuisine in a calm, serene space at the very heart of Paris - Walk across the street to the Louvre Museum or Notre Dame Cathedral - Workout at the on-site gym or relax in the tranquil wellness center - Enjoy a meal outdoors in the private, sunny Terrace during the summer Walk out of the hotel into the magnificent 1st arrondissement and the famous Tuileries Garden, steps away from the Musée du Louvre. Dine in style at the hotel’s Chez Suzy restaurant, where fresh and modern Mediterranean-inspired cuisine is a nod to the chef’s travels, or end the evening with a one-of-a-kind cocktail at the cozy English Bar.

VIESS.name: Hotel Sans Souci Wien
VIESS.description: With a collection of Allen Jones, Roy Lichtenstein, and Steve Kaufman artworks lining the walls, and the museum quarter just moments away, Hotel Sans Souci Wien combines the best of traditional and contemporary Vienna. The lighthearted atmosphere and playful design add character to a hotel that takes service standards seriously. Perfectly judged small touches, such as homemade cookies and tea, ease the check-in process. A sleek spa, Austrian restaurant, opulent Champagne bar, and stylish accommodations make this the ultimate retreat in one of Europe’s most majestic cities. In addition, the hotel’s friendly concierge team will provide personal insight into Vienna’s most enchanting cultural and historic attractions, allowing you to explore the city with ease. Highlights of the hotel include: - 69 comfortable guestrooms and suites with a pillow menu to ensure the perfect night’s sleep - High-quality Austrian cuisine prepared with Viennese ingredients in the signature restaurant - Personalized treatments at the spa, allowing guests to select their ideal products and pressure - The largest hotel swimming pool in Vienna, lit by crystal chandeliers for luxurious moments - Champagne tastings, cocktail workshops, and tours of the hotel’s extensive Pop Art collection - Central location that allows guests to sightsee with ease, steps away from the museum quarter

TSFHS.name: Hotel Sassongher
TSFHS.description: Get back to nature at Hotel Sassongher, a five-star boutique hotel in the Italian ski village of Corvara that has been run by the same family for more than 70 years. Relax in an inviting lounge or gaze out at the Dolomites, a UNESCO World Natural Heritage site often described as the most beautiful mountains in the Alps. Dine on exquisite local Ladin cuisine served on antique silver platters at The Hunter’s Stube restaurant, built in 1520. After a day of hiking or skiing, get an alpine beauty treatment or massage at the wellness center before retiring to your guestroom with balcony views across Val Badia. - Stay in one of 65 spacious, charming guestrooms and suites with balconies overlooking the town and mountains; one has a private sauna overlooking the valley - Dine on seasonal Italian and Ladin cuisine at one of the three restaurants, including the cozy, playful Dolls Stube - Listen to live music at the piano bar, a cigar in the smoker’s lounge, or a glass of fine wine at the wine 'stube' - Hike the scenic landscape, ski on world-renowned slopes, work out in the fitness room, and then relax on the sun terrace - Unwind at the spa and enjoy the indoor pool, sauna, steam room, and whirlpool - Enjoy the complimentary breakfast buffet, parking, and shuttle service to and from ski slopes Adding to its charm, some parts of the hotel date back to 1520 and some of its walls, ceilings, and furniture beautifully feature local wood. The hotel creates an ambiance indoors to match the stunning beauty outdoors. Open from mid-June to mid-September and early December to early April, you can bask in the five-star service, luxury gourmet cuisine, luxurious amenities, and endless mountain views.

SZGHS.name: Hotel Stein
SZGHS.description: Please note that Hotel Stein is adults-only. Guests aged 16 and above are gladly welcome. Enter a world of artistic elegance at the luxurious Hotel Stein on the Salzach River in the very heart of the famous historic city center of Salzburg. Its prime location allows you to explore the town’s historical center and sights with ease, as well as the elegant festival district with its world-renowned classical festivals. Highlights of the hotel include: - 56 guestrooms combine a chic aesthetic with luxe touches and Old Town views - Venetian glass by Barovier & Toso brings incredible style and light to the spaces - A pampering relaxation area, sauna, and fully outfitted gym - Breathtaking views of Salzburg and the River Salzach from the rooftop bar - Elevated dining at the hotel's rooftop restaurant Steinterrasse An Austrian hotel with Italian flair, Hotel Stein makes for a distinctively unique stay in Salzburg. Because of the hotel’s central location, you can easily do a deep dive into the city’s culture and history — visit palaces and museums or scale the nearby mountains. Escape the city within minutes and enjoy nature combined with stunning outlooks on the world heritage city on the nearby Kapuzinerberg.

VCEHV.name: Hotel Villa Cipriani
VCEHV.description: The views from the hilltop town of Asolo are so magnificent it has been nicknamed the Village of 100 Vistas. Just outside the medieval walls, Hotel Villa Cipriani shares this stunning setting overlooking rolling hills and valleys dotted with olive and pomegranate trees. This beautiful boutique hotel is equally alluring. Once a private palazzo owned by the English poet Robert Browning, it has retained its historic charm while offering every modern comfort, from a sleek spa, fine Italian dining, and spacious guestrooms to a gorgeous garden and picturesque outdoor pool with a Jacuzzi surrounded by sun loungers — a perfect setting for admiring those views. - Rest in one of 29 elegant guestrooms and suites, furnished with antiques and showcasing Italian craftsmanship, including hand-painted tiles - Stroll through gorgeous gardens planted with olives and cypresses, - Swim in an award-winning hilltop pool and Jacuzzi that looks out over the valley below - Explore the countryside of Treviso Province on a walking tour or mountain bike - Work out with a personal trainer in the gym or book private Pilates and Nordic walking classes - Be pampered at the wellness center with a sauna, Turkish bath, and an array of health and beauty treatments - Have a cocktail at the bar and dine on regional and Mediterranean cuisine at Villa Cipriani restaurant; the classic beef carpaccio was invented by the hotel’s first manager Hotel Villa Cipriani is a spectacular retreat within easy reach of some of northern Italy’s most beguiling sights — and some of its best produce. From here, you can join the prosecco wine route or visit the home of grappa brandy within minutes; longer journeys will bring you to historic Treviso and to the iconic cities of Venice and Padua. The hotel has hosted royalty, celebrities, and other illustrious guests such as the Queen Mother, the Duke of Edinburgh, Catherine Deneuve, Kim Basinger, Sharon Stone, Aristotle Onassis, and many others.

MADVR.name: Hotel Villa Real 5*
MADVR.description: Surrounded by some of Madrid’s most important museums and landmarks, in a neighborhood known for its traditional architecture, Hotel Villa Real 5* invites travelers to experience the Spanish capital from the center of it all. Choose from a variety of accommodations, all with a sleek design and views of the Congress of Deputies or Plaza de las Cortes. Relax with delectable tapas and traditional Mediterranean fare, sip cocktails by the rooftop pool, or venture out to explore all that the city has to offer. Highlights of the hotel include: - 115 guestrooms and grand suites, all with a balcony or terrace where guests can unwind - A luxurious tapas bar offering Mediterranean-inspired dishes and creative cuisine - Seasonal rooftop bar with specialty cocktails overlooking the bustling city center - A fitness center for wellness enthusiasts as well as varied meeting spaces - Unrivalled location near public transit and within walking distance of major sights With a focus on art and history, the hotel is a museum in itself, showcasing a selection of restored Roman and Syrian mosaics, 20 Apulian vessels from Magna Graecia, and more than 100 pieces of ancient artwork scattered throughout hotel common areas, corridors, and guestrooms.

ZRHWS.name: Hotel Waldhaus Sils
ZRHWS.description: Perched in the forest high above the Alpine village of Sils-Maria, Hotel Waldhaus Sils has been run by the same family since it opened in 1908. This grand 140-room hotel rises over Lake Sils, affording wonderful views of the Engadine Valley region. A thoughtful restoration has preserved original features, including the Belle Époque central staircase, while contemporary touches have been added throughout including a stunning three-level spa. Look out over snow-covered slopes from a heated indoor pool, explore the mountains with complimentary mountain bikes and discounted ski passes, and experience true Alpine hospitality from fifth-generation owners. - Work out in the Technogym-equipped fitness center or take pro tennis lessons on indoor and outdoor courts - The Chef’s Table experience includes a tour of the renowned 20,000-bottle wine cellar and an exclusive dinner for up to 12 guests - Borrow mountain and electric bikes in summer and hit the slopes with a discounted ski pass and complimentary shuttle service in winter - Explore the hotel's period features on a guided tour and book a Nostalgic room for original restored furnishings - Swim in the indoor pool with floor-to-ceiling windows and direct access to an outdoor terrace with wading pool and hot tub - Unwind in a huge spa with a Finnish sauna, steam rooms, tranquil relaxation pools, and an extensive treatment menu Hospitality is the hallmark of Hotel Waldhaus Sils, and this family-run hotel prides itself on making children at home too. A mini golf course nestles in the larch forest, and the Gian & Gianna Children's Club runs a program of play, crafting, and outdoor excursions. There are even pizza-making sessions in the hotel kitchen.

SMOHH.name: Huntley Santa Monica Beach
SMOHH.description: Luxurious and chic, beachy and breezy, Huntley Santa Monica Beach on California’s Pacific coast exudes smart sophistication and playful charm.
