Outside, Santa Monica State Beach is just a stroll away; inside, candles flicker, piranha sculptures line the lobby wall, and sinuous one-piece design chairs sit on deep-pile rugs. Interior designer Thomas Schoos made his mark on the hotel's 204 guestrooms and suites and on its celebrated top-floor restaurant and bar, a popular place to sip seasonal cocktails in front of panoramic city and ocean views. - Choose from 204 elegant guestrooms with king-size beds, Egyptian cotton bedding, and Bulgari amenities - Secure event tickets, hard-to-get tables, and insider city tips from a 24-hour concierge team - Work out at the gym and then walk to the golden-sand beach or to the boutiques of the Third Street Promenade - Book the luxurious Presidential Suite with Murano glass lighting, wet bar, and Pacific Ocean views - Plan perfect events with 5,000 sq ft / 465 sq m of meeting space with consultants - Dine on modern California cuisine and sip a signature cocktail in a private curtained cabana at The Penthouse restaurant and bar, 18 stories above the city Whether in Santa Monica for business or pleasure, Huntley Santa Monica Beach gives you a stylish base in one of Los Angeles County's most vibrant cities. Wake up to beautiful city or ocean views, cycle to the iconic Santa Monica Pier, sip cocktails at The Penthouse, and then walk to the beach to enjoy a perfect California sunset.

SZGIH.name: Imlauer Hotel Schloss Pichlarn
SZGIH.description: Tucked away in Austria’s Styrian Enns Valley, Imlauer Hotel Schloss Pichlarn is an elegant hotel housed in a historic, 11th-century castle. Surrounded by towering mountain peaks and vibrant green hills, this picturesque region has plenty to offer travelers looking to indulge in fresh fare, indulge at a relaxing spa, play a round of golf, or explore the local scenery. Unwind in sophisticated guestrooms and suites that are ideal for relaxing and planning the perfect itinerary. Highlights of the hotel include: - 110 tasteful guestrooms and suites with panoramic views of stunning natural scenery - Restaurants that blend Alpine and Mediterranean cuisine using regional ingredients - A championship golf course, Trackman driving range, golf academy, short game area, and more - A luxury spa offering wellness treatments, heated pools, various saunas, and relaxation areas - Activities ranging from yoga and other fitness classes to hiking, biking, tennis, and forest bathing

PWMIS.name: Inn by the Sea
PWMIS.description: On a mile of unspoiled beach, Inn by the Sea provides a AAA Four Diamond award-winning home away from home as you explore the best of the rugged New England coast. If you can pull yourself away from the cozy, crackling fireplace in your guestroom and past the hand-crafted maple furnishings in the lobby, treat yourself to a Sea Salt Stone massage, or another sea-inspired treatment, at the LEED Silver-certified Spa. The farm-to-table Sea Glass restaurant, stunning water views, and personal touches like a daily trip to the ice cream shop in warm weather for a complimentary frozen treat are just a few of the reasons the resort is a regular winner of Condé Nast Traveler Readers' Choice and Travel + Leisure awards. - Relax in one of the 62 modern, luxuriously appointed guestrooms and suites, including Beach Suites, with large living spaces, gas-burning fireplaces, and fully equipped kitchens - Work out in the state-of-the-art gym, followed by a massage or steam in the sea-inspired spa - Listen to crashing waves while you dine on fresh regional seafood dishes at the oceanfront Sea Glass restaurant - Return from a bike ride to the beach and enjoy the heated outdoor pool - Head off for a day on the ocean in an authentic lobster boat where you’ll bait traps, measure your catch, and have it prepared by experts when you get to shore Begin the day with a relaxing yoga practice. Tour the stunning grounds with the friendly head gardener. Head out on a lobster cruise for two. Walk on the beach at sunset and end the day under blankets by a crackling fire pit, eating s'mores. Inn by the Sea provides the best that New England has to offer.

PCMJP.name: Jungala Hotel at VidantaWorld Riviera Maya
PCMJP.address_raw: KM. 48 Carretera Cancun-Playa del Carmen, Playa del Carmen
PCMJP.description: Escape to Mexico with a visit to Jungala Hotel at VidantaWorld Riviera Maya. This all-encompassing resort, surrounded by lush jungle and beautiful blue Caribbean waters, has endless amenities to offer those staying in its one-bedroom suites. When not relaxing in the spacious accommodations, savor a wide array of culinary options, lounge on a private white sand beach, or soak up the sun in the lazy river at the adjacent water park. Jungala Hotel also offers opportunities for golf, tennis, shopping, spa treatments, and so much more – all in the heart of Yucatan paradise. Highlights of the hotel include: - 52 one-bedroom suites that provide all the comforts of home while away in paradise - A range of food and beverage venues, serving up flavors of Mexico, poolside bites, and more - An upscale water park with slides, a wave pool, and a lazy river with a swim-up bar - Luxury spas, all offering tranquil treatments, as well as top-of-the-line fitness centers - An 18-hole short course designed by Jack Nicklaus, plus a pro shop - Refreshing swimming pools, tennis courts, beach bonfires, VR, and mixology classes

CASKT.name: Kenzi Tower Hotel
CASKT.description: Set in the Twin Center — Morocco’s first and tallest skyscraper — the five-star Kenzi Tower Hotel is synonymous with the city of Casablanca. The downtown location puts you in the heart of Morocco’s largest and liveliest city, while the tower’s floor-to-ceiling windows offer unbeatable panoramas all the way to the spectacular Hassan II Mosque and the Atlantic coast. Add in supremely comfortable guestrooms, stylish French cuisine at Sens restaurant, and wellness amenities such as an indoor pool, gym, and spa with hammam treatments, and you can be assured of an iconic and memorable stay. - Choose from 237 guestrooms and suites with floor-to-ceiling windows - Discover the best views and cocktails in Casablanca at the chic Sky 28 bar - Unwind in the indoor pool with massage jets or soak in the hot tub - Indulge in an exotic Moroccan hammam ritual in the O’SPA by Kenzi - Plan perfect events in nine spacious banquet and meeting rooms - Explore Casablanca’s Art Deco architecture and beachside suburbs Kenzi Tower Hotel’s 24-hour concierge can help you discover “Caza” like a local. Tee off at the city’s premier golf course or head to a souk to bargain for the best babouche slippers. After a busy day, revel in returning to your luxurious home-away-from-home at the most recognizable address in town.

DUBKC.name: Kilkea Castle
DUBKC.description: There is perhaps no scene more Irish in character and content than that which strikes guests as they enter Kilkea Estate and see Kilkea Castle emerging from an early morning mist — its turrets, crenellations, arched windows, and thick walls sitting solid and impressive among emerald green fields. One of the oldest inhabited castles in Ireland, Kilkea Castle dates to 1180 A.D. as a medieval stronghold of the FitzGerald clan. Today, this family-run estate and castle defines luxury accommodations in the Irish countryside. Set on 180 acres of woodland, gardens, and a golf course, Kilkea Castle invites guests to experience life like an Irish nobleman. While at Kilkea Castle, guests can: - Sleep in modern baronial bedrooms in one of the oldest inhabited castles in Ireland - Sip whiskey or enjoy a pint of Guinness at the castle's bar, aptly named The Keep - Nurture your mind and body at the extensive and enriching The Spa at Kilkea Castle - Golf 18 holes of championship parkland at Kilkea Castle Golf Course - Try your hand at archery, shooting, falconry, or simply soak in the quiet countryside Kilkea Castle offers a variety of accommodations, including fully equipped residences for longer stays and larger groups, grand castle rooms for couples on a romantic escape, and more typical, but no less luxurious rooms in the historic carriage house, great for families, friends, or solo travelers. While at Kilkea Castle you'll be swaddled in traditional comforts and activities such as afternoon tea, decadent dinners, and educational and entertaining tours.

JMKMO.name: Kivotos Mykonos
JMKMO.description: Inimitable style and laid-back luxury await at this Greek resort, where careful attention to detail permeates every experience. Indulge in unparalleled accommodations that combine postmodern elegance with the classic Cycladic design that Greece’s islands are known for. Throughout your visit, unwind in spaces that showcase the beauty of Mykonos, from dinner on the sand next to Ornos Bay to rejuvenating wellness treatments, meditative yoga sessions, and daybeds set out on the private beach. Set sail on the hotel yacht to explore untouched beaches, visit the town of Mykonos for vibrant nightlife, or remain at Kivotos Mykonos to enjoy the swimming pools, art gallery, boutique shopping, and more. Highlights of the hotel include: - 40 bright suites and villas with stylish details and sprawling island views - Exclusive dining experiences at a Mediterranean fusion restaurant or on the sand by the ocean - A world-class wellness spa offering treatments and traditional hammam experiences - Luxury amenities, including two swimming pools, a fitness center, an art gallery, and more - A private beach, plus the exclusive use of the Kivotos Mykonos sailing yacht

JTRKS.name: Kivotos Santorini
JTRKS.description: Greeted with a glass of Champagne, guests at Kivotos Santorini will experience the finest of contemporary luxury at this Greek hotel. Smooth, organic lines and curved corners reflect classic Cycladic architecture while modern finishes, décor, and furnishings elevate the experience. Take in panoramic views of Santorini’s caldera and the Aegean Sea from sophisticated accommodations, intimate al fresco terraces, gourmet restaurant, cocktail bar, and outdoor infinity pool. Exceptional experiences await, offering the best of art, culture, dining, and sightseeing. Highlights of the hotel include: - 10 guestrooms, suites, and villas with breathtaking vistas and a private pool or hot tub - Bold, Greek-inspired cuisine that harmoniously blends tradition with innovation - Holistic spa treatments offered in the privacy of your accommodations, plus yoga sessions - Heated outdoor infinity pool with daybeds and a pool bar, all overlooking the sprawling sea - Bespoke concierge to assist in booking wine tastings, yacht excursions, guided tours, and more

PARHD.name: L’Hôtel du Collectionneur Paris
PARHD.description: Located just a few steps from the Champs-Élysées, facing the Parc Monceau, L’Hotel du Collectionneur Paris embodies French refinement within a prestigious Art Deco setting. Every detail has been meticulously designed to offer an unforgettable experience. Its 496 elegant guestrooms and suites provide absolute comfort and breathtaking views of Paris. On the culinary side, the restaurant offers refined cuisine that showcases French flavors while the intimate bar is the perfect place to enjoy a signature cocktail. For a moment of serenity in the heart of the French capital, the hotel’s picturesque terraces and garden provide an exceptional setting—ideal for relaxation or hosting an outdoor event, away from the city’s hustle and bustle. Let yourself be captivated by timeless elegance. Highlights of the hotel include: - 496 guestrooms and suites, some with private balconies offering views of the Eiffel Tower - Contemporary cuisine presented at the hotel's uniquely innovative restaurant - A wellness suite offering beauty rituals for the skin, body, and mind - Lush gardens and tranquil terraces that provide spaces to gather or unwind - Nearby the Champs Élysées and the fashionable Rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré boutiques

SANLV.name: La Valencia Hotel
SANLV.description: A La Jolla landmark since 1926, the legendary La Valencia Hotel is an eclectic mix of Golden Age Hollywood glamour and modern Mediterranean elegance. Nicknamed 'the Pink Lady,’ for its signature pink exterior and distinctive tower, This beautiful award-winning hotel was listed as one of Condé Nast Traveler ’s Top 17 San Diego Hotels in 2019, and one of the 10 Best Hotels in Southern California by USA Today Travel. Take in views of the mighty Pacific from the pool deck and saltwater soaking spa for ultimate relaxation on the California Riviera. - Choose from 114 pet-friendly guestrooms, suites, and exclusive villas with designer furnishings and ocean views - Work out at the fitness center, and soak up the sun by the pool or the nearby beach - Upgrade to the ICON Pacific Suite for top-floor ocean views and Art Deco-inspired décor - Dine at three on-site eateries, and sip a cocktail with live music and ocean views - Plan the perfect event in the hotel’s refined venues, with ocean views, private patios, and terraced gardens that can accommodate up to 250 guests - Snorkel, swim, explore sea caves, and see wild seals at nearby La Jolla Cove - Explore the charming seaside village of La Jolla or travel to San Diego, just 13 mi / 20 km away, for world-class museums, art galleries, theaters, and shops Stroll the grounds framed by lush bougainvillea and palm trees, or simply take in awe-inspiring Pacific views from your guestroom or suite.

SPRLT.name: Las Terrazas Resort and Residences
SPRLT.description: With white powdery sand, lush tropical gardens, and an exquisitely turquoise sea, Las Terrazas Resort and Residences combines beach bliss with adrenaline-packed adventures. Go kayaking, or cave tubing, or get a bird’s-eye view of paradise from a helicopter tour. Modern in design with a relaxed sense of style, the charming resort remains true to its island roots with locally handcrafted furnishings, a Caribbean-inspired restaurant, and spa treatments that use Belizean chocolate and sea salt. Located on Ambergris Caye, this sprawling beachfront hideaway sports a treasured spot along a secluded stretch of glistening coastline. - Enjoy a dynamic view from one of 39 island-chic penthouse suites, sea houses, and residences - Soothe your sun-kissed skin in the spa with a specialized remedy made with yogurt and local honey - Savor freshly caught snapper and chilled white wine on O Restaurant’s seaside terrace - Sip a fruity rum punch served straight to your sun lounger at O Bar - Pedal the island’s pathways on one of the resort’s bicycles or cruise into town by water taxi Island life in Belize is laid back, friendly, and brimming with aquatic wonder. Swim with colorful parrot fish on a snorkeling excursion, admire the sea view from your balcony, and dine on fresh shrimp ceviche. Indulge and let the natural power of the island inspire and revitalize you.

ZTHLL.name: Lesante Classic
ZTHLL.description: For celebrity-style service at a luxurious, seaside locale, get away to Lesante Classic in Tsivili village on the coast of Zakynotho (also known as Zante), one of Greece’s beautiful Ionian islands. Set just 250 feet from the beach, this award-winning hotel features coastal-chic rooms, three pools, on-site dining, a fitness center, and the island’s largest and most extensive spa. Guests can also enjoy custom services, including a private chauffeur and butler service, security protection, a personal chef, arrangements for private jets and helicopters, and sailing trips to the most secluded spots on the island. Its location on one of the most stunning and vibrant of the Greek islands is a prime attribute, and its serene surroundings, modern facilities, and spectacular piece of paradise combine to make it an ideal vacation destination. Highlights of the hotel include: - 119 guestrooms and suites featuring balconies or terraces with pool, garden, or sea views - Complimentary breakfast, plus restaurants with Greek and international cuisines - Signature cocktails at the piano bar or at the swim-up bar at the sparkling outdoor pool - Luxurious massages at the spa, plus an indoor pool, hammam, sauna, and adventure shower - Near a charming main street and stunning beaches, like the island's famous Shipwreck Beach

FCOLR.name: Locanda Rossa
FCOLR.description: Discover the unique charm and picturesque landscape of Italy's Tuscany when you stay at Locanda Rossa, a quaint country retreat that offers guests a luxurious stay in an unforgettable setting. Located north of Rome on 60 acres / 21 hectares of rolling hills covered in 3,200 olive trees, Locanda Rossa offers guests a quintessential and intimate Italian vacation. While at Locanda Rossa, guests can: - Stay in individually decorated rooms, suites, and villas — all with original artwork - Dine at an authentic farm-to-fork restaurant with olive oil straight from the hotel's grove - Explore nearby attractions such as the Tarot Garden or the Medieval city of Capalbio - Relax at the spa and experience a hammam steam or emotional showers. This private country estate — just a few minute's drive from the beautiful Tuscan coast — offers sumptuous gardens, two impressive pools, and multiple options for entertainment and activities. From wine-tasting to cooking classes, history hikes, or a morning at the gym, Locanda Rossa can provide guests with a curated and creative Tuscan itinerary.

ACHHM.name: Loewen Hotel Montafon
ACHHM.description: Set amid the breathtaking peaks of the Vorarlberg Alps in the charming village of Schruns, Loewen Hotel Montafon is the ideal base for year-round mountain exploration. Thoughtfully designed to feel both relaxed and elegant, the hotel invites guests to slow down, reconnect with nature, and discover the heartfelt service of Austria. From accommodations that boast warm materials and mountain views to restaurants that demonstrate culinary excellence, an inviting spa, and activities galore amid the slopes and trails, this beautifully balanced Alpine escape ensures that you’ll discover everything you seek on your high-elevation visit to Austria. Highlights of the hotel include: - 102 warm, refined guestrooms and suite inspired by modern Alpine design - Modern mountain cuisine crafted with high-quality, seasonal ingredients from the region - A tranquil spa with heated indoor and outdoor pools, herbal sauna, crystal bath, and more - Loewengrube nightclub, offering performances by live musicians and DJs, plus karaoke - Activities ranging from winter skiing to tennis, hiking, mountain biking, and rock climbing

NCEMA.name: Maison Albar - Le Victoria
NCEMA.description: The cosmopolitan atmosphere in Nice, France, carries over into Maison Albar Le Victoria, where comfort meets luxurious grandeur. Each guestroom features ornate materials that elevate their aesthetic and many of them also have a balcony or terrace overlooking beautiful spaces ranging from the hotel garden to the energetic city streets or vibrant Mediterranean Sea. Relax on the rooftop at the Provencal restaurant, infinity pool, or lively bar, or visit the lavish spa. Highlights of the resort include: - 132 guestrooms and suites overlooking either the ocean or city streets - Rooftop restaurant with a bar serving cuisine inspired by the Mediterranean - Luxurious spa with relaxing treatments and a swimming pool carved from marble - Infinity pool on the roof plus beach access within walking distance of the hotel In addition to sunny beaches, renowned artists, and luxury wines, the city of Nice is known for its rich history, having been deemed a UNESCO World Heritage Site in 2021. The hotel, too, throws a nod to the region’s past, named for the current owners – the Albar family – and its five generations of hoteliers.

PARVH.name: Majestic Hotel-SPA Champs-Elysées
PARVH.description: Ideally located on a quiet street in the 16th arrondissement, just steps from the stunning Champs-Élysées, Majestic Hotel-SPA Champs-Elysées offers privacy and comfort amid classically elegant surroundings. With contemporary French décor, the hotel charms you throughout its halls and facilities, from the tranquil ambiance of the Spa to the cosmopolitan character of Restaurant. For the epitome of timeless Parisian sophistication, alongside the exquisite services of a team led by a Les Clefs d'Or concierge, look no further than Majestic Hotel-SPA Champs-Elysées. - Stay in one of 57 guestrooms, suites, and residences, with select quarters featuring private terraces - Enjoy divine cuisine at the Restaurant and expertly made cocktails at the Bar - Indulge in a hammam ritual or a facial at the Spa or unwind in the sauna - Enjoy an easy stroll to the Arc de Triomphe, the Champs-Élysées, or the Eiffel Tower - Take an aqua-biking class at the wondrously large swimming pool or book a personal trainer session at the gym Majestic Hotel-SPA Champs-Elysées is dedicated to creating unforgettable stays. The elite Les Clefs d'Or concierge ensures your every desire is met, and the therapists and trainers at the spa have a clear focus on your rejuvenation and relaxation.

LONKH.name: Middle Eight
LONKH.description: Middle Eight sits in the heart of Covent Garden, an area steeped in history, shopping, entertainment, and attractions. The hotel takes its name from the musical term 'middle eight,' a type of musical interlude or bridge that differs in character from a song's melody and is used to inject variety through a change of key or tempo. Middle Eight works in a similar way, enhancing the Covent Garden area with its luxurious and modern accommodations, while still holding strong to the heritage and character of the neighborhood. Guests of Middle Eight can: - Stay in contemporary rooms featuring bespoke toiletries and Egyptian cotton linens - Dine at Sycamore and savor authentic Italian-inspired tastes and flavors - Enjoy a live performance at the hotel's bar and nightlife hot spot, QT - Take a stroll or catch the Tube to see some of the city's best-loved landmarks - Ease into a warm bath surrounded by luxurious marble and soothing, radiant-floor heating in one of the hotel's sumptuous suites Harking back to 1912, the building that Middle Eight calls home was originally a Methodist church called Kingsway Hall. Known to have some of the finest acoustics for recording classical orchestral and choral music at that time, Middle Eight continues that theme of live music and performances throughout its dining and entertainment venues.

ASEMG.name: MOLLIE ASPEN
ASEMG.description: Travelers heading to Aspen with the goal of skiing, biking, seeing the sights, and immersing themselves in the atmosphere of a classic ski town need look no further than MOLLIE. One of the newest hotels in the downtown area, MOLLIE welcomes guests and locals alike into a world of impeccable design and dedicated service, all set in the heart of the city. Highlights of the hotel include: - An array of rooms with luxury amenities and baths with rain showers - A rooftop pool and terrace with amazing views of Aspen Mountain - Multiple spots to dine including a café, restaurant & bar, and rooftop lounge - Close to everything that makes Aspen unique, including its famed ski slopes Outside the hotel, all the city's best sights and attractions are just a few minutes walk away, making MOLLIE one of the best home bases from which to set out and explore Aspen and the area’s astounding natural beauty.

MAHMO.name: Morvedra Nou
MAHMO.address_raw: Camí de Macarella, Km 7, Ciutadella de Menorca
MAHMO.description: Before becoming a hotel, Morvedra Nou was a farmhouse – and it still features an enchanting rustic charm today. The adults-only estate, tucked away in Menorca’s sprawling countryside, is a haven of tranquility, with accommodations that make guests feel right at home with amenities like private plunge pools or outdoor bathtubs shaded by swaying trees. The chef crafts creative Mediterranean fare using both Menorcan recipes and local ingredients. Wellness is held at the forefront, with massage treatments provided in the comfort of your room or out in nature and private yoga classes offered to enhance mind and body. Set out to explore the Spanish island, which was once home to the Talayotic civilization, or stay active while swimming, biking, boating, or horseback riding. Highlights of the hotel include: - 25 stylish guestrooms and suites with a harmonious design and views of the countryside - A Mediterranean restaurant featuring Menorcan recipes prepared with fresh ingredients - Sunset Experience with breathtaking vistas, ambient music, small plates, and light aperitifs - Tranquil in-room or outdoor massage treatments to encourage rest and relaxation - Adventurous activities, including biking, yoga classes, swimming, boating, and horseback riding

ECIMB.name: Mukul Resort
ECIMB.address_raw: Km. 10 Carretera, Tola - Las Salinas, Tola, Tola
ECIMB.description: Explore a coastal haven of world-class luxury and serene natural surroundings at Mukul Resort, a tropical Nicaraguan sanctuary bordered by a pristine beach and lush jungle. Recently re-imagined as a members club for everyone, this oceanfront escape offers elevated accommodations and access to an array of amenities. Highlights of the resort include: - Accommodations ranging from Beach Villas to Tree Suites private residences - Multiple dining and bar options serving Nicaraguan and international cuisine - A restorative spa featuring a crystal temple and ancient sanctuary - Activities including surfing, swimming, nature tours and walks, golf, and more Meaning “secret” in the Maya language, Mukul Resort immerses guests in an intimate space set apart from the hustle and bustle of the rest of the world. Here, travelers can rest, relax, swim, sunbathe, and take in the beauty of nature, all without ever leaving the resort.

JMKMN.name: Myconian Naia
JMKMN.description: Minimalist yet sumptuous, and close to Mykonos Town, Myconian Naia is a serene, adults-only hilltop hideaway. With panoramic views over the Aegean Sea, Myconian Naia’s 18 palatial suites, some with private pools, all face west, in line for some of the most spectacular sunsets in Greece. Molecular Mediterranean cuisine and handcrafted cocktails are served in a setting where designer furnishings of deceptive simplicity combine with pitch-perfect service to create the ultimate island retreat. - Sink into a lush four-poster bed in one of 18 chic and minimalist suites - Discover the island’s best ingredients presented with international culinary techniques at Naros - Toast the sunset with a cocktail from the lantern-lit pool bar - Stay fit, healthy, and active with sessions in the well-equipped gym - Destress with a detoxifying massage at the cavernous and atmospheric Satori Spa - Let staff plan a dream day horseback riding on the beach or exploring the Aegean by yacht Tranquil and lavish are the bywords of a vacation at Myconian Naia. The softest sun loungers and the dreamiest views are just some of the highlights you can expect at the hotel, leaving you feeling relaxed, refreshed, and pampered.

JMKMK.name: Mykonos Blanc
JMKMK.description: Open the doors to your private balcony for views of the Aegean Sea or step into your private patio for luxurious seclusion at Mykonos Blanc, a luxury five-star boutique hotel on the pure white sands of beautiful Ornos Beach. Echoing the signature all-white décor of the Cyclades, the spacious guestrooms, suites, and villas feature curved archways and understated yet sumptuous décor. Enjoy sushi by the sea, laze by the edge of the cabana-lined infinity pool, or dance the night away in the cosmopolitan bars of nearby Mykonos Town. - Stay in one of 40 serene and sophisticated guestrooms, all with an iconic white-on-white palette; some have private pools and hot tubs - Relax on a lounger and soak up the Mykonian sun while you sip on a cocktail - Dine at the on-site restaurants, and then work it all off at the fitness center - Be pampered in the Mykonos Blanc Spa with a range of personalized treatments - Enjoy a shisha pipe with your toes in the sand at the unique beachfront bar - Let the concierge organize a memorable experience like horseback riding on the beach - Take a ride to Mykonos Town after dark and hit the infamous party scene The stylish white décor of the hotel mirrors not only the island’s sugar-cube houses but also the platinum sands of Ornos Bay, one of the island’s best beaches. Mykonos Blanc makes the most of an enviable position right on the shore with tented cabanas — perfect whether you want to tan in tranquility or start the party without lifting a finger.

LISMS.name: MYRIAD by SANA
LISMS.description: Set in the vibrant Parque das Nações area of Lisbon, MYRIAD by SANA offers guests a stunning setting with multiple amenities and panoramic views of both the city and the Tagus River. Connected to Lisbon’s Vasco de Gama tower, a popular tourist attraction that was originally constructed for a 1998 World’s Fair, the hotel is the tallest building in Portugal. Check in to total sophistication and comfort in one of Lisbon’s most vibrant neighborhoods at this dynamic riverside hotel, where guests are invited to experience an unforgettable stay with award-winning dining, a luxury spa, swimming pool, and on-site gym. Highlights of the hotel include: - 186 contemporary design guestrooms and suites with exceptional comfort and amenities - Fifty Seconds, a globally inspired Michelin-starred restaurant offering refined fine dining - Tranquil spa, featuring a heated indoor swimming pool set high above the city skyline - A bar and lounge with Mediterranean fare and a terrace overlooking the river and nearby parks - Fully outfitted, state-of-the-art fitness center that is available 24 hours a day for workouts

BUDMH.name: Mystery Hotel Budapest
BUDMH.description: Built by Hungarian Freemasons in the 19th century, the historic Mystery Hotel Budapest is full of wonder and mystique. Located in Budapest’s 6th district, this new luxury boutique hotel is shrouded with legends, secrets, and optical illusions above the front desk, the fire by the entrance, and the elevator hidden by the curtains. Stay in intricately designed studio and suite-style guest rooms. Indulge in sumptuous cuisine at The Great Hall — the hotel restaurant and bar — serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Private dining options are available as well as an unforgettable rooftop experience. - The hotel’s 82 guest rooms are elegantly designed in ancient Grecian style - The hotel is conveniently located downtown and near the Nyugati train station - Relax at the Secret Garden Spa or get your body moving in the fitness room - This alluring building dates back to the 19th century and was built by Hungarian Freemasons - Indulge in breakfast, lunch, and dinner at convenient on-site restaurants - Pets are welcome and pampered with pet beds, food and water dishes, treats, and toys - Try to solve the mystery to open the hidden doors of Pythagoras Mystery Hotel Budapest is in a prime area bustling with bars, cafes, and nightlife. Its proximity to the State Opera House and Andrássy út places you in an area offering a bounty of upscale shopping, restaurants, and beautiful buildings. Because the hotel is conveniently located near public transportation, the rest of Budapest is at your fingertips.

RECNM.name: NANNAI Muro Alto
RECNM.address_raw: Rod PE 09 s/n – Aces. Muro Alto KM 3, Porto de Galinhas
RECNM.description: Escape to the tranquil south Pernambuco coastline in Brazil for a tropical getaway filled with sunshine and golden beaches. NANNAI Muro Alto offers dreamlike accommodations surrounded by pristine natural beauty that make travelers feel far removed from the rest of the world. Abundantly fresh culinary offerings offer tastes of Brazil in beautiful settings while an on-site L’Occitane spa features customized treatments that indulge the senses. During every stay, guests can also take advantage of the vast sports and leisure activity program, lounge by the pool or on Muro Alto Beach, shop at a sophisticated boutique, let the children play at the kids’ club, and more. Highlights of the hotel include: - 137 enchanting apartments, a villa suite, and bungalows that each feel world’s away - Restaurants and culinary experiences that celebrate abundance and sophistication - A tranquil L'Occitane spa with invigorating massages, facials, body treatments, and baths - Activities ranging from pool swimming, kayaking, and paddleboarding to yoga and tennis - Beach boutique combining Brazilian elegance with the laid-back leisure of the coast

FENNN.name: NANNAI Noronha
FENNN.address_raw: Vila do Sueste - Distrito Estadual, Fernando de Noronha
FENNN.description: Nestled on a Brazilian island that is part of the Fernando de Noronha archipelago, NANNAI Noronha is a sanctuary for tranquility in the middle of the Atlantic Ocean. A refuge for both humans on land and marine life in the water, this protected region immerses travelers in the island’s pristine beauty. Stay in elevated bungalows, some with amenities like relaxing daybeds or outdoor hammocks. Savor the tastes of traditional Brazilian cuisine, lounge by the pool, indulge in luxe culinary experiences, or consult the on-site concierge to plan out the rest of your stay. Highlights of the hotel include: - 10 sea view apartments and bungalows emphasizing comfort and genuine connection - Unforgettable culinary experiences that immerse guests in Brazilian flavors and tradition - An outdoor swimming pool with a panoramic view of the beautiful Sueste Bay - Traditional afternoon teas, private breakfasts, beach luaus, picnics, and tasting menus available - A concierge team that can help plan an itinerary of activities and restaurants on the island

ATHNJ.name: NJV Athens Plaza
ATHNJ.description: With a prime location in historic Syntagma Square close to the Acropolis, this luxurious five-star hotel is ideal for your Athens stay. The doorman welcomes you to NJV Athens Plaza with a warm smile as you step into a contemporary lobby with gleaming tiled floors, marble columns, diamond motifs, and a mezzanine library. This fashionable hotel delights with sleek lines, contemporary lighting, and minimalist décor in guestrooms, as well as superb views of the Acropolis from selected suites. It also delivers exceptional hospitality, and sophisticated fine dining at the Explorer’s Bar Bistro, a British-styled, most inspiring venue. - Choose from 180 guestrooms and suites with marble bathrooms and views of Syntagma Square, the Acropolis, Voukourestiou Street, or Stadiou Street - Dine in two restaurants and lounges, including traditional Mediterranean cuisine reimagined for the 21st-century palate at the Explorer’s Bar Bistro. - Book an eighth-floor suite for exclusive access to a terrace with olive trees and Acropolis views - Work out in style with access to the prestigious Holmes Place Athens Club and Spa - Be close to major attractions, shops, museums, and archaeological sites NJV Athens Plaza puts you where ancient and modern Greece meet. The Acropolis looms in the near distance; just a block away, boutiques line pedestrianized Voukourestiou Street. Explore Athens' historic riches with the best in five-star hospitality, from concierge services to luxury vehicle rental.

MSYNN.name: NOPSI New Orleans
MSYNN.description: Set in a building that dates back to 1927, the NOPSI New Orleans has breathed new life into an Art Deco landmark. The NOPSI building, once the headquarters of New Orleans Public Service Inc. power and transportation company, has been restored to its former grandeur, with 217 charming guestrooms, industrial-chic meeting spaces, a rooftop bar, and a plethora of exceptional amenities. Upon opening, it was hailed by Architectural Digest as one of the most beautiful new hotels in the USA. In other words: this is a luxury hotel with style and heritage and the best of The Big Easy at its doorstep. - Relax in a ninth-floor suite or a terrace guestroom, featuring private outdoor space and commanding views across the city - Plan events in more than 14,000 sq ft of flexible, stylish indoor and outdoor space - Enjoy a cooling swim or sip an inventive Live Wire cocktail while watching the sunset from the rooftop bar and pool - Drink and dine under vaulted ceilings at Henry's Gin Bar, the prohibition-inspired bar at the heart of the buzzing lobby - Host a party in the private dining room of Public Service, with floor-to-ceiling windows and space for 100 guests - Savor a bounty of Gulf Coast seafood, such as jumbo Louisiana shrimp, at Public Service, the hotel’s colorful community gathering place Step into the heart of New Orleans’ bustling Central Business District, just moments from the vibrancy and charm of the French Quarter. Once you’ve explored the best of the Crescent City, you can look forward to a tranquil sleep in your spacious, classically elegant guestroom.

MANNC.name: Northcote
MANNC.description: On the edge of the stunning Ribble Valley in Lancashire, England, the historic buildings, breathtaking views, luxurious guestrooms and suites, and elegant dining at Northcote inspire relaxation and reflection, whether you stay for a short getaway or stop overnight while traveling north or south. An oasis of food and wine excellence, Northcote's stylish and sophisticated Michelin-starred restaurant, with menus designed by Executive Chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen, offers views of the garden and distant hills of the valley. - Recharge overnight in one of the manor house's 26 imaginative and individually inspired guestrooms, then wake up to one of Northcote's famous Lancashire breakfasts - Try cooking lessons, gin-making, cheese tasting, or clay pigeon shooting - Golf at one of the many parkland or championship links courses nearby - Savor Northcote's creative dishes and harmonious flavors complemented by a bottle of wine from the hotel's award-winning cellars - Select from a variety of whiskies and cognacs, rums from seven different countries, and gins from near and far at the cocktail bar or terrace lounge - Host a celebration for as many as 14 people over lunch or dinner at Lisa Goodwin-Allen's chef's table Northcote's tucked-away location makes it a gem for seasoned travelers. Like a well-kept secret, the property encourages exploration, both around the grounds and within each guest. Trying new flavors and experiences is part of each and every visit. Nearby, you can immerse yourself in the culture of Lancaster Castle and Williamson Park. Surround yourself with nature and the United Kingdom's famed rolling hills at Yorkshire Dales National Park and the Gordale Scar, a ravine that looks like a Tolkien wonderland.

SINOF.name: One Farrer Hotel
SINOF.description: One Farrer Hotel is a lifestyle retreat hotel-resort in Singapore defined by its intuitive and trend-setting approach towards hospitality, remarkable amenities, and unique features such as its award-winning permanent collection of original art from across Greater Asia, the largest of its kind in the city, and its 15 water and tropical gardens, including a fully operational farm. Set in the district known as Little India, with Farrer Park MRT station right at its doorstep, the hotel offers a great location from which to set out and explore the city. - Enjoy alfresco dining with skyline vistas at the award-winning Escape - Indulge in the pinnacle of private dining experiences at the Nest at One Farrer - Revitalize with a swim in the Olympic-sized pool or a session at the fitness center - View over 400 works of contemporary art by some of the most renowned artists in Asia From the reception area’s large, floating bronze green apple sculpture to the Farrer Suites with direct access to Farrer Park Hospital, it is clear this hotel was designed to provide comfort and privacy in an innovative, total lifestyle environment. The lobby sculpture, created by Kumari Nahappan, one of Singapore’s leading artists, represents Artemis, the Greek god of lifestyle, and is symbolic of the hotel itself — a home away from home that nourishes the body as well as the soul.

KULOW.name: One World Hotel
KULOW.description: Located just outside Kuala Lumpur city center, One World Hotel is a distinguished, award-winning hotel, offering a luxurious experience with gracious hospitality and stunning architecture in the heart of Petaling Jaya. Conveniently located adjacent to 1 Utama Shopping Centre, one of the largest malls in the world with more than 700 retail outlets, and within walking distance of the Bandar Utama MRT station, it offers seamless access to the vibrant city and its surrounding attractions as well as hotel amenities, including an enchanting spa, gourmet kitchen, gym, pool, and pickleball venue. Highlights of the hotel include: - 452 guestrooms and suites are designed to offer a sense of tranquility and relaxation - Dining that combines Eastern and Western cuisine, including a contemporary Chinese restaurant - A spa offering foot rituals and holistic treatments to balance the mind and body - Amenities ranging from an outdoor pool to a gym and pickleball courts - Adjacent to 1 Utama Shopping Centre, with a 20-screen cinema, bowling alley, arcade, and more

MADOY.name: Only YOU Boutique Hotel Madrid
MADOY.description: A former 19th-century palace, Only You Boutique Hotel Madrid has been lovingly modernized by acclaimed designer Lázaro Rosa-Violán. From the moment you step into the beautiful lobby, with its soaring ceiling and walls lined with white suitcases and hand-painted tile murals, you will feel enchanted. More than 150 years since the hotel served as a palace, its timeless design, chic rooms, and flawless service mean it is still fit for royalty. Highlights of the hotel include: - 125 guestrooms and suites with some offering spectacular city views - Delectable dining and drinks at two restaurants and a cocktail bar - A location between Madrid’s stylish Chueca and Salesas neighborhoods - An Asian-inspired Thai Room Wellness Center to soothe and relax Step inside this modernized palace and see unexpected design details shine. Arched windows, Juliet balconies, Chesterfield sofas, rich carpets, and oversized lamps are just some of the features that combine old-world glamor with modern luxury.

VLCYV.name: Only YOU Hotel Valencia
VLCYV.description: Set amid the shady, narrow streets of Valencia’s Old Town, Only YOU Hotel Valencia offers guests an inspired experience colored by the traditional style, cuisine, and culture of one of Spain’s most iconic destinations. Featuring refined, glamorous interiors designed by Lázaro Rosa-Violán, the hotel’s airy and luxurious atmosphere immediately imbues guests with a true sense of relaxed, Mediterranean coastal life. Highlights of the hotel include: - 191 accommodations ranging from Deluxe options to spacious Panorama Suites - Delicious dining at two gourmet restaurants and refreshing cocktails at the bar - In-suite spa experiences and a fully outfitted fitness center to focus mind and body - A prime location just steps from Valencia's best sights, landmarks, and attractions Located in a building originally used as the Hotel Astoria – the first luxury property in the city – past guests have included Salvador Dalí, Sofia Loren, and even Michael Jordan, reaffirming Only YOU Hotel Valencia’s status as one of the city’s top places to see and be seen.

ZREOL.name: OROS LUXURY BEACH RESORT
ZREOL.description: Escape to the island of Crete, where OROS LUXURY BEACH RESORT sits nestled on the hillside. The light, airy nature of the estate lends itself to rest and relaxation, whether you’re lounging by the lifestyle pool, splashing with the kids in the family zone, or building a sandcastle on the private beach. The Greek hotel is also home to a spa with ample wet areas, contemporary dining venues offering an array of cuisines, and activities ranging from yoga to cooking classes. After a long day in the sun, retreat to a comfortable guestroom with views of the Sea of Crete. Highlights of the resort include: - 186 guestrooms, suites, and villas offering ocean views and private balconies - Restaurants ranging from Greek and Mediterranean to sushi and buffet-style - A tranquil spa with treatment rooms, wet areas, a salon, and fitness center - Lifestyle and family swimming pools, plus a private stretch of sandy beach - Activities ranging from cooking classes, wine tastings, and yoga to DJ sets around the pool

TPEPC.name: Palais de Chine
TPEPC.description: Celebrating the Age of Discovery while embracing the future, Palais de Chine blends Asian and Western styles to deliver a culturally rich, luxurious, and contemporary hotel experience in Taipei. Wander its corridors and enjoy the many artifacts on display. Lounge in your sumptuous guestroom, with Asian and European décor. Whether you’re connecting to your E-Butler or working out while admiring the view from the 17th-floor gym, do so in style at the Palais de Chine. - Choose from 277 spacious and luxurious East-meets-West guestrooms and suites - Explore the hotel’s collection of museum-worthy sculptures, tapestries, and wall art - Use E-Butler on your TV to make your stay seamless - Host an event under copper-leaf drapes and 16 crystal chandeliers in the Grand Hall - Bathe using exclusive Palais de Chine-fragranced products presented in collectible vials - Experience gastronomical excellence at three Michelin-starred restaurant Le Palais A home away from home for leading artists, academics, explorers, and diplomats, Palais de Chine blends regal European design with the philosophies of Asian scholars to create a “museum hotel” rich in aesthetics, culture, and extravagance that will live long in the memory.

FCOPM.name: Palazzo Dama
FCOPM.description: Feel like royalty with a stay at Palazzo Dama, a beautiful, historic villa ideally located next to the banks of the Tiber in the heart of the city, just steps from Piazza del Popolo in Rome. This high-end, pet-friendly palace-turned-hotel was once home to nobility, with stunning original features blended with modern amenities and design by famed Italian architect Antonio Girardi. Admire the crystal chandeliers and sophisticated décor. Stroll the enchanting gardens amid lemon and olive trees. Swim in the outdoor pool. Work out in the 24-hour gym, dine in the Peruvian-Asian restaurant, and sip a cocktail at the exclusive Raspoutine nightclub. - The 29 refined guestrooms and suites feature marble bathrooms, wood floors, soundproof walls, and art from all over the world; in-room massages are available - The hotel’s modern design in a historic palazzo offers a unique, home-like stay - The gorgeous garden is a serene oasis — and the perfect spot for a special event - Dine and drink on-site at the full-service restaurant, bar, and one of Rome’s best nightclubs - Have a cappuccino or aperitif by the pool, which lights up at night - Walk to the Piazza del Popolo, Via del Corso, the Spanish Steps, and the Villa Borghese gardens; Vatican City, Trevi Fountain, and the Colosseum are all within 1 mi / 2 km This beguiling noble palace was once the residence of the Malaspina family, a family that hosted high-society gatherings for dignitaries, diplomats, aristocrats, and the cultural elite. The hotel’s name was inspired by the 18th-century dama Marchesa Anna Maria Malaspina, who was admired for her wit and sophistication.

FCOGP.name: Parco dei Principi Grand Hotel & Spa
FCOGP.description: For complete peace and relaxation in Rome, look no further than Parco dei Principi Grand Hotel & Spa. With a prime location near wonderful Villa Borghese Park, you will enjoy easy access to many of the city’s best landmarks. Inspired by the opulent homes of 17th-century Italian aristocracy, the interior’s gilded stuccowork, sumptuous fabrics, and rich colors exude regal charm. The hospitality and warm welcome at the award-winning hotel are second to none, and the expansive spa and fitness center are ideal for unwinding after a day exploring the iconic city. - Winner of the Condé Nast Johansens Best Hotel with Spa Award – Europe and Mediterranean - Choose from 177 classically decorated guestrooms and suites - Indulge in views of Villa Borghese Park and the nearby botanical gardens - Take a short stroll to the world-famous Spanish Steps and Barcaccia Fountain - Dine in the hotel’s three exceptional restaurants with park views and beautiful terraces Explore Rome following the excellent concierge’s suggestions, taking in some of the world’s most iconic sights just a short walk from the hotel. Return for a rejuvenating massage before a leisurely dinner in the Pauline Borghese restaurant, followed by a restful night’s sleep in your plush guestroom or suite.

NYCHP.name: Park Lane New York
NYCHP.description: With some of the most breathtaking views in the city, Park Lane New York welcomes travelers and locals alike to an iconic hotel rising 47 stories into the New York skyline. Located at one of the most sought-after addresses in Manhattan, the hotel’s location just steps from Central Park offers remarkable views of the park and Manhattan’s skyline and easy access to the best of the Big Apple. Highlights of this elegant, inviting, and pet-friendly hotel include: - 610 expansive rooms and 80 magnificent suites with sweeping views - Darling Rooftop Bar and Lounge perched on the 47th floor - Park Lane Café offers reimagined contemporary classics - State-of-the-art fitness center with Peloton bikes, ellipticals, and more - Les Clefs d’Or offers access to all the best NYC has to offer

MCZPB.name: Paru Boutique Hotel
MCZPB.description: Perfectly positioned between the sandy beach and lush greenery, Paru Boutique Hotel in Brazil offers a private escape centered around the harmony of nature. Rustic yet elevated suites and bungalows await, designed in a Brazilian style that combines simplistic beauty with a sophisticated lifestyle. Keeping both wellness and sustainability in mind, this intimate resort allows guests to get in touch with nature while enjoying locally inspired cuisine, rejuvenating spa treatments, and a wealth of activities, both on- and off-site. Highlights of the hotel include: - 20 suites and bungalows that combine the best of Brazilian architecture with natural elements - A contemporary bistro highlighting fresh, local ingredients that reveal a sense of place - Serene massages and other spa treatments that provide guests with balance and renewal - Wellness experiences ranging from tennis, yoga, and meditation to biking on the beach - Local excursions to natural swimming pools or a manatee sanctuary

ORDPC.name: Pendry Chicago
ORDPC.description: Set amid downtown Chicago’s soaring skyscrapers and high-rises sits the Carbide & Carbon Building, a 1929 Art Deco architectural masterpiece now home to one of the Windy City’s newest luxury hotels: Pendry Chicago. Paying homage to the past while staying firmly grounded in the present, Pendry Chicago offers travelers to the largest city in the Midwest a simple and sophisticated stay through inspired interior design, dedicated service, and exceptional amenities and features. While a guest at Pendry Chicago, travelers can: Slumber in 364 rooms and suites designed with an eye toward the building’s historic style Indulge in dinner and drinks at Venteux, a Parisian-inspired French brasserie Admire city views while sipping craft cocktails at Château Carbide on the 24th floor's terrace Stay at the top of your game with a workout in the 24-hour deluxe fitness center Set out to explore nearby sites like Millenium Park, the Art Institute, and Magnificent Mile At Pendry Chicago, immersing yourself in city life is easy thanks to its sophisticated urban aesthetic that effortlessly signals a chic cosmopolitanism and its central location just a short walk from many of the city’s best attractions, restaurants, and entertainment venues.

ELHPS.name: Pink Sands Resort
ELHPS.description: Offering total relaxation or complete adventure, Pink Sands Resort is a dreamy paradise found on gorgeous Harbour Island. Amid acres of lush gardens and shaded by swaying palm trees, this luxurious beachfront hideaway makes for a blissful retreat, fragranced by vibrant hibiscus flowers. The resort’s organic kitchen garden grows luscious fruits, vegetables, and herbs that are used in each of the elegant restaurants’ gourmet dishes. World-class dining, thrilling watersports, off-site charters, and enchanting cottages, some boasting sparkling private pools, are just a handful of offerings that make this such a beloved destination. Of course, it is the pink sand beach that truly takes your breath away. - Stay at one of 29 luxurious cottages, villas or homes, many with exquisite views of the Atlantic Ocean - Snorkel or scuba dive through crystal-clear waters and explore colorful coral reefs - Dine on traditional Bahamian food with soft pink sand only steps away - Indulge in a soothing massage before sipping on cool coconut water by the sea - Explore the picturesque sights of the island on a resort bike or golf cart Wake up in a quaint cottage with wood-beamed ceilings and Bahamian furnishings, and then stroll to the pastel-pink beach notably framed by azure waters. Authentic Caribbean hospitality and an alluring sense of blissful sanctuary await you at this serene resort, far from the hustle and bustle of urban life. Spend the morning snorkeling, scuba diving, or reef fishing before browsing the novels in the British colonial-style library in the afternoon and simply relaxing by the gently heated freshwater pool come sunset.

PMIPM.name: Pleta De Mar Luxury By Nature
PMIPM.address_raw: Via De Les Cales, s/n, Canyamel, Mallorca
PMIPM.description: Nestled on a cliff in a Mediterranean forest overlooking the sea, surrounded by wild olive and pine trees, Pleta De Mar Luxury By Nature puts an emphasis on respecting the natural world. Its luxurious suites all feature outdoor terraces for visitors to embrace the island while the interiors offer neutral hues to keep guests grounded. Elsewhere, Pleta De Mar offers flame-grilled meals, an outdoor spa facility, fitness classes, and other activities. Highlights of the resort include: - 30 spacious suites with living areas and outdoor terraces - A signature restaurant serving flavorful Mediterranean dishes - Tranquil spa treatments, a sauna, hot tub, outdoor pool, and more - Activities ranging from hiking, boating, yoga, and Pilates to culinary tastings

SHATP.name: Primus Hotel Shanghai Hongqiao
SHATP.description: Whether you are in Shanghai for business or pleasure, Primus Hotel Shanghai Hongqiao guarantees a supremely luxurious stay. A sense of modern refinement pervades the hotel, from the unique glass exterior and soaring lobby to 393 contemporary guestrooms and suites. Dining choices include three gourmet restaurants and an impressive atrium bar, and the hotel’s proximity to the airport makes it an ultra-convenient option — yet great transport connections ensure the city is within easy access. - Swim laps at your own pace in the indoor pool - Burn some vacation calories in the state-of-the-art fitness center - Indulge in a rejuvenating treatment at the Touch Spa - Choose between Italian, Chinese, or international cuisine - Plan the perfect event in the grand ballroom and 11 meeting rooms

TRNPP.name: Principi di Piemonte UNA Esperienze
TRNPP.description: High above the historic city of Turin, delight in the luxury of every detail at Principi di Piemonte UNA Esperienze. Framed by the Piedmonts Alps, this unique urban setting takes visitors back in time to the opulence and charm of the early 20th century with just 100 guestrooms, delivering five-star service and elevated amenities, including: - Delicious local Italian cuisine paired with the perfect wines at Casa Savoia - A wellness center and spa hosting a steam bath, sauna, and Jacuzzi - The Salone delle Feste with room to host clients and conferences - Close proximity to local landmarks, such as The Egyptian Museum - Museo Egizio, Palazzo Madama, and Juventus Stadium Admire the architectural rationalism and the hotel’s mix of classic details and modern comforts, embracing the royal treatment with upscale amenities and a staff with a keen eye for detail.

SAOPU.name: Pulso Hotel
SAOPU.description: A combination of warm wood and soaring glass welcomes guests to Pulso Hotel in the heart of São Paulo’s financial district. The ultra-modern architecture combines gourmet dining, luxury accommodations, and sumptuous amenities to create an unforgettable stylish, and cosmopolitan destination. Highlights of the hotel include: - 57 sophisticated guestrooms and suites featuring deluxe details and unique art - L’Occitane SPA - an indulgent and iconic space to relax and refresh - A main restaurant serving gastronomic delights, plus an accompanying bar - A fully equipped Gym, heated swimming pool, and wellness center - Location between some of the city’s best-loved neighborhoods Anchored by impressive design that stands out from its neighbors, a collection of unique artwork throughout its accommodations and public spaces, and frequent live shows and entertainment, Pulso Hotel invites guests to immerse themselves in the elevated and sophisticated urban atmosphere of Brazil’s most populous city.

SANRB.name: Rancho Bernardo Inn
SANRB.description: Experience the hidden beauty and end-of-the-earth feel at Rancho Bernardo Inn, a 265-acre retreat in San Diego's North County offering access to local culture, beach towns, breweries, and ample hiking to burn off the many indulgences you'll experience during your stay. Expansive grounds surround beautiful buildings with wide verandas and sun-dappled balconies. Guests of Rancho Bernardo Inn can: - Perfect their golf game at its championship course - Float and swim in three pools, including an adults-only option and family pool - Experience an award-winning spa with outdoor treatment casitas, water features, and a pool with cabanas - Enjoy live music and cold cocktails at Veranda Fireside Lounge & Restaurant - Dine at AVANT, the Inn's premium culinary destination, and savor fresh California cuisine Rooms are set discreetly among winding paths surrounded by lush vegetation, offering ample privacy and ultimate comfort.

MGARS.name: Rancho Santana
MGARS.description: Experience 'The Good Life' when you book a stay at Rancho Santana on Nicaragua’s pristine Emerald Coast. Enjoy ultimate privacy and serenity at this resort set on 2,700 acres of forested hills, stunning cliffs, and five peaceful beaches. Guests of Rancho Santana can: - Indulge in luxurious treatments at the Spa in El Bosque with signature massage and holistic therapies - Explore miles of hiking, horseback riding, and secluded beaches spread throughout the grounds - Relax poolside with cocktail in hand, while nibbling on light bites from The Sand Dollar Pool Bar - Spend a day on the water paddle boarding, surfing, swimming, fishing, and more With spacious rooms themed in relation to the four major elements of fire, wind, water, and earth, you will feel an immediate spiritual and physical connection to the lush landscape of this Central America Pacific Coast paradise.

MLARH.name: Romègas Hotel
MLARH.description: Once the noble residence of Grand Master Mathurin Romègas, a knight and naval commander from the 16th century, this intimate Maltese retreat has been fully restored to showcase the region’s historic character. Designed with contemporary refinement in mind, the hotel aims to provide a discreet, highly personalized experience with quiet moments of luxury away from the vibrant cultural center of the city. Distinct accommodations are complemented by elevated dining at the on-site restaurant, a rooftop pool, a boardroom-style meeting room, and unique experiences that showcase the art and culture of Malta. Highlights of the hotel include: - 23 individually designed guestrooms and suites representing the palazzo’s noble heritage - Bold, contemporary Maltese cuisine made with seasonal produce at the signature restaurant - A rooftop swimming pool and lounge with panoramic views of the harbor - Elegant courtyard bar offering relaxing moments with coffee, cocktails, and aperitifs - Curated cultural tours as well as art-led experiences that showcase local artists

MILHR.name: Rosa Grand Milano - Starhotels Collezione
MILHR.description: The style and sophistication of the Rosa Grand Milano – Starhotels Collezione reflects its prime location in Milan’s historic fashion district. As the sole hotel on Piazza Fontana, with views across the Gothic spires of the Duomo, this four-star hotel offers chic style and upscale amenities. After a day in the city, enjoy the tranquility of the hotel’s wellness center, relax with an aperitif in the opulent wine bar and lounge, dine in the chic restaurant, and retire to your luxurious guestroom or suite adorned with elegant Italian style, comfort, and decor. Highlights of the hotel include: - 346 guestrooms and suites feature white marble or stone bathrooms, oak floors, and Smart TVs - Relax in an expansive wellness center with Turkish bath, solarium, and spa treatments - Work out with personal trainers in the fully-equipped gym - Do business in style with eight meeting rooms holding up to 300 delegates - Elite Clefs d’Or concierge service on hand to assist with your every wish - Go shopping and sightseeing from the hotel’s central location The Rosa Grand Milano – Starhotels Collezione is perfectly located for fashion and culture lovers alike. Discover the very best of the city with the help of the dedicated concierge team.

TCICB.name: Royal Hideaway Corales Beach
TCICB.address_raw: Avenida Virgen de Guadalupe 23, La Caleta Costa Adeje Tenerife
TCICB.description: Royal Hideaway Corales Beach offers an ideal destination for a peaceful island vacation or romantic getaway. This adults-only hotel on the southern coast of picturesque Tenerife – the largest of Spain’s Canary Islands – invites guests age 16 and older to enjoy panoramic views, exclusive amenities, and memorable experiences. Its unique boat-shaped architecture and coral reef-inspired exterior blend the modern building with the stunning outdoor landscape. Highlights of the hotel include: - 121 luxurious suites, each with private terraces and views of the ocean - Award-winning restaurants with wide-ranging international cuisine, plus a rooftop bar - Tranquil wellness haven with serene spa treatments and a hydrotherapy circuit - Fitness center, hot tub, and heated swimming pools with towel concierge - Unforgettable excursions, such as sailing with dolphins, scuba, stargazing, and more Steps away, visit sister hotel Royal Hideaway Corales Suites to access Italian, Mediterranean, and seafood-focused restaurants as well as common spaces like the saltwater swimming pool.

TCICS.name: Royal Hideaway Corales Suites
TCICS.address_raw: Avenida Virgen de Guadalupe 21, La Caleta Costa Adeje Tenerife
TCICS.description: Royal Hideaway Corales Suites invites guests to enjoy an award-winning stay on the iconic island of Tenerife, the largest of Spain’s Canary Islands. Overlooking the Atlantic Ocean, this tropical hideaway offers luxurious suites that serve as a base for solo travelers, couples, and families alike. Designed in the shape of a boat, with an exterior inspired by local coral reefs, the resort features delectable cuisine, from international fare to in-suite floating breakfasts, plus a heated pool and kids club. Highlights of the hotel include: - 114 spacious suites with kitchens, living spaces, and ocean-view terraces - Gourmet restaurants specializing in grilled seafood, traditional Italian, and more - Heated, family-friendly saltwater pool plus a toddler pool for little ones - Private boat charters for whale watching, snorkeling, and exploring local coves Take a short walk next door and guests will find even more amenities at the adults-only Royal Hideaway Corales Beach, including an award-winning restaurant, wellness spa, fitness center, additional swimming pools, and more.

LONLL.name: Royal Lancaster London
LONLL.description: Royal Lancaster London exudes a wow factor perfectly suited to a refined London stay. Step through the opulent entrance into the timelessly sleek lobby with its eight-meter glazed facade, white 1960s-style leather booths, futurist velvet chairs, and cutting-edge lighting. Follow the sweeping white Carrara marble staircase to one of the elegant guestrooms or suites — many with exceptional views of iconic Hyde Park or the famous London skyline. Highlights of the resort include: - 411 guestrooms and suites that blend mid-century design and contemporary luxury - A 24-hour Technogym for fitness enthusiasts plus tranquil, in-room wellness treatments - Authentic, award-winning restaurants plus an elegant lounge with a curated bar menu - Floral-inspired Afternoon Tea service, held in collaboration with the Natural History Museum - Ample meeting space for those looking to host a memorable corporate event or celebration With an enviable location, the Royal Lancaster London is perfectly placed for exploring the capital with children or pets in town, and its discerning concierge service is second to none, offering advice on everything from theaters to walking tours.

DPSSU.name: Samsara Ubud
DPSSU.description: Find yourself in Bali’s enchanting highlands with a stay at Samsara Ubud. The tranquil jungle setting allows you to ease into relaxation in a place where the contemporary elegance of private villas with heated plunge pools meets the vibrant Balinese culture. Nested in the jungle, this boutique resort is an exclusive escape with elevated local cuisine, a world-class spa, and activities that highlight Indonesian heritage and the spiritual energy found across the island. Embrace the region’s timeless culture by visiting nearby temples, shops, art markets, and eateries before returning to unwind at Samsara Ubud. Highlights of the hotel include: - 17 luxurious private villas crafted in harmony with nature, all with 24-hour butler service - A restaurant nestled above the jungle canopy serving Balinese flavors with a modern twist - A tranquil spa with treatments emphasizing healing traditions and holistic wellness philosophies - Daily yoga sessions, art classes, live jazz music, floating breakfasts, and moonlight cinema - An environment designed to foster connections with nature, loved ones, and yourself

LPASC.name: Santa Catalina A Royal Hideaway Hotel
LPASC.address_raw: Calle Leon y Castillo, 227, Las Palmas de Gran Canaria
LPASC.description: Journey to an island hailed as a continent in miniature thanks to its multitude of climatic zones as a result of its location on the subtropical Canary Islands just east of mainland Africa. A part of Spain, The Canary Islands is home to one of The Atlantic Ocean’s most authentically glamorous and luxurious resorts: Santa Catalina, A Royal Hideaway Hotel. Perfectly positioned in the center of Las Palmas, the main city on the island of Gran Canaria, Santa Catalina offers travelers a luxurious stay featuring rooftop bars, a beautiful pool, and award-winning restaurants, all just a few minutes walk from the beautiful Playa de Las Alcaravaneras. Guests of Santa Catalina can: - Enjoy a selection of elegant accommodations ranging from Deluxe Rooms to Premium Suites - Dine on tapas with a twist or savor traditional Canary flavors at two delectable restaurants - Relax at the expansive pool surrounded by palm trees and refreshing greenery - Explore the natural wonders and quiet corners of Gran Canaria Island Experience the relaxing and wellness-focused atmosphere created by a hotel dedicated to living a more stress-free life through its 'Betterism' philosophy, imbuing every aspect of your stay with comfort and serenity and ensuring total satisfaction.

HRGSB.name: Serry Beach Resort
HRGSB.description: An Arabesque architectural masterpiece set along the shimmering shores of the Red Sea, Serry Beach Resort invites travelers from across the globe to connect with the serenity of this ancient, arid landscape. Alongside thoughtful design features and décor grounding guests in a sense of place, the resort offers an array of experiences, amenities, and dining options to satisfy every type of traveler, from the adventure seeker to the relaxation enthusiast. Just minutes from the airport and in the heart of the Red Sea Riviera, Serry Beach Resort is the perfect seaside getaway for everyone from romantic couples to multi-generational families. Highlights of the hotel include: - 453 guestrooms, chalets, and suites blending contemporary design with unique local heritage - A range of dining options, from a sprawling food hall to an Asian fusion finger food restaurant - A stress-relieving spa, fully equipped gym, and water park complete with slides and wave pool - Vintage-inspired cabaret nightclub with entrance through a lobby bookshelf - Seemingly endless activities such as live entertainment, sports, shopping, and more

YYZSM.name: SoHo Hotel Toronto
YYZSM.description: With a Dale Chihuly sculpture in the lobby and the best of Toronto culture on the doorstep, you know SoHo Hotel Toronto is something special from the moment you arrive. By the time you get to know the exceptional concierges special feels like an understatement. - Work out in a fitness center with a lap pool, steam room, and personal trainers managed by Dalton Brown - Source tickets, reservations, and city tips from Les Clefs d'Or-certified concierges - Stretch out in a spacious bed with goose-down duvets and Italian Frette linens - Dress for dinner in an 80-square-foot dressing room with custom-made maple closets - Plan perfect events with 4,000 sq ft of meeting space and a dedicated conference manager Step into the heart of Toronto's entertainment and dining districts, guided by some of the very best concierges in the business. Then relax and recharge in a stylish, contemporary room with commanding city views. SoHo Hotel Toronto is more than a boutique hotel; it's your gateway to the best Toronto has to offer.

VCESV.name: Splendid Venice Venezia - Starhotels Collezione
VCESV.description: With stunning views of the city's famed canals, Splendid Venice Venezia - Starhotels Collezione is as much a journey through Venice's history as it is the hotel's. Weaving together two 16-century townhouses to create a single, masterful property, the hotel features historic throughout, including the intimate, old-world Levantine parlors that make up the lobby, while rooms and suites have been reimagined to evoke classic Venetian glamour with a modern edge. Centrally located off a quiet canal steps from St. Mark’s and the Rialto Bridge, the hotel offers guests the relaxed laid-back atmosphere of a private residence with the service of a luxury property. Highlights of the hotel include: - 165 rooms and suites, some with panoramic balconies offering stunning views - A top-floor terrace offering sunset drinks overlooking the city's tiled rooftops - A glass-roofed, sun-dappled courtyard restaurant serving traditional Venetian dishes - Easy access to the city’s waterways with gondola rides from a private dock Admire unparalleled views of the city from the rooftop, before venturing out onto the canals. Once you’ve finished exploring, contemplate the waterways from your room or while sampling authentic Venetian fare at the in-house acclaimed restaurant, Le Maschere.

DENSJ.name: St Julien Hotel & Spa
DENSJ.description: Nestled at the foothills of the Rockies in downtown Boulder, St Julien Hotel & Spa delivers luxury accommodations with a breathtaking vista of the mountains. Indulge in treatments at the expansive spa or dine at the award-winning Jill’s Restaurant for afternoon tea or French-inspired American cuisine. As night falls, drift off to sleep in a plush four-poster bed among fine Italian linens. With four stars from Forbes Travel Guide and four diamonds from AAA, the hotel has a stellar reputation as an idyllic base for Colorado adventures. - Stay in one of 201 spacious, stylish guestrooms and suites with oversized slate-floor bathrooms - Swim in the lap pool, work out at the fitness center, and unwind in the hot tub - Dine at Redgarden Terrace against the stunning backdrop of the Rocky Mountains - Treat yourself to a full menu of body and beauty treatments at the award-winning spa - Hold your next meeting, retreat, or celebration here with an array of indoor and outdoor meeting spaces, plus an expansive conference center - Fill your days with outdoor adventures, from skiing and kayaking to fishing and golf - Listen to some of the best live music in Boulder on The Terrace or the T-Zero Lounge Ask the concierge team to arrange kayaking, mountain climbing, or fly fishing.

ZRHZS.name: Storchen Zürich
ZRHZS.description: Located in the heart of Zürich’s lovely Old Town, Storchen Zürich has been welcoming guests for 660 years to a city known for its wonderful quality of life. Stay right at the edge of the River Limmat, with views over the water to the church towers of the Old Town, and revel in the exquisite, personalized service. The friendly and efficient 24-hour concierge will take care of everything, from organizing a private chauffeur to booking your flights. Try a cocktail in the sophisticated Barchetta Bar Lounge & Piazza, let Chef Cyrille Anizan treat you to refined seasonal cuisine on Zürich’s most beautiful terrace, and take in the amazing views from your guestroom. - Admire views of the River Limmat or Old Town from the 66 stylish guestrooms and suites - Begin your day with a breakfast buffet of Swiss regional cuisine with fresh produce from the hotel's farm - Dine at one-star Michelin restaurant, La Rôtisserie on a beautiful terrace overlooking Old Town - Choose a fine cigar from the hotel’s humidor and pair it with a high-quality whiskey or a glass of wine at the Cigar Bar With its centuries-old tradition of outstanding hospitality, Storchen Zürich has service down to fine art. You will find every detail is carefully thought through, from the selection of international newspapers to the 24-hour room service. You will be treated to arguably the best location in Zürich, with the river, the lake, and Old Town right on your doorstep.

SNASH.name: Surf & Sand Laguna Beach
SNASH.description: At the edge of land and sea lies Surf & Sand, Laguna Beach. This luxury oceanfront resort in California offers guests the chance to be calm, explore, and take time to reinvigorate the senses through dining, recreation, and the reassuring rhythm of the ocean. Combining coastal elegance with contemporary style, curated experiences, and elevated hospitality that embodies the spirit of Laguna Beach, Surf & Sand, Laguna Beach offers renovated interiors that help travelers feel right at home. Experience quintessential Southern California with an elevated escape at this pet-friendly resort, where yoga sessions, pool days, spa treatments, and artistic exploration are tucked around every corner. Highlights of the resort include: - 164 guestrooms and suites featuring magnificent views from a private terrace or balcony - Fresh, ocean-inspired cuisine at a waterfront restaurant with waves crashing below - A white sand beach with food and drink service, plus a refreshing swimming pool with cabanas - Nourishing treatments for the body and mind, fitness classes, and more at the stylish spa - Rooted in the heart of Laguna Beach, near the town’s boutiques, cafes, galleries, and beaches Surf & Sand, Laguna Beach is a treasured part of this artist colony’s story, inspiring generations to reconnect and rediscover lasting memories along the California coast.

ALBAH.name: The Adelphi Hotel
ALBAH.description: Built in 1877 during Saratoga Springs’ initial tourism boom, The Adelphi Hotel originally catered to travelers seeking the excitement of horseracing or the tranquility of the local mineral springs. Maintaining its striking Victorian architecture and 19th-century charm, the hotel offers guests the chance to step back in time without compromising modern comforts. From accommodations full of distinct character to elevated amenities like a spa and salon, upscale dining, refined library-style lounges, and a cozy game room, every detail is designed to enrich your stay. Located on the historic main avenue, guests also enjoy convenient access to the walkable town. Highlights of the hotel include: - 65 lurious guestrooms and suites where every curated detail keeps comfort in mind - A farm-to-table steakhouse serving award-winning cuts with bold flavor and timeless style - Restorative massage and skin care treatments at a refined spa, plus a women’s hair salon - A state-of-the-art fitness center with dedicated spaces for yoga and stretching - Library lounges and a lively game room offering table tennis, billiards, foosball, and more

MCOAI.name: The Alfond Inn
MCOAI.address_raw: 300 East New England Ave, Winter Park
MCOAI.description: Just outside of Orlando, The Alfond Inn offers more than a luxury stay, it's a cultural experience in itself. On every wall of this AAA Four Diamond hotel hangs work from the prestigious Alfond Collection of Contemporary Art, which showcases more than 450 works by established and emerging international painters, sculptors, and photographers. Framed by award-winning luxury, your stay at The Alfond Inn promises impeccable service and pristine accommodations as well as gourmet culinary artistry at acclaimed Hamilton’s Kitchen. - Unwind in one of 183 handsomely appointed guestrooms and suites - Feast on the freshest local cuisine with a glass of wine at historic Hamilton’s Kitchen - Take a dip in two pools set atop the roof and offering cabanas and loungers - Experience the fun and adventure of Orlando’s many theme parks - Be charmed by Winter Park’s museums, galleries, and green spaces For guests seeking both relaxation and wellness, the hotel is the perfect place to enjoy peace and renewal at the indulgent spa and two fitness centers, and a great spot for experiencing Orlando theme parks and attractions, including Walt Disney World.

BIOGH.name: The Artist Grand Hotel of Art
BIOGH.description: You need confidence to stand opposite the Guggenheim Museum Bilbao — one of the world’s architectural masterpieces — and The Artist Grand Hotel of Art has precisely that. Designed by Spanish artist Javier Mariscal, this self-assured retreat is the only five-star hotel in front of the world-famous museum, and its sleek, bright guestrooms and suites show a deep love of art, design, and culture. The forward-thinking aesthetic extends into the décor and atmosphere of Olio restaurant, where chef Abel Corral conjures up new dishes using the city’s timeless flavors. - Stay in one of 145 design-led guestrooms with floor-to-ceiling windows and marble bathrooms - Enjoy a view-filled alfresco breakfast of Iberian ham and Basque Idiazabal cheese - Rejuvenate with a Balinese, Swedish, or Ayurvedic massage at Wellness by Domine - Experience a twist on the roots of Basque Country cooking at Olio restaurant - Sink into a plush sofa at sleek bar Sixty-One, or sip a cocktail on the rooftop - Discover the world-famous Guggenheim Museum Bilbao on your doorstep Elegantly refurbished, The Artist Grand Hotel of Art celebrates art and design alongside first-class service. After a rooftop breakfast overlooking the titanium waves of the Guggenheim Museum Bilbao, explore the hotel’s own design touches, from its shell staircase to the imposing rock sculpture in the lobby.

ZKICS.name: The Capra
ZKICS.description: Soaring white peaks meet intense blue sky; rustic Alpine tradition meets ultra-chic modernity; ski lodge meets wellness boutique.
