The five-star Capra Saas-Fee is at all these intersections, creating an extraordinary escape in the Swiss Alps. With an updated take on wooden chalet décor, accommodations are suite-style with living areas and floor-to-ceiling windows — and the quaint hotel is minutes from the Hannig ski lift. Farm-to-table cuisine in the award-winning restaurant fuels your mountain adventures, while the spa is run by wellness experts Peak Health. - Take in mountain views from one of 38 homey suites, each with a private balcony - The expansive spa has indoor and outdoor pools, salt-therapy rooms, and saunas* - Book the Penthouse Suite to warm up by your own private fireplace after a day on the mountain - Cozy up by the Lobby Lounge’s roaring open fire in the winter - Restore your lifestyle on a Peak Health summer wellness retreat - Get fatigued muscles ski-ready with a signature deep-tissue massage, or book the private spa for exclusive use During the winter, rejuvenate muscles aching from a day on the slopes in the comprehensive spa. In the summer, join a wellness retreat to spend your days hiking in the fresh mountain air and gaining new perspective. You can be sure of an unforgettable Alpine experience, whatever the season. This beautiful location is open year-round for guests to enjoy.

BOSCH.name: The Charles Hotel Harvard Square
BOSCH.description: From its exceptional guestrooms to its seasonal regional cuisine, The Charles Hotel, Harvard Square epitomizes New England’s timeless rustic elegance and charm. Set in Cambridge with views of Harvard Square and the Charles River, this gem boasts luxury guestrooms and suites with Shaker furniture and modern amenities. Dine at award-winning restaurants, toast to good times with a cocktail in hand, and admire pieces from the hotel’s early American quilt collection. Highlights of the hotel include: - 303 guestrooms and suites with a distinctly Bostonian aesthetic - Farmhouse restaurant with fresh dishes with ingredients sourced locally - Elegant jazz bar with classic cocktails and live music from rising and established artists - Tranquil spa with seasonal, French-inspired face, body, and beauty treatments - Walking distance from Harvard University, shops, restaurants, and more

CHSCH.name: The Charleston Place
CHSCH.description: As you enter The Charleston Place’s inviting lobby, feel as if you’ve stepped into the historic city’s living room. A gathering place for family, friends, and strangers alike, this comfortable space is a sign of what’s to come throughout your stay. The hotel, built in the 1980s, has long been a symbol of unforgettable service and modern elegance. Rest in spacious accommodations designed with luxurious furnishings, dine at an array of dining venues, and relax with activities ranging from spa treatments and a workout in the fitness center to lounging by the pool, riding bicycles, or heading out into the city for a leisurely picnic. Highlights of the hotel include: - 434 guestrooms and suites, all with a sitting area, original artwork, and city views - Varied culinary experiences, from fine dining to Lowcountry favorites and pub or poolside fare - A serena spa retreat with rejuvenating treatments, a relaxation lounge, nail salon, and boutique - Rooftop saltwater pool with panoramic views of Downtown Charleston - Seasonal events, bicycle rentals, a picnic program, afternoon tea, shops, and a Club Lounge

DELCL.name: The Claridges New Delhi
DELCL.address_raw: 12, Dr. APJ Abdul Kalam Road, New Delhi
DELCL.description: Opening in 1955, The Claridges, New Delhi has invited the discerning traveler to its perfect blend of old-world elegance and contemporary luxury for decades. Set in the heart of New Delhi’s eminent address – Lutyens Delhi, The Claridges is a landmark location offering exquisite rooms and suites, an array of celebrated dining options, and dedicated business facilities, in a grand retreat designed with classic architecture and complemented by expansive lawns. Highlights of the hotel include: - 132 diverse guestrooms and suites focused on guest comfort and luxurious style - An array of gourmet restaurants offering a unique culinary experience - Cinqtuair Spa to revive and restore at a state-of-the-art gym, Sumaya - Spacious banquet halls and boardrooms featuring the latest technology

PAOCP.name: The Clement Palo Alto
PAOCP.description: Check in to Northern California and the Bay Area’s only all-inclusive luxury hotel, The Clement Palo Alto. Just minutes from the restaurants, activities, and attractions that the ritzy town of Palo Alto has to offer, The Clement offers travelers and guests an expansive experience where service is second to none and amenities abound. Guest of the hotel can: Relax in spacious one-bedroom suites with state-of-the-art tech and luxurious stone baths Lounge under the California sun at the rooftop pool or rest in the shade of a quiet cabana Enjoy 100% all-inclusive hospitality featuring all meals, in-room dining, and snacks from The Kitchen Host an intimate dinner or business event at The Jury Room with space for up to ten people Enjoy quiet conversation by the fire in the hotel’s common space, The Living Room As an all-inclusive hotel, you’ll love the fact that everything is included – and that means everything. From food and drinks to gratuities and valet parking, you won’t have to sign a single receipt during your stay.

FCOFM.name: The First Musica
FCOFM.description: Visit Rome in style with a stay at The First Musica. The luxury hotel offers comfortable rooms with a contemporary design and neutral color palette to encourage rest and relaxation. During your visit, sample an array of seafood creations, sip cocktails at the rooftop bar, explore a collection of artwork, indulge at parties with live music, or enlist the help of the concierge to create a lineup of bespoke experiences in the city, from tours to cooking classes. Highlights of the hotel include: - 24 chic guestrooms, studios, and suites with stylish furnishings and elegant art - A glamorous seafood restaurant with both an indoor dining room and al fresco terrace - Rooftop bar with craft cocktails, light bites, and panoramic views of Rome - Gatherings on the rooftop that combine art, live music, and socializing among guests - Bespoke concierge services to curate itineraries with historical tours and cultural experiences

FCOTF.name: The First Roma Arte
FCOTF.description: Blending exquisite contemporary art curated by a local gallery with the elegance and comfort of a delightfully restored 19th-century palace, The First Roma Arte creates quite an impression. Its aesthetic and philosophy capture the vibrancy of Rome’s modern art scene with more than 150 pieces of impressive artwork from the 20th century throughout the hotel — including in each guestroom. The refined, yet homey décor, impeccable service, and creative dining experiences continue the theme, ensuring your relaxation and absolute immersion in modern art before you explore Rome’s iconic galleries and ancient sights. - Sip cocktails on the rooftop at Acquaroof, overlooking Rome’s spectacular skyline - Frame your stay with modern art exhibited in the 26 guestrooms and throughout the hotel - 19th-century architecture meets contemporary style and sumptuous furnishings - Stay steps away from the world-renowned Galleria Borghese and Vatican City - Collaborate with your personal shopper and art advisers on your purchases Some of Italy’s most dynamic artists have their work hanging on the walls of The First Roma Arte, so take your time to explore the art and appreciate its refined appeal. Creativity continues in the hotel’s Michelin-starred seafood restaurant, Acquolina, where the kitchen artfully combines Mediterranean flavors using fresh, authentic ingredients.

FCOTR.name: The First Roma Dolce
FCOTR.description: Enjoy Rome’s magical allure from the most exclusive spot in the city. The First Roma Dolce is a new, one-of-a-kind contemporary luxury experience within a renovated historic building on one of Rome’s most iconic streets. This exquisite five-star boutique residence on Via del Corso offers 23 spacious guestrooms and suites, an innovative food experience, art amenities, personal service, and unique in-room options such as libraries, personal fitness areas, and cutting-edge technology. This refined hotel in the heart of Rome is an ideal retreat after a day of exploring The Eternal City. - The hotel’s 23 elegant guestrooms and suites feature modern amenities, headboard libraries, and Saint Laurent marble bathrooms; select options have views and balconies - Stay in one of the Prestige Fitness Rooms and Studios with personal fitness equipment - Enjoy a warm welcome with a complimentary welcome drink and in-room homemade pastries - Dine at the hotel’s restaurant and patisserie for an array of delicious options all day and have a drink at the bar to toast to a spectacular stay - Request a personal shopper or trainer, consult with the 24-hour concierge, pre-book the luxury sedan to tour Rome’s historical center area, and get a complimentary shoe shine - The hotel’s prime location is next to Ara Pacis and a short walk to the famous Piazza del Popolo Trevi Fountain, the Spanish Steps, The Vatican, Via Veneto, and the Villa Borghese parklands Explore the hotel and enjoy the refined warmth, elegance, and design from the same architectural team behind The First Roma Arte, the hotel’s nearby sister property where you can use the fitness center and Acquaroof panoramic rooftop. Old World charm blends beautifully with thoroughly modern amenities.

BFSFH.name: The Fitzwilliam Hotel Belfast
BFSFH.description: Personal service and true attention to detail define The Fitzwilliam Hotel Belfast, a chic retreat in the heart of Belfast, just steps away from the famed Grand Opera House. It makes for an impeccable base for the best restaurants, shopping, and cultural attractions of Northern Ireland’s dynamic capital. Step into the light-filled, high-ceiling lobby with impressive floor-to-ceiling windows, wooden bookshelves, and a welcoming fireplace for an unforgettable start to your stay. - Sink into crisp king-size linen sheets in one of 146 elegant bedrooms - Sip a glass of prosecco with your afternoon tea at the local hangout - Book the bespoke boardroom for a stylish meeting or party - Learn to be a mixologist with a cocktail masterclass in the bar - Join a Titanic murder mystery in the city that built the fateful luxury liner The five-star quality of The Fitzwilliam Hotel Belfast operates at every level, from its design and service to the consummate attention to detail.

DUBFH.name: The Fitzwilliam Hotel Dublin
DUBFH.description: Experience classic Irish hospitality in a contemporary setting at The Fitzwilliam Hotel Dublin, an award-winning hotel in the heart of the city. The colorful, elegant guestrooms designed by Sir Terence Conran feature marble bathrooms with bold chartreuse standalone baths, some with views of St Stephen’s Green, while Glovers Alley restaurant, led by chef Andy McFadden, serves up exquisite French-inspired cuisine. From the concierge team to the penthouse's private butler, the service is exceptional — like the beautifully designed spaces that surround it. - Named as one of TripAdvisor’s Top 25 Luxury Hotels in Ireland in 2017 - Relax in one of 139 ultra-chic guestrooms, with duck-down duvets, fresh orchids, and the option of a four-poster bed - Unwind with a massage at Spirit Salon, or work out at the 24-hour fitness suite - Hold five-star conferences and drinks receptions in 1,819 sq ft / 169 sq m of event space - Take afternoon tea with gourmet miniatures and Perrier Jouët NV Champagne - Discover star chef Andy McFadden's signature style with a tasting menu at Glovers Alley, paired with sommelier-recommended wines - Explore Dublin’s historic attractions and vibrant nightlife through the concierge team’s expert local knowledge Staff at The Fitzwilliam Hotel Dublin are passionate about their city and dedicated to helping you explore it. Ask about the hotel’s exclusive walking tour podcasts, which guide you to some of Dublin's cultural and shopping highlights.

HKGFO.name: The Fullerton Ocean Park Hotel Hong Kong
HKGFO.description: Undulating in an architectural wave along Hong Kong Island’s southern coast, The Fullerton Ocean Park Hotel Hong Kong eloquently replicates the gentle movements of the South China Sea it looks out upon. Inside, a soaring lobby flooded with light from the multi-story floor-to-ceiling windows welcomes guests to a sophisticated waterfront hotel where sustainability, understated elegance, and exceptional service come together to create an atmosphere of total calm and comfort. Highlights of the hotel include: - More than 400 rooms across 13 accommodation types, all with expansive sea views - Multiple dining options offering everything from casual local favorites to fine dining - A refreshing infinity pool, plus a lagoon pool perfect for travelers with children - Indulgent treatments from the on-site spa enhanced by a fully-equipped fitness center - A sought-after location among the activities and attractions of Ocean Park Hong Kong Along with amazing amenities, guests of this tranquil retreat can explore and discover the shops, restaurants, activities, and attractions of Hong Kong’s most vibrant neighborhood, Southside, including natural wonders and marine park adventures.

NYCGC.name: The Garden City Hotel
NYCGC.description: The Garden City Hotel remains one of New York’s most iconic addresses, welcoming guests with gracious hospitality, spacious guest rooms, and luxurious suites. Business and leisure travelers alike appreciate all the hotel has to offer including an indoor pool and fitness center along with a world class Spa. From the cool marble lobby to the chandeliered atrium, modern luxury surrounds you from the moment you arrive at the AAA Four Diamond hotel. - Choose from one of 269 rooms, including 16 suites and three penthouses - Dine on David Burke's lauded Himalayan salt, dry-aged steaks in the Red Salt Room - Take a dip in the indoor pool before wandering through the lush gardens - Entertain clients and close business deals in one of the 16 inspirational function rooms - End the day sipping on a hand-crafted cocktail in the modern King Bar or outside on The Patio Bar by David Burke Whether you have chosen The Garden City Hotel for business or pleasure, the location is perfect to explore all that Long Island has to offer and is close enough to JFK to make traveling easy. Take advantage of this premier downtown location or a quick train ride into Manhattan to explore for the day.

QQYTG.name: The Grand York
QQYTG.description: Once the headquarters of the North Eastern Railway, The Grand, York has been updated to deliver an experience enhanced with a unique blend of modernity suffused with the timeless qualities of the early 20th century. The enchanting Edwardian brick façade of this impressive heritage building fronts a sumptuous subterranean spa with a pool and sauna, spacious guestrooms, and a bar that pays homage to Old World décor. With a central location inside the city’s medieval walls, the hotel also places you at the heart of historic York, one of Britain’s most picturesque cities. Walk the cobbled streets to explore historical attractions, boutique shops, eclectic restaurants and bars, cozy cafes, and many hidden treasures. Highlights of the hotel include: - 207 stylish guestrooms and suites with marble tubs and Molton Brown toiletries - Fine dining restaurant offering an eight-course tasting menu as well as a casual terrace eatery - Invigorating massages and purifying body treatments amid serene thermal spaces - A cooking school with demonstrations, plus individual workstations for hands-on learning - An elegant afternoon tea, served with Champagne, finger sandwiches, fresh scones, and more

LONTG.name: The Guardsman
LONTG.description: The Guardsman is a luxurious, five-star property just minutes away from Buckingham Palace, St. James' Park, and the U.K. capital's many other main attractions. Purpose-built for an opulent stay, The Guardsman has an unmistakable British feel that befits such a prestigious address exuding understated elegance whilst also feeling homey. Discrete and attentive service is reminiscent of a private club combined with a dedication to personalization, making each stay at The Guardsman unique. Choose your preferred room type, location, preferred drinks, and menu options in advance and arrive to a completely curated stay. Eco-conscious guests can also rest easy at The Guardsman since the hotel uses only 100% renewable energy for its operations, in addition to implementing other rigorous sustainability standards.

VPSTH.name: The Henderson Beach Resort & Spa
VPSTH.description: An elegant resort of wooden shingles and gabled roofs, The Henderson Beach Resort & Spa overlooks the powdery, white-sand beach of the Gulf Coast and offers both blissful repose and captivating outdoor activities. Savor zesty, just-caught ceviche while admiring the panoramic views at the octagonal bar. Go sea kayaking and explore the nature trails at the pristine Henderson Beach State Park. With a full-service spa, fitness center, beautiful courtyard, and two refreshing pools, the resort is a shimmering gem on the Gulf Coast. - Stay in one of 170 guestrooms and suites, with views of the Gulf of Mexico or the nearby nature preserve - Dine at the signature restaurant, Primrose, which serves fresh “dock-to-table” seafood and sushi dishes - Stay in a wellness-focused spa guestroom for upgraded amenities and direct elevator access to the award-winning Salamander Spa - An endless roster of on-site activities — from beach volleyball to parasailing — means there’s something for everyone - Use your complimentary day pass to explore the 208-acre Henderson Beach State Park Ensure your kids have as memorable an experience as you at The Henderson Beach Resort & Spa, with a pizza party and games of giant Jenga. The Poppy’s Kids Club also runs full-day programs, with activities from scavenger hunts to lawn games. For furry family members, request a dog-friendly guestroom.

HOUHH.name: The Houstonian Hotel Club & Spa
HOUHH.description: Nestled amid mature oaks and pines, The Houstonian Hotel, Club & Spa is a historic, Forbes four-star hotel that exudes luxury, elegance, and southern hospitality. The former home of United States President George H.W. Bush, it has Texas ranch decor, upscale amenities, and is set amid 27 wooded acres and lush green grounds. It feels like a secluded retreat miles from the city — yet it is in the heart of Houston. It also has one of the finest fitness clubs in the U.S. and a Forbes four-star spa that is a Zen-like sanctuary. - This exquisite Forbes four-star hotel has 284 elegant guestrooms and suites - Work out at The Houstonian Club, a world-class fitness center; its aquatics training program has been rated #1 in Texas - A top culinary team, led by executive chef Neal Cox, curates the experience across five on-site restaurants - Indulge in the new therapeutic outdoor Soaking Pools & Garden water circuit experience at Trellis Spa - Swim in three outdoor pools, including a huge sports pool and one with a 32-foot slide - Sip a cocktail at the poolside grill, run on the jogging path, or play tennis, racquetball, or nearby golf One of the finest hotels in the Houston Galleria area, The Houstonian Hotel, Club & Spa is a city hotel with the style and seclusion of a country retreat. Explore its woodland grounds on a nature walk, passing monarch butterflies and spotting ruby-throated hummingbirds. Watch rabbits hop along the hotel lawns and go for a leisurely run along the forest jogging path that links up with the Memorial Park trails. Its ideal location is near popular Houston dining, shopping, nightlife, and attractions.

AUSGP.name: The Inn at Green Pastures
AUSGP.description: The Inn at Green Pastures got its start as a sprawling, 50-acre property with a small farmhouse in 1895 before opening to the public as an eatery and gathering place in the 1940s. Now nestled on 7 acres among shady oak trees, the estate’s peaceful atmosphere is perfect for unwinding and, in fall of 2025, the Southern hospitality at the ground’s farmhouse restaurant will extend to a brand-new inn for overnight stays. Set against an idyllic backdrop, complete with resident peacocks and stunning scenery, the hotel features its own casual eatery, a pool, fitness center, and event space in addition to sophisticated guestrooms and suites. Highlights of the inn include: - 63 guestrooms and suites with luxurious amenities, some offering balconies - Two restaurants, one offering elevated fine dining and the other serving casual bar fare - Private event space and wedding venues, plus banquet and catering services - A refreshing swimming pool and fitness studio with state-of-the-art equipment - Complimentary bicycle rentals that can be used to explore the city of Austin

ROCTL.name: The Lake House on Canandaigua
ROCTL.description: Venture to Upstate New York’s Finger Lakes region, where dense forests and rich farmland encircle gorgeous Lake Canandaigua, the setting of award-winning hotel The Lake House on Canandaigua. Take a break from the fast pace of everyday life for a slow visit to this premier wellness destination. From the moment you check in at the main lodge, with architectural touches reminiscent of old New England and the Adirondack Great Camps, you can treat yourself to a quintessential, all-season getaway. From skiing, snowshoeing, and ice fishing activities in winter and leaf peeping or hiking in the fall to water sports, lakeside lounging, and year-round fitness classes, The Lake House on Canandaigua's activities will satisfy everyone from the intrepid outdoorsman to the yogi-in-training. Highlights of the hotel include: - 124 masterfully designed rooms in a variety of buildings throughout the resort grounds - Locally sourced produce and meats incorporated in delicious dishes at the Rose Tavern - Therapeutic body treatments, massages, and facials, plus a heated pool and sauna at the spa - Guided, behind-the-scenes tours of the hotel’s gardens, greenhouse, and seasonal blooms - Ample activities, such as lakeside Pilates, boat cruises, movies at the pool, and cooking classes You can also feel good about your carbon footprint when staying there since it runs entirely on geothermal power and keeps its plastic usage to a minimum, all in an effort to maintain the pristine natural surroundings.

HOULH.name: The Lancaster Hotel
HOULH.description: With nearly a century of service, The Lancaster Hotel in Houston’s thriving theatre district is the city center’s regency-inspired, art-focused iconic home for hospitality. Featuring artwork from 100 internationally recognized Texan artists, the gallery-like atmosphere is in keeping with the hotel’s setting among the city’s many art spaces, from The Jones Hall for the Performing Arts to the Alley Theatre and Bayou Music Center. The award-winning hotel offers elegantly appointed accommodations, an inviting restaurant, a fitness center, and easy access to all of Houston’s best attractions. Guests of The Lancaster Hotel can: Relax in spacious suites named after artistic professionals like The Producer or Playwright Suites Dine on sophisticated American cuisine at the hotel’s inviting restaurant, Cultivated F+B Work out in the cardio fitness center featuring Peloton stationary bicycles Explore the nearby arts-oriented sites and attractions like The Houston Grand Opera After an evening of culture and theatre, relax in the hotel’s contemporary rooms and suites that feature complimentary sweet and savory snacks, juice, water, and soft drinks, before falling to asleep on ultra-comfortable beds. Wake in the morning to a gourmet breakfast buffet on the hotel’s mezzanine, before heading out to explore the city while feeling refreshed and refueled.

AUOLH.name: The Laurel Hotel & Spa
AUOLH.description: Embracing the duality of the laurel leaf itself – both as a symbol of academic accomplishment and a key ingredient in many cuisines – The Laurel Hotel & Spa offers visitors to Auburn and Auburn University a luxurious stay at a teaching hotel for its School of Hospitality Management. Guests will delight in the exclusive concierge-level check-in experience that eschews the traditional counter for a more personal interaction involving a guided room tour, a full review of hotel amenities, plus valet parking and baggage service. Other highlights of the hotel include: - A rooftop pool and garden with sweeping views of Auburn University’s Samford Hall - An array of calm and comfortable rooms and suites featuring thoughtful tech touches - An on-site spa, fitness studio, and rooftop yoga pavilion for wellness and exercise - Delicious, complimentary breakfast, lunch, aperitivo hour, and evening treats With a location within feet of Auburn University and the city’s charming downtown, The Laurel Hotel & Spa is the perfect place to stay for visiting parents, Auburn athletics fans, and any other traveler to one of the American South’s best small cities.

BCNTO.name: The One Barcelona
BCNTO.description: Stay in the best neighborhood at The One Barcelona, a five-star grand luxury hotel located steps away from World Heritage La Pedrera from Gaudi, exclusive international shopping, and fine restaurants. Awarded Best Urban Hotel in Spain 2019 by Condé Nast Traveler, it offers elegant and tech-savvy rooms, a fine dining restaurant and bar as well as an amazing terrace located on top of the hotel where tapas and Mediterranean dishes will accompany you while sipping a cocktail. For a restoring moment, Despacio Spa is the place of choice to slow down in its relaxing pool and Finnish sauna or indulge yourself with a massage or a beauty treatment. Alternatively, the plunge pool and solarium on the rooftop deck will surprise you with its panoramic views of the city. The One Barcelona is an ideal hideaway for your authentic experience in an understated luxury environment in the city. - 88 bright and chic rooms and suites featuring spacious marble bathrooms, amazing beds, and media hubs - Walk just a block to Gaudi’s La Pedrera (Casa Milà) and Paseo de Gracia, the shopping boulevard Clefs d'Or Concierge to help you access the best in food, wine, travel, and services - Enjoy the full-service Despacio Spa that includes a Finnish sauna, water area, and 24-hour gym - Dine at the hotel’s fine dining Somni Restaurant or have a drink at Somni Cocktail Bar - Discover Spanish tapas and Mediterranean dishes at the swanky Mood Rooftop Bar - Special touches include kid-friendly amenities such as coloring and painting books, a pet-friendly set-up, and many more.

LISTO.name: The One Palácio da Anunciada
LISTO.address_raw: Rua das Portas de Santo Antao, Lisbon
LISTO.description: For a unique five-star boutique experience in the heart of Lisbon, Portugal, stay at The One Palácio da Anunciada. Housed in a 16th-century palace in the city’s most exclusive neighborhood, this magnificent hotel blends exquisite original architecture with modern amenities and facilities, including an outdoor swimming pool, Portuguese restaurant, wine, and tapas bar, unique event spaces, and the Despacio Spa at The One with a 24-hour gym and personalized facial and body treatments. The hotel’s guestrooms offer elegant design in neutral tones and its beautiful gardens feature a 100-year-old dragon tree. - The 82 sophisticated guestrooms and suites feature marble bathrooms, pure Egyptian cotton bedding, and original hand-painted Portuguese ceramic pieces - Dine at the hotel’s restaurant — Lisbon’s newest gastronomic hot spot — for Portuguese market fare in an elegant setting under a splendid coffered ceiling with hand-painted frescoes - Enjoy your favorite drinks poolside or at the Gourmet Cocktail Bar of the Wine & Tapas Bar - Swim in the outdoor pool, work out in the gym, and stroll the beautiful French-style gardens - Relax at the spa with a heated experience pool, Finnish sauna, and personalized treatments - From the hotel’s ideal central location, walk to prime shops, cafés, historic attractions, and the iconic Bairro Alto and Baixa Chiado districts Natural light floods The One Palácio da Anunciada and the beauty of the stunning gardens, original architecture, and sophisticated interior design surround you. More allure awaits outside the hotel, with Lisbon’s most popular attractions within walking distance. Browse fashionable shops, listen to live music from café terraces, and walk the cobbled streets of Bairro Alto past vivid street art and centuries-old houses. The hotel’s Clef d’Or Concierge can help plan your adventures in Portugal’s magical capital city.

CCUPK.name: The Park Kolkata
CCUPK.description: The Park Kolkata, so named for its location on Park Street less than a block from Kolkata’s largest park, The Maidan, is a bright and modern cosmopolitan hotel welcoming travelers to the capital of both the state of West Bengal and the cultural heart of Northeast India. Offering guests a hip and luxurious respite among the throng of the city’s downtown, The Park Kolkata exudes a cool calm inspired by the seven chakras, helping to awaken the spirits of every guest. Along with a beautiful location, The Park Kolkata also helps guests to: Dine on local and international cuisine at eight restaurants, lounges, and cafes Indulge in a day of bliss at the hotel’s spa Aura and its line-up of signature treatments Host a business meeting or celebratory occasion in the hotel’s multiple event spaces Explore the surrounding neighborhood with its charming shops and tree-lined streets Known for its after-hours entertainment, The Park Kolkata isn’t just a place for relaxation, but also for play. Enjoy drinks and snacks with friends or family at the pub, cocktail bar, outdoor bar, or even the 5,000 sq ft nightclub, before returning to your spacious and welcoming accommodations just steps away.

MEMPE.name: The Peabody Memphis
MEMPE.description: The iconic Peabody Memphis near vibrant Beale Street has been treating guests to refined Southern charm since 1869. The grand brick building, once a favorite haunt of Elvis, is a picture of elegance, with glittering chandeliers and marble columns — all an elaborate backdrop for the famous march of the Peabody ducks, a unique tradition that originated in 1933. When evening comes, watch the sunset over Memphis and listen to music at the rooftop bar before dining on fine French cuisine with a Southern twist at award-winning Chez Philippe. - Experience the gracious elegance of this Forbes Four-Star and AAA Four-Diamond hotel - Stay in style in one of 464 comfortable guestrooms and suites, including the Romeo and Juliet suite with a living room and spiral staircase - Watch the much-loved Peabody ducks march through the lobby twice a day - Eat at the romantic Chez Philippe, the region's only Forbes Four-Star and AAA Four Diamond restaurant featuring classic French fare - Enjoy exclusive access to The Peabody Athletic Club and pool - Host your event, wedding, or business conference here with beautiful meeting spaces and a Grand Ballroom that can host more than 2,000 guests - Explore the home of the Blues from the hotel’s central downtown location near historic sites, shops, restaurants, and world-class museums The Peabody Memphis has been a fixture of Memphis life for generations and remains one today. It is famous for its summer rooftop parties, where live music and cold drinks accompany slow sunsets over the Mississippi River. Dining is a pleasure any time of day; be sure to try the afternoon tea and Sunday brunch. For a relaxed evening, find a quiet corner in the elegant Peabody Corner Bar with your favorite cocktail.

MKEPH.name: The Pfister Hotel
MKEPH.description: Centrally located among famed museums, lakefront parks, and the city’s renowned breweries, Milwaukee’s grand dame, The Pfister Hotel has welcomed guests with its lobby lions, fireside lounge, and extensive art collection since 1893. To this day, this Victorian masterpiece and five-star architectural icon continues to be the top spot for all out-of-towners. Complementing this rich history, modern experiences set the AAA Four Diamond boutique hotel apart from other downtown hotels. Dine at the popular steakhouse Mason Street Grill, sip a signature martini while admiring Lake Michigan views from top-floor Blu, and take pleasure in the old-world charm of its guestrooms. - Honored with the AAA Four Diamond Designation for 45 consecutive years - Regularly listed among Condé Nast Traveler ’s “World’s Best Places to Stay” - Admire panoramic city and lake views — and inspired jazz — at the 23rd-floor bar, Blu - Dine on tender wood-grilled steaks and delicious seafood at Mason Street Grill - Treat yourself to a Remineralizing Hydrotherapy Bath or Hammam Steam Shower and Mud Spa at the WELL Spa + Salon - Celebrate the expansive Victorian art collection — the largest of its kind of any hotel in the world — and world-famous Artist-in-Residence program - Interact with the art and history of the hotel with the Augmented Reality Tour on your smartphone or tablet Discover the impressive Victorian art collection on a hotel tour with the Artist-in-Residence, an up-and-coming artist who works in an open studio on the premises as part of a one-year partnership with the hotel. Learn from the Pfister Narrator about Antonio Torres’ 'Grecian Girl,' Alexander Pope’s 'The Dog,' and the two bronze lions, affectionately known as Dick and Harry, who have been watching over the hotel’s lobby and greeting visitors for more than 125 years.

ISPPR.name: The Pridwin Hotel and Cottages
ISPPR.description: Perched above Crescent Beach on New York’s Shelter Island, this classic American resort has been serving travelers since 1927 with ocean views, gentle waters, and peaceful bay breezes. Rest in timeless, sea-inspired guestrooms or quaint standalone cottages. Savor tastes of Long Island through several dining venues or during elevated culinary events that highlight seasonality and the atmosphere of connection at the hotel. In your spare time, stay active with a wide range of fitness classes, sports, and creative ventures or unwind at the spa with treatments featuring all-natural skin care products. Highlights of the hotel include: - Cozy guestrooms with nautical touches and spacious cottages boasting private docks - Long Island-inspired fare crafted with local ingredients, plus a deluxe continental breakfast - A day spa overlooking the hotel garden, offering treatments, a sauna, and a hammam - Outdoor pool with lounge chairs and umbrellas as well as private beach access - Adventures and entertainment, including movie nights, crafts, tennis, kayaking, yoga, and fishing

TYOPP.name: The Prince Park Tower Tokyo
TYOPP.description: Modernism meets Japanese style at The Prince Park Tower Tokyo, from its dramatic open-concept atrium lobby to its lofty Stellar Garden, where you can enjoy signature cocktails with views of the iconic Tokyo Tower. Surrounded by lush green space, the hotel stands tall over downtown Tokyo; elegant guestrooms offer views of the city's unmistakable skyline or the beauty of nearby parks. In its public spaces, attentive staff help you make the most of exceptional facilities, including upscale boutiques and beauty salons, an on-site bowling alley, and seven Asian and international restaurants. - Stay in one of 603 Western or traditional guestrooms and suites, including Garden Suites with traditional Japanese screens and tatami floors - Unwind in a sauna, or in a natural saltwater onsen with mineral-rich water drawn from deep beneath Shiba Park - Swim in an indoor pool and work out in a fitness center with techno-gym equipment and personal trainers - Meet and work in a 24-hour business center and 76,019 sq ft / 7,062 sq m of event space, including a 3,600-capacity ballroom - Premium Club rooms include a Champagne welcome, complimentary breakfasts, and access to an exclusive lounge - Watch master chefs prepare fresh sushi at Hamashiba's counter, or sample international cuisine with amazing city views at Brise Verte on the 33rd floor With some of the most spacious meeting rooms in the capital, a chandeliered ballroom, and a vast convention hall, The Prince Park Tower Tokyo makes an ideal business venue — and karaoke, billiards, and a 12-lane bowling alley ensure leisure time is just as memorable.

MSPSP.name: The Saint Paul Hotel
MSPSP.description: The Saint Paul Hotel is a luxurious Minneapolis landmark with a century of stories woven into its fabric. It has played host to gangsters and presidents — JFK stayed here — to ballrooms and banquets, all while maintaining its status as the best address in the city. Today, it combines old-world European glamour with a central location, just a short walk from the picturesque Rice Park. With fine dining, ample meeting and events space, and impeccable service, The Saint Paul Hotel remains a historic heart of city life. - Snuggle up in one of 255 elegant guestrooms overlooking the Landmark Center - Sip traditional afternoon tea in the lobby, with English cakes, sandwiches, and scones - Relish classic American fare cooked to perfection by award-winning chefs at the St. Paul Grill - Plan successful events with a huge function space, accommodating up to 250 people - Stay motivated in the rooftop gym thanks to its great panoramic views of the city Whether you want to recharge after a busy day of shopping or simply immerse yourself in the lavish opulence of turn-of-the-century Europe — all grand marble staircases, crystal chandeliers, and the chance to have tea like the Queen of England — a stay here will have you feeling like royalty. Its design is the work of architect Allen H. Stern, who also created New York’s Grand Central Station, merging Italian architecture with classic English gardens to great effect.

NYCSN.name: The Sherry-Netherland
NYCSN.description: A timeless New York legend, The Sherry-Netherland delivers world-class accommodations and the finest service in what was once the world’s tallest apartment hotel. Opened to great fanfare in 1927, this boutique jewel maintains its historic elegance and opulence, attracting the global elite with its exceptional grandeur. The signature sidewalk clock marks the start of a journey that takes you past the friendly doormen, beneath the grand lobby’s spectacular frescoes, and into the hotel’s gorgeous golden interior and custom chandeliers — all just steps from Central Park and New York’s finest restaurants, culture, and museums. - Treat yourself to an exceptional New York experience in one of the hotel’s 50 unique guestrooms and suites, featuring marble bathrooms and upscale amenities - Schedule a rejuvenating in-room massage or work out in the fitness center - Dine on Venetian classics at Harry Cipriani, a duplicate of legendary Harry’s Bar in Venice - Take in the sensational views across 59th Street or Central Park - Book an appointment with celebrity hairstylist Laurent Dufourg at Privé Salon, or visit Emile Salon, a barbershop and men’s salon - Marvel at the exceptional 1920s mural depicting eight of the nine Greek muses - Add a pooch package to your stay to ensure your pet also has a luxury getaway The Sherry-Netherland is in a prime location for Fifth Avenue and Madison Avenue shopping. A stay here also places you steps from Broadway’s greatest theaters and outstanding ballet, opera, and fine-art museums — all from a hotel that has truly perfected the art of genteel pampering. From legendary European-style service to elegant ambiance, and thoughtful touches like Louis Sherry chocolates, complimentary sparkling water, and daily fresh flowers, the hotel continues to earn its accolades as a favored Manhattan hotel.

LAXSR.name: The Sun Rose West Hollywood
LAXSR.description: The energy of the Sunset Strip is electric, with the glamour of Old Hollywood seamlessly blending with vibrant contemporary landmarks – including The Sun Rose West Hollywood. Refined style meets social sophistication in this modern space, built on the former site of the iconic House of Blues. Live entertainment lives on in a boundary-pushing music venue housed within the hotel, mere steps away from the chic guestrooms where you’ll rest your head. The Sun Rose West Hollywood also boasts a rooftop restaurant and swimming pool, a rejuvenating spa, and prime access to many of Los Angeles’ finest attractions. Highlights of the hotel include: - 149 modern guestrooms and suites with sleek interiors featuring vivid pops of color - Coastal and fusion cuisine served at a signature rooftop restaurant overlooking Los Angeles - A dynamic music venue where legends and up-and-coming voices take the stage - World-class beauty and wellness spa with luxurious treatments that aid relaxation - A sparkling rooftop swimming pool with lounge chairs, daybeds, and views of the city skyline

KIXTK.name: THE THOUSAND KYOTO
KIXTK.description: Experience the epitome of Japanese hospitality with a warm welcome and personalized stay at THE THOUSAND KYOTO, a luxury hotel in the Shimogyo Ward district near Kyoto Station. Its amazing location puts you close to top museums, temples, and cultural sites. Relax in modern, spacious guestrooms and suites before strolling the serene garden, dining at the hotel’s on-site restaurants, or sipping tea or sake at the bar. Try a therapeutic treatment at the spa after a workout at the fitness center, then sign up for one of the hotel’s unforgettable “Deep Kyoto” experiences. Highlights of the hotel include: - 222 guestrooms and suites featuring a minimalist style, reminiscent of a traditional tea house - Gourmet dining venues serving seasonal Japanese or Italian dishes made with local ingredients - Rejuvenating spa offering tranquil treatments, a stone spa, dry sauna, fitness center, and more - Contemporary versions of the ancient Kyoto-born tea ceremony at the modern tea bar - Beautiful banquet rooms, meeting spaces, and a chapel near the city’s finest attractions

NYCWL.name: The Wall Street Hotel
NYCWL.description: Located on lower Manhattan’s famed Wall Street and housed in the historic Tontine Building, The Wall Street Hotel offers travelers to New York a colorful and charming retreat surrounded by the beating heart of the United States’ main financial sector. Blending the best of the Big Apple’s broad cosmopolitanism, guests of The Wall Street Hotel will get a taste of city life by being the center of it all. While at The Wall Street Hotel travelers can: - Relax in oasis-like rooms and suites with luxuriously outfitted adjoining baths - Revel in New York’s culinary scene at La Marchande and taste true gastronomy - Host a reception, meeting, or other event in the hotel’s glamorous ballroom - Explore some of the city’s best sights set within walking distance of the front door The building that houses The Wall Street Hotel has been welcoming guests from around the world since 1794 when it began life as the Tontine Coffee House. Through the years it has survived fires and fate to live again as one of the area’s finest hotels.

WASWH.name: The Watergate Hotel
WASWH.description: Iconic, inimitable, and legendary, The Watergate Hotel stands alone in its design, quality of service, and unique place in American history. Recently reimagined for the 21st century, its dramatic chic, sleek interior — courtesy of Ron Arad — complements period features. The hotel has set a new high standard, from the rippling, copper lobby and the retro uniforms designed by Mad Men’s Janie Bryant, to the luxurious décor of the guestrooms and suites — try the gorgeous new Rose Suite, ideal for bridal showers and afternoon tea parties. - Choose from 336 stylish guestrooms and suites, including the infamous Scandal Room - Experience traditional afternoon tea and then pedal to the river on a classic bike - Dine on Kingbird’s re-imagined contemporary classic dishes, including Foie Gras terrine - Sip on craft cocktails and enjoy 360-degree views at the hotel's Top of the Gate rooftop lounge - Choose your whisky from an extensive menu and top it off with a cigar at The Next Whisky Bar, stunningly decorated with illuminated bottles - Swim in the indoor pool, and get a jade-stone massage at the 12,500-sq-ft Argentta Spa - Stroll to historic Georgetown, The National Mall, or the neighboring Kennedy Center Completely renovated to the sum of $125 million, The Watergate Hotel reopened its doors in 2016, transforming into a 21st-century destination that redefines luxury. Many of the original features of the 1960s Luigi Moretti-designed building have been restored, while architect Ron Arad and Italian design company Moroso have updated the interiors to signal the next chapter in the fascinating history of this iconic hotel. It is the perfect place to have your wedding, big event, business meeting, or personal vacation in the federal capital of the United States.

JACWH.name: The Wort Hotel
JACWH.description: A renowned landmark in downtown Jackson, The Wort Hotel is known for its warm hospitality, authentically Western décor, and historic charm. Opened in 1941, and listed on the National Register of Historic Places, this heritage hotel is nevertheless luxurious — a AAA Four Diamond property that has been awarded the TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence for the last eight years running. The cozy, atmospheric guestrooms are complemented by an informal grill restaurant of impeccably high standards and the famous Silver Dollar Bar. The hotel’s central location places the best of Jackson and the surrounding Wyoming wilderness at your fingertips. - Hear the best live music in town on Bluegrass Tuesdays in the Silver Dollar Bar, a local favorite - Hit the slopes of Jackson Hole Mountain Resort in winter via a complimentary hotel shuttle - Take an après ski soak in the Jacuzzi, or work out in the fitness center - Sample the flavors of the state with a Wyoming Mule and a buffalo burger - Hold atmospheric events in flexible spaces with authentic Old West furnishings - Take a walking tour to learn more about the house collection of 200 pieces of original Western art - Take note of the shine of thousands of uncirculated 1921 Morgan silver dollars inlaid throughout the hotel Located on Jackson’s main square, the hotel is perfect for experiencing the town’s dining, shopping, and cultural highlights, but it’s also within easy reach of world-renowned skiing at Jackson Hole Mountain Resort and the outdoor activity hub Grand Teton National Park.

FCOPU.name: Umiltà 36
FCOPU.description: Set in the center of Rome just steps from many of the ancient Italian capital’s famed monuments and sites, Umiltà 36 entices guests not only with a prime location ripe for exploring the city, but also with glamorous interiors and spacious accommodations. Other highlights of the hotel include: - A range of rooms and suites to suit travelers ranging from couples to trios and solo explorers - Three on-site food and drink options serving traditional Italian alongside Argentinian dishes - A top-floor terrace bar and lounge perfect for sunset views overlooking Rome’s rooftops - Easy access to Rome’s best sights, many of which are within walking distance In contrast to its many historical surroundings, Umiltà 36 features design and amenities firmly from the present. Combining styles from previous decades, the hotel seamlessly blends modernism, Art Deco, and other moody vintage periods into an opulent and elegant Roman retreat.

CPHVC.name: Villa Copenhagen
CPHVC.description: Set in what used to be the Central Post & Telegraph Head Office, Villa Copenhagen is a unique and stunning lodging experience in the heart of the city. Originally opened in 1912, the hotel's gorgeous historic accents blend beautifully with contemporary Nordic designs and interior accents. This iconic historical building has been transformed into a luxury hotel and opens its doors to you in the middle of all the area has to offer — from the most popular attractions to its beautiful sights such as the Tivoli Gardens and Meatpacking District. For the ideal urban getaway, head to this chic hideaway. - 390 guestrooms and suites feature contemporary Nordic-designed interiors, original features from 1912, and upscale amenities - Meet and mingle in the hotel's courtyard to have a glass of wine and enjoy pop-up activities, events, and exhibitions - Enjoy traditional cuisine at the hotel's on-site dining venues, including the Sorting Room, which has views of the sunken garden - Swim in the outdoor heated pool, relax in the sauna, and work out in the 24-hour gym - Enjoy the fresh smell of spices and herbs from the rooftop garden — one of the few urban green spaces in Copenhagen - Hold your meeting or special celebration here, with 3,200 square feet of event space For more than 100 years, this building has been admired for its Neo-Baroque architecture. Its transformation into a hotel is fitting as a gathering place for a new generation. Adding contemporary flair and design to the interior, the hotel opens as a chic and vibrant setting rooted in this building of history, blending the past, present, and future in an inspiring and playful ambiance.

STOVD.name: Villa Dagmar
STOVD.description: Vibrant and luxurious, Villa Dagmar delivers a cosmopolitan stay at Östermalmstorg in the very heart of Stockholm, Sweden. Design, personalized service, and unique dining experiences come together at this striking boutique hotel with a storied past. Contemporary event spaces, a retreat and fitness center, and a flower shop — along with an enviable location adjacent to Östermalms Saluhall building — add to the hotel's exhilarating ambiance, attracting local visitors as well as leisure and international business travelers. - Warm, cozy furnishings and the latest technology provided in 70 guestrooms and suites offer a welcome respite from the bustling city - Reward yourself with a fresh local treat at the hotel's gourmet market after you work out in the state-of-the-art fitness center - Host a memorable event in one of the meeting spaces or an intimate meal created by your own chef in a private dining room with a courtyard view - Stroll over to the Östermalmstorg subway station; it is one of the city's most beautiful stations, adorned with playful and personal artwork by feminist artist and sculptor Siri Derkert - Choose from the Mediterranean-fusion menu at the main restaurant on site or visit the gorgeous Östermalm Market Hall next door to sample traditional Swedish fare, innovative global cuisine, and organic groceries Built in 1870 and refurbished in 1912, history permeates the atmosphere of this restrained Art Nouveau building where famous author Axel Munthe, the doctor and allegedly lover of Sweden's Queen Victoria, was a long-time resident. The old brick building, with its industrial windows and architecture reminiscent of Josef Hoffman's work, has been fondly preserved.

PRJVM.name: Villa Marina Capri
PRJVM.description: Visit the enchanting island of Capri and stay at Villa Marina Capri, which aims to tell the story of the island’s hospitality. Inspired by European romanticism and Mediterranean mythology, the hotel feels more like home than a hotel, with a warm ambiance and spectacular views from its hilltop setting overlooking the Bay of Naples and the Amalfi Coast. Enjoy a relaxing spa, outdoor swimming pool, creative gastronomy, fitness center, and lush gardens, or take a short walk to Capri’s nearby port village or the island’s largest beach. Highlights of the resort include: - 22 guestrooms and suites that are individually themed after Capri’s cultural icons - Dine on fresh Mediterranean fare during dinner in the rose garden or breakfast on the terrace - Relax at the spa with a sauna, steam room, sensory shower, treatments, and more - Lounge by the infinity pool with a cocktail, taking in views of the sea and Mount Vesuvius - Stay active with a visit to the fitness center, designed with high-tech equipment For outdoor adventure, stroll the gardens, relax in a hammock while watching the sunset, or set out on an excursion, from a gozzo boat experience to a tour of Pompeii.

MEXHV.name: VOLGA
MEXHV.description: Set just one block from one of the most culturally important streets in Latin America, the hotel VOLGA embraces contemporary art, music, cuisine, and design and reflects that to guests from across the world with gourmet gastronomic experiences, beautiful accommodations, and unique amenities. Highlights of the hotel include: - 50 rooms and suites featuring warm-yet-minimalistic architecture and balconies - A soaring central lightwell, or “urban cenote,” housing the hotel’s bar and restaurant - An open-air rooftop terrace with swimming lane, loungers, cabanas, a bar, and more - In-house art installations and events ranging from fashion collections to food tastings Named after Europe’s Volga River and its ever flowing and lifegiving nature, the hotel VOLGA embraces the vibrancy of life and the positive effects of movement and travel with a design concept inspired by an earth-to-heaven theme that plays out from the Speakeasy Bar in the basement to the relaxing rooftop terrace.

MADWH.name: Wellington Hotel & Spa Madrid
MADWH.description: On one of the most prestigious corners in Madrid's exclusive Salamanca neighborhood sits the Wellington Hotel & Spa Madrid. Step in from the tree-lined streets and the sense of grandeur is immediate in the light-filled lobby, with its polished columns and sparkling chandelier. Add your name to a guest list that includes the Spanish royal family, and you can expect the ultimate in luxury — from the 245 elegant guestrooms and suites to Michelin-starred Japanese cuisine — all with an exceptional location just moments from leafy Retiro Park. Highlights of the hotel include: - Choose from 245 elegant guestrooms, with 13 types from Executive to Luxury Suites - Indulge in bettering mind, body, and spirit at Le Max Wellness Club Wellington & SPA - Watch master sushi chefs in action at Michelin-starred restaurant Kabuki Wellington - Stroll to the lake at Retiro Park or browse The Prado’s collections at the Triangle of Art - Add your name to a guest list that includes Ernest Hemingway and international royalty

SDFWB.name: West Baden Springs Hotel
SDFWB.address_raw: 8538 West Baden Avenue, West Baden Springs
SDFWB.description: A spectacular six-story dome – once dubbed “the eighth wonder of the world” – a grand welcome to the West Baden Springs Hotel in beautiful southern Indiana. This National Historic Landmark hotel calls on a century of tradition to blend cutting-edge design with impeccable service, contemporary amenities, and a cosmopolitan feel. It features four golf courses, indoor and outdoor swimming pools, formal gardens, riding stables, a casual café in a breathtaking atrium, a world-class spa, and gourmet splendor at Sinclair’s Restaurant or Table One, where you can watch the chefs work in an open kitchen. Highlights of the hotel include: - 243 regal guestrooms and suites, including some with marble bathrooms and whirlpool tubs - Eclectic dining experiences, including a restaurant within the atrium of the spectacular dome - Two 18-hole championship golf courses from Pete Dye and Donald Ross, plus two 9-hole courses - Adventures ranging from archery and sporting clays to horseback riding and carriage rides - A wide array of entertainment, including nightly live music as well as headlining concerts - More than 12 miles of wooded trails in the nearby Hoosier National Forest With a rich history dating back to 1902, West Baden Springs Hotel has majestic architecture and attention to detail that creates an unparalleled sense of grandeur inspired by bygone eras.

LEBWI.name: Woodstock Inn & Resort
LEBWI.description: The Woodstock Inn & Resort stands handsomely in its leafy New England surroundings like a storybook mansion. From the moment you step foot inside the Condé Nast Traveler Gold List hotel, you’ll be entranced by its timeless ambiance, with rich furnishings and natural tones, as well as charming heritage touches throughout. Glide down the slopes at the historic ski resort, or improve your swing at the exquisitely crafted 18-hole course. Dine on fresh, locally cultivated fare at the AAA Four Diamond Red Rooster restaurant, and make the most of après ski at the rustic Perley’s Pourhouse. - Select from a range of rejuvenating seasonal treatments at the award-winning Spa at Woodstock Inn & Resort - Experience fresh food cultivated onsite at the unique Red Barns at Kelly Way Gardens - Sip local brews on tap at Perley’s Pourhouse, with its congenial lodge vibe - Work on your swing surrounded by natural beauty at the 18-hole course designed by Robert Trent Jones, Sr. - Bring your canine companion along for an invigorating exploration of the picturesque New England trails The Woodstock Inn & Resort provides a truly special base from which to embrace New England’s scenery. After a day golfing, hiking, or skiing in the Green Mountains, pamper your body at the soothing Forbes Four Star spa before sitting down to an alfresco meal or relaxing fireside with a mixed drink in a classic setting.

ZRHVA.name: 7132 Hotel
ZRHVA.description: Blending world-class design and impeccable service in the dramatic beauty of the Swiss Alps, 7132 Hotel is the final word in luxury. The experience begins upon arrival, with the serene beauty of the mountains surrounding the striking architecture — starting with the hotel's sinuous, sculpted entrance. Inside, winding rails of pendulum spotlights lead your eye to breathtaking views from floor-to-ceiling windows. You will soon discover the crown jewel: an award-winning thermal spa by Peter Zumthor. The magnificent thermal spa was constructed from 60,000 slabs of local quartzite. The same commitment to absolute perfection is visible everywhere; the two-Michelin-star 7132 Silver restaurant offers a surprise menu of unique culinary delights; and live music at 7132 BLUE Bar comes from a Steinway grand piano. If you’re in search of the exceptional, 7132 Hotel delivers. - Stay in one of 22 guestrooms with mountain-facing terraces, including Presidential and Penthouse Suites by star architect Kengo Kuma - Sip delicious coffee and innovative cocktails at glass-walled 7132 Blue Bar, with spectacular Alpine views and live jazz music - Explore a listed, award-winning thermal spa designed by Peter Zumthor, powered by 30 C° / 86 F° water from a natural spring - Browse local gifts, art, and architecture books over coffee and pastries at 7132 Shop, the hotel's curated boutique - Discover the best local produce on Chef Mitja Birlo's tasting menu at the two-Michelin-star 7132 Silver restaurant 7132 Hotel is extraordinary year-round. With discreetly attentive service, stunning Alpine gardens, and the highest standards from cuisine to spa, it’s a hotel that makes an impact from the moment you arrive.

BUDAH.name: Al Habtoor Palace Budapest
BUDAH.description: Set in the heart of the city steps away from the Danube River, Al Habtoor Palace Budapest provides visitors with the choice to explore the historic Hungarian capital or simply unwind with all the hotel has to offer. During your stay, delight in a variety of dining venues that highlight Hungarian favorites as well as dishes around the world. Indulge with afternoon tea, a spa treatment, or wellness amenities. An indoor swimming pool with oversize windows for ample natural light offers another space in which to relax before venturing out to see the sights or returning to your accommodations for a restful night’s sleep. Highlights of the hotel include: - 200 elegant guestrooms and suites with scenic views and indulgent touches - Restaurants offering internationally inspired cuisine along with artfully designed cakes - Tranquil spa treatments plus a sauna, steam room, and fitness center - Refreshing indoor swimming pool in a serene setting - Sophisticated bar serving craft cocktails and regional wines

DXBAL.name: Al Habtoor Palace Dubai
DXBAL.description: Al Habtoor Palace, Dubai blends prestige with elegance in one of United Arab Emirates’ most vibrant cities. Part of the Al Habtoor City multi-use development project and not far from the picturesque Dubai Water Canal, the hotel envelopes guests in opulence with its illuminated facade, marble staircases, sparkling chandeliers, and more than 200 guestrooms. While Dubai is known for its fast pace of life, slow down and unwind with premium activities and amenities. Highlights of the resort include: - 234 sophisticated, residential-style guestrooms and suites in a Beaux-Arts castle - Dining venues serving French classics, Middle Eastern fare, and quality steaks - A rejuvenating spa with luxurious treatments, steam room, sauna, Turkish bath, and hot tub - Activities ranging from tennis, a fitness center, live music, and themed dinner nights

HKTAR.name: Andara Resort & Villas
HKTAR.address_raw: 15 Moo 6 Layi Naka Lay Road, Phuket
HKTAR.description: Discover your own personal paradise at Andara Resort & Villas, nestled on a lush tropical hillside above Kamala Beach on Phuket’s west coast. Overlooking the endless blue of the Andaman Sea, this stunning five-star boutique hotel offers the pinnacle of tropical living with private infinity pools, world-class service, a pampering spa, and modern villa residences with Thai-influenced décor and indoor-outdoor living. - Marvel at the spectacular views — the resort is located on a cliffside overlooking Kamala Bay - 26 luxury villas and 37 resort suites offer one- to six-bedrooms with kitchens, dining and living areas, and terraces; some have intimate private pools - Take a cooking class, go scuba diving, play tennis, or catch some rays at the nearby beach - Complimentary access to Andara’s 40-meter resort pool, state-of-the-art fitness center and daily classes, and outdoor tennis court - Enjoy wellness and spa treatments at Andara Spa - Dine on award-winning Thai cuisine at SILK Restaurant and Bar or from your private villa chef - Charter the Andara Yacht to explore the coastline and nearby islands With incredible beauty, impeccable hospitality, and pampering services, Andara Resort & Villas is the tropical paradise getaway you’ve been dreaming of. Each villa features an outdoor dining pavilion and a private chef so you can dine out or in without having to cook. The villas are designed to exist in perfect harmony with the breathtaking natural surroundings, with seamless indoor and outdoor living spaces that maintain privacy via dramatic landscaping. Many have private pools with amazing views. You will feel as if this piece of paradise is your own. Come and experience it for yourself.

JTRAA.name: Andronis Arcadia
JTRAA.description: High atop the cliffs of the Santorini caldera, Andronis Arcadia lies just outside the blue-dome-dotted fishing village of Oia. With views overlooking Greece’s Aegean Sea, Andronis Arcadia is an all-suite, island resort where the highest standards of hospitality are only exceeded by the awe-inspiring views. Guests of the resort can also: Stay in suites or villas with private pools and nearly panoramic sea views Relax on a multi-step Water Path journey at the resort’s Evexia Spa Be adventurous with outdoor activities like sailing, diving, and wine-tasting Explore the nearby clifftop village with its blue-domed churches and ruined castle Welcomed by an exterior architecture that mimics the traditional and charming whitewashed cliffside Cycladic houses and enraptured by the resort’s stunning natural beauty, guests will appreciate the resort’s prominent sense of place and irrepressible beauty.

JTRAL.name: Andronis Luxury Suites
JTRAL.description: An enchanting escape awaits in Greece, where Andronis Luxury Suites offers travelers the ultimate setting for an unforgettable getaway. Perched atop a cliff with unparalleled ocean vistas all around, the hotel offers sleek, sophisticated suites and villas, each with expansive terraces perfect for basking in the sun, savoring the view, or stargazing. Dine on the patio at the signature restaurants for an amorous meal filled with Greek flavors, relax in your private plunge pool or hot tub, or rejuvenate at the spa, immersing yourself in the healing energy of the island. Andronis Luxury Suites also presents a curated collection of ultraluxe experiences, ensuring your stay is nothing short of a dream come true. Highlights of the hotel include: - 35 suites and villas with breathtaking panoramic views of the deep blue Aegean Sea - Romantic restaurants that combine Greek flavors with al fresco settings and iconic landscapes - Tranquil spa offering rejuvenating treatments and wellness programs with relaxation in mind - Activities ranging from wine tasting to a yacht experience or Mykonos shopping spree - Bespoke concierge team to assist with booking restaurant reservations and luxury experiences

MILAH.name: Armani Hotel Milano
MILAH.description: World-renowned fashion capital Milan, Italy, invites those with exquisite tastes to relax in style at Armani Hotel Milano. Designed by the iconic Armani fashion house, the hotel features a sleek, sophisticated ambiance with a superb attention to detail. Guests can delight in modern Italian fare at the signature restaurant or unwind with a drink at the rooftop bar. Before exploring the iconic city, experience everything from a tranquil spa and high-energy fitness center to live music, personal shopping, and bespoke services to enhance your stay. Highlights of the hotel include: - 95 guestrooms and suites characterized by Armani’s signature minimalist aesthetic - Fine dining restaurant serving creative seasonal cuisine and a bar with live music - A 1,000-square-meter spa offering treatments, sauna, steam bath, and ice fountain - An all-day fitness center with high-quality equipment and breathtaking views of the city - Made to Measure/Made to Order services allowing for personalized Armani clothing

SINAS.name: Artyzen Singapore
SINAS.description: Immerse yourself in the vibrant energy of Singapore at Artyzen Singapore, a modern lifestyle hotel in the heart of the city. Capturing the essence of Singapore's captivating culture, vibrant colors, and tantalizing flavors, the hotel’s prime location offers a harmonious blend of convenience and tranquility. Highlights of the hotel include: - A selection of rooms and suites with balconies, luxurious baths, and more - A delicious array of dining options reflecting the cuisine and tradition of the region - A dedicated Wellness and Workout Floor includes spa treatment rooms, yoga pavilion, and gym - Close proximity to Orchard Road shopping district, and the iconic Singapore Botanic Gardens Set on the grounds of a former sprawling mansion of an avid botanist and great-grandson of Singapore's philanthropist Mr. Tan Tock Seng, the hotel has been infused with contemporary raw concrete elements, archways, enchanting gardens, courtyards, and covered walkways, creating a seamless fusion of modernity and natural beauty perfect for a stay any time of year.

MRYBL.name: Bernardus Lodge & Spa
MRYBL.description: Discover European elegance in the heart of California’s little-explored wine country. This Carmel Valley lodge feels worlds away despite being a half hour from the coast, offering a blend of guestrooms, suites, and luxury villas where guests can rest their heads. The 28-acre estate features its own organic fruit orchards, vegetable and herb gardens, and vineyards, often incorporated into farm-to-table dining. For recreation, unwind with spa treatments, tennis matches, bocce or croquet games, pool days, culinary events, and wellness experiences or borrow a Mercedes Benz to explore nearby golf courses, wineries, and boutiques. Highlights of the hotel include: - 73 guestrooms, suites, and villas that combine Old World sophistication with modern style - Authentic farm-to-table dining experiences with organic produce from the estate gardens - Luxurious spa treatments, plus a eucalyptus steam room, sauna, and wellness workshops - Amenities such as a swimming pool, adults-only infinity hot tub, and 24-hour fitness studio - Tennis courts, croquet and bocce lawns, and an exclusive partnership with a nearby golf club

BOSHA.name: Boston Harbor Hotel
BOSHA.description: From the moment you enter the lobby, with its shining marble and glittering vintage chandeliers, you’ll begin to experience classic New England style and hospitality at Boston Harbor Hotel. Located on the historic Rowes Wharf, the hotel offers sweeping views of the harbor and the city skyline, as well as award-winning dishes at the hotel's myriad of dining destinations, and a sense of serenity at Rowes Wharf Health Club. Combined, this delivers an unforgettable experience. - Relax in the only Forbes Five-Star and AAA Five Diamond ranked hotel on the Boston waterfront - Ignite your palette with a cocktail in 'one of the 44 best hotel bars in the world' as rated by Forbes - Embark on a culinary journey and dine al fresco, catching the freshest seafood at the Rowes Wharf Sea Grille - Enjoy the revitalized Rowes Wharf Health Club including fitness studio, gym, sauna, and more

ZIHCI.name: Cala de Mar Resort & Spa Ixtapa
ZIHCI.address_raw: Paseo Punta Ixtapa S/N, Zona Hotelera II, Ixtapa
ZIHCI.description: Cliffside Cala de Mar Resort & Spa Ixtapa is one of Mexico’s most spectacular hotels, sculpted into a red cliff above the ocean. From the Pacific breeze carrying the citrus fragrance through the open-air lobby to the four specialty restaurants and heated plunge pools in all guestrooms, it is a slice of paradise. Indulge in Aztec-inspired treatments at the sensuous Spa El Capricho, watch dolphins from a secluded cliff-side terrace, and enjoy cold beer with fresh guacamole and chips brought to your suite daily. No wonder this AAA Four Diamond oasis was named one of Travel + Leisure ’s Top 100 Hotels in the World in 2018 and 2019. - 59 suites each feature an ocean-facing private terrace and heated plunge pool - Savor fresh, local seafood on The Seafood Market's ocean-view terrace, or choose seasonal fine dining at A Mares Restaurant - Indulge in an Aztec-inspired treatment with local herbs at Spa El Capricho in tranquil treatment rooms overlooking the ocean - Ride the scenic coastal route to the resort city of Ixtapa from a complementary bicycle - Take yoga classes on the outdoor deck, or play golf on nearby Palma Real Golf Course - Book local transport, activities, and more through a dedicated Personal Assistant - Learn the secrets of Mexican cuisine with a private culinary experience, including market shopping and one-on-one tuition from hotel chefs Surrounded by tropical forest and sculpted into the red cliff face, Cala de Mar Resort & Spa Ixtapa effortlessly fuses the modern and the traditional. Its thatched adobe cottages are interwoven with palm-lined cobbled walkways, giving an authentic village feel — and framing magnificent views of the Pacific at every turn.

FLRIC.name: Castelfalfi
FLRIC.description: Surrounded by the lush, natural beauty of the Tuscan countryside, the five-star Castelfalfi is a one-of-a-kind, dream-like retreat. Designed with sustainability in mind, and using traditional materials such as wood and stone, the hotel seamlessly blends into the vineyards, forests, and fairways that surround the hotel. Dine on exquisite Mediterranean flavors with stunning views of the landscape, explore the estate on horseback, and unwind in the tranquil spa. - Check in to one of 146 spacious guestrooms and suites and soak up mesmerizing views - Indulge in a soothing massage or facial at the new Castelfalfi Spa - Swim in heated indoor and outdoor swimming pools - Explore the estate with more than forty experiences, for the thrill of the adventure head over to Castelfalfi Adventure Park - Savor authentic Italian flavors at restaurants Olivina, Il Rosmario, Country Clubhouse, and La Rocca, and sip signature cocktails at elegant Ecrù - Try your hand at truffle hunting, or sample the region’s delicious produce on a wine-tasting tour at the agricultural estate of Castelfalfi Set in the heart of the Tuscan countryside, Castelfalfi is the perfect place to immerse yourself in the sights and sounds of Tuscany. Sample traditional ingredients and flavors with a cooking class at Olivina restaurant, and visit the local vineyards to discover your new favorite wines. Once set in a medieval village, the grounds now surrounding the hotel are filled with charming shops and restaurants sure to transport you to a different era.

ORKCA.name: Castlemartyr Resort
ORKCA.description: Situated on 220 acres, Castlemartyr Resort is home to a grand 18th-century country manor house that sits adjacent to the ruins of a 13th-century castle. With 108 magnificently restored and elegantly enhanced guest rooms and suites alongside 36 luxury residences, Castlemartyr Resort invites guests to slip into the past while staying in contemporary comfort. In addition to its five-star accommodations, the resort also offers abundant recreation options including golf, tennis, woodland walks, family outdoor fun, and indulgent spa and wellness experiences. Other highlights of the resort include: - Five unique dining venues including a two-star Michelin restaurant, a contemporary Brasserie, and a traditional Irish Pub - A challenging, 18-hole, inland-style links golf course with sweeping fairways and driving range - Personalized, stress-relieving spa and wellness therapies and treatments - Quintessential experiences such as afternoon tea Steeped in Irish heritage, the history of the manor and castle stretches from the era of Norman invader Strongbow through to the Knights Templar and Walter Raleigh and into the present. Today, guests can feel the presence of these powerful figures as they immerse themselves in this storied site turned destinations retreat.

JMCCP.name: Cavallo Point
JMCCP.description: Located in the shadow of the legendary Golden Gate Bridge, Cavallo Point sits on the edge of the Golden Gate National Recreation Area, a natural haven with miles of biking and hiking trails just minutes from downtown San Francisco. The epitome of understated green luxury, Cavallo Point is home to exceptional culinary experiences, including exclusive chef-driven events and world-class cooking classes, and a nurturing Healing Arts Center & Spa, all guided by a commitment to environmental stewardship. - Select from 142 luxurious guestrooms and suites, many in officers’ former homes - Cavallo Point has impeccable green credentials – it’s a LEED gold-certified sustainable lodge - Indulge in a Cavallo Point Signature Massage at the acclaimed Healing Arts Center & Spa - Dine on chef-driven, farm-to-fork cuisine at four unique restaurants and lounges - Head out for a fascinating guided hike in the shadow of the Golden Gate Bridge Seek refuge from the buzz of San Francisco at the blissfully serene Cavallo Point, and immerse yourself in all that the eco-friendly hotel has to offer. Explore the award-winning wine list, made up of 2,200 selections, with some bottles dating back as far as 1922. Pick up new skills from world-class chefs at the cooking school. Head to the art gallery and admire work by local artists and then paint your own masterpiece during a watercolor class. Whatever your mood or preference, there are plenty of memorable experiences waiting to be enjoyed.

HYACB.name: Chatham Bars Inn
HYACB.description: Set on 25 oceanfront acres on Massachusetts's famed Cape Cod peninsula, Chatham Bars Inn welcomes guests to coastal New England with a charming blend of rich history, timeless hospitality, and modern luxury. Captivating ocean views, impeccable service, and a commitment to preserving the Inn’s more than a century of heritage combine to create an award-winning destination perfect for family vacations, romantic getaways, and group retreats. Highlights of the Inn include: - 217 ocean view rooms and suites spread across a main Inn and dozens of cottages - Five restaurant options offering a uniquely New England culinary experience - An indulgent spa offering a range of relaxing treatments and therapies - An oceanfront heated pool and hot tub with the option for private cabanas - A fleet of six custom boats for fishing, lobstering, sailing, whale watching, and more Guests of the Inn are able to experience a series of authentic, first-hand Cape Cod experiences such as private cabana rentals along the Inn’s private quarter-mile beach, complimentary bike rentals, private bonfires, tennis courts, and supervised Kids Crew sessions. The Inn is just a short stroll from Chatham’s charming Main Street, allowing for easy access to an array of shops, galleries, and more.

SJUCV.name: Condado Vanderbilt Hotel
SJUCV.description: Step into the legendary Condado Vanderbilt Hotel, an icon of luxury built to the highest standards in 1919 by the visionary Vanderbilt family. Designed by the architects behind New York’s Grand Central Station, this Spanish Revival masterpiece has been meticulously restored to blend historic grandeur with modern sophistication. From the moment you enter the marbled lobby and ascend the signature wrought iron spiral staircase, you’re immersed in a world of panoramic views, curated experiences, and refined service. At Condado Vanderbilt Hotel, classic heritage meets contemporary coastal luxury in an elevated escape where every detail is designed to captivate. Highlights of the hotel include: - 317 beautifully appointed guestrooms with expansive windows looking out over Condado - Complimentary tequila, wine, and sorbet tastings where visitors can mingle with other guests - Exceptional dining at acclaimed fine dining restaurants, al fresco eateries, and chic lounges - Full-service spa featuring Puerto Rico's first hammam, plus a fitness center with sea views - Four swimming pools offering ocean views, including an infinity pool, plus a beach club - Located along the seafront near Old San Juan, where guests can explore the town’s history

SZGDE.name: Das Edelweiss Salzburg Mountain Resort
SZGDE.description: Breathe in fresh mountain air at Das Edelweiss Salzburg Mountain Resort, a stunning retreat in the Austrian Alps that offers chances for wellness, culinary journeys, outdoor exploration, and more. Many different accommodations are available to choose from while a vast lineup of restaurants presents guests with masterpieces ranging from authentic Austrian recipes to sushi, steak, and more. A thrilling, five-floor wellness center provides optimal relaxation for adults and epic fun for families with kids. Relax at the resort, in both child-friendly and adult-only spaces, or venture out to experience all that the region has to offer. Highlights of the hotel include: - 138 stylish guestrooms and suites with expansive windows revealing Alpine views - Restaurants serving gourmet mountain cuisine, sushi, stone oven pizzas, and more - A serene spa with separate adults-only and family areas, plus a hair salon and boutique - A cocktail bar serving signature drinks crafted with house-made syrups, plus a wine cellar - Outdoor adventures ranging from hiking and biking to skiing, snowshoeing, and tobogganing - Ample activities for children, including a water slide park, play areas, and programming The hotel’s all-inclusive nature allows for hassle-free travel, with cuisine, spa access, fitness classes, and children’s programming encompassed in every stay.

SNNDC.name: Dromoland Castle
