SNNDC.description: Rising out of the Emerald Isle’s verdant green hills, Dromoland Castle is a sight to behold. Its historic charm and inviting atmosphere are paired with modern amenities for a stay that is both comfortable and unforgettable. An impressive array of active, wellness, cultural, and culinary activities ensures that there is something for everyone hidden within the castle walls and estate beyond. Highlights of the resort include: - 96 inviting guestrooms, staterooms, and suites celebrating Irish heritage and hospitality - Creative contemporary Irish cuisine served in opulent dining rooms - Rejuvenating spa with signature treatments, some performed on a bed made of crystals - Championship 18-hole golf course, plus practice facilities and a welcoming clubhouse - A wide range of experiences from tennis and pickleball to archery, falconry, and fishing Travelers can also venture outdoors to explore the 500 acres of estate grounds. Walk, jog, or bike along the rolling woodlands, around the lake, through ornamental walled gardens, and past towering yew trees that date back to 1740 for an immersive and quintessentially Irish experience.

PBIEP.name: Eau Resort & Spa
PBIEP.description: A welcome glass of Champagne sets the tone for your stay, but the immaculate guestrooms at Eau Resort & Spa will switch you fully into relaxation mode. Just steps from the Atlantic, this intimate resort invites guests to enjoy effortless luxury while immersed in a classic Palm Beach experience, with distinct dining venues, enhanced kids and teen clubs, a spa sanctuary, and a private, 7-acre beach featuring breathtaking views, tropical breezes, and abundant Florida sunshine. Highlights of the hotel include: - 310 guestrooms and suites with balconies so guests can fall asleep to the sound of the ocean - Elegant epicurean destinations offering locally caught seafood, Japanese cuisine, and more - An award-winning spa with indulgent bespoke treatments and a garden sanctuary - A private beach and two oceanfront pools, including the adults-only Tranquility Pool - Activities ranging from tennis and fitness classes to kayaking and stand-up paddleboarding

RNOET.name: Edgewood Tahoe Resort
RNOET.description: Set along the shores of beautiful South Lake Tahoe and surrounded by snow-capped mountains, Edgewood Tahoe Resort blends outdoor brilliance with upscale accommodations reminiscent of historic Alpine lodges of the American West. With a renowned golf course, expansive spa, three dining outlets, upscale recreation facilities, and outdoor adventures just moments away, this world-class destination beckons selective travelers from all over the world. - Check in to one of 168 guestrooms and suites with outdoor terraces and gas fireplaces - Hike, bike, ski, kayak, parasail, and more amid the spectacular scenery of the Sierras - Unwind in the lakefront heated pool, with epic mountain views - Play golf on the George Fazio-designed 18-hole course, host to major golf events - Savor seasonal fare surrounded by modern mountain chic at The Bistro - Enjoy a grounding gemstone massage at the Forbes Travel Guide-rated Spa Edgewood Head to Edgewood Tahoe Resort for an experience that reinvigorates your mind, body, and soul. Breathe in the fresh mountain air, take in the calming views of the lake, get active with energizing outdoor activities, take a dip in the lakefront heated pool, and indulge in a therapeutic spa session. Though you have many choices of indoor and outdoor activities, no one would blame you if you simply wanted to relax by Alpine Lake amid the enchanting scenery.

GOAEX.name: Excelsior Palace Portofino Coast
GOAEX.address_raw: Via San Michele di Pagana, 8, Rapallo
GOAEX.description: Overlooking the yachts anchored in the Mediterranean’s glistening Bay of Rapallo, five-star Excelsior Palace Portofino Coast defines luxury with its exceptional sophistication and service. The turn-of-the-century grandeur starts as you step onto the cool marble floors of the lobby, where opulent chandeliers soften the light from the sea-facing windows. Continuing its sense of refinement, the hotel’s restaurants and bars deliver creative dishes and exquisite cocktails whether you are relaxing by the infinity pools or taking in the views from the terrace. - Relax in one of 117 guestrooms finished with authentic prints and antique furniture - Savor fresh Italian cuisine that uses only the best local ingredients - Treat yourself to an indulgent outdoor massage or unwind in one of the outdoor Jacuzzis - Spend your days at the Beach Club swimming in the infinity pools overlooking the sea - Book yourself a boat excursion into the historic bay from the Beach Club - Visit Cinque Terre and Portofino and explore their quaint villages and hills Take a sumptuous cruise around the bay on a private yacht from the hotel jetty. Tailor your adventure to jet along the coast or find a secluded cove to moor up for some snorkeling in the crystal waters before a Champagne lunch. For golf lovers, there is nothing better than a round of golf overlooking the beautiful ocean, or travel further afield to visit the monuments and hilltops of Cinque Terre.

SFOFI.name: Farmhouse Inn
SFOFI.description: Discover Northern California’s famed wine country at Farmhouse Inn, an upscale boutique hotel on six rural acres close to wineries, hiking, and coastal activities. Luxurious country-chic rooms, five-star service, Michelin-starred dining, and personalized experiences like sommelier-led winery tours are just a few reasons it ranks among the world’s most highly rated hotels. - No. 5 Best Hotel in North America, Condé Nast Traveler Gold List 2020 - No. 3 Best Hotel in North America, Condé Nast Traveler Gold List 2019 - No. 1 Best Hotel in Northern California, Condé Nast Traveler 2017 - 25 country-chic rooms and five concierges ensure extraordinary service - Dine at the Michelin Star Restaurant in a restored farmhouse anchoring the property - Swim in the heated pool and make s’mores by the fire pits under the stars - Indulge in a relaxing massage or body scrub in the elegant farm-to-table spa - Delight in an exclusive sommelier-led winery tour in Farmhouse Inn house car This family-owned property shows the pride of fifth-generation Sonoma County natives with authentic hospitality and thoughtful touches everywhere. From friendly smiles and an offer of wine at check-in to the personal service of a pool attendant and the evening s’mores bar in the lobby, you will know you are welcome here. Stroll the grounds and enjoy beautiful gardens and the surrounding sun-kissed vineyards. Get a Warming Ginger Honey Massage at the Spa at Farmhouse. Sip coffee on your private deck. Rest well in your feather bed and enjoy nightly turndown service with homemade triple chocolate chip cookies and milk.

AGPFC.name: Finca Cortesín Hotel Golf & Spa
AGPFC.description: Finca Cortesín Hotel, Golf & Spa is a decidedly sophisticated retreat with a sense of seclusion that belies its convenient location outside Malaga. Set around tranquil, traditionally Andalusian courtyards, the hotel’s perfectly pitched décor – which adds avant-garde touches to heritage looks, and attentive, genuine service, have seen it named the Condé Nast Traveler Best Hotel in Spain and Portugal 2019. Relax at the fashionable beach club, retreat to the opulent spa, or tee off on the par 72 golf course, one of the best in Spain. - Watch the kite surfers skip waves from your Balinese bed at the Beach Club, cocktail in hand - Delight in discovering Asian cuisine based on Japanese cuisine, in combination with flavors from other gastronomic cultures, at REI Restaurant - Wander through acres of well-tended gardens, from palm-shaded courtyards to flower-filled meadows - Pamper yourself at the impressive spa with a treatment using collagen, caviar, or gold - Lounge in one of 67 spacious guestrooms or suites, or stay 'en famille' in a four-bedroom villa - Sink a putt on the superb greens that Masters Tournament champion Sergio Garcia ranks alongside Augusta National This exquisite boutique hotel is brimming with singular delights, from its four expansive pools to the hand-painted wallpaper in the tranquil bar. Golfers will be in seventh heaven – the challenging course offers a choice of five different tees and more than 100 bunkers, plus there’s a Jack Nicklaus Academy to help improve your swing.

PMISN.name: Grand Hotel Son Net
PMISN.description: In the foothills of the UNESCO World Heritage Tramuntana Mountains, a stylishly understated, art-filled hideaway presides over a centuries-old private estate. Famous for its colorful history and palatial design, Grand Hotel Son Net was lovingly restored to offer an exquisite boutique retreat with 35 classically elegant guestrooms and suites that maintain the original features, including a 17th-century interior courtyard with a spring-fed well and a private chapel. - Relax at the magnificent outdoor 30-meter pool, circled by cabanas and loungers, with spectacular views of the village and surrounding mountains - Enjoy easy access to hiking and walking trails passing through the heart of the Serra de Tramuntana mountains, plus wine and olive oil tastings and cycling tours - Restore body and mind at the brand new two-story Spa & Wellness Center with an indoor pool, soothing treatment rooms, and a state-of-the-art fitness room to be inaugurated after summer 2023. - Dine on authentic Majorcan dishes produced with locally sourced ingredients, including fruits and vegetables from the Son Net gardens

SJDVB.name: Grand Velas Boutique Los Cabos
SJDVB.description: Set just outside the vibrant city of Los Cabos on the soft sands of Mexico’s Baja Sur peninsula, Grand Velas Boutique Los Cabos is an all-suite, all-inclusive, adults-only boutique resort with just 79 accommodations. Here, private intimate spaces blend with inclusive offerings and experiences to create a one-of-a-kind, luxury destination resort like no other. Highlights of the resort include: - All-suite accommodations designed for the ultimate in relaxation - Two restaurants and two bars along with inclusive access to sister property dining - An expansive zero-edge pool overlooking the shimmering Pacific - A restorative, full-service spa and state-of-the-art fitness center - An array of experiences including cooking classes, tequila tastings, and more

SJDGV.name: Grand Velas Los Cabos
SJDGV.description: Immerse yourself in all-inclusive luxury along the sparkling Sea of Cortez at Grand Velas Los Cabos. Renowned for having the most incredible waters in all of Baja, this world-class resort offers the perfect combination of oceanside relaxation, activities, and cuisine for all ages. At this premiere resort, prepare to be pampered with ultra-personalized service and a plethora of specialty restaurants, including the masterpieces of a two-Michelin-starred chef. Other highlights of the resort include: - 307 suites with personal concierge, 24-hour service, private terraces, and spa tubs - A wide array of restaurants, bars, cafes, and even a Mezcal tasting room - Infinity pools with attentive service enhanced by refreshing drinks and light snacks - The ultra-relaxing SE Spa features a seven-step water ceremony - Teen and Kids Clubs to allow busy parents to take some alone time From its spectacular setting and impeccable service to its gorgeous details and inclusive offerings, a stay with Grand Velas Los Cabos appeals to the most discerning traveler and is sure to be one to remember.

PVRGV.name: Grand Velas Riviera Nayarit
PVRGV.address_raw: Paseo de los Cocoteros, Nuevo Vallarta
PVRGV.description: Overlooking Mexico's Pacific waters, this multiple AAA Five Diamond award-winning hotel features contemporary architecture and stunning tropical views. Perfect for both family getaways and romantic vacations, the top resort in Nuevo Vallarta offers four award-winning restaurants, 650 feet of pristine beach, oasis-like pools, a world-class spa, and a wide range of guest accommodations. Other highlights of the resort include: - 267 luxury suites overlooking the resort infinity pool and Bandera Bay beyond - Gourmet international cuisine is served at a variety of restaurants and bars - A world-class 16,000-square-foot luxury spa fit for all-day indulgence - Activities from sunbathing and snorkeling to local exploration and shopping The resort's ideal location is a haven for water activities, including deep-sea fishing and scuba diving, while the resort’s golf course offers a land-based approach to fun with its rugged terrain and stunning ocean views. For the ultimate in customer service, a personal concierge is also available to make your stay even more special.

LONGH.name: Grosvenor House Suites
LONGH.address_raw: 86 Park Lane, Corner of Mount Street, London
LONGH.description: Combining the services and amenities of a luxury property with the privacy, comfort, and living space of a home, Grosvenor House Suites welcomes guests to Mayfair with the contemporary elegance and refined hospitality of a sophisticated and spacious English residence. From its stunning seven-story atrium to its iconic location overlooking Hyde Park, Grosvenor House Suites offers the exclusivity travelers expect of one of London’s finest neighborhoods. Guests of the property can: Stay in a number of spacious Suites all with separate living spaces, kitchens, and more Enjoy casual dining at the elegant second-floor Atrium or savor a private in-residence meal Stay active at the 24-hour Fitness Suite with the latest equipment from Technogym™ Indulge in an in-residence spa treatment such as an aromatherapy massage, facial, or pedicure Set on Park Lane, within an impressive area boasting an abundance of high-end townhomes and haute-couture shops including those found on famed Saville Row, Grosvenor House Suites is at the center of all things high-end in London. Set out from this remarkable property to explore all its nearby activities and attractions including the best art galleries, boutiques, and restaurants that the city has to offer.

MBJHM.name: Half Moon
MBJHM.description: Tropical greenery, miles of sandy beach, and crystal-aquamarine waves frame Half Moon, a serene paradise in the resort-packed town of Montego Bay. The 400-acre property offers an alluring taste of Jamaica hospitality, featuring charmingly warm service, one of the most extensive water sports programs in the Caribbean, and a culinary experience that swings from authentic island barbecues to fine dining favorites. After a round at the championship golf course or a scuba diving excursion off the colorful coast, be ready to lounge with a frozen cocktail on a sea-view terrace or settle into the sanctuary of the Fern Tree Spa, known for its usage of native ingredients. - Enjoy the view from one of the 238 uniquely designed guestrooms, suites, and villas - Sip a 50-year-old estate rum while dining on authentic Jamaican cuisine by candlelight - Drop off your kids at the Children’s Village for fun games and supervised activities - Saddle up on one of the resort’s horses and go for a gallop along the beach - Play a round of golf at the acclaimed 18-hole course, designed by Robert Trent Jones, Sr. - Lounge with a sunset cocktail at Solly’s Keep, Cedar Bar, or the swim-up bar at Hibiscus Pool - De-stress with a coconut milk soak or a sugar-spice scrub at Fern Tree Spa Embrace island relaxation and a Caribbean rhythm at Half Moon. With award-winning Jamaican cuisine, private villas overlooking the sea, and yoga classes in huts set above the water, this destination is the ultimate in beachfront luxury.

ORKHM.name: Hayfield Manor
ORKHM.description: Among the rolling green hills and fields of southern Ireland lies the picturesque city of Cork, and within that sits multi-award-winning Hayfield Manor, a grand old manor house turned luxurious Irish escape where traditional comforts meet modern hospitality and personalized service. Step into the world of this ivy-covered brick mansion, where rooms are dressed in polished wood paneling, sumptuous and ornate carpets and drapes, elegant furniture, and fine linens, with views of a two-acres private walled garden. While at Hayfield Manor, you can: - Dine at award-winning restaurants serving seasonal and traditional Irish dishes - Treat yourself to a day at Europe's first Elemis Spa at The Beautique Spa - Stroll the private gardens and grounds and take a moment to reflect on the emerald landscape - Explore the quaint city of Cork or tour the surrounding sights and countryside Whether it's a restful weekend away, an adventurous exploration of the hills and valleys of southern Ireland, a family history and genealogical search, or a special event that you seek to celebrate, Hayfield Manor offers you luxurious accommodations in a refined Irish atmosphere. From check-in to check-out, you'll experience nothing short of a five-star stay at this hotel where grandeur reigns and service excels.

MUCBH.name: Hotel Bayerischer Hof
MUCBH.description: Experience Bavarian grandeur at its very best at the iconic Hotel Bayerischer Hof. Four generations of the Volkhardt family have been at the helm of this hotel, adding a personal touch and welcoming royalty, politicians, artists, and celebrities to the heart of Munich with trademark exquisite service since 1841. The two Michelin-starred Atelier restaurant is an attraction in its own right, and mixologists at Falk’s Bar work their magic in the famously ornate Hall of Mirrors. Book one of the 337 sumptuous guestrooms, enjoy the skyline spa and discover why this storied hotel has been awarded Condé Nast Traveler Gold List status. - Select a guestroom style to suit your needs and taste, from classic or colonial to an opulent Parisian theme - Experience chef Anton Gschwendtner's creative seasonal cuisine at Atelier, the hotel’s signature two-Michelin-starred restaurant - Celebrate fireside romance above the rooftops of Munich no matter the weather at the rooftop Polar Bar, heated by huge fireplaces - Plan an event packed with heritage glamour in one of 40 exclusive function rooms, totaling 48,935 sq ft / 4,546 sq m of space - Take a seat in the private cinema lounge or movie theater for world-class entertainment without leaving the hotel - Work out in a fitness center with personal trainers, wraparound floor-to-ceiling windows, and equipment selected by former Mr. Universe Ralf Möller - Relax with an Ayurvedic massage, sauna, or swim in an indoor pool with a sliding glass roof at the award-winning Blue Spa Hotel Bayerischer Hof’s Les Clefs d’Or-accredited concierge team will help you discover the best of Munich, book opera tickets, organizing limousine tours, or dreaming up something extra special, such as a hot air balloon flight over the city or a horse-drawn carriage ride through the nearby English Gardens.

CHSHB.name: Hotel Bennett Charleston
CHSHB.description: The elegant Hotel Bennett is deeply evocative of a refined era, with grandiose guestrooms, impeccable service, and glamorous restaurants. In Charleston’s picturesque downtown, the boutique hotel is perfectly placed for exploring the city’s culture and history. Look out over Marion Square and colorful King Street from Fiat Lux, the hotel's rooftop bar, as atmospheric music plays, or sample a glass of Champagne in elegant luxury at the Art Deco-inspired bar, Camellias. - Experience the finest Southern hospitality and indulgent luxury on a grand scale - Unwind in ultimate comfort in the hotel’s 179 guestrooms and suites - Feast on delectable delicacies inspired by the bounty of Coastal Carolina at the hotel’s signature restaurant, Gabrielle - Explore nearby major landmarks such as Waterfront Park and Charleston Landing - Swim in the heated rooftop pool with stunning views of Charleston's skyline Awaken to your chic surroundings, where a European-inspired design pays homage to Charleston’s heritage. From the sophisticated vantage point of the hotel's rooftop, take in the sights of the charming, vivid architecture of historic King Street before taking a dip in the rooftop pool.

SMOCD.name: Hotel Casa del Mar
SMOCD.description: Step into a world of Jazz Age elegance and modern Mediterranean allure at Hotel Casa del Mar, located on the beach with panoramic views of the Pacific Ocean and the iconic Santa Monica Pier. Built as an opulent beach club in 1926, its grand Renaissance Revival architecture blends beautifully with state-of-the-art amenities and contemporary coastal design. Its enchanting ambiance, Old World hospitality, and sweeping surf views draw celebrities, locals, and tourists alike. From its casually luxurious guestrooms to its glamorous dining venues and sumptuous spa, it is the ideal Southern California destination. - The hotel's 129 guestrooms and suites feature floor-to-ceiling arched windows and hydrotherapy spa tubs; two-story residential-style penthouses are the ultimate in seaside luxury - Swim in the ocean or in the guests-only Palm Terrace Pool overlooking the sand and sea - Relax in the hot tub, work out at the fitness center, or rent a bike for a coastal cruise - Pamper yourself with a massage or facial at the eco-friendly Sea Wellness Spa - Enjoy light bites, hand-crafted cocktails, and nightly music at Terrazza Lounge in the lobby - Sign up for a surf lesson, do yoga on the sand, and walk to local attractions like Third Street Promenade and the famous Ferris wheel at the Santa Monica Pier Hotel Casa del Mar is a spectacular destination for a vacation, celebration, or meeting — try the Lobby Cabanas for a unique and creative work retreat. The hotel has appeared on prestigious travel lists such as Travel + Leisure World's Best and Condé Nast Traveler 's Gold List and is one of only two hotels on the sand in Los Angeles County.

SATEM.name: Hotel Emma at Pearl
SATEM.description: Upon arrival at the elegantly rustic Hotel Emma at Pearl, you get the sense that the former brewing halls are lying dormant, ready to burst into action at any moment. Original brick walls, a sleek steel mezzanine, and pillars of the 19th-century brew house frame exquisitely curated Steampunk design and furniture in the lavish hotel named for heroic Prohibition businesswoman Emma Koehler. After a genuine Southern welcome, relax in your exquisite guestroom where historic elements meet contemporary luxury, before diving into San Antonio’s vibrant foodie scene in the charming Pearl neighborhood. - Dine on hearty farm-to-plate dishes at Supper, Hotel Emma’s flagship restaurant - Work out in the fitness center or enjoy the view from the shimmering rooftop pool - Choose from 147 guestrooms, each with their own personality - Create a corporate event to remember in the unique meeting spaces - Learn of scandalous stories in the brewery’s intriguing past In Pearl, the welcoming and energetic cultural hot spot of San Antonio, modern breweries and gourmet restaurants sit beside independent shops selling artisanal goods. The Hiatus Spa & Retreat, Culinary Institute of America, and Amphitheater at Pearl are just a few steps from the hotel.

TYOZE.name: Hotel New Otani Tokyo 'EXECUTIVE HOUSE ZEN'
TYOZE.description: Located on the 11th and 12th floors of a tower originally constructed to host visitors of the 1964 Tokyo Olympic Games, Hotel New Otani Tokyo, 'EXECUTIVE HOUSE ZEN' is an exclusive enclave within a larger hotel complex. Its luxe interiors embody the essence of eastern serenity, featuring bamboo and washi paper touches, an Edo-era color scheme, Japanese tea sets, and city views. With acres of centuries-old serene gardens, the largest hotel pool in Tokyo, and award-winning restaurants that serve kaiseki and shabu-shabu — Hotel New Otani Tokyo, 'EXECUTIVE HOUSE ZEN' is a prominent hotel of distinction. - Choose from 87 serene guestrooms and suites, which feature Frette linens, Grohe rain showers, and scented bath oils - Enjoy access to two hotel pools, a fitness center, a tennis court, and a driving range - Pick from a vast range of dining options, including a Michelin-starred restaurant, soba bar, and yakitori joint - Drappier Champagne, Pierre Hermé pastries, and other treats are served in the Executive Lounge - Book a treatment in one of two spas, with an extensive range of treatments and in-room services - Explore the waterfalls, bridges, and stone lanterns of the 10-acre Japanese garden - At the Executive Lounge, a buffet-style food presentation is offered six times a day A hotel-within-a-hotel, Hotel New Otani Tokyo, 'EXECUTIVE HOUSE ZEN' exudes exclusivity, with the warm ginger ameyu welcome drink setting the tone. Wander out to the main hotel — as a guest you have access to all the facilities.

SAOHU.name: Hotel Unique
SAOHU.description: From the moment you arrive, it is quite clear, given the stunning nautically inspired architecture, that Hotel Unique is beyond compare. This sense of distinction, of approaching the hotel experience in a novel way, continues inside with suites featuring flooring that curves up and transforms into a wall, along with a pool that boasts a unique water slide. As you sample eclectic dishes at the rooftop restaurant and bar, browse art and design books in the library, and work out with a personal trainer at the fitness center, it becomes clear why Condé Nast Traveler named this urban sanctuary the Best Hotel in South America. Hotel Unique more than lives up to its name. - Stay in style at one of the 86 spacious and contemporary guestrooms and suites - Watch São Paulo light up at dusk from the chic rooftop restaurant and bar Skye - Take a dip in one of two indoor pools, each featuring an underwater sound system - Treat you and your partner to one of three romantic experiences: Dream RED, Dream PURPLE, or Dream BLUE - Visit Sala Spa for the signature Unique Sense massage or rejuvenating therapies using Caudalie products Hotel Unique appears as if a gargantuan cruise liner has docked among the skyscrapers of São Paulo. What’s inside is even more surprising, with highlights that include circular windows in guestrooms and a bar that is home to a 60-foot wall decorated with rows of gin, whisky, vodka, and rum. The crown jewel is the rooftop sundeck, with its unusually colored crimson pool and panoramic views of São Paulo.

FLRIS.name: Il Salviatino
FLRIS.description: Experience a visionary retreat designed for those who travel with intention. Set on a Tuscan hillside, this 15th-century estate once housed aristocrats and visionaries but has now been transformed into a haven for serenity with a restorative spa, a swimming pool nestled in a lush garden, and a program of activities that keep holistic well-being in mind. By day, make your way down the hill to explore the streets of Florence then, when you return, retire to elegant accommodations for a restful night’s sleep. Highlights of the hotel include: - 39 stylish guestrooms and suites that blend classic elegance with contemporary comfort - Authentic Italian cuisine served at a signature restaurant with a panoramic outdoor terrace - An indulgent spa housed in a renovated greenhouse and dedicated to holistic well-being - Tiered, heated swimming pool surrounded by the hotel’s tranquil gardens - Activities ranging from yoga and meditation to cooking classes, wine tastings, and more

MLAIH.name: INIALA HARBOUR HOUSE & RESIDENCES
MLAIH.description: INIALA HARBOUR HOUSE & RESIDENCES proudly welcomes guests to the Maltese capital with an architecturally exquisite combination of modern design and decor and Valletta’s traditional heritage and charm. Spread across four historic townhomes boasting carefully restored features and details, this unique collection of guestrooms, suites, and residences offers exceptional luxury and comfort enhanced by spectacular views and an ideal setting perfect for everything from total relaxation to cultural exploration. Highlights of the hotel include: - Award-winning cuisine served with a spectacular view at ION Harbour on the hotel's stunning rooftop terrace - Soothing treatments and therapies dedicated to ultimate relaxation and rejuvenation at Essensi Spa by Iniala - Original works of art throughout including pieces by renowned and up-and-coming Maltese and Gozitan artists - Unparalleled views of The Grand Harbour and Fort St. Angelo's historic walls and battlements Along with its array of stunning accommodations and Michelin Star award-winning dining, INIALA HARBOUR HOUSE & RESIDENCES delights in offering its guests a variety of experiences ranging from wine-tasting to guided tours.

BWIPC.name: Inn at Perry Cabin
BWIPC.description: Escape to this five-star seaside retreat, located in the Victorian town of St. Michaels, off Maryland’s eastern shore. Inn at Perry Cabin is a boutique luxury waterfront resort with upscale class and historic colonial charm beside the Miles River. Surrounded by lush manicured greenery and tranquil waters, this secluded 26-acre haven makes for an ideal getaway. Swim in the expansive infinity pool, relax at the Spa at Perry Cabin, savor the fresh catch of the day from award-winning restaurants, sail the blue waters, play a championship golf course, and unwind in elegant accommodations in the 19th century, modernized manor house. - Rated Best Resort in Maryland by Condé Nast Traveler 2017 and The Most Beautiful Hotel in Maryland by Architectural Digest - Rest in 78 elegant, 19th-century inspired guestrooms; many have private balconies - Sample freshly caught, expertly prepared seafood from the Forbes Four-Star restaurant - Practice your tennis and golf swings at the three lighted Har-Tru tennis courts and new 18-hole championship Pete Dye-designed Links at Perry Cabin - Keep up your workout routine in the 24/7 fitness center with state-of-the art equipment - Indulge in an herbal massage or revitalizing facial at the Spa at Perry Cabin, where rare botanicals are used in treatments - Explore nearby St. Michael’s attractions, such as the Chesapeake Bay Maritime Museum, as well as the many antique shops, boutiques, and cafés Though the Inn at Perry Cabin is within close proximity to Washington, D.C., this rural retreat is a peaceful respite from the busy city. Relax at the pub by the fireplace, enjoy afternoon tea at the waterside restaurant, take a leisurely bike ride, and relax with laid-back coastal living.

INNHT.name: Interalpen-Hotel Tyrol
INNHT.description: Experience iconic Alpine grandeur at Interalpen-Hotel Tyrol, a secluded mountain resort where outstanding service and contemporary amenities are matched by unforgettable outdoor activities and an incomparable immersion in the natural landscape. Highlights of this modern chalet-style luxury resort include: - Spacious rooms and suites with warm wood accents and expansive Alpine views - Multiple dining options including a gourmet restaurant and welcoming fireside lounge - A holistic spa with a panorama pool, sauna, and specialty skin and body treatments - Seasonal activities such as snowshoeing, sledding, hiking, mountain biking, and more

CHOKS.name: Keswick Hall
CHOKS.description: Originally built in the early 1900s, Keswick Hall has been reimagined into a boutique luxury hotel offering timeless elegance and memorable moments. Guests who visit this countryside retreat are immersed in the beauty of Virginia’s wine country and the picturesque Blue Ridge Mountains that surround the resort, where amenities range from a spa and golf course to a signature farm-to-table restaurant helmed by a renowned chef. Highlights of Keswick Hall include: - 80 beautifully appointed guestrooms and suites designed with comfort and elegance in mind - Farm-to-table dining experiences with seasonal, sustainable ingredients and wine country fare - An award-winning, 18-hole golf course set on rolling hills with the mountains in the distance - A peaceful spa with inspired treatments, infrared sauna, and eucalyptus-scented steam room - Infinity-edge Horizon Pool and family-friendly Pavilion Pool, plus tennis and fitness activities

LAXBE.name: L'Ermitage Beverly Hills
LAXBE.description: Discover a world of luxury at L’Ermitage Beverly Hills. Nestled along a palm tree-lined boulevard in the shadow of the Hollywood Hills, this resort serves as an understated yet lavish getaway emphasizing rest and relaxation in the heart of one of America’s most bustling cities. From residential-style living areas to marble bathrooms with soaking tubs and French balconies, each suite pairs contemporary opulence with comfort. During your stay, Italian fare at signature restaurant, sip specialty cocktails in the lounge, lounge by the pool, stay active in the fitness center, or pamper yourself with one of several wellness experiences. Highlights of the resort include: - 116 residential-style suites, all with lavish dressing rooms and triptych mirrors - A coastal Italian restaurant with Mediterranean influences serving seasonally inspired dishes - Transformative self-care, including facials, body treatments, and wellness experiences - Rooftop swimming pool overlooking Downtown Los Angeles and the Hollywood Hills

VRNSD.name: Lefay Resort & SPA Dolomiti
VRNSD.description: With the forested foothills of the Alps as its backdrop, Lefay Resort & SPA Dolomiti is one of the most picturesque places to stay within Italy’s Dolomite region. Designed to blend harmoniously with the natural surroundings, the resort balances beautiful and integrative architecture with an atmosphere dedicated to both energizing physical activity and the ultimate in rest and relaxation. Highlights of the resort and spa include: - Spacious suites set amid the mountain scenery of a UNESCO World Heritage Site - Two restaurants and two bars offering distinct perspectives on gourmet food and drink - One of the largest spas in the Alps, the 5,000 sq m / 53,820 sq ft Lefay SPA Dolomiti - All-season access to mountain sports and activities like skiing, trekking, cycling, and more - Manicured grounds offering sweeping mountain vistas of the Rendena Valley In addition to welcoming travelers to a dazzling location with exceptional amenities, the resort also dedicates itself to doing good by reducing energy consumption through advanced tech and adding its local communities in the economic development.

VRNLR.name: Lefay Resort & SPA Lago di Garda
VRNLR.description: Nestled high atop a hill hugging the western shores of Italy’s Lake Garda, Lefay Resort & SPA Lago di Garda stuns travelers with spectacular panoramic views of the Riviera dei Limoni with its famed citrus groves, olive trees, and one-of-a-kind lakeside landscape. Guests of the resort are greeted by a pair of elegant gates that swing open to reveal a park-like estate dotted with shady woodlands and sweeping lawns leading up to one of northern Italy’s most beautiful wellness retreats. Highlights of the resort include: - All-suite accommodation, all with lake views, and some with spacious private terraces - An expansive spa dedicated to guest wellness offering multiple pools, treatments, and more - Two restaurants and two bars with a focus on healthy, seasonal Mediterranean dishes - Picturesque natural surroundings featuring hiking trails and quiet places for contemplation - Holistic hospitality personalized to each guest, with a special commitment to wellness Designed to blend seamlessly with the natural surroundings, the hotel fits snuggly into the hillside, cascading downward in terraces that culminate in a broad infinity pool whose mirror-like surface melts imperceptibly with the waters of Lake Garda beyond. The resort’s surrounding estate likewise offers guests an entry into nature while also staying active through fitness trails, walking groups, and other activities that honor the resort’s unique environment.

BDSSD.name: Masseria San Domenico
BDSSD.description: Immersed in a landscape of century-old olive groves on the Adriatic coast, Masseria San Domenico combines the finest in Italian luxury with intricate details of the past. Housed in a 14th-century building that served as a watchtower for the Knights of Malta on an estate that has long served as an olive farm, the boutique hotel is now a peaceful estate surrounded by nature. Escape to accommodations designed for comfort and luxury, including a villa with a pool, or explore the picturesque grounds. The hotel is home to a free-form swimming pool, golf course, sea-inspired spa, private beaches, and a range of sports and experiences to keep you entertained throughout your stay. Highlights of the hotel include: - 40 guestrooms, suites, and a private villa with spacious king beds and pops of color - Fresh cuisine in lovely settings, from an elegant 18th-century dining room to a seaside patio - A thalassotherapy spa that utilizes seawater and seaweed rich in vital minerals - Championship 18-hole golf course overlooking the azure waters of the Adriatic Sea - Activities ranging from wine tasting to yoga classes, mountain biking, tennis, and more - A seawater swimming pool, private beaches, Mediterranean gardens, and other scenery

SJDML.name: Montage Los Cabos
SJDML.description: Overlooking a sheltered bay, each room at Montage Los Cabos boasts coastal views and sliding glass doors that blur the boundaries between the relaxing indoors and the gorgeous outdoors. Set in the renowned Twin Dolphin community, this five-star resort offers a sublime mix of relaxation and recreation. So whether you are in the mood for hitting the tennis court, teeing off at the 18-hole golf course, lounging on a daybed by the beachfront pool, or snorkeling in picturesque waters, these 39 stunning coastal acres make for a highly personalized, authentic experience. - Travel + Leisure World's Best Awards 2019 winner - Soak up the shimmering coastline from one of 122 guestrooms and suites and 52 Montage residences - Swim and snorkel in calm turquoise waters and stroll along a powdery sand beach - Relax beside any one of three palm-shaded pools, including an adults-only Serenity Pool - Give your children the chance to explore on their terms with the immersive Paintbox program - Plan your dream destination wedding on the beach or a sprawling oceanfront lawn - Relish poolside downtime while the kids enjoy a supervised program of fun activities - Indulge in a relaxing and tailored wellness program with pampering spa treatments Chase marlin during a deep-sea fishing trip, or swim with dolphins and whale sharks on an excursion arranged by the concierge. Feast on fresh seafood with the sand between your toes, and be sure to wind down by indulging in treatments inspired by the desert-meets-sea setting at 40,000-square-foot Spa Montage Los Cabos. A celebrity playground, Montage Los Cabos gives you the opportunity to eat, stay, and play like an A-lister.

JMKMV.name: Myconian Villa Collection
JMKMV.description: A glass of Champagne and uninterrupted views of exquisite Elia Beach welcome you to the dreamy Myconian Villa Collection in the coastal hills of breathtaking Mykonos. This tranquil island escape offers impeccable service with quintessential, crisp Greek decor accented by bespoke wood-crafted furnishing and vibrant fabrics. Sip a tropical cocktail. Dip in the saltwater infinity pools. Dine on exceptional plates under the stars to the delicate tones of the resident harpist. - Stay in one of 96 idyllic sea-view guestrooms, suites, or private villas - Stroll down to your section of famously exclusive Elia Beach - Explore the island from the comfort of the hotel’s chauffeur-driven luxury cars - Select holistic designer therapies at Myconian Collection Spa - Explore the high-end boutique shopping and after-dark nightlife in Mykonos - Cruise the Aegean Sea aboard the resort’s exclusive yacht Myconian Villa Collection is the island getaway you have always dreamed of. Enjoy plush cushions on the poolside loungers, crafted cocktails from the palm-thatched bar, sumptuous dining on your private terrace, and languishing views of the Aegean Sea from the saltwater infinity pools.

PITNW.name: Nemacolin
PITNW.description: Escape to the Laurel Highlands of Southwestern Pennsylvania at the one-of-a-kind Nemacolin resort. Fill your days with unforgettable adventures amid rolling meadows, flourishing woodlands, and rugged mountains. From ropes courses, off-road excursions, on-site animal habitats, and 36 holes of championship golf to a luxurious spa, holistic healing center, and infinity pool, this lavish resort offers an array of exceptional experiences. Choose from five different types of accommodations and indulge in a range of contemporary dishes and drinks at the varied dining venues before experiencing the excitement each day brings. Highlights of the resort include: - 280 welcoming guestrooms, suites, townhomes, and vacation homes - Sensational European, American, and Italian restaurants, plus a seafood-driven experience - Adventures ranging from off-road drives through the wild landscape to animal encounters - Two championship golf courses as well as lessons offered at The Nemacolin Golf Academy - A tranquil spa with healing treatments, saunas, hot tubs, and an indoor swimming pool - Decor featuring exquisite pieces from the owners’ extraordinary Hardy Family Art Collection

CUNLB.name: NIZUC Resort & Spa
CUNLB.address_raw: Blvd. Kukulcan Km 21+260, Punta Nizuc, Cancun
CUNLB.description: Sparkling, transparent blue water, soft white sand, and lush tropical gardens help set the scene at NIZUC Resort & Spa, a secluded beachfront resort at Punta Nizuc in Cancún, Mexico. Its 29 tranquil acres on the Caribbean coast offer a slice of paradise with stunning scenery and an array of activities. Relax in your stylish suite or private villa. Play tennis. Rejuvenate at the world-class ESPA-branded spa. Enjoy live Cuban music, or roll some cigars. The eclectic experiences that make up the 'Nizuc Life' will linger long in your memory. - Stay in one of 274 sumptuous suites and private villas - Swim in one of three pools — including an adult-only option - Sip sunset cocktails in one of three lounge bars with a view - Delight in romantic moments together with private dining on the beach - Savor gourmet cuisine in the resort’s six world-class restaurants - Snorkel among exotic wildlife at the world’s second-largest reef A world away from the familiarity of everyday life, NIZUC Resort & Spa offers you the opportunity to take part in an extensive range of unique and expertly curated activities and experiences, from kayaking on still waters and playing tennis in the sun, to masterclasses in sushi making and cruises in a luxury yacht. Children love the resort’s Winik’s Kids Club, and everyone has fun with the various water sports and fitness classes offered.

OXROV.name: Ojai Valley Inn
OXROV.description: Surrounded by a breathtaking mountainous backdrop, and set within 220 acres of immaculately landscaped gardens and oak trees, Ojai Valley Inn goes beyond the everyday norm. Listen to live music under a 200-year-old oak tree, and be awed by The Pink Moment as the sun sets beyond the Topa Topa bluffs. Whether you choose to enjoy world-class dining at one of eight restaurants, to be reinvigorated by a Himalayan salt stone massage at the award-winning Spa Ojai, explore one-of-a-kind culinary classes at The Farmhouse, or stimulate your creativity at the Artist Cottage and Apothecary, there are countless and inimitable experiences to be had at the AAA Five Diamond hotel. - A TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence winner in 2017 - Choose from 303 exceptionally designed guestrooms - Savor farm-to-table cuisine at one of the eight delicious restaurants, cafés, or bars - Tee off at the 18-hole championship golf course - Choose from four elegant pools dedicated to family fun, adult-only time, fitness, and relaxation - Explore one-of-a-kind culinary classes, demos, book signing, chef dinners, and more at The Farmhouse at Ojai - Indulge in five-star pampering at the award-winning Spa Ojai Ojai Valley Inn’s carefully curated experiences ensure your vacation is utterly unique. Dress in a protective suit and spend time with a beekeeper in the Mistletoe Meadows, before tasting a unique selection of fresh local honey. Go on a geo-caching treasure hunt, ride horseback through leafy woodland, or play tennis before retiring to a sophisticated guestroom with awe-inspiring views.

EDIOC.name: Old Course Hotel Golf Resort & Spa
EDIOC.description: On the iconic 17th hole of the Old Course, overlooking the sandy shores of Fife, Old Course Hotel, Golf Resort & Spa is a dreamy European retreat, whether golf is part of your life or simply a passing pleasure. The hotel has a true sense of classic grandeur, with interiors designed by legendary architect Jacques Garcia, combining contemporary style with traditional Scottish décor. Moreover, with the warm Scottish welcome and the subsequent specialty of personalized service, it is easy to see how the hotel won its AA Five Red Star status. - Retreat in style at one of the 144 stylish guestrooms, including 35 suites - Watch golfers play the 17th green of the Old Course from your private balcony - Enjoy a luxurious afternoon high tea with buttery scones and pink champagne - Unwind at the United Kingdom’s first Kohler Waters Spa or in the rooftop hot tub - Explore the more than 250 whiskies on the terrace of the Road Hole Bar - Tee off at one of the world’s oldest championship golf courses Step into “The Home of Golf,” guided by the best golfing concierges in the area, ready to organize tee times, rent equipment, and schedule lessons at the Golf Academy. Afterward, recharge at the luxury spa, with its refreshing ice fountain, swimming pool, hydrotherapy pool, and steam room.

MRYPR.name: Post Ranch Inn
MRYPR.description: Built on a cliff 1,200 feet above the Pacific Ocean, the 100-acre Post Ranch Inn embraces the dramatic beauty of the coastline with glorious ocean, mountain, and forest views. This luxury California hotel is adorned with earth tones, high sweeping arches, and skylights that ensure it blends seamlessly into its natural surroundings, creating a sanctuary that’s uniquely at one with its environment. Escape to this remote, romantic hideaway to experience unparalleled vistas, world-class cuisine with an award-winning wine list, nurturing spa treatments, and an array of complimentary activities. Highlights of the adults-only retreat include: - 39 rustic suites, private houses, and treehouses with wood-burning fireplaces and outdoor decks - Garden-centric dining at Sierra Mar, with floor-to-ceiling windows offering stunning views - Relaxing infinity pools and a soothing spa with treatments that incorporate healing elements - Wellness offerings, including morning yoga, nature walks, forest meditation, and sound baths - A diverse lineup of activities, ranging from stargazing, falconry, and shopping to garden tours

IADSH.name: Salamander Middleburg
IADSH.description: Set on 340 stunning acres in Virginia’s beautiful wine country, just 30 minutes from Washington, DC, Salamander Middleburg is a five-star luxe country retreat with refined rooms, farm-to-table dining, and activities that range from the serene to the ruggedly rural. Feel at home in the elegant guestrooms and restaurants as impressive as their countryside surroundings. Fish, play tennis, explore the region on horseback, or zoom along zip lines, then unwind at the award-winning Salamander Spa. - Choose from 168 opulent yet relaxed guestrooms, with designer touches and luxury amenities - Glide from whirlpool to hot stone treatment to the aromatic steam room or reconnect in a couple’s suite at the award-winning Salamander Spa - Learn how to turn simple ingredients into delicacies during a cooking class at Harrimans Cooking Studio - Spend your evenings under the stars with a glass of regional wine or a signature cocktail - Make the most of rural Virginia's great outdoors with horseback riding, zip lining, clay shooting, and fishing - Savor local bounty and regional specialties from brined pork chops to a 22-ounce prime bone-in Cowboy Cut ribeye, fresh crab cakes, and fried chicken with buttermilk biscuits at Harrimans Grill Revel in the beauty of the Virginia countryside at this lavish and indulgent retreat in the heart of wine country. Spend your days outdoors enjoying activities with your family, relax in the healing spa, dine in style, and end your evenings by the fire pit.

BCNTS.name: Serras Barcelona
BCNTS.description: Located along the beautiful Spanish waterfront, Serras Barcelona is a seaside resort where the bright blue waters of the Mediterranean Sea complement the gorgeous architecture of the city's stunning Gothic Quarter. The hotel offers travelers the perfect place to rest and relax when not out seeing the sights. Whether you’re visiting Barcelona for its sunny beaches, compelling history, architectural novelty, or just a weekend away, Serras Barcelona provides ample opportunity to both do it all and do nothing at all. Enjoy Catalan cuisine, take a day to unwind with an in-room massage, go for a dip in the plunge pool, or work up a sweat at the gym, all in a building that previously housed one of Pablo Picasso’s very first studios. Highlights of the hotel include: - 28 elegant guestrooms and suites with a stylish, contemporary design and views of the area - Catalan cuisine that blends savory meats and locally caught seafood with seasonal produce - A rooftop terrace with a refreshing swimming pool and loungers overlooking the waterfront - State-of-the-art fitness center with quality equipment and personal training services - Steps away from local landmarks such as Las Ramblas and the Basílica de la Sagrada Família

SVQSS.name: Serras Sevilla
SVQSS.description: This Andalusian hotel in southern Spain beckons those seeking history, romance, or simply a relaxed pace in a city that feels like home. Amid stunning architecture – including the Seville Cathedral, mere steps away from the hotel – Serras Sevilla offers an inspired retreat in the middle of the city. Take in views of historic buildings from the comfort of your guestroom or suite, go for a dip in the pool, relax with tranquil spa treatments, or sip cocktails on the rooftop before enjoying dinner at one of the hotel’s dining venues. Embark on a journey through the city to uncover a wealth of landmarks, sidewalk cafes, and boutique shops before returning for a restful night’s sleep. Highlights of the hotel include: - 43 guestrooms and suites blending historic grandeur with contemporary luxury - Diverse dining at a street-level restaurant, al fresco patio, and rooftop terrace - Double treatment room designed for relaxing massages, facials, and other treatments - Rooftop swimming pool with views of the city and a 24-hour fitness center - Central location in Seville’s historic district, right near its famed Gothic cathedral

SMOSB.name: Shutters on the Beach
SMOSB.description: Experience luxury beach living and quintessential California at its best at Shutters on the Beach, an iconic hotel directly on the sand in Santa Monica with the Pacific Ocean just steps away. With an elegant style evoking upscale Cape Cod cottages, it offers coastal-chic guestrooms, casual and fine dining, a wide array of amenities and activities, a revitalizing spa, and a prime, yet discreet, location that is central to Southern California hot spots like the Santa Monica Pier and Venice Beach. Nothing compares to this exceptional property — except the ocean sunsets on display every day - The hotel's 186 guestrooms and 12 suites feature hardwood floors, poster-style beds, elegant beach-cottage décor, and marble bathrooms - Lounge by the ocean-view outdoor pool, relax in the Jacuzzi, or walk to the sand and sea - Dine with ocean views at COAST Beach Café and Bar for casual fare or 1 Pico for fine dining - Meet for drinks at the Lobby Terrace or the gorgeous Living Room with twin fireplaces, cozy couches, and a grand piano — plus live entertainment nightly - Recharge at ONE Spa with a relaxing massage, hydrating facial, or body scrub - Work out at the fitness center, take an exercise class or surf lesson, and ride bikes by the beach - Explore the local area with complimentary house car drop-off at local sites within three miles Shutters on the Beach is a 2017 and 2018 Condé Nast Traveler Readers' Choice Award winner, and one of only two hotels located on the sand in Los Angeles County, with relaxed, elegant décor by Michael S. Smith, the interior designer of the White House. Nothing separates you from the sea, sand, and sun here. Everything you need for a day at the beach is available, including chairs, umbrellas, towels, bicycles, picnic baskets, surfboards, boogie boards, and even butler service.

OSLSO.name: Sommerro
OSLSO.description: Tucked away within one of Oslo’s oldest neighborhoods and surrounded by 19th-century architecture, Sommerro Hotel and its 242 rooms welcome guests into a world of Nordic splendor and decadence. Guests of the Norwegian capital’s newest luxury hotel can: Spend their evening resting in sumptuous Art Deco rooms accented with traditional Nordic flare Sunbathe or swim in Oslo’s first rooftop pool – or enjoy a sunset view on the adjacent terrace Feast on traditional Nordic cuisine and international favorites at a variety of restaurants Stroll the nearby historic neighborhood and shop, eat, and drink like a local Maintain your workout regimen at the fitness center or relax with a treatment at the wellness area Whatever way you choose to enjoy and spend your time at Sommerro, you’ll appreciate the cultivated and beautiful 1930s atmosphere enhanced even further by superb attention to detail, dedication to personalized service, and luxurious touches everywhere.

SIRTA.name: The Alpina Gstaad
SIRTA.description: The Alpina Gstaad sets a new standard for Swiss mountain resorts, famed for its style and refinement. While Michelin-starred restaurants and the award-winning spa offer world-class sophistication and luxury, the Jean Mus-designed garden serves as a serene escape in nature and authentic Alpine life is never far away. An outdoor pool deck beautifully frames the mountains, the resort’s interiors make use of natural wood and stone cut by Swiss craftsmen, and the honey on your breakfast table comes from beehives in the hotel garden. Whether on a wellness retreat or a winter sports adventure, feel the stresses of the world slip away as you surround yourself with stunning views, cozy decor, and exceptional service. Highlights of the hotel include: - 56 guestrooms, suites, and residences offering stunning Alpine views from the balcony - Traditional Swiss dining at a Michelin-starred restaurant or delectable global cuisine - Rejuvenating Asian-influenced treatments, hot and cold plunge pools, a hammam, and more - A fitness center with personal training, plus a studio for yoga, Pilates, and meditation - Extensive hotel art collection, plus hosting of artists in residence and creative forums - Luxury fleet of Mercedes and Tesla vehicles used to chauffeur guests Committed to sustainability, The Alpina Gstaad participates in the NOW Force for Good alliance to provide a sustainable travel experience while taking responsibility for its impact on communities and the environment. To learn more about the hotel's efforts and book directly, click here .

LONBM.name: The Beaumont Mayfair
LONBM.description: Step into one of London’s most exclusive hotels. Elegant and seductive, The Beaumont Mayfair is surrounded by prestigious designer stores, Michelin-starred restaurants, and boutique art galleries. Recapturing the spirit of old-world luxury, the award-winning hotel is a sophisticated urban oasis, set away from the hustle and bustle of London’s eclectic streets. Sip classic cocktails in Le Magritte Bar and savor the finest British cuisine along with a glass of Champagne at Rosi after unwinding in the tranquil hotel spa with a comprehensive lineup of massages, facials, and hammam treatments that incorporate organic, British-made products. Highlights of the hotel include: - 101 tastefully decorated guestrooms and suites offering relaxed glamor - Inventive, seasonal British dining that doubles as a show with thrilling tableside theatrics - Relaxing hammam, sauna, and steam room, plus a 24-hour fitness center - A chauffeur-driven house car that makes it easy to explore the city - Central location near the world-famous Selfridges department store, mere steps away

COSBM.name: The Broadmoor
COSBM.description: Discover the incomparable splendor of Colorado through the unique lens of The Broadmoor. Since opening its doors more than a century ago, this extravagant resort has offered its guests the chance to experience the unique beauty of the American West. Set on the idyllic shores of Cheyenne Lake and framed by Colorado’s iconic mountains, The Broadmoor welcomes guests with warm, genuine hospitality and an unmatched selection of adventures and activities that celebrate the magnificent surroundings. Home to 20 restaurants and lounges, two legendary golf courses, a world-renowned spa, a movie theater, boutique shopping, sophisticated meeting, and event spaces, an array of programming, and elegantly appointed accommodations, the many amenities encourage guests to stay at the hotel and make the most of the unique environment. Highlights of the hotel include: - 784 sumptuous guestrooms, suites, cottages, brownstones, and an estate home - Dine at Penrose Room, Colorado’s only restaurant awarded both Forbes Five-Star and AAA Five Diamond statuses - Explore a world-class collection of American West art and feel the hotel’s history - Swim in a zero-entry infinity pool or enjoy a soak in a Jacuzzi with stunning views - Stroll around the lake, cross the water in a paddleboat, or soar over waterfalls on a zipline - Tee off at the East Course or the West Course, two championship golf courses designed by Donald Ross and Robert Trent Jones, Sr. If you wish to retreat further into the Colorado Rockies, The Broadmoor can help, with its all-inclusive Wilderness Experiences operating seasonally from April through October. Offering exceptional settings and one-of-a-kind experiences that blend seamlessly with the hotel’s signature hospitality. Embrace the lush beauty of Pike National Forest, try fly fishing along a private 5-mile stretch of Tarryall Creek, and more. Whichever adventure you choose, The Broadmoor promises an experience unlike any other.

TYOCH.name: The Capitol Hotel Tokyu
TYOCH.description: Rising high above the streets of downtown Tokyo, The Capitol Hotel Tokyu combines traditional architecture and contemporary design to a dazzling effect. In the two-story lobby, slender wooden beams echo temple and shrine interiors, while a large-scale Ikebana flower arrangement hints at the original art collection within. Guestrooms are designed to customize your space with movable shoji panels; the Carju Rajah Tiado spa and huge indoor pool invite you to unwind; and five bars and restaurants entice you with a tour of the very best modern Asian cuisine. - Try a Vital Spa — a salt bath combined with a low-temperature mist sauna — or get groomed for dinner in the gentlemen's barber room - All 251 guestrooms and suites feature sliding shoji screens - Discover the delicacy and precision of kaiseki cuisine at Suiren, led by master chef Minoru Tsuge - Admire contemporary Japanese art throughout the property, including calligraphy and Ikebana flower arrangements - Work out in a 15th-floor gym overlooking the city or relax in the Jacuzzi or 65 ft / 20 m indoor pool The beams in The Capitol Hotel Tokyu's lobby are the work of award-winning architect Kengo Kuma, a fitting introduction to a hotel that is filled with art. There is work here from some of 20th-century Japan's great masters, including subtle suibokuga by Toko Shinoda and sculpture by Sofu Teshigahara.

CHSTC.name: The Cooper
CHSTC.description: Southern elegance and Lowcountry charm come together at The Cooper, a luxury hotel located on the riverfront in beautiful Charleston, South Carolina. Stylish decor, opulent furnishings, and contemporary aesthetics create comfortable accommodations in which to unwind after exploring the region. During your visit, indulge in distinct dining venues, rejuvenating spa treatments, or time spent poolside overlooking the city skyline. Discover even more with on-the-water adventures courtesy of the boats docked in the hotel’s own marina or spend your leisure time shopping and visiting local historic landmarks. Highlights of the hotel include: - 191 timeless guestrooms and suites designed in a residential style - Distinct culinary experiences, from a seafood restaurant to pool bar, cafe, and burger joint - Urban wellness center offering skin care treatments, body rituals, and fitness services - Waterfront infinity pool offering views of the harbor and downtown skyline - Private marina with a fleet of luxury cruising vessels

WASDC.name: The Dupont Circle Hotel
WASDC.description: Presiding over the site where multiple grand avenues converge within the United States’ capital, The Dupont Circle Hotel welcomes diplomats, dignitaries, and travelers alike with gracious guest accommodations and luxurious amenities. Featuring a refreshed, contemporary vision of its building’s original 1950s design aesthetic, the hotel pairs forward-thinking spaces with highly personalized service. Influenced by its location at the base of Embassy Row, the hotel embraces its place at the intersection of the international through global architectural accents, refined yet approachable dining options, and chic guest room décor. While staying as a guest of this recently renovated, multi-award-winning hotel, you can: - Relax in an array of accommodations, from well-appointed Classic Rooms to Penthouse Suites - Savor signature dishes at the Martin Brudnizki-designed Pembroke Restaurant - Retreat to the club-like atmosphere of the Doyle Bar for a 1950s-influenced cocktail - Stay active at the fully outfitted fitness center or be soothed by an in-room spa treatment - Enjoy exploring Washington’s many historic monuments such as the National Mall and Capitol Set in one of the city’s most beautiful neighborhoods, The Dupont Circle Hotel makes its home among foreign embassies housed in 19th-century Gilded Age mansions where hard-to-find international dining options rub shoulders with smart cafes and unique shops. Beautiful boulevards spread out in every direction from the hotel’s front door, making it a perfect place to begin your truly authentic Washington, D.C. experience.

KIREH.name: The Europe Hotel & Resort
KIREH.description: The Europe Hotel & Resort is an award-winning hotel regarded as the most luxurious hotel in Killarney and among the top hotels in Ireland. Set in a breathtaking location on the Lakes of Killarney, the hotel overlooks 26,000 acres of Killarney National Park and offers elegant guest rooms and suites with contemporary décor and are finished to the highest standard. The resort also includes numerous dining options, a stunning 50,000 sq. ft. lakeshore spa, and an array of activities and nearby attractions perfect for experiencing the area’s unique Irish charm. Highlights of the hotel include: - 180 rooms and suites with magnificent views of the lake or gardens - Three onsite restaurants offering both relaxed and formal dining - Indulgent and restorative treatments at ESPA at The Europe spa - Complimentary Austrian Haflinger Pony rides for all ages - Outdoor activities such as boat trips, fishing, car touring, and more

PHXGA.name: The Global Ambassador
PHXGA.description: Set in a prime location where Phoenix, Scottsdale, and Paradise Valley meet, The Global Ambassador invites travelers to experience personalized hospitality, five original restaurants, and exceptional wellness in refined and curated style. Highlights of this thoughtfully designed retreat include: - 141 beautiful accommodations ranging from King rooms to One-Bedroom Suites - Five restaurants with a variety of cuisines including Mediterranean and French - A restorative spa offering traditional and contemporary treatments and therapies - Outdoor pool and hot tubs, fitness center with sauna, steam room, and cold plunge - Abundant nearby activities including hiking, shopping, history, and more Created by restaurant innovator, Sam Fox, The Global Ambassador is imbued with the passion for dedicated service and superb hospitality that this 12-time James Beard Award nominee has previously brought to the 150 restaurants he has successfully opened throughout the United States. This particular attention to detail ensures The Global Ambassador offers guests a bespoke, ultra-luxe stay experience second to none in the Southwest.

BNAHH.name: The Hermitage Hotel
BNAHH.description: As gracious now as it was upon opening in 1910, The Hermitage Hotel is home to 122 recently restored and redesigned guest accommodations offering a sumptuous space to rest and relax, along with historic amenities such as its stunning, airy, and inviting lobby, and grand ballroom lined with walnut paneling and crowned by an ornate ceiling. Set near the State Capitol, the hotel's prime location offers unparalleled access to all Nashville's activities and attractions, while still reflecting the quiet, refined, and genteel atmosphere reflective of modern-day Southern hospitality. Other highlights of the hotel include: - Oversized guest rooms and suites with a spacious, residential feel - Two restaurants from Michelin star-awarded Chef Jean-Georges Vongerichten - A state-of-the-art fitness center with Peloton equipment - National Historic Landmark status in the heart of Music City The Hermitage Hotel extends Southern hospitality to every member of the family, including those with four legs. The Pampered Paws Program offers an on-call pet masseuse, choice of luxurious beds, and in-room dining options.

TLVJH.name: The Jaffa Hotel
TLVJH.description: Originally built in the 19th century, The Jaffa Hotel has a timeless charm that blends Old World allure with modern luxury in one of Tel Aviv-Jaffa’s most historic neighborhoods. Only a short walk from the beach, it sits amid a mix of ancient alleys, diverse architecture, and dynamic markets, offering guests an authentic taste of the region’s rich cultural heritage. Aside from two accommodation wings – the minimalist modern section and the ornate historic section – the thoughtfully designed hotel offers areas for rest and relaxation, whether focused on dining, wellness, or leisure. Highlights of the hotel include: - 120 guestrooms, suites, and a luxury penthouse with three wings and a rooftop terrace - Refined culinary experiences inspired by the Mediterranean that keep sustainability in mind - A revitalizing spa with signature massages and body rituals, wet and dry saunas, and more - Outdoor swimming pool inviting moments of leisure both in and out of the water - State-of-the-art fitness center, open 24 hours a day for hotel guests

DUBKH.name: The K Club
DUBKH.description: Set among more than 500 acres of rolling Irish countryside, The K Club invites guests from around the world to explore and experience a centuries-old estate centered around the beautifully restored Straffan House. Built in 1832, this idyllic manor lavishes guests with a contemporary luxury experience enriched by sumptuous accommodations, nearly endless outdoor activities, and unforgettable dining experiences. Highlights of the hotel include: Unique accommodations ranging from Standard Rooms to home-like Residences Two iconic parkland golf courses designed by renowned golf great Arnold Palmer A variety of gourmet dining options including cocktail bars and classic restaurants Abundant outdoor activities such as horseback riding, archery, fishing, and falconry An easy-to-access location just 30 minutes from Dublin’s city center and airport With so many activities and such a wide variety of accommodations types, The K Club’s lush country stay experience is perfect for all types of travelers from golf buddies testing their game on championship courses to multi-generational families reuniting for a week of fun and couples wishing for a romantic weekend away.

LONLE.name: The Londoner
LONLE.description: Set in London's Leicester Square, The Londoner takes center stage in the heart of the West End's theater district. Grand in scale yet intimate in atmosphere, the hotel's first-of-its-kind super boutique hotel redefines English cosmopolitan hospitality. With 350 rooms and suites spreading throughout 16 stories and across 10 levels, The Londoner even includes a tower penthouse with panoramic views of the city's spectacular skyline. The hotel offers as much underground as it does above with a beautifully designed subterranean area hosting the hotel’s two private screening rooms, spa and gym, nail salon, and barber shop. Guests of The Londoner will not only enjoy deluxe accommodations, but they'll also have exclusive access to The Residence, a residents-only club. The Residence features many options for relaxing and working with complimentary breakfast pastries, antipasti, soft drinks, tea, and coffee served throughout the day. There is even a secret, green velvet Whisky Room, home to a rare selection of whiskeys from around the world.

LONAN.name: The Newman
LONAN.description: Wander the cosmopolitan streets of one of the most famous cities in the world with The Newman as your home base. Enchanting guestrooms feature a conventional style with a playful edge at this London hotel, incorporating chic furnishings, vivid artwork, and a sleek aesthetic. The culinary program offers relaxed dining and drinks while those focused on health and well-being can visit the Wellness Floor for unparalleled restorative experiences. Highlights of the resort include: - Honored as The Times’ 2026 London Hotel of the Year - 81 stylish guestrooms, studios, suites, and apartments inspired by the cultural heart of London - Modern European brasserie featuring an outdoor terrace and seasonal British ingredients - Wellness Floor with a salt room, hydrotherapy pool, and hot/cold experience cabins - Fitness activities ranging from yoga and meditation to a gym with personal training

HOUTP.name: The Post Oak Hotel at Uptown Houston
HOUTP.description: Set in a 10-acre, oak-scattered complex in one of Houston’s most sought-after areas, The Post Oak Hotel at Uptown Houston is a visually striking, 38-story tower hotel that makes a bold statement from the get-go. A vast, Swarovski crystal-laced chandelier dominates the lobby, while silver accents characterize the design woven throughout the 250 palatial guestrooms, suites, and residences. Enjoy the good life with several fine dining eateries and The Library, an inspiring retreat stocked with limited-edition volumes of books. With an extensive spa, a pampering salon, and a sparkling pool stylishly surrounded by contemporary chaise lounges and a sleek fire pit, this hotel ensures that you look and feel your absolute best. - Stay at the city’s only AAA Five Diamond destination - Let The Cellar’s sommelier guide your selection through 30,000 bottles of wine - Wind down in the shade of a private cabana by the oasis-like courtyard pool - Work out in the cutting-edge gym, with access to live cycling classes - Sip a seasonal elixir tea as you decide which tailored spa treatment is right for you - Choose from 16 cuts and chops at Mastro’s Steakhouse, a celebrity favorite - Arrive in style from the airport by landing atop the rooftop’s private helipad - The Spa at The Post Oak Hotel is the only hotel spa in Texas to feature an IN-SKIN facial machine With an enviable location in Houston’s most upmarket neighborhood, it is little wonder the local shopping scene is unrivaled. Begin at in-hotel boutique 29 North and then head out to the beloved high-end mall nearby, The Galleria. The on-site spa pulls techniques and traditions from around the globe and throughout history, with a focus on holistic wellness in every treatment. High-tech innovations mingle with the latest formulas, guaranteeing unparalleled pampering and long-lasting results.

BTHSA.name: The Sanchaya
BTHSA.description: Situated on the white sandy shores of the island of Bintan, The Sanchaya is a magnificent beachfront estate that will instantly relieve and revitalize mind, body, and soul. With colonial-inspired features and a picturesque, stately atmosphere, the property is a must-visit. Between breathtaking views of the South China Sea, a stunning white powder beach, delectable dining experiences, refined service standards, unique wellness activities, and 29 immaculate private suites and villas, it’s no wonder The Sanchaya has won numerous awards, including “Top Resorts in Asia” in Condé Nast Traveler ’s Readers Choice Awards for two consecutive years, 2017 and 2018. - Retreat to your private suite or villa, each featuring exquisite interiors, upscale amenities, and views of the ocean or lagoon - Head to the Olympic-sized infinity pool to relax on submerged lounge chairs and enjoy Bakul – a service that provides towels, still and sparkling water, after-sun gel, and a cold face towel - Enjoy turn-down service, morning yoga, and à la carte breakfast - Play croquet, paddleboard, or explore the estate gardens - Indulge at the Indonesian-inspired spa with natural experiences and treatments using a fresh menu of organic scrubs The Sanchaya is just an hour away from Singapore but feels worlds apart from the bright lights of the big city. Steeped in tradition and tranquility, it's an escape from the everyday.

LONTS.name: The Stafford London
LONTS.description: In central but peaceful St James’s neighborhood, The Stafford Hotel puts you within easy reach of London’s famous landmarks, close to the theaters of the West End, and a stone’s throw from iconic Bond Street and Oxford Street shopping. When your day exploring the English capital is over, relax in the hotel’s individually designed guestrooms or feel like you are in your very own residence in the hotel’s townhouse-style suites. Explore one of the most picturesque areas of London, with royal parks and the River Thames nearby. Highlights of the hotel include: - 106 individually decorated guestrooms and suites with sprawling city views - A well-equipped fitness center with state-of-the-art Technogym equipment - MICHELIN‑starred dining by celebrated chef Michael Caines MBE, showcasing refined European cuisine - A timeless American-inspired bar with light bites and innovative signature sips - Location in the heart of historic St James’s, just across the park from Buckingham Palace

OSLTT.name: THE THIEF
OSLTT.description: Steal away to a stylish stay at THE THIEF, Oslo’s gold-and-glass crown jewel on its city-meets-sea peninsula that has transformed from an islet getaway for local bandits to an ultra-trendy arts district. This luxe Norwegian seaside gem feels like a chic art museum with works from renowned artists such as Jeff Koons and Andy Warhol sharing space with futuristic video art. If that doesn’t heist your heart, the stylish rooms, nearby beach, rooftop terrace, and pampering spa treatments will. • 2018 Condé Nast Traveler Gold List and 2017 Readers' Choice Award-Winner • All 116 rooms boast exclusive art, private balconies, and floor-to-ceiling windows • The incredible spa offers distinctive treatments, saunas, steam rooms, a pool, and a Turkish hammam • Enjoy delicious dining, cocktails at the chic bar, and Oslo fjord views from the rooftop terrace • Walk to Aker Brygge’s waterfront promenade and the Astrup Fearnley Museum next door • THIEF Activities offers classic Norwegian experiences like cross-country skiing and toboggan runs THE THIEF is not your average art hotel. Its permanent collection was curated by the former director of Norway's National Museum of Art and its lounge hosts concerts, fashion shows, and book launches. The guest experience is equally exceptional. Breathe in the fresh sea air. Take in the stunning fjord views. Work out at the gym. Get a decadent Moroccan clay spa treatment and then dine on fresh catches and weekend brunch buffets. Explore Oslo and make memories no one can take away.

MSYWC.name: The Windsor Court
MSYWC.description: Exuding European-inspired elegance with New Orleans flair, The Windsor Court welcomes guests with exquisite artwork and a grand rose arrangement to set the tone for a spacious and luxurious visit. Just a short stroll from the French Quarter, the hotel features an award-winning spa, fine dining, nightly live music, and traditional afternoon tea. Enjoy rooftop views from the pool or elevate your stay with access to the private club Level, offering curated amenities like daily breakfast and evening desserts. With gracious hospitality and a peaceful, central location, it’s the perfect blend of comfort and sophistication. Highlights of the hotel include: - 314 sophisticated guestrooms and suites with elevated amenities and Italian marble bathrooms - Diversified dining experiences, including contemporary New Orleans dishes at the Grill Room - English-inspired bar offering live jazz music and delicious Old Fashioned cocktails - A heated saltwater swimming pool located on the roof that overlooks the city skyline - Prime location not far from the famous Bourbon Street in the French Quarter Paintings of British rural hunting scenes, Windsor Castle, and high-society portraits spanning the 17th to 20th centuries adorn the walls of the hotel, adding to the sense of stepping into an old English country club, far away from traditional Louisiana.

HYAWI.name: Wequassett Resort and Golf Club
HYAWI.description: Tucked along the Atlantic shoreline in the heart of Cape Cod, Wequassett Resort and Golf Club is a beloved coastal haven where family traditions are born and timeless memories unfold. Set on 22 acres of manicured waterfront, the resort offers personalized luxury coupled with an exquisite blend of spirited recreation and serene relaxation. Rally for a tennis match, unwind in a secluded cabana by the pool, or explore Pleasant Bay aboard a scenic boat tour. Children can embark on pirate-themed adventures and beach bonfires while you retreat to your elegantly appointed guestroom, designed to reflect the natural beauty of the coast. Highlights of the hotel include: - 121 beautifully designed guestrooms, including the Round Cove Suite with an outdoor deck - Ocean-inspired cuisine, fine wines, and warm hospitality at diverse dining venues - Live music and entertainment on an outdoor terrace, plus a waterfront hot tub with ocean views - Unforgettable sailing excursions onboard the Maria, the resort’s luxury daysailer - Exclusive golf opportunities at the nearby 72-par Cape Cod National Golf Club For 100 years, Wequassett Resort and Golf Club has offered something for every kind of traveler. For the adventurous spirit, explore Cape Cod on two wheels along the scenic, 36-mile Cape Cod Rail Trail or cast a line for Atlantic bluefin tuna, an angler’s ultimate pursuit. From the thrill of discovery to the ease of indulgence, every detail is thoughtfully curated to create an experience that feels both bespoke and effortlessly timeless.

BOSXV.name: XV Beacon
BOSXV.description: Voted the No. 1 Best Hotel in Boston in 2016 by readers of Condé Nast Traveler, XV Beacon is one of Boston’s most famous historic hotels. Conveniently located near the financial district, this luxury boutique beauty offers an alluring mix of history, architecture, modern comforts, and exquisite service.
