Immerse yourself in class and style amid the hotel’s turn-of-the-century beaux-arts facade, chic decor, original-cage elevators, grand marble staircase, 63 refined guestrooms, and modern amenities. - Guestrooms and suites are each custom-designed with sophisticated decor, gas fireplaces, and lavish details like Italian marble bathrooms and Frette linens - Start the day with a smoothie and pancakes, and end it with a fine Wagyu A5 sirloin at the hotel’s destination steakhouse, Mooo.… - Get insider tips of the city and VIP reservations from the 24-hour concierge team - Plan a private dinner in XV Beacon’s wine cellar with its fourth-century Roman mosaic - Take in the Beacon Hill views from the rooftop terrace and hot tub - Well-behaved dogs are welcome – they even get their own turndown water service - Explore the city with the hotel’s free in-town car service The thoughtful, charming staff at XV Beacon is at the heart of what makes the hotel so adored. The concierge team is available 24 hours a day, ready to suggest a delightful jogging route, secure you last-minute Red Sox tickets – or whatever else your heart desires.

HNLAR.name: 'Alohilani Resort Waikiki Beach
HNLAR.description: The Pacific is a constant presence at 'Alohilani Resort Waikiki Beach, a contemporary hi-rise oasis in the heart of Waikiki. Public areas and ocean-facing rooms overlook it, menus showcase its bounty, and — most dramatic of all — a two-story Oceanarium brings its marine life right into the lobby. Located in the prime Diamond Head district of Honolulu’s vibrant Waikiki neighborhood, this relaxed, stylish hideaway is moments from the beach, offering Rockwell Group-designed guestrooms, two destination restaurants by acclaimed chef Masaharu Morimoto, and an endless choice of adventures both in and out of the water. - 839 airy guestrooms and suites offer private balconies with views of the ocean or the Diamond Head - Relax on the fifth-floor pool deck with private cabanas, infinity pool, an expansive pool deck and bar, and sublime ocean views - Savor innovative Pan-Asian fusion cuisine at two signature restaurants led by Iron Chef Masaharu Morimoto - Experience the resort's signature green initiative on a tree-planting excursion to 'Alohilani's forest located at Gunstock Ranch - Lounge in the showstopping bar, where colorful native fish swim in a 280,000-gallon, two-story Oceanarium - Take a hula lesson or yoga class, work out in the fitness center, get a massage at Fit Waikiki, and enjoy rooftop batting cages and tennis courts 'Alohilani Resort Waikiki Beach sets new standards on a paradise island famed for its beaches, natural beauty, and warm welcome. Surf or sunbathe, explore Honolulu, then sip a cocktail while the sun sets over Waikiki Bay. This Hawaiian island escape puts one of Waikiki’s most popular surf spots at your doorstep with shopping, dining, and adventure just around the corner. Feel a spiritual connection to this beautiful island long after you've left, thanks to the resort's dedication to plant 100,000 native trees with the help of each guest.

BOGKU.name: 100 Luxury Suites
BOGKU.description: Just steps away from World Trade Center Bogotá and near much of the city’s colorful dining scene and vibrant nightlife, 100 Luxury Suites offers the perfect location for an extended stay in the capital, whether you are in town on business or leisure. From the intimate bar and the around-the-clock reception desk to the outdoor terrace and bright residences with floor-to-ceiling windows, 100 Luxury Suites celebrates a sophisticated style of urban living. - Feel like a local with a stay at one of the 66 spacious and stylishly decorated residences - Start each day with a buffet breakfast of Colombian cuisine and international dishes - Cook dinner in your suite's well-equipped kitchen and dine in your private dining room - Discover Bogotá’s glamorous Zona Rosa nightlife, guided by the friendly front desk staff - Book the Romantic Plan package for a candlelit suite with rose-petal turndown and rich chocolate drop-offs Once you have unpacked your suitcase and brewed a cup of fresh Colombian coffee, relax and make yourself at home in your residence. Work comfortably at your desk, eat a hearty breakfast in the lounge bar, and get around the city hassle-free thanks to transportation organized by the reception staff.

STSNO.name: 27 North
STSNO.description: After 20 years in Downtown Healdsburg as an elegant, French-inspired chateau, 27 North underwent a rebranding to modernize the hotel while still honoring its heritage. Now, the lively boutique hotel, located in an enchanting town within Northern California’s beloved wine country, welcomes guests with intimate accommodations and plenty of opportunities to sip and savor. During your stay, enjoy gourmet dining, a pop-up wine bar, vinyl and DJ nights, and wellness experiences at the hotel, then set out to explore nearby wineries, shops, or outdoor areas rife with adventure. Highlights of the hotel include: - 16 tranquil guestrooms with luxurious imported linens, walk-in rain showers, and fireplaces - A high-energy Mexican cantina serving up tacos and tequila, weekend brunch, and more - Music-focused events on the restaurant patio, including vinyl-spinning nights and DJ sets - A daytime, pop-up wine bar offering tastes of wines from the region and beyond - Complimentary shuttle service to the spa at 27 North’s sister hotel, Farmhouse Inn

BOGLS.name: 93 Luxury Suites & Residences
BOGLS.description: Every detail of 93 Luxury Suites & Residences comes together to offer an exquisitely comprehensive experience of distinction and comfort, whether you are watching a film in the exclusive movie theater or taking a stroll along the rooftop terrace with views of Bogotá. From the moment you arrive, your state-of-the-art apartment will feel like a home away from home, with sleek, contemporary furnishings inviting you to stay a while. As a natural extension of the surrounding first-class facilities, the attentive, personalized service is second to none. - Feel at home in one of the 60 comfortable, high-tech suites or residences - Order breakfast in bed to lounge a while longer in the 400-thread-count linens - Catch the latest feature at the charming and exclusive 17-seater movie theater - Work out at the fully equipped fitness center, then book a revitalizing in-room massage - Dine on gourmet local and international cuisine at the elegant on-site restaurant Every detail at 93 Luxury Suites & Residences characterizes their dedicated ethos of “The Art of Living.” In Bogotá’s Zona Rosa — also known as Zona T — The Art of Living means a high-fashion, glamorous lifestyle, filled with fine dining, designer shopping, and late-night music and dancing.

SBAAL.name: Alisal Ranch
SBAAL.description: Spanning more than 10,000 acres of California’s Santa Ynez Valley, Alisal Ranch welcomes couples and families to a Western adventure with more than 50 miles of horseback riding trails, two 18-hole golf courses, a spa, multiple bars and restaurants, and rustic-but-refined suite and cottage accommodations. While at the Ranch, guests can enjoy: Telephone and TV-free accommodations that help you disconnect and truly relax An indulgent day at The Spa at Alisal with its restorative ranch-themed treatments Dine on California and ranch-style cuisine made from fresh and local meat and produce Get active with fishing, water sports, cycling, hiking, riding, archery, and more Wander and admire the wide-open spaces and stark beauty of a true California ranch Home to a 100-acre lake and miles of rolling hills and oak savannah, Alisal Ranch is not only an excellent place for outdoor sports but also for wildlife watching – including spying American bald eagles soaring high above. Rates include breakfast, dinner, and drinks.

LISAA.name: Altis Avenida Hotel
LISAA.description: Take a trip back in time to the glamour of 1940s Portugal at Altis Avenida Hotel on the Praça des Restauradores. Located in a historic part of the city, it has remained true to its Portuguese modernist roots, originally built by the acclaimed architect Cristino da Silva and transformed into a hotel in 2011. Marvel at the elegant façade and staircase as you immerse yourself in its retro-chic design. Dine on gourmet cuisine at the sleek rooftop restaurant, then unwind in a stylish accommodation with some of the best views in the city. You will also be minutes away from the waterfront among the boutique-lined boulevards of 19th-century Lisbon. With a stunning location and gracious service, Altis Avenida Hotel is a perfect sanctuary for both business and leisure travelers. Highlights of the hotel include: - 118 guestrooms and suites with luxury amenities, hints of color, and subtle Art Deco flourishes - Gastrobar restaurant serving shareable plates, bowls, comfort foods, and a chef’s tasting menu - A rooftop sundeck with sweeping views, overlooking the city skyline and St. George’s Castle - Tranquil spa treatments are offered in the hotel’s massage room through outside partnerships - Additional amenities, including a Technogym fitness center, lobby bar, and concierge service

SINAM.name: Amara Singapore
SINAM.description: World-class luxury awaits at Amara Singapore, where refined spaces invite guests to relax and enjoy the vibes of the downtown district. Connected to a four-level shopping mall, guests truly have everything they need at their fingertips, from gourmet dining inspired by countries from all over Asia and beyond to diverse stores and wellness spaces that enhance well-being. A wide array of dining venues are available in the hotel along with a Balinese-inspired swimming pool, gym, relaxed bars, and thoughtful accommodations to keep you comfortable all through the night. Highlights of the hotel include: - 389 inviting guestrooms, suites, and apartments designed with sustainability in mind - Inspired dining with cuisine from Singapore, Thailand, Japan, France, China, and more - A boutique shopping mall connected to the hotel with shopping, dining, and lifestyle services - Leisure spaces, such as an outdoor swimming pool and fitness center with personal training - Tours revealing the history of Singapore’s Chinatown and the Tanjong Pagar district

OSLAM.name: Amerikalinjen
OSLAM.description: Chart a course to the best of Oslo with a stay at Amerikalinjen — a historically rich and architecturally stunning boutique hotel in one of the city’s most vibrant and artistic neighborhoods. Built in 1919 as offices for the Norwegian America Line that transported locals across the Atlantic to the New World, it has been transformed into a modern-day marvel with beautiful accommodations, delicious dining, a chic jazz club, upscale amenities, stellar service, and a prime location for you to launch new adventures. - 122 elegantly designed rooms offer a tranquil respite from the excitement of the city - Easily access Oslo’s hot spots and transportation hubs from the hotel’s ideal city center location - The casual club and bar, enchanting brasserie, and cozy café will satisfy any appetite - Work out at the gym or relax at the hidden, all-season green garden in the heart of the hotel - This landmark large yellow building neighbors the Opera House and the Oslo Central Station - Breakfast is included with your stay, so enjoy the fabulous spread each morning - The Gustav jazz club is perfect for a romantic night or as a location for team-building events The prime location of Amerikalinjen means that the best of Oslo is right at your door. From premiere shopping and dining to renowned attractions and landmarks, the hotel is a gateway to easily access what you want to do and see. Nearby must-sees include the Norwegian National Opera and Ballet, Oslo Spektrum, Ekebergparken, Akershus Fortress, Astrup Fearnley, The Royal Castle, and so much more.

PFOAH.name: Annabelle
PFOAH.description: Set within six acres of tropical gardens overlooking the Mediterranean Sea, Annabelle is a peaceful retreat in the heart of Paphos. Experience the best of Cypriot cuisine at the hotel’s four restaurants, relax at the rooftop spa, or swim in the free-form pool that winds through the scenic grounds. The panoramic vistas of the Mediterranean from the sea-view balconies and terraces are equally alluring. Relax in spacious rooms and suites with cool marble floors, shady traditional shutters, and sun-trap balconies Look out across Paphos Harbor and the Mediterranean from the rooftop pool, bar, and restaurant - Sample Cypriot delicacies and fresh local produce from the hotel’s dining options - Rejuvenate with a marine treatment in the Ouranos Wellbeing Spa - Swim in the hotel’s two pools and order a cocktail at the swim-up Grotto Bar A short walk from nearby Kato Paphos town and moments from the bay’s best beaches, Annabelle is a blissful spot for a vacation. Get active with a fitness class, take gentle laps around the pool, and leave the little ones to have their own fun with kids’ club activities.

ACHAH.name: Appenzeller Huus – Huus Loewen
ACHAH.description: Escape to the mountains with a visit to Appenzeller Huus – Huus Loewen, one of three hotels that make up a hospitality complex nestled in the Swiss Alps. Elegant accommodations range from guestrooms and family rooms to suites, crafted with local spruce and moonwood, cut during specific moon phases. During your stay, take in breathtaking views of the Appenzell landscape, dine on fresh fare, relax at the spa or outdoor hot tub, explore with hiking or biking, and delight in tradition and hospitality in a historic setting. Highlights of the hotel include: - 24 comfortable guestrooms and suites with original wood paneling and Alpstein views - Traditional, rustic fare crafted with regional ingredients in warm, welcoming restaurants - Vibrant lounge with floor-to-ceiling windows, floral wallpaper, and Appenzell hospitality - A tranquil spa with massages, sauna, and experience showers in the neighboring hotel - Rooftop hot tub heated by a wood-burning stove overlooking stunning alpine landscapes - Majestic gardens, hiking trails, and outdoor adventures waiting to be explored

YOWAH.name: ARC The.Hotel Ottawa
YOWAH.description: The best of Ottawa at its doorstep, ARC The.Hotel Ottawa combines style, substance, and luxury for an ideal stay. Contemporary, calming guestrooms exhibit works by local artists, and minimalist influences combine with earthy tones, invoking Canada's long history in the Yabu Pushelberg-designed décor. The hotel’s celebrated restaurant offers the best of national produce, and the sights of Ottawa are minutes away. - Check into one of the 112 sophisticated guestrooms and suites, created by acclaimed designers Yabu Pushelberg - Take a culinary tour of Canadian produce at ARC Lounge & Bar - Book a Luxury Suite for a romantic stay, with a Roman-style tub and your own spacious living area - Work out at the 24/7 fitness center, or bike along the banks of the Ottawa River - Privacy is on the menu, with in-room dining - Sip a cocktail around the fire in the elegant lounge bar It is all in the details: Every aspect of your stay at ARC The.Hotel Ottawa has been thoughtfully considered.

ZRHHM.name: art boutique Hotel Monopol
ZRHHM.description: Combine sophistication and a creative edge to your Alpine adventure at art boutique Hotel Monopol. With avant-garde and modern art, a rooftop spa with a panoramic terrace, and chic but subdued rooms, this four-star boutique hotel makes for a truly inspiring Alpine stay in the heart of St. Moritz. Spend your days on the mountain with world-class skiing, snowboarding, or hiking, then return to the hotel to warm up in the saunas, lounge with a cocktail, or delight in inventive Italian cuisine. Colorful and upbeat, art boutique Hotel Monopol is a cosmopolitan retreat that contrasts postmodern sensibilities with beautiful natural surroundings. - Select from 73 guestrooms and suites with mountain vistas and avant-garde artworks - Revitalize yourself in the Finnish sauna, steam room, and Jacuzzi at the Wellavista Rooftop Spa - Dine on gourmet Italian cuisine at MONO, paired with a wine from a 300-label cellar - Breathe in the fresh mountain air and soak up valley and village views from the panoramic terrace - Visit in summer to explore the spectacular Upper Engadine Valley, with its mountain railways - Combine Pop Art and powder in a creative space in the heart of St. Moritz No matter what the season or the nature of your vacation, art boutique Hotel Monopol is the perfect base for exploring St. Moritz. Shop at the high-end boutiques at the Via Serla or browse the art galleries to compare exhibited works with those on display throughout the hotel.

SHAAN.name: Artyzen NEW BUND 31 Shanghai
SHAAN.description: Part of Shanghai’s newest iconic destination district, Qiantan, Artyzen NEW BUND 31 Shanghai welcomes world travelers to this contemporary space that weaves traditional Shanghainese aesthetics, art, and culture, into a modern hospitality experience. Highlights of the hotel include: - 202 spacious and sophisticated guest rooms with high-ceilings and sleek style - Lobby offering integrated indoor and outdoor spaces including dining options - Direction connection to the adjacent Performing Arts Centre via the third floor - Easy access to nearby sights and attractions, as well as transit and the airport With so many entertainment options nearby, the hotel is the perfect place to stay for an evening of arts and culture or to simply explore and experience one of China’s best-loved cities.

ZHJAA.name: ASPEN alpin lifestyle Hotel
ZHJAA.description: Plan your postcard-perfect Swiss vacation at the ASPEN alpin lifestyle Hotel, a 37-room ski-in, ski-out resort nestled atop the green alpine countryside at the foot of the world-famous Eiger, one of the most iconic mountains of the Bernese Alps. Located just outside the quaint village of Grindelwald, the chalet-style hotel beckons you to hit the slopes, take a hike, dine on delicious cuisine, relax in the award-winning spa or outdoor hot tub, rest well in your chic suite, or simply enjoy the breathtaking views from your private terrace or balcony. - Awarded the TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence for consistently glowing reviews - Cozy up in one of the 37 unique guestrooms, with fireplaces, balconies or terraces - Warm up with welcome afternoon tea and cake, served every day - Enjoy world-class skiing; the famous Kleine Sheidegg slope goes past the sun terrace - Order delightful local and regional specialties in the restaurant and bar — plus enjoy a free breakfast daily - Melt your cares away with a partial body massage at the spa, or relax in the steam bath, sauna, and outdoor hot tub; there is even an ice fountain - Book a family room for five; it has an open gallery under the roof An appealing blend of modern design and alpine charm, ASPEN alpin lifestyle Hotel is a 20-minute drive from the idyllic mountain village of Grindelwald, and is a perfect base for any season. Ski and sled in the winter, hike and bike in the spring, summer, and fall, and take in the spectacular natural beauty of rolling green hills, rushing waterfalls, and sparkling mountain lakes any time. Back at the hotel, spot climbers on Eiger’s North Face from the terrace telescope, read a book in the library, or unwind by the fireplace in the lobby lounge.

DTWAS.name: Atheneum Suite Hotel
DTWAS.description: Located in the heart of Greektown, next to Detroit’s thriving business district, and close to the city’s best sports and concert venues, Atheneum Suite Hotel is Detroit’s premiere all-suite hotel. The newly renovated interior gives grand Greek design a modern twist. Take in city skyline views and relax in the oversized marble bath in your well-appointed suite before taking a shuttle to a big game or concert. If you have a business or social event to plan, the hotel is renowned for its facilities, including a grand ballroom and full catering service. - Located in downtown Detroit’s Greektown neighborhood, packed with culture and character - Ranked among the top 10 Detroit hotels by US News & World Report in 2018 - Admire the murals of Greek mythological characters in the stunning marble lobby - Check in to one of the 174 suites with city views and over-sized marble bathrooms - Step outside for award-winning restaurants, sports arenas, and theaters - Keep fit and work out in the well-equipped fitness and wellness center - Host impressive events at the premium banquet and business facilities, including a stunning ballroom Your spacious suite in the impressive Grecian-inspired hotel makes a wonderful base for exploring the city. Watch the Detroit Tigers play at Comerica Park a short walk away, savor cosmopolitan cuisine, and discover the cultural mix that makes Detroit a UNESCO-acclaimed City of Design. Detroit’s theaters, sports arenas, and world-class museums are close by, and shuttle service is available within a five-mile radius of the hotel. The hotel is a premiere Detroit venue for meetings, events, weddings, and other celebrations.

BOMSC.name: Aurika Mumbai Skycity
BOMSC.address_raw: CTS No. 145 A, NS C-04, Skycity, Mumbai
BOMSC.description: With more rooms than any other hotel in India, Aurika, Mumbai International Airport is a shining example of world-class hospitality. The grand hotel showcases the charm and character of the 1940s and ’50s with vintage, mid-century modern interiors in sleek accommodations that showcase the city’s seaside setting with pops of color. During your stay, dine on regional and global cuisines, relax with soothing spa treatments, pamper yourself with salon services, squeeze a workout in, play a board game, or view one of the hotel’s art exhibitions. Highlights of the hotel include: - 669 elegant guestrooms and suites with modern furnishings and picturesque views - Global gastronomy showcasing flavors from around the world at an all-day restaurant - A tea lounge featuring drinks infused with local ingredients and an array of treats - A serene spa and salon offering indulgent treatments and specialty services - Amenities including an inviting swimming pool, fitness center, art exhibits, and recreation room

STOBH.name: Backstage Hotel Stockholm
STOBH.description: Housed in a building built in 1880 that has been lovingly restored and transformed into a modern masterpiece, Backstage Hotel Stockholm offers a unique stay in Sweden’s capital. Historic elements like exposed wooden rafters blend with contemporary art, distinct design, and an exclusive ambiance that makes guests feel as if they’re backstage at a concert or theatrical performance. Stay in a lofted guestroom, an ABBA-themed suite, or several other chic accommodations. During your visit, head to the Backstage Zone to enjoy international dining and a vibrant bar or venture nearby to take in a live show. Highlights of the hotel include: - 57 contemporary guestrooms and suites, including the themed ABBA Gold Junior Suite - A brasserie serving a globally inspired menu as well as weekend brunch - Lively bar offering DJ sets, music trivia nights, craft beer launches, and more - A private karaoke room with space for up to 15 people, plus food and drink service - Ideal place for music lovers, centrally placed near Stockholm’s biggest entertainment venues

SJDBB.name: Bahia Hotel & Beach House
SJDBB.address_raw: Av. El Pescador S/N, Cabo San Lucas
SJDBB.description: A stay at Bahia Hotel & Beach House feels like discovering Cabo San Lucas from the inside out. Steps from the swimmable shores of Medano Beach, this design-forward boutique hotel captures the relaxed energy and warmth of Baja California through chic décor, soulful hospitality, locally inspired cuisine, and effortless access to the sea. Each moment feels immersed in a sense of place, whether gathering over live music and Mediterranean-Baja fare, lounging by the pool with a craft cocktail, or spending the day at the hotel’s oceanfront beach club overlooking the Sea of Cortez. Highlights of the resort include: - 89 stylish guestrooms and suites, including poolside options with hot tubs, plus a luxe villa - Celebrated, open-air dining venues serving international cuisine from award-winning chefs - Activity center offering paddleboards, kayaks, and guided excursions - Swimming pool with a pool bar offering daytime dining and refreshing cocktails - Wellness offerings range from a sauna and cold plunge to a fitness center - Walking distance from the marina, downtown, and Cabo San Lucas’ most swimmable beach

BOSBW.name: Battery Wharf Hotel Boston Waterfront
BOSBW.description: Dramatic harbor views and an authentic New England atmosphere welcome guests to Battery Wharf Hotel, Boston Waterfront. Located in Boston’s historic North End, multiple buildings make up this hotel’s beautiful campus offering more than 150 guest rooms, a restaurant with classic local cuisine, and a prime location just minutes from both the airport and the city center. Highlights of Battery Wharf Hotel include: - Stylishly furnished rooms with spa-like baths and other thoughtful touches - An onsite restaurant serving hand-crafted cocktails and creative dishes - An expansive fitness center, full-service spa, and indulgent Hammam - A private dock, perfect for hailing a water taxi directly to the airport - Stunning views from observation decks, plus history from the onsite Maritime Museum A perfect homebase for exploring one of America’s oldest cities, Battery Wharf Hotel, Boston Waterfront takes the area’s historic heritage seriously, with its multiple buildings named after famous Bostonians and great ships. In fact, prior to becoming a hotel, the area was home to a quintessentially New England business: the Bay State Lobster Company.

ORHBH.name: Beechwood Hotel
ORHBH.description: As the only AAA Four Diamond boutique hotel in central Massachusetts, Beechwood Hotel offers a welcoming, stylish stay. The hotel interior is adorned with stunning stained-glass windows and hand-picked artwork from the owner’s personal collection. The 52 guestrooms and 21 suites mix comfort with style; some have fireplaces. Dine or have a drink at the casually elegant Sonoma Restaurant, sit on the lovely patio, work out in the fitness center, or take a short walk to Lake Quinsigamond and Regatta Point Park. - The hotel is conveniently located near the Massachusetts Biotechnology Research Park and the University of Massachusetts and is frequented by scholars, academics, and tourists alike - The Beechwood Brunch was voted The Landmark ’s 2016 Readers’ Choice Best Sunday Brunch - The fitness center consists of a treadmill, a stationary bike, an elliptical machine, and free weights to keep in top shape while you travel - Services include a business center and valet laundry service - Complimentary Wi-Fi is included with every stay - With 13 function rooms and the beautiful, intimate Maria Gill Wilson Chapel, the hotel is perfect for meetings, events, private parties, and weddings — there is even a wedding planner on site Beechwood Hotel is committed to sustainability and participates in the NOW Force for Good Alliance to provide a sustainable travel experience and take responsibility for its impact on communities and the environment. To learn more about the hotel's efforts and book directly, click here .

VBSBL.name: Bellerive Lifestyle Hotel
VBSBL.description: On the sparkling shores of Lake Garda, travelers will find Bellerive Lifestyle Hotel, a relaxing boutique hotel. A chef from the region helms the restaurant, offering elevated tastes of Italy that take diners on a gastronomic journey with pasta and seafood specialties. Unwind with lake views in comfortable accommodations, tranquil spa treatments, a hidden oasis with a swimming pool, and excursions around the lake. Located in the heart of Salò near the marina and waterfront promenade, it’s easy to set out by foot to explore. Highlights of the hotel include: - 39 stylish guestrooms and suites with an elevated attention to detail - Gourmet bistro that takes diners on a culinary journey through the flavors of the region - A massage room, where guests can enjoy relaxing spa treatments - Seasonal swimming pool, on-site fitness center, and yoga classes - Excursions for golf, boating, canoeing, wine and olive oil tasting, and cycling

QRLCM.name: BOHO CLUB MARBELLA
QRLCM.address_raw: Urb. Lomas de Río Verde, 144, Marbella
QRLCM.description: Set on the Golden Mile in the southern Spanish city of Marbella and just minutes from the area’s beautiful beaches, BOHO CLUB MARBELLA dazzles guests to Spain’s Andalusia region with stunning panoramic views of La Concha Mountain, a location just steps from the Mediterranean Sea, and an array of other elevated amenities and highlights including: - Contemporary accommodations ranging from standard rooms to suites with kitchenettes - Signature, decadent dining helmed by Michelin-star-awarded Chef Diego del Río - Two refreshing swimming pools, an outdoor fitness area, and a lush garden - A Guest Assistant to suggest interesting itineraries and magical excursions With its deep commitment to both local culture and international art, Boho Club is dedicated to preserving the legacy of legendary hospitality in one of Spain’s best-loved vacation destinations.

SAYBS.name: Borgo Scopeto Wine & Country Relais
SAYBS.description: Situated in a 14th-Century hamlet in the Chianti Hills of Tuscany, Borgo Scopeto Wine & Country Relais invites travelers to an unforgettable Italian vineyard experience. While taking in the views of nearby Siena, guests can reconnect with nature while they sample locally made wine, refresh at Borgo Scopeto Relax Spa, and take in the local culture. Additional highlights of the hotel include: - 52 guest rooms with sweeping views of neighboring Siena and the local vineyards - An on-site spa with Turkish bath, whirlpool tub, and the hotel’s custom beauty products - Two pools including an adults-only pool, two tennis courts, and an outdoor fitness area - A variety of cultural experiences including wine and olive oil tastings, cooking classes, and more This Tuscan oasis offers the perfect opportunity to explore historic, central Italy and indulge in Italian culinary and wine culture.

LIRCL.name: Cala Luna Boutique Hotel & Villas
LIRCL.description: The line between indoors and out is blurred seamlessly at Cala Luna Boutique Hotel & Villas, an intimate resort immersed in the lush jungles of Costa Rica. Relax in a variety of spacious guestrooms, some with private plunge pools or jetted bathtubs, before venturing out to explore. The hotel is home to farm-to-table dining experiences, accentuated with produce from its own farm on a nearby nature reserve, as well as a serene spa and plenty of adventures that make for a memorable vacation. Highlights of the hotel include: - 39 bungalow-style guestrooms and suites, plus villas with full kitchens and private pools - International cuisine with Costa Rican flavors, featuring ingredients from the hotel’s farm - A tranquil spa with holistic treatments performed in a lush, tropical garden - Activities ranging from yoga classes and cycling to sailing, hiking, and water sports - Wildlife encounters around the hotel, from howler monkeys to iguanas and exotic birds

MIAMW.name: Carillon Miami Wellness Resort
MIAMW.description: Build on a foundation of historical elegance, with past hotel guests ranging from Frank Sinatra to Martin Luther King Jr., this wellness sanctuary has been redeveloped and expanded to create a setting that blends vintage glamour, modern comforts, and thoughtful touches that honor the resort’s past. Stay in Carillon Miami Wellness Resort’s luxurious apartments, many with space for up to four guests, then get ready to unwind under the Florida sun. Wellness abounds at the spa, one of the largest facilities of its kind on the East Coast, while gourmet restaurants offer flavors of the sea and beyond. Relax by the pool or on the private beach, or pump up the adrenaline with a lineup of thrilling adventures. Highlights of the resort include: - 82 modern apartments with floor-to-ceiling windows showcasing views of the Atlantic Ocean - Indoor and outdoor dining venues serving everything from global cuisine to coastal favorites - An elegant spa offering a blend of Western and Eastern techniques, plus a hydrotherapy circuit - Experiences including fitness classes, rock climbing, deep-sea fishing, and mangrove kayaking - A seasonal farmers market where guests can gather to peruse fresh produce and artisanal goods

MADLC.name: Catalonia Las Cortes
MADLC.description: Once the 18th-century palace of the Duke of Noblejas, Catalonia Las Cortes has been completely restored, preserving distinctive touches while adding modern comforts. Strategically located in the Art Triangle in the heart of traditional Madrid, five minutes from the Prado Museum, a little more to Plaza Mayor, and close to the Thyssen Bornemisza Collection and the Reina Sofía Art Center, the best of Madrid is at your doorstep. - Choose from 64 guestrooms, including the spectacular terrace room and elegant suites that feel like a true palace with Neoclassical style columns and 18th-century frescoes - Enjoy the Barrio de las Letras neighborhood nightlife, beginning with tapas accompanied by a beer at the hotel’s gastro bar - Discover the bohemian spirit that characterizes the intimate restaurants, modest art galleries, and cocktail bars in the district surrounding the hotel The building retains its noble character, including the original palace entrance, frescoes in the suites, and the spectacular main staircase, as well as the moldings and mirrors that decorate it. The wood floors have also been preserved and you can admire the stained glass windows of the old chapel on the second floor.

BCNCP.name: Catalonia Passeig de Gracia
BCNCP.address_raw: Gran Via de les Corts Catalanes, 644, Barcelona
BCNCP.description: In the heart of Barcelona, on Gran Vía de les Corts Catalanes in a beautiful modernist-style building dating from 1928 that was formerly the headquarters of Codorniu, one of the country’s most prestigious cava makers, Catalonia Passeig de Gràcia boasts tasty Mediterranean cuisine in an elegant restaurant, cocktails and casual bites at the gastrobar, a pool on the tranquil garden patio, and if you arrive by car, enjoy a private car park with EV charging stations. Hotel highlights include: - Choose among 74 guestrooms, including the spectacular duplex suite, with two floors and a private terrace, the exclusive terrace suite, with its own terrace and pool, and the spacious A - Try a varied menu of Mediterranean cuisine, authentic tapas selections, or more elaborate traditional Catalan dishes, such as cannelloni — at Les Delícies restaurant - Escape the bustle of the city with a refreshing dip in the swimming pool located in the quiet interior terrace, in the solarium, or fitness center Explore every corner of Barcelona from your central location next to Plaza Catalunya, Passeig de Gràcia, and Rambla Catalunya, near iconic monuments such as La Pedrera, Casa Batlló, and Casa Amatller, and the Ramblas and Barri Gòtic, where the Barcelona Cathedral is located.

FCOCO.name: Corso 281
FCOCO.description: Live the sweet life in the center of Rome in the Deluxe Rooms and Residences of Corso 281. Housed in a former 18th-century baroque palace, this ultra-boutique hotel of just 12 accommodations offers an exceptional, home-like stay just steps away from Rome’s best historic and cultural sites. As a guest of Corso 281, you can: Experience a relaxing hotel stay in a Deluxe Room with spacious marble bath Select from a series of Residences with kitchenettes and additional space for longer stays Dine on a delicious cooked-to-order breakfast each morning in your room Relax in the hotel lounge, Caveau, with a drink from the expertly curated honor bar Receive personal advice and reservation assistance on local activities and attractions From the moment you step on the first tread of the elegantly spiraling marble staircase lit with a constellation of modern globe pendant lights, you know you’re in for the ultimate experience of taste and discretion. Close to all the best that Rome has to offer but secluded enough to feel welcoming for a multi-week stay, Corso 281’s prime location provides the perfect launch pad for your next Italian adventure.

DABDB.name: Daytona Grande Oceanfront Resort
DABDB.description: Set on the white-sand shores of Daytona Beach on Florida’s north-central coast, Daytona Grande Oceanfront Resort offers sun-seekers and water-lovers an idyllic escape among of the state’s best-loved beaches. At 27 stories, the hotel’s accommodations offer guests iconic views, while a plethora of amenities help relax and entertain. Highlights of the resort include: - Contemporary, beach-style standard rooms and suites with magnificent ocean views - Incredible dining and cocktail experiences at the hotel’s restaurant and bar - A luxurious infinity pool with cabanas, loungers, and a refreshing bar - A fully equipped fitness center with free weights and cardio machines - A location directly on the hard-packed sands of beautiful Daytona Beach

LIMLD.name: Delfines Hotel & Convention Center
LIMLD.description: With sweeping views of the Lima Golf Course and beautifully appointed guestrooms, the multiple award-winning Delfines Hotel & Convention Center is one of Peru’s finest five-star hotels. Sample Peruvian cuisine under a breathtaking crystal domed ceiling, and unwind with a treatment at the Murukas Urban Spa. Take in the views of the Lima Golf Course, one of the city’s largest and most beautiful green spaces, and give business meetings a touch of luxury in the executive lounge. The hotel even has its own heliport if you are arriving by helicopter. - Winner of the 2018 TripAdvisor Travelers’ Choice award - Select from one of 206 guestrooms and suites, all with floor-to-ceiling views, and windows that open - Take a swing at the gorgeous Lima Golf Course, right next to the hotel - Soak up the sunshine beside the vast outdoor pool - Hold business meetings in 14 sophisticated boardrooms - Book a room between the 12th and 14th floors, and enjoy your own Jacuzzi and sauna This contemporary hotel offers unparalleled views of downtown Lima. Wake up and gaze out through huge windows at the buzzing city. Whether you are here for business, a family vacation, the perfect romantic retreat, a wedding, or corporate event, Delfines Hotel & Convention Center is the ultimate in luxury, from the highly acclaimed restaurants to the private amenities, pool, spa, and the exclusive business lounge.

MNLDB.name: Discovery Boracay
MNLDB.description: Right on the powder-soft White Beach of Boracay, Discovery Boracay is a paradise island getaway that delivers spectacular experiences. Sunbathe on the palm-fringed beach and take a dip in the pool, as butlers pass out chilled towels and inflatable toys for the kids. Pamper yourself with a traditional Hilot massage while your children enjoy a scavenger hunt at Sandbox Kids’ Club. After dark, dine alfresco on fresh seafood under a canopy on the beach. Other highlights of this award-winning resort include: - 99 spacious suites, including the luxurious two-floor premier suite - Two beachfront bars, a swim-up pool bar, two restaurants, and more - A spacious fitness center with free weights and cardio equipment - An indulgent spa offering ocean-inspired therapies and treatments - Water activities such as swimming and snorkeling and more Slip off your shoes as soon as you arrive and bask in the resort’s barefoot-chic atmosphere. With palm-shaded beach bars, restaurant tables spilling out onto the sand, and stylish suites within earshot of the waves, this is definitely a snapshot-worthy resort.

PTYDP.name: Dovle Branded Residences
PTYDP.description: Get a feel for city life at this high-rise hotel situated in near the coastline in Panama City. In addition to sprawling views, travelers will enjoy stays in residence-style suites that ensure all the comforts of home are right at your disposal. From contemporary kitchens and living spaces to tech-focused innovation, you won’t want for anything while unwinding in Dovle Branded Residences’ sleek apartments. While in town, take advantage of all the hotel has to offer, from a fusion restaurant and unparalleled culinary events to a rooftop swimming pool and wellness experiences ranging from yoga and meditation to personalized fitness. Then, set out to explore the city. Highlights of the hotel include: - 48 one- and two-bedroom apartments with living areas, kitchens, and dining areas - A restaurant that transforms from a morning cafe to a fine dining establishment and bar - Swimming pool on an open-air terrace that offers panoramic views of the city - A demo kitchen for cooking exhibitions, private dinners, and social events with local chefs - State-of-the-art fitness center, plus yoga, meditation, and other wellness-inspired sessions

HAMEH.name: east Hamburg
HAMEH.description: Since its 2004 opening in Hamburg’s St. Pauli district, east Hamburg has attracted designers, gourmands, and everyday travelers from around the world to marvel at its unique design and architecture, savor its exceptional cuisine, and enjoy its prime location in the central city. Highlights of the hotel include: - 172 tranquil, guest accommodations in contemporary-chic style - Elegant dining options serving gourmet dishes ranging from steak to sushi - A traditional Finnish sauna, relaxation rooms, and full fitness center - Easy access to Hamburg’s historic landmarks and best activities and attractions Known for as a haven for celebration and a home to vibrant nightlife, east Hamburg’s St. Pauli neighborhood makes this modern luxury hotel housed in a former iron foundry the place to stay and play in the ‘Jewel of Northern Germany.’

MIAEA.name: EAST Miami
MIAEA.description: EAST Miami encapsulates everything that makes Miami great — the cosmopolitan outlook, the dazzling skyline, the sheer energy. The hotel’s cutting-edge design blends sharp lines with bursts of color and greenery, making it a minimalist and playful escape, and features a rooftop pool terrace that is expansive and stylish enough to spend the whole day. With 352 chic guestrooms, suites, and residences, as well as high-tech guest services and gourmet, gaucho-style dining, this is surely one of Miami's most luxurious and innovative stays. - Take advantage of the hotel’s prime location atop Brickell City Centre by exploring local boutiques and eateries - Soak up fabulous city views from the rooftop swimming pool, hot tub, and deck - Experience the future of hospitality with custom guest services and award-winning technology - Indulge in authentic Latin American wood-fired parrilla cuisine at Quinto restaurant - Mix with local trendsetters at Sugar, one of Condé Nast Traveler ’s favorite rooftop bars Distinctive modern design blends with Asian-inspired elegance at EAST Miami, making a bold statement in a city celebrated for its style. Cutting-edge technology and an award-winning rooftop cabana bar make your stay even more special, with the hotel’s downtown location delivering city buzz within striking distance of the beach.

TLCES.name: El Santuario Resort & Spa
TLCES.address_raw: Carretera Federal a Colorines Km 4.5, Valle del Bravo
TLCES.description: Let the calming energy of El Santuario Resort & Spa embrace you. The one-of-a-kind circular hotel is seamlessly built into a quartz mountain believed to emit harmonious energy and healing vibrations, creating a truly restful visit. Relaxation is built into every aspect of the property, from the meditative labyrinth, ancient temazcal ceremonies, and rejuvenating spa treatments to meals that take guests on a sensory journey with healthy, energized cuisine. During your stay, lounge by the pool, play tennis or padel, ride horses, enjoy holistic wellness experiences, or set out on the waters of Valle de Bravo Lake. Highlights of the hotel include: - 135 serene suites and villas, many with views of the lake and mountains surrounding the hotel - Unique dining experiences centered on fresh fare, energy resonance, and sensory moments - Therapeutic spa with personalized treatments, steam room, and space for mindfulness activities - Meditative spaces, including a temazcal, water mirrors, a labyrinth, and many others - Tennis and padel courts, lake-view pools, equestrian center, and a yacht club with a private dock

ZNZEP.name: ENVI Paje
ZNZEP.description: Sapphire lagoons, pristine white sand, and mystical mangroves come together on the island of Zanzibar, the largest atoll of a Tanzanian archipelago off the eastern coast of Africa. It’s here that you’ll find ENVI Paje, nestled near a small coastal village known for its stunning beaches. Focused on wellness and renewal, the luxury eco-lodge is specially curated around vitality, stillness, and connection. Surrounded by nature that amplifies the healing effects of this island paradise, guests can also get their adventure fix with an array of water sports, embrace sea-inspired dining, or indulge in curated spa experiences before retreating to private villas. Highlights of the hotel include: - 25 villas immersed in nature with stunning views of the ocean or gardens - Dining that highlights the rhythm of island living, with fresh, seasonal flavors of the ocean - A spa sanctuary with curated moments inspired by ancient wisdom and modern science - Water sports bungalow offering equipment for snorkeling, paddleboarding, and kitesurfing - Signature experiences ranging from cooking and mixology classes to cultural immersion

MIAEM.name: Esmé Miami Beach
MIAEM.description: Indulge in the glitz and glamor of old Miami Beach while surrounded by today's top amenities when you check in to Esmé Miami Beach. Formerly a colony for artists and outcasts - and a Prohibition Era hideaway for Al Capone - this transformed 1925 block of buildings turned hotel introduces travelers to old Florida through contemporary hospitality and comfort. Guests of Esmé Miami Beach can: Relax in one of 145 rooms and suites with beds swathed in Italian-made fine linens Dine at El Salon for a sampling of Miami’s most iconic and influential dishes Soak up the sun at the rooftop pool and enjoy an ice-cold sangria on the lounge deck Sip on Spanish beer and snack on hot skewers from Bar Pintxo Explore shops, bars, and restaurants in the surrounding area known as the Spanish Village Just steps from the blue waters and sugar sand of South Beach, and mere minutes from many of the city’s best attractions, Esmé Miami Beach offers a quintessential Miami stay colored by a backdrop of history and tropical intrigue.

MAAFR.name: Feathers-A Radha Hotel
MAAFR.description: A Radha Hotel. Floor-to-ceiling windows in every guestroom provide spectacular views of the city, where ancient temples sit alongside movie studios and technology hubs. Whether you are traveling on business or for a vacation, this luxury hotel has the ideal location with all the upscale amenities to ensure a relaxing stay, from the large outdoor pool to the Skyloft rooftop lounge. - Relax with modern décor and stunning views of Chennai in each of the 186 guestrooms - Discover traditional Indian cuisine with a modern twist at Umami or watch the chefs in action at the 24-hour Waterside restaurant - Find inner peace at the holistic Sohum spa, with couple's treatments available - Mark an occasion in the grand ballroom, or hold a corporate event in the boardroom - The hotel's striking swimming pool is 53 ft long, with the Barefoot cocktail bar on poolside Chennai’s business district is on your doorstep at Feathers – A Radha Hotel, along with the city's major transportation hubs. Work at the oversized desks in every room, de-stress at the outdoor pool, and unwind in the evening with a drink and a dance at Vapor, the hotel’s chic bar.

SDFFR.name: French Lick Springs Hotel
SDFFR.description: Established in 1845 and recognized by the National Register of Historic Places, French Lick Springs Hotel is steeped in history. You can spot clues from the past everywhere – look for the old switchboard in one of six sophisticated restaurants and take your breakfast in the ballroom where Franklin D. Roosevelt began his run for the presidency. This majestic hotel exudes luxury, and you will be thoroughly spoiled with modern amenities, including swimming pools and hot tubs, a world-class spa, award-winning golf courses designed by Pete Dye and Donald Ross, and a grand casino. Learn about the past on a history tour, then head out to make new memories with live music on the veranda or family fun at the bowling alley or arcade. Highlights of the hotel include: - 513 luxurious guestrooms inspired by the Beaux Arts architectural style of the hotel - An award-winning steakhouse named after the year the Kentucky Derby started - The Spa at French Lick, a sophisticated, century-old spa offering 20 different treatments - Award-winning golf courses, including one designed by Hall of Fame architect Pete Dye - Activities range from casino games to hiking, pickleball, and horse-drawn carriage rides

BJXGP.name: Galeria Plaza Irapuato
BJXGP.description: Retreat to this modern hotel in Irapuato, Mexico, a town located at the foot of Arandas Hill in the south-central region of Guanajuato. Stunning interiors and contemporary architectural details fill the entire property and its 138 guestrooms. With an ideal location, you’ll find yourself within close proximity to the city's vibrant offerings. - Retreat to guestrooms equipped with sleek decor, spacious layouts, and upscale amenities - Head up to the beautiful rooftop garden and terrace to find the expansive swimming pool, poolside bar, and phenomenal views - Work up a sweat at the 24-hour fitness center featuring state-of-the-art equipment - Meet with colleagues and get to work in the business center with five meeting rooms and offices - Grab your clubs and practice your short game on the property’s complimentary putting green - Enjoy delicious menus and craft cocktails at the hotel’s two restaurants and three bars - Host any type of meeting or event in the expansive ballroom, with a capacity for 680 guests Between the rooftop terrace pool and bar and the fully equipped meeting center and ballroom, this urban getaway is perfect for both business and leisure travelers.

BJXPL.name: Galeria Plaza Leon
BJXPL.description: Comfort, tranquility, and balance guides the design, styling, and accommodations of Galeria Plaza Leon, an ultra-modern hotel set on the north side of Leon. Located in one of Mexico’s largest cities and a major commercial and social hub, Galeria Plaza Leon offers a wide range of amenities and facilities to ensure every traveler – from the business-focused to the leisure-oriented – is as comfortable and content as possible. Highlights of the hotel include: - 176 rooms and suites featuring chic decor and refined baths - Dining options such as a restaurant, rooftop bar, and room service - A refreshing pool with two counter-current exercise lanes, plus a gym - A prime location in one of Leon’s premier lifestyle centers

MTYGP.name: Galeria Plaza Monterrey
MTYGP.description: Calling the city of Monterrey’s financial district in downtown home, Galeria Plaza Monterrey welcomes travelers to this quintessentially Mexican city with nearly 200 accommodations offering panoramic views. An array of upscale amenities including a gym, pool, rooftop lounge, and event space makes this urban hotel an oasis for locals and visitors of every kind. Highlights of the hotel include: - Contemporary rooms and suites with sweeping views of downtown Monterrey - An on-site pool perfect for cooling down after a long day of meetings or exploration - Easy access to nearby historical and cultural monuments and sights - A prime location within the city’s financial district, just minutes from the nearby airport

MEXGP.name: Galeria Plaza Reforma
MEXGP.description: In La Zona Rosa, where Mexico City’s financial district meets buzzing nightlife, Hotel Galeria Plaza Reforma’s 436 guestrooms are great for business travel or as a city break base. Sink into a sofa by the fireplace in the marble lobby and indulge in some people-watching, or order up a cocktail at the rooftop terrace bar and watch the sunset over the city skyline. - Explore the hip Reforma district and Mexico City’s historic center - Stay active in the hotel’s fully-equipped fitness studio - Connect with colleagues or plan meetings in the plush Brisas Business Lounge - Hunt out your favorite mezcal in the many nearby bars - Take it all in at the rooftop pool with panoramic views of the city A gateway to DF (Distrito Federal), Hotel Galeria Plaza Reforma is easy to get to from Mexico City’s must-see sites. With valet parking and an English-speaking concierge, the hotel puts the city at your fingertips.

MEXSJ.name: Galeria Plaza San Jeronimo
MEXSJ.description: Make your next trip to Mexico City as streamlined and comfortable as possible with a stay at Galeria Plaza San Jeronimo. Set in the sunny southern reaches of the city, this hotel provides business and leisure travelers alike a modern and easily accessible location from which to set out and tackle those board meetings or take in the spectacular local sites. Guests of Galeria Plaza San Jeronimo can: Swim a few laps in the hotel pool and take a soak in one of three hot tubs in the rooftop garden Select from a variety of room types and suites, including a special executive floor Dine on traditional Mexican cuisine at the hotel’s flagship Restaurant Plaza Host a corporate event, seminar, or even a wedding within the hotel’s beautiful event spaces Work out at the fitness center, shop at nearby stores, and enjoy after-dinner drinks at the bar With a business center available along with an executive floor with additional amenities, Galeria Plaza San Jeronimo makes business and group travel easy, while spacious rooms mean families will also feel right at home at this hotel.

PTYGR.name: Gamboa Rainforest Reserve
PTYGR.address_raw: Corregimiento de Cristobal Colon, IA 5, Gamboa
PTYGR.description: Once explored by pirates and adventurers, the area surrounding Gamboa Rainforest Reserve has long held a mysticism that delights intrepid travelers. Situated in the pristine jungle of Panama, within Soberanía National Park, guests can soak up the sights and sounds of nature in luxe accommodations that all include a balcony or terrace. Take it slow at the hotel, lounging by the sprawling pool or indulging in delectable Caribbean cuisine, then set off for active adventures in the heart of the rainforest. Highlights of the hotel include: - 116 guestrooms and suites designed in an eco-lodge style - A variety of dining venues inspired by the pristine nature surrounding the reserve - Sparkling swimming pool with sections for both swimming and splash play - Gift shop for travel essentials and souvenirs plus a library with books, maps, and games - Exhilarating eco-tours and adventures like an aerial tram

BKIGR.name: Gayana Marine Resort
BKIGR.address_raw: Malohom Bay, Gaya Island, Kota Kinabalu
BKIGR.description: Abundant sea life swirls around the luxurious over-water villas at the Gayana Marine Resort, where the highest quality of service and amenities meets environmental protection on an island off the coast of Borneo. Dine overlooking the South China Sea on the day’s sustainable catch, learn to dive on the nearby reef, or trek into the lush jungle before returning for a rejuvenating treatment using indigenous plants, locally sourced ingredients, and oils. Find a tranquil escape among turtles and mangroves at a resort that welcomes you wholeheartedly to its little slice of paradise. - Enjoy a cool jungle breeze in one of 45 luxury stilted villas - Learn to dive with P.A.D.I. certified instructors in an idyllic location - Dine on the freshest seafood at one of the finest Chinese restaurants in Malaysia - Swim, snorkel, paddleboard, or kayak in the gentle South China Sea - Indulge in a mineral-rich Malay mud wrap or gentle botanical scrub at the Echo Wellness Spa - Get up close to seahorses and bamboo sharks at the Marine Ecology Research Center A trip to the Gayana Marine Resort is more than a luxurious break in a tropical paradise. This resort effortlessly provides modern luxury and sustainable living while preserving the ecosystem for generations to come. At the Marine Ecology Research Center, contribute to protecting the island by replanting in the coral reef.

BLRGG.name: Gokulam Grand Hotel & Spa
BLRGG.description: Set in the bustling metropolis of Bengaluru, India, in a beautiful area known as 'The Garden City,' this high-end hideaway offers a stay like no other. Gokulam Grand Hotel & Spa’s 182 guestrooms and suites are adorned with stylish design and luxurious comforts and its upscale amenities include a renowned spa, outdoor pool, and a collection of on-site eateries. Whether traveling for business or leisure, this urban oasis offers it all. - Feel relaxed and inspired in spacious guestrooms designed with contemporary décor and upscale amenities - Dip into the outdoor pool and work out at the Aasman Fitness Center - Relax with a sauna or massage service at the hotel’s Sohum Spa - Admire the unique virtual art gallery displayed on the atrium walls where paintings are projected electronically - Host your meetings and events in a myriad of ballrooms and banquet halls ready to accommodate any occasion Between the hotel’s breathtaking city views and upscale accommodations, Gokulam Grand Hotel & Spa Bangalore provides the ideal stay in southern India. Make it your base to explore nearby city attractions such as the Indian Institute of Science, Bengaluru Palace, Lalbagh Botanical Garden, Cubbon Park, and Iskcon Temple.

ACKGH.name: Grand Hotel Santa Lucia
ACKGH.description: With breathtaking views across the Bay of Naples, Grand Hotel Santa Lucia is a four-star boutique hotel where you can relax and enjoy the ultimate in sophisticated luxury. Walk through the front doors and marvel at the stunning reception, where marble flooring and crystal chandeliers reflect the light off the glistening Mediterranean Sea. Many of the guestrooms face out towards the Bay of Naples, where you can get lost in the stunning views of the islands of Capri and Ischia, Mount Vesuvius, and Castel dell’Ovo, while the on-site Megaris Restaurant serves world-class modern Italian cuisine, a true taste of sophisticated Italian dining. - Relax in one of 85 stylish guestrooms, many offering views over the Bay of Naples - Savor fresh Italian pastries at breakfast, and modern Italian cuisine at Megaris Restaurant - Enjoy an aperitif or a nightcap in an elegant and comfortable setting at Il Pavone Bar - Start your day with a gentle workout at the fitness center before an indulgent breakfast - Visit nearby sights including Castel dell’Ovo, Museo di Etnopreistoria, and Borgo Marinari Set on possibly the world’s most beautiful seafront at the Bay of Naples, the Grand Hotel Santa Lucia is grand in every sense, from the glorious lobby to the balcony views of the Castel dell’Ovo, the Bay of Naples, and Vesuvius in the distance. It has every last luxurious detail taken care of, including Murano chandeliers, frescoed ceilings, hot tubs in the suites, and breakfast on the balcony.

GVFDS.name: Grand Hôtel Soleil d’Or
GVFDS.description: Genuine hospitality and a passion for authentic detail merge in the French Alps, where Grand Hôtel Soleil d’Or invites travelers to experience the mountains differently. Offering a setting that is equal parts elegant, inviting, and inspiring, nestled in the village of Megève, the hotel has the soul of a family home with refined accommodations, culinary venues that celebrate the beauty and bounty of the mountains, and a tranquil spa with all-encompassing wellness experiences. In the winter, take to the slopes for skiing or snowboarding or embrace the winter wonderland all around. When the weather heats up, guests can pivot to hiking, golfing, mountain biking, and enjoying vibrant cultural festivals held nearby. Highlights of the hotel include: - 29 guestrooms, suites, and chalets that blend elevated comfort with authentic Alpine charm - A fromagerie offering fondue, raclette, premium meats, and more, plus a rooftop tapas bar - Soothing spa retreat with signature treatments, sauna, hammam, indoor pool, and more - Cozy lounge serving exquisite artisanal chocolates and other desserts, plus brunch in the winter - Ideal location for skiing, snowboarding, and snowshoeing or horse-drawn carriage rides

TYOGP.name: Grand Nikko Tokyo Daiba
TYOGP.description: Located on Tokyo’s Odaiba island with sensational views over Rainbow Bay and Tokyo Bridge, Grand Nikko Tokyo Daiba is a 30-story tower of comfort, entertainment, and well-being. Wake up in your light-filled guestroom before enjoying a swim in the pool. Relax with a traditional Japanese spa treatment or acupuncture session. Enjoy works of art at the on-site Gallery 21. In the evening, dine at The Grill on 30th while taking in the panoramic vistas, round off with sake at The Bar & Lounge. - The hotel’s 882 elegant guestrooms and suites are modern, chic, and tranquil - Work out at Le CLUB fitness center and get a refreshing facial at the spa - Choose from multiple dining venues and bars, including the finest cuts of Japanese beef at The Grill on 30th, while taking in panoramic views of Tokyo - Shop at ABISTE Boutique and treat yourself to new clothing or accessories - Choose from many event spaces, from contemporary meeting rooms to opulent halls With its peaceful spa, large swimming pools, and beautifully furnished guestrooms, Grand Nikko Tokyo Daiba is designed for relaxation. Sip tea or sake with dazzling city views, dine at the many restaurants, and decorate your guestroom or suite with fresh flowers from the on-site florist. Stop by the Bakery & Pastry shop for a treat, shop at several onsite retail shops, and enjoy close proximity to top Tokyo destinations such as the Museum of Maritime Science.

LASGV.name: Green Valley Ranch Resort Spa Casino
LASGV.description: Located just a few minutes from the dazzling Las Vegas Strip, Green Valley Ranch Resort Spa Casino is a Mediterranean-inspired hotel with outstanding amenities, activities, and hospitality. Open your windows to reveal the sun-soaked backyard, where a large outdoor pool and lavish seating areas are framed by a backdrop of rugged mountains. Then, throughout the day, enjoy a full-service spa, sprawling casino, and both casual and fine dining restaurants. Head into nearby Las Vegas to experience the lively Strip or historic downtown area, as well as nearby shopping centers, entertainment venues, and golf courses. Highlights of the hotel include: - 490 relaxing guestrooms and suites with plush robes and contemporary décor - A vast range of cuisines, ranging from classic steaks and gourmet pizzas to sushi and sashimi - Sand-bottom swimming pool surrounded by private cabanas, where you can sip cocktails - An expansive gaming floor with card tables, slot and video poker machines, and more - Luxe movie theater, plus the Grand Events Center, offering concerts and comedy shows

BCNCU.name: H10 Cubik
BCNCU.description: With a prime location in the center of Barcelona, H10 Cubik is as stylish as the city it calls home. The cutting-edge interior playfully combines geometric shapes reminiscent of the Brutalist architecture of the mid-20th century with natural light and flashes of vibrant color. Follow the fresh design into the bright bedrooms, relaxed and modern communal areas, and a rooftop bar with panoramic city views. - Explore the popular Gothic Quarter, Plaça de Catalunya, and La Rambla - The 101 guestrooms feature premium touches, soundproofing, and personal Nespresso machines - Admire local designer Lázaro Rosa-Violán’s considered features that complement the hotel’s future-facing interior design - Spot the spires of the Gothic cathedral as you cool off in the eighth-floor plunge pool - Try Spain’s famous tapas at Atik Tapas Bar or enjoy a drink or snack in funky Robotik Bar - Finish the day with a sunset cocktail and a panoramic view of Barcelona from Atik Rooftop Bar From your bright and spacious room, you can watch the liveliness of Barcelona through your large windows that offer great views of the city. But, not many things can beat the view from the roof with a cocktail at sunset.

BCNME.name: H10 Metropolitan
BCNME.description: In the heart of the Eixample district, H10 Metropolitan transports you back to the boom days of Barcelona’s industrial past. From its historic façade to its renovated interior by renowned local designer Lázaro Rosa-Violán, the hotel emanates sophistication and Old-World charm. With a complimentary glass of cava as you check in, you will feel instantly welcome at H10 Metropolitan where staff members pride themselves on ensuring you have a stress-free stay. - Cool off in the top-floor plunge pool with views of Plaça de Catalunya and Tibidabo - Choose one of 85 spacious guestrooms and suites, many with private balconies or terraces - Admire the hotel’s industrial décor by prestigious interior designer Lázaro Rosa-Violán - Soak up the sun or enjoy a cocktail in Eden Terrace, beside the ground-floor pool - Curl up on one of Eden Bar’s large leather sofas - Discover luxury boutiques and Gaudí buildings on Passeig de Gràcia From the lush poolside terrace to the airy top-floor sundeck, four-star H10 Metropolitan is ideal for relaxing and escaping the crowds. This industrial-inspired hotel has a quirky library, considered details, and a playful approach to color and texture.

MADHV.name: H10 Villa de la Reina
MADHV.description: Originally a 20th-century bank building, the edifice that now hosts Madrid's H10 Villa de la Reina maintains the same historical façade and features of the original, but with a fully refurbished and redesigned interior. Clean lines, cool colors, and exquisite materials such as marble flooring, tufted armchairs, brushed-gold accents, stone columns, white wainscoting, and custom tiles add a modern touch to the hotel's traditional style. Its location in the heart of the Gran Vía makes this hotel the perfect home base for exploring the sights, sounds, and scents of the Spanish capital. At this TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence recipient, you can: - Relax in one of the hotel's 74 tranquil rooms and suites - Sip on craft cocktails and enjoy a tapas tasting menu at La Villa bar - Listen to live music on Friday evenings in the lobby - Check out a book from the hotel's complimentary library - Hold a conference or corporate meeting in the hotel's three event spaces - Explore Madrid's city center with its museums, galleries, and palaces Set between some of the city's most famous sites — The Prado Museum, The Royal Palace, the Plaza Mayor — H10 Villa de la Reina's best feature is its great location. Just steps outside the hotel, you'll find yourself transported back in time to Bourbon-ruled Spain, where ornate 18th-century architecture abuts grand buildings built during the Spanish Golden Age.

TUSHS.name: Hacienda Del Sol Guest Ranch Resort
TUSHS.address_raw: 5501 N. Hacienda del Sol Road, Tucson
TUSHS.description: With a rich history dating back to 1929 as a finishing school, the resort has hosted old Hollywood luminaries such as Clark Gable and Katherine Hepburn. Hacienda Del Sol Guest Ranch Resort is a charming, southwestern-style ranch retreat nestled amid the mountains of the Catalina Foothills. Its lavish amenities, picturesque architecture, carved wood furnishings, and beautiful village setting on 34 tranquil acres create an alluring atmosphere. Dine alfresco in the patio area, swim in the infinity pool, and lounge amid the gorgeous desert landscape. Highlights include: - 98 rustic-elegant guestrooms, suites, and casitas - Work out in the well-equipped fitness room and lounge by the pool - Dine at award-winning restaurants while listening to live music - Relax in an outdoor hot tub while gazing at the surrounding mountains - Enjoy a signature spa treatment with expanded offerings Walk in the footsteps of Silver Screen stars, such as John Wayne, Clark Gable, and Katherine Hepburn, with a stay at this desert oasis, and enjoy relaxing like celebrity royalty under the warmth of the Arizona sun. The resort was originally designed as a ranch school for elite families to send their daughters, and is now a relaxing oasis getaway in the heart of Tucson.

SJDLR.name: Hacienda Encantada Resort & Residences
SJDLR.address_raw: Carretera Transpeninsular Km 7 3, Cabo San Lucas
SJDLR.description: Looking out from your private villa to where the Sea of Cortez meets the mighty Pacific, you will feel as if you have found an oceanfront paradise at the world's end. The location is made even more appealing with vibrant downtown Cabo San Lucas just a short drive away. Hacienda Encantada Resort & Residences is the ultimate in privacy and tranquility. This Four Diamond AAA resort provides secluded accommodations combining Mexican architecture with beautiful hacienda-style contemporary interiors, as well as a clifftop pool terrace which is perfectly positioned to showcase the legendary Los Cabos sunset. - Be inspired by spectacular sea views from one of 203 hotel rooms and 35 residences - Soak up the sun by one of the resort’s three luxury pools, or on the secluded private beach - Share memorable moments in an 18,298-sq-ft garden, complete with pool bar, Jacuzzi, barbecue grills, and fire pits - Be pampered with a Swedish massage or hot-stone treatment at the holistic spa - Take advantage of private butler service and let the concierge team plan your adventures - Play a round of golf at two courses, with eight holes of Punta Espada Golf Club directly along the ocean On a rugged cliff on the serene Baja coast, Hacienda Encantada Resort & Residences are well-appointed, from the gorgeous interiors to the premium services. Take in exceptional views from the outdoor space of your villa, or sit out under the stars.

QROHJ.name: Hacienda Jurica by Brisas
QROHJ.description: Formerly a 16th-century plantation, Hacienda Jurica by Brisas delivers a five-star hotel experience in an estate that captures both the spirit of Querétaro and its own unique colonial-era history. Head here for an immersive experience in Mexican culture, with an abundance of traditional cuisine, live music, and local works of art within its historic walls. Running parallel to this are upscale amenities that bring a contemporary touch to the hotel, including a lavish spa, waterfall pool, and pristine tennis courts. - Choose from one of 239 guestrooms and suites, where minimalist décor meets modern amenities - Lounge by the outdoor pool with a snack or enjoy a few laps instead - Immerse yourself in antiquity with a tour of the 16th-century hacienda - Let a specialist ease away your tensions with a bespoke massage in the spa - Hire a horse-drawn carriage for a romantic lap of the meticulous grounds Hacienda Jurica by Brisas is a haven of recreation and rejuvenation. Unwind with a hot stone massage, body wrap, or aromatherapy treatment. Maximize your state of Zen by heading poolside or venture into the peaceful gardens and listening to the soft trickle of the fountains. Take your journey of recuperation a step further with a day trip to nearby Tequisquiapan, famed for its healing thermal springs.

DABHB.name: Hammock Beach Golf Resort & Spa
DABHB.description: Nestled along two miles of stunning Atlantic Ocean coastline, Hammock Beach Golf Resort & Spa is a golfer’s paradise, boasting two signature golf courses – one offering eight holes with breathtaking ocean views and the other featuring undulating greens and a unique links-style design. This resort community combines luxurious accommodations, including villas and residences, with world-class amenities. Guests can enjoy the Fantasy Pool Complex with a three-story waterslide and lazy river, a 10,000-square-foot indoor aquatic center, and a full-service spa, setting the stage for an unforgettable getaway. Highlights of the hotel include: - 275 guestrooms, suites, condominiums, and villas, creating diverse settings for rest - Two of America’s finest golf courses, designed by legends Jack Nicklaus and Tom Watson - A state-of-the-art fitness center with a sauna, steam room, and professional wellness counselor - Unique dining experiences, from shore-to-table seafood, Italian favorites, and sushi to pub fare - On-site racquet complex with floodlit tennis courts, pickleball courts, and professional coaching - Indoor/outdoor pool complex featuring a waterslide, lazy river, and zero-entry beach pool Every day brings a new family adventure at Hammock Beach Golf Resort & Spa. Book surfing lessons for the kids, rent bicycles to explore the coast together or enjoy unique seasonal experiences, such as roasting s’mores or stargazing on warm evenings.

MIAHC.name: Hawks Cay Resort
MIAHC.description: An array of activities and an exceptional location make Hawks Cay Resort the ultimate family destination in the Florida Keys. Watch the early morning sun rise over the Atlantic Ocean, swim with the resort’s resident bottlenose dolphins, experience some of the best water sports and fishing opportunities in the Sunshine State, or take an evening dip in the Gulf of Mexico. Travelers can also set sail on a diving trip or fishing charter from the resort’s private marina. Surrounded by the sea, this luxurious hotel is an idyllic escape sure to create long-lasting memories. Highlights of the resort include: - 374 Caribbean-inspired guestrooms, suites, and villas, many with private balconies and views - Freshly caught seafood available dockside or directly on the sand - Four swimming pools and a saltwater lagoon fed straight from the ocean - Chartered fishing boats that set out in search of leaping sailfish, blackfin tuna, and more - A tranquil spa offering island-inspired treatments, plus a salon and fitness center - Showstopping kids’ club with activities ranging from sports and snorkeling to nature programs

SHAHH.name: Himalayas Hotel Shanghai
SHAHH.description: Situated atop the Shanghai Himalayas Center – a multi-functional development focused on culture with a museum, theater and more – the luxurious Himalayas Hotel Shanghai makes for an enticing escape in the Pudong district. Relax in contemporary guestrooms and suites that combine modern design and amenities with classic Chinese decor. The futuristic hotel, topped by a colorful neon-lit cube, also boasts several restaurants, a relaxed lounge offering afternoon tea and late-night dance sessions with a DJ, a fitness center, a serene garden, and more. Highlights of the hotel include: - 412 chic guestrooms and suites with traditional artwork, a work desk, and deep soaking tub - Dining ranging from classic Chinese fare and a breakfast buffet to afternoon tea - A spa with private therapy suites, dry and wet saunas, a massage pool, a tea lounge, and more - An impressive 14-story jade atrium with a tranquil reflection garden - Located within Shanghai Himalayas Center, a mixed-use cultural development

AUSHB.name: Horseshoe Bay Resort
AUSHB.description: Set on a sprawling, 7,000-acre property, Horseshoe Bay Resort is an elevated lifestyle resort offering endless activities and amenities. Designed to appeal to many kinds of travelers, the hotel boasts a vast collection of accommodations, three 18-hole golf courses designed by Robert Trent Jones Sr., waterfront dining, a putting course, a professional golf academy in partnership with Callaway, an 18-hole zoysia grass putting course, a destination spa, full-service marina featuring Nautique luxury boats, a private jet center, and a unique swimming pool floating atop the waters of Lake Lyndon B. Johnson. For guests enjoying the signature residences at Horseshoe Bay Resort, added amenities include the yacht club pool and hot tub, plus a sandy beach and beach bar. During your stay, enjoy tennis and pickleball matches, on-water boating or fishing excursions, off-roading, an aqua obstacle course, a dedicated kids club, and much more. Highlights of the hotel include: - 423 guestrooms, suites, villas, and residences, providing options for every type of stay - Three championship golf courses designed by Robert Trent Jones Sr. - Varied dining venues, serving everything from hill country cuisine to seafood, pizza, and burgers - A lakeside spa oasis offering rejuvenating treatments, saunas, steam rooms, and more - Distinct swimming pools, from spa and fitness pools to a floating pool and aqua water park - A wide range of activities, including off-roading experiences, exotic bird encounters, and more Venture beyond the resort to explore the Texas hill country, with state parks, wildlife refuges, spring-fed lakes, quaint towns, and picturesque wineries all nestled nearby.

YQB71.name: Hotel 71
YQB71.description: Combine urban convenience with European boutique elegance when you stay at Hotel 71 in the heart of Quebec City’s historic Old Port district. Housed in a 19th-century bank building with a beautiful neoclassical façade and lustrous lobby, this urban oasis offers modern amenities, an ideal location near notable attractions, and gorgeous rooftop views of the city, St. Lawrence River, and Cap Diamant. - 2023 TripAdvisor Travelers’ Choice Award and Four-Diamond hotel by CAA and AAA - 60 guestrooms feature original wood floors, high ceilings, and Italian walk-in rain showers - Dine at the four-star Italian restaurant, sip wine at the bar, and enjoy 24/7 coffee - Walk to boutiques, bistros, museums, the marina, art galleries, and historical sites - Workout at the fitness center or ride a complimentary bicycle along a scenic river trail - Take advantage of the massotherapy room and espresso lounge Front desk service can arrange nearby excursions, reservations, and tours — as well as advise you on must-see sites of the city, including the Museum of Civilisation next door. The hospitable staff can also help you plan your business or celebratory event in meeting rooms for 10 to 100 guests. Back in your room, take in the excellent views from most rooms of the St. Lawrence River and historic Petit Champlain district.

GVALE.name: Hotel Angleterre
GVALE.description: The perfect blend of splendid tradition and refined modernity, Hotel Angleterre dates back to the 18th century and delivers four-star luxury. Set around a lovely courtyard garden, there are four main residential pavilions, each unique in style — the oldest of which played host to Lord Byron while writing The Prisoner of Chillon in 1816. Explore the beautiful, historic town of Lausanne, or stroll the shores of Lake Geneva before unwinding beside the hotel’s secluded pool and luxuriating with top-notch service. In the evening, take in your glorious surroundings with an aperitif on the terrace of L’Accademia restaurant. - Enjoy a stunning view of nature or the city in one of the 75 guestrooms and suites - Rent a bicycle or an electric boat from the hotel and explore Lake Geneva region - Organize a conference or reception in the Platane pavilion and terrace - Make good use of The Château d’Ouchy spa and relax in its sauna or hammam - Dive into the hotel’s picturesque pool, surrounded by an English-style garden - Sustainability at Hotel Angleterre, where indulgent comfort meets responsible living—our EarthCheck Certified status ensures every elegant detail is backed by real-time sustainability tracking, from energy and water use to carbon footprint and community care.
