Discreet with a calming atmosphere, Hotel Angleterre has the charming allure of a private lakeside home. Make the most of its proximity to the fascinating city of Lausanne, with its winning combination of medieval beauty and magnificent natural setting.

BCNHB.name: Hotel Balmes 4*
BCNHB.description: Surrounded by the historic neighborhood of Eixample in the center of Barcelona, Hotel Balmes 4* blends the comfort and style of modern architecture with the sophistication of Old World Spain. This hotel uses its old alleyway from the early 1920's as a leafy garden with a pool and sunny area for drinks. Other highlights of the hotel include: - An array of guest rooms, including 11 home-like Residences, perfect for longer stays - A full fitness center featuring a treadmill, stationary bicycle, and free weights - Set just steps from several notable architectural landmarks and tourist spots - A relaxing courtyard pool shaded by palm trees and the greenery of the hotel’s garden - More than 200 pieces of African art displayed prominently throughout the hotel Hotel Balmes 4* is a perfect oasis of calm for executives passing through on business trips, families can also find relaxation by the pool after long days of enjoying local cuisine, taking in the art collection around the hotel, or exploring coastal, historic Spain.

TNRCM.name: Hotel Carlton
TNRCM.description: From its prime spot overlooking Lake Anosy, Hotel Carlton — downtown Antananarivo’s only five-star hotel — has been delivering impeccable service for nearly half a century. Settle into your cozy guestroom and savor the complimentary pastries that await you, then relax by one of the largest outdoor pools in town and ask the friendly concierge to arrange an unforgettable day trip to see Madagascar’s famous ring-tailed lemurs. After sunset, sip cocktails on the stone terrace and dine on French-influenced fare in Île Rouge Restaurant, which buzzes with atmosphere. - Choose from 171 comfortable guestrooms and spacious suites - Soak up stunning views of Lake Anosy and the Queen’s Palace - Play tennis on the clay court and book a session with a professional coach - Treat yourself to just-baked baguettes and croissants at L’Éclair - Stay in shape in the gym, fully equipped with Technogym machines - Try your luck at blackjack or roulette at the hotel's Grand Cercle de Tana Casino Beyond its numerous accolades — including being the only ISO 9001-certified hotel in the country, guaranteeing the highest standards — Hotel Carlton is unrivaled when it comes to facilities and authentic Malagasy hospitality. Shop for Madagascar’s fabled vanilla in the hotel’s boutiques and enjoy the convenience of an on-site hair and beauty salon, bank, and travel agency.

EASCD.name: Hotel Catalonia Donosti
EASCD.address_raw: San Bartolome Gaina K., 9, San Sebastián
EASCD.description: Hotel Catalonia Donosti occupies a 17th and 18th-century convent, with a north façade that has been carefully maintained, preserving the spectacular bell tower and the central body of the church. Warm hospitality surrounds you in the elegant atmosphere inspired by noble English estates, decorated with velvets, marble, copper, dark woods, and authentic local design elements. Perfectly positioned in the natural lookout of San Bartolomé, the rooftop terrace offers panoramic views over Playa de la Concha, the Cathedral, and the city center. Hotel highlights include: - Contemporary guestrooms and suites at this intimate 128-room hotel offer sea views, some from private terraces - Enjoy an avant-garde approach to Basque gastronomy with touches of Catalan cuisine at the Aldapeta Gastrobar - To unwind, relax with a glass of wine on the rooftop terrace, take a dip in the plunge pool in the summer, or visit the expansive wellness center with a Finnish sauna, steam bath, cold water pool, and massage cabin - Perfect for business events, meeting rooms are equipped with state-of-the-art audiovisual gadgets; smaller event spaces are ideal for family celebrations Protected by the Urban Heritage of San Sebastián, the building has important historical value, but the contrast between the façade of the old convent and the main entrance of the hotel, newly built and modern in design, is surprising.

AGPCR.name: Hotel Catalonia Ronda
AGPCR.address_raw: Calle Virgen de la Paz, 16, Ronda
AGPCR.description: Located just opposite the iconic Real Maestranza de Caballería de Ronda bullring in the center of town, Hotel Catalonia Ronda boasts an impressive façade and arches, columns, coffered ceilings, and arabesques that reveal its Arab origin. Choose a Balinese bed by the infinity pool on the quiet rooftop terrace, the outdoor hydromassage pool, spa and wellness area, or the privacy of your very own balcony or junior suite’s plunge pool to relax and refresh at this magnificent city hotel. Hotel highlights include: - Guestrooms and suites with a range of amenities including balconies, terraces, and expansive living areas - Traditional Andalusian cuisine with a modern twist, showcasing seasonal local products — and the best wines — at Panorámico restaurant or on the terrace of the Gastrobar - An outdoor solarium at the spa and wellness area, where you can work on your tan or maintain your exercise routine with state-of-the-art fitness machines Stay in an unbeatable location, a two-minute walk from Puente Nuevo Bridge over the Tagus Gorge, close to the Old Bridge and the Arab Bridge, and fall in love with the old town’s picturesque streets, churches, convents, and palaces.

QLJCG.name: Hotel Château Gütsch
QLJCG.description: Set high above Lake Lucerne in Switzerland, Hotel Château Gütsch is an alpine resort offering a storied history and majestic elegance. Each of the grand guestrooms is distinct yet extraordinary, with luxury wallpaper, tasteful fixtures, and ornate beds. When you arrive, ride the funicular up to the hotel to get the lay of the land. Stays consist of innovative regional cuisine, walks through a serene garden, and musical presentations that showcase the arts. Highlights of the hotel include: - 37 romantic guestrooms and suites, each uniquely designed with elegant furnishings - An innovative restaurant serving Mediterranean-inspired Swiss cuisine, plus a spirited bar - Tranquil castle gardens that provide a chance for respite in a beautiful natural setting - Live entertainment, from jazz and piano music to ballet performances - Scenic Gütsch Funicular that provides quick access to the hilltop resort from below Often referred to as the Swiss Castle on the Hill, this picturesque Belle Époque estate was designed to resemble a French château, with turrets and towers that have made it one of the most recognizable landmarks in Lucerne.

MILCC.name: Hotel Cristoforo Colombo
MILCC.description: Embrace the luxury lifestyle with a visit to Hotel Cristoforo Colombo. Located in the heart of the city along Corso Buenos Aires, a bustling street offering more than 350 department stores and boutiques, the hotel is centrally located for both shopping and exploration. Retreat to the spa for relaxing treatments and amenities, including a water circuit featuring a range of indulgent options, or head to the fitness center to squeeze in some exercise. Guests can also dine at a signature restaurant for every meal or sip drinks at the bar before or after venturing out into the city. Highlights of the hotel include: - 120 refined guestrooms and suites with bespoke furnishings, Italian fabrics, and city views - A vibrant restaurant offering breakfast, lunch, dinner, weekend brunch, and evening drinks - A tranquil spa that prioritizes well-being with treatments, sauna, a Turkish bath, and more - Intimate fitness center with Technogym equipment, plus an outdoor terrace for relaxation - Concierge service to assist with booking guided tours and other activities throughout Milan

PARDA.name: Hôtel Dame des Arts
PARDA.description: Set in the heart of Paris’ Latin Quarter and Saint-Germain neighborhood, Hôtel Dame des Arts embraces its location within the city’s historically bohemian and non-conformist stronghold by offering a passionately designed and decorated hotel where accommodations are spacious, dining is innovative, and the comradery is timeless. Highlights of the hotel include: - More than 100 rooms and suites, many offering outdoor terraces - A rooftop bar serving delicious drinks made better by panoramic Parisian views - A state-of-the-art fitness center and wellness area, offering a sauna and treatment room - An ideal location just steps from some of the city’s best sights and attractions Along with its elegant accommodations and scenic rooftop bar, the hotel also features a lush and calm garden courtyard, along with a signature restaurant that serves small plates to both guests and locals alike.

ILGHD.name: HOTEL DU PONT
ILGHD.description: The splendid HOTEL DU PONT is one of the world’s most prestigious hotels. This storied hotel has been warmly welcoming its guests since 1913. The finest French and Italian craftsmen of the day fashioned this gem into an icon of the Gilded Age, and modern conveniences blend seamlessly with nostalgic elegance. Admire the gilded high ceilings in the lobby, the ornate gold chandeliers in the Green Room, and the magnificent, floor-to-ceiling arched windows around the hotel. Walk in the footsteps of former guests such as John F. Kennedy, explore the beauty of the Brandywine Valley, and experience the vibrant charm of downtown Wilmington. - Retreat to one of 217 sophisticated guestrooms and suites, with custom furnishings, and sumptuous décor - Dine at Le Cavalier at The Green Room, a modern brasserie with menus influenced by Provence and North Africa - Indulge in a sweet treat from Spark*d Creative Pastry, the hotel’s own bakeshop, a local favorite - Experience downtown Wilmington’s vibrant nightlife, high-end shopping, and world-class museums - Enjoy a quintessential afternoon tea each Friday in Le Cavalier at The Green Room - Host fairy-tale weddings and other grand occasions in the Gold Ballroom Lose yourself in the glamour and luxury of the Gilded Age. From the Italian mosaics, oil paintings, and coffered oak-beamed ceiling in the highly acclaimed restaurant to the grand guestroom or suite that welcomes you with every amenity you could desire, you will be transported to a world of opulence, comfort, and high style.

BCNHE.name: Hotel España
BCNHE.description: Immerse yourself in the Catalan modernist architecture that Barcelona is so famous for at Hotel España, the creation of celebrated architect Lluís Domènech i Montaner. Travelers visit just for a tour of this 19th-century building, but guests can wander past the fluted columns, vividly patterned tiles, and striking chandeliers to their heart’s content. While true to its historic roots, the hotel has been renovated to include chic guestrooms, upscale amenities, multiple cocktail bars, and unrivaled gastronomy overseen by a Michelin-Starred chef. Highlights of the hotel include: - 82 contemporary rooms adorned with vibrant pops of colors and refined Art Deco details - Rooftop terrace open year-round, featuring a sky bar with tapas, pizzas, sweets, and cocktails - Creative Catalan cuisine overseen by a renowned chef in a modernist dining room - Outdoor swimming pool on the roof in the heart of the Ciutat Vella district - Impressive 19th-century architectural elements combined with modern comforts An advertisement dating back to the hotel’s launch in 1859 promised attentive service and superb rooms, and the current incarnation continues to deliver. With unparalleled hospitality and a location in the heart of the city center, it’s no surprise travelers are still coming back more than 160 years later.

HELHH.name: Hotel Haven
HELHH.description: Just feet from Helsinki’s South Harbour and near the famed Market Square, Hotel Haven sits as an elegant and refined retreat boasting rooms and restaurants located in the second-oldest stone building in the city. Guests of Hotel Haven not only have a chance to sit within the walls of an architecturally and culturally significant building, they can also enjoy: - Resting in an array of well-appointed rooms and suites with soft beds and varying views - Two restaurants and a bar serving Italian dishes, American Southern cuisine, and more - A 24-hour gym with state-of-the-art equipment and space for free exercise - A central location offering easy access to sights, attractions, and public transit For history buffs, the stone building still hosts five original living spaces that are protected by the Finnish government, allowing guests and locals alike to experience what life was like in Helsinki merchant’s house more than 200 years ago.

NCEHL.name: Hotel Les Terrasses D'Eze
NCEHL.description: Nestled in the Côte d’Azur hills, between Nice and Monaco, Hotel Les Terrasses D’Èze is an ideal getaway to explore the French Riviera and discover the iconic medieval village of Èze that awed Walt Disney. The four-star hotel offers a unique panorama: a breathtaking view of the Mediterranean Sea from Saint-Jean-Cap-Ferrat and Villefranche-sur-Mer’s bays to the Cap d'Antibes. This is the perfect destination focused on well-being with its modern lodging, delectable dining, and pampering spa. - 87 renovated guestrooms and Suites all offer contemporary design and boast spectacular sea views from private terraces for a unique experience - Head to the signature restaurants and Lounge Bar to find delicious gastronomic experiences, expertly crafted cocktails, and unbelievable views - Take a dip in the exterior infinity swimming pool which overlooks the Mediterranean Sea - Relax at the 5,382 sq ft / 500 sq meter spa and enjoy the benefits of the wellness route as you make your way through the various sauna cabins, 'paradise showers,' 'ice fountain,' and Himalayan salt room, complete with the indoor hydromassage pool including different waterfalls, a Jacuzzi, jets, and benches - Discover the Floating Room, a unique sensory experience to ensure total relaxation of your mind, body, and spirit; or treat yourself to a facial and body care with natural products - Get active in the fitness room or with various outdoor activities within the hotel, such as running on a tennis court, doing yoga, playing the traditional French game pétanque, or walking in the botanical garden - Venture to the famous Medieval Village, where you can walk around the historical winding alleys, browse the Exotic Garden, and well-known fragrance factories Fragonard and Galimard - Discover the different hiking trails that connect the three levels of the village; the best known is the path of Nietzsche, which inspired the philosopher to write his famous novel Thus Spoke Zarathustra Guests will discover plenty of natural sunlight and calming modern designs throughout the property. The hotel’s unique architecture, staggered like the decks of a ship, allows guests to enjoy the French Riviera as if on a boat floating on the water.

HELLR.name: Hotel Lilla Roberts
HELLR.description: In one of Helsinki’s best neighborhoods, Hotel Lilla Roberts welcomes guests into a sleek and glamorous hotel inspired by the Art Deco design and décor of the 1930s. Calling the Kaartinkapunki design district home, the hotel thrives on a spirit of contemporary creativity and throwback elegance. Guests of Hotel Lilla Roberts can: - Rest and relax in spacious accommodations boasting modern amenities and sleek baths - Delight in a buffet breakfast and three-course evening dinners at Krog Roba restaurant - Sip on lively and unforgettable cocktails at the Nordic-design forward Bar Lilla e - Workout at the all-day fitness center before or after exploring Helsinki’s best attractions Not just a place to rest your weary head while in Helsinki, Hotel Lilla Roberts is also a place to be inspired - especially when it comes to fashion. Partnering with different fashion designers each month, the hotel offers guests exclusive benefits at each designer’s lobby display area.

PARMP.name: Hotel Mayfair
PARMP.description: Experience true French elegance and ambiance with a stay at the Hotel Mayfair in the historical heart of Paris between Place de La Concorde and Place Vendôme. This intimate, four-star hotel charms with a stunning Haussmann façade, décor mirroring a 19th-century mansion, and 47 guestrooms and suites with rich furnishings, soft lighting, and luxurious fabrics. A morning meal in the traditional French breakfast room and a nightcap in the classic lounge will start and end your day with style. - Retreat to rooms reflecting classic French and Parisian style with modern amenities - Indulge in an array of in-room facial and body spa treatments that use organic products - Begin each morning with delicious food in the hotel’s classic French breakfast room - Unwind from a busy day with a drink at the bar or lounge — look for the red leather ceiling - Walk to the famed Tuileries Gardens, Musée du Louvre, Musée d’Orsay, and Champs-Elysées - Conduct business in the meeting room that seats 12 with a view of a flowered courtyard The Hotel Mayfair is the perfect place to stay for a quintessentially French experience on your next trip to The City of Light with its prime location in Paris’ historic 1st Arrondissement. The hotel’s Art Deco marquise (canopy) welcomes you with flair — and it doesn’t stop there. The hospitality exemplifies the best in French tradition, the rooms are elegant and spacious by European standards, and its superb central location is within walking distance to iconic attractions like the Louvre and the Seine — yet on a quiet side street away from the bustle of the city. The bar’s Versailles-style flooring, red leather ceiling, and original furniture will take you back to another time period.

GVAHM.name: Hotel Metropole Geneve
GVAHM.description: Built in 1854, the Hotel Metropole Geneve is a sumptuous blend of classic and modern. The careful renovation has retained the stunning façade, which now fronts a contemporary, boutique-style interior. Enjoy exemplary service at this five-star hotel, winner of three elite World Luxury Hotel awards. Its location on Geneva’s left bank puts you at the heart of the city’s famous shopping district, and a short walk from the landmark Jet d’Eau fountain. Dine at one of four fabulous restaurants, and take in the stunning rooftop terrace with unbeatable views of the city and the lake. - Order a martini in the Mirror Bar, one of the city’s hippest spots - Dine on exquisite Italian cuisine at Gusto - Work out on the bikes and fitness machines in the state-of-the-art gym - Take in the lovely views from one of the hotel’s 111 guestrooms and 16 suites - Use the concierge service for a detailed guide to the city, and for recommended best boutiques to visit - The scenic, ideal location is just five minutes from Old Town, filled with charming cafes, museums, restaurants, and historical sights - Enjoy a ride around the city and lake with the hotel's electric bikes Hotel Metropole Geneve offers Swiss hospitality at its finest. The six event rooms ensure its position as the city’s number one meeting place. Appreciate world-class design, faultless amenities, and flawless service, whether you are on business, or traveling for pleasure.

TSAMP.name: Hotel Metropolitan Premier Taipei
TSAMP.description: Hotel Metropolitan Premier Taipei welcomes guests into a world that fuses the cultures and aesthetics of Japan and Taiwan through sleek, inconspicuously luxurious spaces. Located just minutes from the airport and steps from public transit and rail, this hotel affords travelers easy access to everything you need to make a visit to Taipei an exceptional one. Guests of the hotel are also invited to: Relax in comfortably designed, spacious rooms with city views Indulge in a day at the hotel spa with a large menu of soothing treatments available Swim in the pool or soothe sore muscles in the hot tub or sauna Dine at a multitude of restaurants and bars serving a variety of cuisines A perfect home base for exploring the city, travelers will appreciate how quick it is to reach the city’s best sights and attractions including the seaside mountain district of Jiufen, the stunning and unbelievably tall Taipei 101, and the Liaoning Street Night Market, famous for its authentic food stalls and local crafts.

BIOHM.name: Hotel Miro
BIOHM.description: Discover the best of Bilbao at Hotel Miró, a modern boutique hotel in the cultural heartland of the city, steps away from the Guggenheim Museum. Marvel at the hotel’s collection of contemporary art, walk on floors made of local black Marquina marble and rest well in 50 chic guestrooms and suites decorated by fashion designer Antonio Miró. Be sure to stop by the guest-exclusive Honesty Bar, fitness center, and private library. - Treat yourself to a massage or a beauty treatment at the hotel’s Wellness Suite - Enjoy the black marble bathrooms and floor-to-ceiling windows of the guestrooms - Dine at neighboring Michelin-starred restaurants, pintxos bars, bistros, and cafes - Walk to the Moyua metro stop, Plaza Nueva, and Guggenheim Museum Bilbao - Shop at the best boutiques in the city and Old Town Bilbao If you can take your eyes off the twisting titanium, glass, and limestone of the unique Frank Gehry-designed Guggenheim Museum Bilbao, you will notice Hotel Miró’s attention to special details. From national and international artists to relaxing and invigorating spaces, the hotel invites you to explore the city and its culture as soon as you arrive.

VCEMG.name: Hotel Monaco & Grand Canal
VCEMG.description: Lose yourself in the beauty and romance of Venice at Hotel Monaco & Grand Canal, a dreamy four-star boutique hotel set within a restored 17th-century palace by the water. Walk across the cool marble floors, admire the original 16th-century columns and ceiling panels, and be stunned by the contemporary glass-roofed lobby. Retreat to your spacious guestroom or suite, complete with Italian marble, precious fabrics, handcrafted furniture, and Murano chandeliers. Dine at the restaurant overlooking the Venetian lagoon, or soak up the sun on the terrace with a panoramic view of the beautiful Grand Canal, the glorious city, and the nearby islands. - Relax in 92 gorgeous guestrooms and suites, with Venetian décor and stunning canal views - Host memorable events at the nine extraordinary Ridotto Rooms dating back to the 1500s - Book gondola trips, boat tours, and entries to the Biennale with concierge assistance - Visit the famous Piazza San Marco just steps from the hotel - Savor Venetian gastronomy at Grand Canal restaurant - Nine event rooms and a business center make this a perfect place for your grand event or business meeting This opulent hotel is uniquely situated, dominating the whole of St. Mark’s Basin. With a cocktail in hand, take in the terrace views over Punta della Dogana, the Basilica della Salute, and the islands of San Giorgio and Giudecca. Be treated like royalty by the hotel staff, and revel in the romance of a mansion that was the first ridotto, a retreat for Venetian nobles, travelers, adventurers, and even Casanova himself.

YULHM.name: Hotel Monville
YULHM.description: With a striking glass and concrete façade, and a clear focus on high-tech amenities, Hotel Monville is ahead of its time. The interior is contemporary, with décor that is cozy, elegant, and practical; the tech is seamless, with automated check-in kiosks and robots that deliver room service orders swiftly; the experience is welcoming, with impeccable concierge services and a quirky sense of humor throughout. Everything about Hotel Monville is an expression of the bold vibrancy that courses through Montreal. - Relax and unwind in one of 269 sleek guestrooms, with floor-to-ceiling windows - Order overstuffed smoked meat or minced pork sandwiches at the grab-and-go restaurant - Conveniently located, the hotel is tucked between popular Old Port and China Town - Workout at an hour most convenient to you – the gym is open day and night - Soak in glorious panoramic views of downtown Montreal from the rooftop terrace Hotel Monville makes a serious style statement the moment you arrive, with an expansive lobby with colossal columns, and work and social spaces designed to engage and immerse. Endowed with smart design and tech surprises, the hotel offers a chance to experience the unexpected in a forward-thinking way.

YOKNG.name: Hotel New Grand
YOKNG.description: Step into the gleaming lobby of Hotel New Grand — with soaring ceilings, wood paneling, and candle-lit chandeliers – and enter through a passage of time. Originally built in 1927 and frequented by Charlie Chaplin, Babe Ruth, and General MacArthur, the hotel continues to impress with Art Deco flourishes, a tiled staircase, and velour couches. Feel welcomed by impeccable Japanese hospitality and dine with distinction at the classic French restaurant inspired by a legendary cruise ship. This landmark gem is a gateway to the former fishing village of Yokohama, one of the first Japanese ports open to foreign trade. - Stay in one of 238 well-appointed guestrooms and suites, some with magnificent views of the harbor - Book a table at Le Normandie for haute French cuisine and Art Deco décor - Indulge in a massage at the Oasis salon or a rejuvenating treatment at the Esthetics salon - Hire out one of the four banquet halls, which are splendid spaces for special events - Take a stroll to nearby Yamashita Park for a relaxing afternoon - Stay in the same suite used by General Douglas MacArthur, named in honor of the American general Rich history meets contemporary luxury at The Hotel New Grand. Stay in the same suite where General MacArthur worked, or book a room in the modern Tower famous for its views of the glittering harbor.

SFOHN.name: Hotel Nikko San Francisco
SFOHN.description: Experience San Francisco’s unique, fun-loving charm from the grand elegance of the 25-story Hotel Nikko San Francisco. Centrally located just two blocks from Union Square and offering sweeping city views, this urban sanctuary makes for an ideal base from which to explore the city — if you can tear yourself away from the alluring on-site amenities. Relax in the hotel’s extensive health club and its glass-roofed swimming pool, savor Californian-Asian cuisine at fine dining eatery ANZU, or drink maple-smoked Old Fashioneds at Feinstein’s, the hotel’s live music venue and nightclub. - Unwind in one of 532 guestrooms and suites, tastefully decorated with Asian-fusion elegance - Receive Forbes Four Star and AAA Four Diamond hospitality - Settle your furry friend into hotel life with treats, a special pet bed, and playtime on the dog terrace - Plan a memorable event with Asian-influenced catering at one of 20 venues to choose from - Share a fresh sushi platter with your choice of aromatic sake at ANZU - Sip classic cocktails and watch world-class musicians at Feinstein’s nightclub After the sun goes down, it’s time to explore San Francisco’s nightlife, where one of the best hot spots around is Feinstein’s — the hotel’s intimate 140-seat, cabaret-style nightclub. Dress to impress in your contemporary suite, then head downstairs for an evening of acclaimed live music acts, covering jazz, pop, and Broadway.

QNCHP.name: Hotel Palafitte
QNCHP.description: Hotel Palafitte is an architectural masterpiece that offers an uncommon experience — most of its bright, light-filled private suites, known as pavilions, stand on stilts in Lake Neuchâtel, affording stunning views of the Alps, the water below, and beyond. Ambiance is everything. This unique boutique hotel is warm and inviting any time of the year, surrounded by blue water, picturesque mountains, and glorious silence for tranquility in a spectacular location. - A TripAdvisor Travelers’ Choice award winner for 2020 - Pick one of 24 Lake Pavilions — Europe’s only five-star guestrooms on stilts — or opt for one of 14 Shore Pavilions, with breathtaking views - The hotel is a joint project between architect Kurt Hoffmann and students from the famous hotel school, l’Ecole Hôtelière de Lausanne - Dine overlooking the lake on the restaurant terrace, with cuisine created by Chef Maxime Pot - Sail on the lake, go hiking, schedule a winery tour, or explore nearby Neuchâtel - Hold your next wedding, business meeting, or seminar here for beautiful venues and five-star service - Cozy up by the lobby fireplace, chic bar, or smoking room in the common area — or take in the views from the seasonal lake-view terrace - Sustainability at Hotel Palafitte, where luxury meets purpose—our EarthCheck Certified commitment ensures your stay in our iconic lakefront pavilions is both indulgent and environmentally responsible, with real-time tracking of energy, water, and carbon impact for a truly conscious escape. Just 20 minutes from the Swiss capital, Bern, Hotel Palafitte gives you easy access to the region’s attractions. As a guest here, you are also entitled to complimentary public transport in the charming town of Neuchâtel, home to Swiss watch specialty shops, a medieval old town, and several wineries for tours and wine tastings.

LNSHR.name: Hotel Rock Lititz
LNSHR.description: Experience a hotel unlike any other amid the beautiful rolling hills of Pennsylvania’s Lancaster County. Set on the 96-acre Rock Lititz production company and campus, a hub for the live event industry, Hotel Rock Lititz incorporates elements from live rock music touring events into its unique design. The guestroom doors are made from road cases, a speaker wall decorates the reception area, and the design incorporates custom wallpaper made from backstage passes. Enjoy a 24-hour fitness center, indoor pool and hot tub, customized experiences, red carpet service, and proximity to shopping, dining, yoga, a bouldering wall, and brewery tastings. - Make yourself at home — the 139 guestrooms and suites are 25% larger than typical hotel rooms - The hotel’s 92,000-square-foot property includes a rehearsal facility for artists and welcomes travelers as well as creative clients for production and technical rehearsals - Swim in the indoor pool, relax in the hot tub, and work out in the 24-hour fitness center - Savor farm-fresh food and creative cocktails at Per Diem, the on-site restaurant and bar - Play pool in the lobby or grab a day pass to nearby recROC to climb the bouldering wall - Hold your next meeting, wedding, or event here, with 3,000 square feet of flexible space - The hotel’s ideal location, surrounded by farmland, is just minutes from Lititz for both serenity and convenience Hotel Rock Lititz is in the heart of Lancaster County, Pennsylvania's Amish Country, with picturesque farmland, covered bridges, scenic hiking and biking trails, delicious dining options and microbreweries, and horse and buggies sharing the roads with cars. Lititz itself is the epitome of small-town America, with charming shops and cafés, historic architecture, tree-lined streets, and friendly locals. The more urban, historic city of Lancaster is just 13 miles away.

DARSC.name: Hotel Sea Cliff
DARSC.description: Set among majestic gardens hugging the Indian Ocean, Hotel Sea Cliff offers one of the most dramatic settings in Dar es Salaam. The hotel’s tropical lobby and the staff’s warm greetings instantly put you in vacation mode, and that first glimpse of the oceanfront pool only welcomes you further. A stay in one of the hotel’s 93 spacious and stylish guestrooms and suites makes for an escape of world-class hospitality and charming comforts. Jaw-dropping views and one of the best seafood restaurants in town means you are happily mingling alongside many repeat guests. - Dine at the hotel’s two-story restaurant overlooking the Indian Ocean - Breath in the fresh, salty sea air from your poolside sun lounger - Work out in the gym with extra motivation, thanks to ocean-facing cardio machines - Enjoy enviable floor-to-ceiling views from the members-only cocktail bar - Satisfy your gaming itch at Sea Cliff Casino, featuring 140 slots and 16 table games Hotel Sea Cliff prides itself on world-class hospitality, with each guest greeted by a cheery “Karibu.” Feel cozy, welcomed, and right at home with the hotel’s calm and convivial atmosphere, with staff wishing you well as you head out to explore the lively city’s most popular attractions.

FLRVS.name: Hotel Ville sull'Arno
FLRVS.description: Once a place of heated intellectual debate, Hotel Ville sull'Arno served as a historic, 15th-century country residence for high nobility and a 19th-century home for revolutionary painters before it was renovated and converted into a luxury hotel. The refined villa now boasts a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Stay in one of three different spaces at the hotel, each with its own unique character and style, to enjoy exceptional Italian dining, a rejuvenating wellness center, a stunning garden surrounding an outdoor swimming pool, an English-style bar, and enchanting views of the Arno River. Highlights of the hotel include: - 45 unique guestrooms and suites spread out across three different spaces - All-day dining that celebrates the historic ingredients and traditions of Florence - An enchanting spa offering treatments and rituals, a jetted pool, bio-sauna, and more - A bar with furnishings from London and a Victorian counter overlooking the garden pool - Amenities from an outdoor pool, well-equipped gym, and bicycle rentals to cooking lessons

MEXHC.name: HS HOTSSON Hotel CDMX Condesa Sur
MEXHC.description: Occupying a central spot with easy access to charming neighborhoods and Mexico City’s main business district, HS HOTSSON Hotel CDMX Condesa Sur offers visitors to the southern half of the city the perfect place to rest, relax, and explore. Highlights of the hotel include: - All-suite accommodation with kitchenettes and minimalist décor - Two restaurants serving international and Mexican cuisine - A prime location just minutes from some of the city’s buzziest neighborhoods - Public transit less than a 10-minute walk away, giving guests full access to the city

BJXHI.name: HS HOTSSON Hotel Irapuato
BJXHI.address_raw: Av P de la Solidaridad, Irapuato
BJXHI.description: HS HOTSSON Hotel Irapuato offers a combination of sleekly designed rooms and world-class amenities; whether you are in town for business or pleasure, your stay here is guaranteed to impress. Conveniently located near Irapuato’s commercial area with easy access to the highway, the hotel is a popular spot for meetings, with elegant spaces for hosting. Grab a hot cup of coffee from the café to fuel your morning. Enjoy à la carte fare 24/7 at Los Vitrales restaurant. Unwind by swimming a few lengths of the outdoor pool or indulging in a spa treatment. - 143 modern, inviting guestrooms feature premium linens and generous workspaces - Catch the big game on giant screens at the family-friendly Game On / Sport Bar - Work out at the fitness center or unwind with spa services — try a rejuvenating massage - Sit down to regional Mexican fare any time; Los Vitrales Restaurant is open 24/7 - Explore nearby Irapuato, famous for its strawberries and tequila - Collaborate with colleagues or clients in the hotel’s elegant stylish spaces, or enjoy a productive hour at your guestroom’s large workspace - Work out at the fitness center, and then relax in the hot tub

BJXHS.name: HS HOTSSON Hotel Leon
BJXHS.description: Arrive at the AAA Four Diamond HS HOTSSON Hotel Leon, for an upscale stay that combines modern refinement with Mexican authenticity. The grand lobby sets the tone with a dramatic atrium with lush greenery, tropical palms, and balconies along each wall reaching the high ceiling. The elegant guestrooms and suites provide a welcome retreat from busy days, and upscale amenities are sure to please, from an outdoor heated pool and tennis courts to premiere conference facilities. It is an ideal place for work or leisure in the heart of León. - 211 guestrooms and suites combine authentic Mexican flair with contemporary luxury - Choose from a wide selection of elegant event spaces for your next event or meeting - Sample Mexican or international cuisine at Restaurant Los Vitrales, open 24/7 - Work out at the fitness center, and take a dip in the outdoor heated pool and spa - Play tennis with complimentary use of equipment during the day - Enjoy the hotel’s prime location near premiere shopping and restaurants - Enjoy a drink, watch a game, and have lunch or dinner at La Estampida Sports Bar

QROHS.name: HS HOTSSON Hotel Queretaro
QROHS.address_raw: Blvd. Bernardo Quintana 8300. Col. Centro Sur, Queretaro
QROHS.description: Step into the HS HOTSSON Hotel Queretaro and experience a contemporary contrast to the colonial architecture of Queretaro. Popular with business travelers as well as vacationers, it offers stylish surroundings, a variety of meeting rooms, and a high-tech business center. Step into this luxury retreat in a tropical landscape, with 146 guestrooms and suites, plus a heated pool and modern fitness center. Fuel your days with a delicious breakfast at the Restaurant Los Vitrales and latersip a delectable cocktail from the Lobby Bar later in the evening. - Cool off in the hotel’s outdoor pool surrounded by manicured vertical gardens - Start your day working out at the state-of-the-art fitness center - Enjoy a happy hour cocktail from the Lobby Bar - Feast on a sophisticated Sunday brunch at the Restaurant Los Vitrales - Take a nearby wine and cheese tour, and explore Queretaro’s vibrant downtown district - Make the two-hour road trip to Mexico City to explore its world-famous historic center

BJXSI.name: HS HOTSSON Hotel Silao
BJXSI.description: From the moment you pull up outside the HS HOTSSON Hotel Silao, you’ll be struck by its contemporary architecture and sleek lines. Inside, discover plush, Mexican-inspired décor and impeccable service. Lounge by the chic pool or sit out on the picturesque terrace at Restaurant Los Vitrales, which serves sumptuous Mexican and international dishes. Retreat to one of the 149 stylish, modern guestrooms for inviting comfort. Whether you come for business or leisure, the hotel has services, amenities, and accommodations for you to stay in style. - Lounge in luxury by the chic pool, or take a dip in its refreshing waters - Satisfy your cravings with delicious dishes day or night with 24/7 room service - Stay on top of your workout routine at the state-of-the-art fitness center - Catch the big game and network over a chilled beer at the popular Sport Bar Game On - Complete work at the business center, or in the hotel’s dedicated meeting rooms - Hold your next corporate or social event in one of the six spacious ballrooms - Explore the nearby UNESCO World Heritage site of Guanajuato

TPAIR.name: Innisbrook Resort
TPAIR.description: Tee off on three 18-hole championship golf courses or a smaller nine-hole course at Innisbrook Resort, then retire to a luxury suite nestled in 600 acres of rolling hills. This family-friendly oasis puts countless activities at your fingertips, with six incredible pools, 10 Har-Tru tennis courts, and a huge fitness center. After an active day, reward yourself with a visit to the sauna at the Island Clubhouse or a beauty treatment at the 11,600-square-foot spa facility, then feast on prime cuts at Packard's Steakhouse and sip a late-night cocktail by the fire pits on the Osprey Patio. Highlights of the hotel include: - 280 condo-style accommodations that help guests feel right at home - Elegant steakhouse dining and a relaxed pub for breakfast or a chilled, pre-dinner beer - The Copperhead Course, home to the Valspar Championship, plus three other golf courses - Several resort swimming pools, tennis and pickleball lessons, a fitness center, and more - A rejuvenating spa with treatments incorporating everything from hot stones to juniper or sage Innisbrook Resort shares your passion for golf. Play the four pristine golf courses independently, work on your swing within a 10-acre practice facility, or book expert lessons from the Innisbrook Golf Institute, led by PGA professional instructor Dawn Mercer.

TYOKP.name: Keio Plaza Hotel Tokyo
TYOKP.description: Located in the heart of Japan’s capital, Keio Plaza Hotel Tokyo is a modern and stylish retreat that stays true to the many inspiring traditions of Japan. This is a place of historic tea ceremonies and harp music, timeless and gracious hospitality and service, and modern interpretations. With numerous dining options to choose from, a beauty salon, and fitness room, Keio Plaza Hotel Tokyo is the perfect base for your adventures through Tokyo’s culture, old and new. - Check in to one of 1,453 exceptional guestrooms and suites, all offering city views - Savor the finest Hida beef or spiny lobster at Teppan-yaki Yamanami - Take a dip in the outdoor pool, open during the warm summer months - Stay in the Japanese Tatami Suite for an authentic experience - Immerse yourself in Japanese culture with a traditional tea ceremony or learn how to wear a kimono If you are looking to experience Japanese culture at its most authentic, you need not venture any further than Keio Plaza Hotel Tokyo itself. The concierge will happily arrange a Japanese tea ceremony and a floral arrangement course — you can even try on traditional Japanese kimono bridal clothes.

HELKK.name: Klaus K Hotel
HELKK.description: Located in Bulevardi street in the center of Helsinki, Klaus K Hotel is a luxurious hotel offering the perfect combination of relaxation, fun, and a dedication to equality. Taking pride in its values of humanity, open-mindedness, and bravery, Klaus K offers guests a welcoming space for everyone. At Klaus K every guest is always welcome just as they are. Highlights of the hotel include: - 171 spacious guestrooms with some featuring private balconies - Traditional Tuscan cuisine and Italian wines at Restaurant Toscanini - Additional dining and drinks at a bar and lounge and seasonal rooftop bar - Amenities such as a full gym and meeting and event spaces In keeping with the spirit of open-mindedness that Finland has maintained through the centuries, Klaus K Hotel is proudly inclusive and caters to the LGBTQ community in a variety of ways, including special packages and membership in the We Speak Gay business community — a group of businesses dedicated to expanding inclusivity and service to LGBTQIA+ people in Finland.

KIXKT.name: Kyoto Tokyu Hotel
KIXKT.description: In Japan’s ancient imperial capital, the Kyoto Tokyu Hotel is a serene, contemporary haven perfectly placed amid the narrow streets that shelter Kyoto’s temples, gardens, and shrines. With a gleaming lobby, grand open-plan public spaces, discreet courtyards, and relaxing water features, the hotel has a simple but exquisite aesthetic. Dining options will take you on a culinary journey around Asia, while balmy nights on the floating terrace create memorable contemplative moments. - 408 nature-inspired guestrooms have green tea sets and yukata nightwear - Retire to the serene floating terrace for an evening cocktail - Begin your day at the fitness center for a workout - Take your pick from six sophisticated banquet halls for receptions or business meetings - Try sublime traditional Kyoto-style dishes at Tankuma Kitamise restaurant - Tranquil courtyards and bubbling water features create a peaceful ambiance

BCNLH.name: Lamaro Hotel
BCNLH.description: Built amid the foundations of ancient Roman city walls and towers and the grand Cathedral of Barcelona, a stay at Lamaro Hotel immerses travelers in 2,000 years of history. Designed to appeal to the modern traveler, the reimagined hotel is now a quiet refuge, offering a place to rest and unwind in the heart of the city’s Gothic Quarter. From stunning guestrooms wrapped in comfort to a restaurant serving “root cuisine” inspired by Catalan heritage and a rooftop bar offering views of the cathedral’s medieval spires, you’re sure to embrace moments of leisure throughout your stay – with the opportunity to step out into the pulsating city whenever you wish. Highlights of the hotel include: - 125 elegant guestrooms and suites with rainfall showers, plush robes and luxury amenities - A restaurant serving tapas and grilled dishes filled with local ingredients and Catalan flavors - Rooftop space with distinct character and unparalleled views of the cathedral bell towers - Intimate live musical performances from local Spanish artists - A prime location in the heart of Barcelona’s historic Gothic Quarter

BKKLK.name: Lancaster Bangkok
BKKLK.description: Step out of the bustle of Bangkok and into the marble serenity of the palatial atrium at the five-star Lancaster Bangkok. The service here is first-class, from the welcome drink on arrival to the complimentary tuk-tuk for your journey to and from the airport link. Explore the entire floor dedicated to wellness, and relax in your elegant guestroom equipped with the latest technology. Watch chefs create authentic Asian and classic western cuisine in Siam Brasserie’s show kitchen, and unwind in the rooftop lap pool, with mesmerizing views over this enchanting city. - Indulge in some pampering on the entire floor dedicated to wellness, with Viva Jiva Spa, gym, and rooftop pool - Be dazzled by the city views from the 231 guestrooms, suites, and longer-stay apartments - Indulge in dim sum, sushi, and sashimi at Siam Brasserie, and hand-crafted cocktails at the Lancaster Bar - Host a business event in one of the nine meeting rooms or an exclusive dinner party at the glitzy Siam Ballroom - Enjoy a taste of traditional Thai transport, with the complimentary tuk-tuk from the airport link A relaxing sanctuary in the center of Thailand’s cosmopolitan capital, Lancaster Bangkok’s impressive service is matched by elegant and airy guestrooms and an impressive wellness center. Stay in a sleek, five-star haven in the vibrant Makkasan district, and enjoy the best of Thai cuisine and upscale comfort. If you are a medical tourist visiting one of the four nearby international hospitals, the hotel offers special packages tailored to your care needs.

ACALB.name: Las Brisas Acapulco
ACALB.description: Set against the lush hillside high above Acapulco Bay sits Las Brisas Acapulco, an exclusive 40-acre beachside oasis, known for being one of the most romantic hotels in the world. This resort does arrivals right, as you are greeted with an ice-cold cocktail and escorted to your private casita via a signature white and pink jeep. Then follow the flower petal path through your spacious rooms to your oceanfront patio. Float in your own private pool or a shared one, take in the sunset over Acapulco Bay from any one of the five eateries and bars, or stretch out in a poolside cabana before heading out to see the famous La Quebrada cliff divers. - Settle into true privacy at one of the 251 casitas built into the hillside - Dive into one of the two saltwater pools overlooking Acapulco Bay - Treat your muscles to a massage in your room or at the ESPA spa - Rent a signature pink and white jeep for excursions along the hillside - Charter the hotel’s luxury catamaran to watch the La Quebrada cliff divers - Take a shuttle to private La Concha Beach Club for cocktails on the sand This unique resort is all about seclusion and exclusivity, from its hillside location to its exquisitely appointed casitas and suites. Feel like a VIP as you are chauffeured to your casita or suite in your very own pink and white jeep or when you are brought a poolside cocktail at the exclusive La Concha Beach Club.

HUXLB.name: Las Brisas Huatulco
HUXLB.description: With four exclusive white-sand beaches and its own coral reef, Las Brisas Huatulco is a tropical, all-inclusive paradise on a lush Pacific coast peninsula in the state of Oaxaca. Set on 50 acres of natural landscape, enjoy the best of both worlds, with wide ocean views to one side and a hilly panorama to the other. Sink into your plush bed and luxuriate in the peace of your spacious guestroom or suite, or dive straight into the abundance of activities – from a fully equipped gym and three pools, including an adults-only space, to snorkeling, kayaking, and sailing. Highlights of the hotel include: - 494 hillside guestrooms and suites offering stunning views of the ocean or exotic vegetation - Seven restaurants and four bars with diverse options - Amenities include sports courts, yoga classes, a fitness center, comedy nights, and more - Four exclusive beaches with thatched palapas and a children’s club - Eco tours that teach guests about Mexico’s local marine life Each of the hotel’s four towns – Mountains, Stars, Clouds, and Ocean – has lush grounds that create the feeling that you’re in your own private sanctuary. Whether you want to relax or get involved with daily activities, your options are endless.

ZIHLB.name: Las Brisas Ixtapa
ZIHLB.description: Las Brisas Ixtapa is a tropical beach-side paradise on the Pacific Coast where your happiness is their top priority. Designed by award-winning architect Ricardo Legoretta, the resort stands out in bold terracotta against the stunning backdrop of the Sierra Madre del Sur Mountains. This striking hotel meets the warm sands of one of Mexico’s most beautiful beaches — where you can bask in the tropical sun shaded by a palapa. Relax in a hammock on your own ocean-view terrace and spot rare species of birds, or join the turtle release party by the shore. - Awarded a TripAdvisor Certificate of Excellence - Rest your head on the soft, pillow-top bed found in each of the 416 guestrooms - Play tennis on the courts or dive into one of the four outdoor pools - Taste flavors from around the globe in one of the six restaurants - Sip a cocktail on the private beach or in the VIP lounge - Watch the sunset over the ocean from the hammock on your private terrace Check into an exclusive Brisas Beach Club Room, in the adults-only section of the hotel on the upper floors. A room at the top gives you breathtaking views across the Pacific, as well as access to the Sunset Lounge and a tranquil pool just for the grown-ups.

MIDBM.name: Las Brisas Merida
MIDBM.description: Nature is a main highlight at this Mexican resort, where thriving gardens, trickling fountains, and a central courtyard help bring guests together with beautiful scenery. Enjoy views of the lush greenery from your accommodations at the all-suite hotel. While in Merida, guests can savor creative seasonal dishes at the main restaurant, grab a cocktail while cooling off in the water at the swim-up bar, sip a glass of wine on the rooftop during sunset, or squeeze in a workout at the on-site gym. Venture out to explore the best of the region’s history and culture with local tours. Highlights of the hotel include: - 50 modern suites that inspire moments of relaxation and awaken the senses - Signature restaurant serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner featuring local ingredients - Refreshing rooftop swimming pool with a pool bar helmed by expert mixologists - A well-equipped fitness center with a view to keep guests active during their stay - Tours of nearby attractions, including sites within Merida as well as beyond

ZLOLH.name: Las Hadas by Brisas
ZLOLH.description: Nestled into the lush hills of Manzanillo in a calm bay on Mexico’s west coast, Las Hadas by Brisas is a heavenly beach hotel with one of the most captivating settings in the country. Lounge on the private stretch of golden sand and snorkel in crystal-clear water. Tee up on the beautiful 18-hole golf course, indulge in a spa treatment, and take in the view of the marina filled with yachts. Stroll through the winding paths of the landscaped gardens to dinner with a view at the hotel’s AAA Three Diamond Award-winning restaurant, and charter a deep-sea fishing boat. - This luxury resort with stunning Arabian architecture has 232 guestrooms and suites with white marble floors and private terraces — some have private plunge pools - Dine and toast to good times at the hotel’s three restaurants and three bars - Learn how to dive at the on-site P.A.D.I. school - Swim in the expansive outdoor pool, or at the exclusive adults-only pool - Have fun with water sports such as snorkeling, kayaking, and pedal boating - Kids 4–12 will love Club Angelitos, a children’s club with activities, crafts, and games - Witness the 'green flash' — a spellbinding natural light phenomenon from your private terrace Ranked among the 100 best golf resorts in the world, Las Hadas by Brisas is ideal for golf aficionados. Once you’ve mastered the course’s legendary serpentine river, there are 15 acres of gardens and a private beach and marina to discover, too.

CPTTC.name: Last Word Constantia
CPTTC.description: With just seven suites and guestrooms, this boutique gem is a graceful and leafy haven nestled within the oldest wine valley in South Africa. Situated between Cape Town and rolling vineyards, it is the perfect pastoral escape within close proximity to the city. Sample local wine around the solar-heated pool, surrounded by lush gardens, or bask in the morning sunshine on your private patio. Breakfast is served in the light-flooded conservatory; enjoy a picnic lunch in the garden; and make a dinner reservation at one of Cape Town’s many award-winning restaurants. - Winner of TripAdvisor’s Certificate of Excellence - Seven pastel-hued guestrooms and suites have private patios or pools - Boutique size provides a private and exclusive feel - Take a refreshing dip in the solar-heated pool - Relax with in-room spa treatments - Explore Cape Town with insider tips from the travel planning team - Sip and swirl local varietals in an excursion to the oldest wine region in South Africa From Last Word Constantia, much of what to see and do in Cape Town is within easy reach. Plan ahead to book a table at the famous Test Kitchen, one of the best restaurants in South Africa. Admire the blooming flowers in the Kirstenbosch Gardens, an access point to hiking trails that ascend Table Mountain. Catch some rays at popular Clifton Fourth Beach, go stand-up paddle boarding at Bloubergstrand, and watch the African penguins putter around on Boulders Beach.

CPTTF.name: Last Word Franschhoek
CPTTF.description: An intimate, five-star hotel of just 10 guestrooms and suites in the heart of the Cape Winelands, Last Word Franschhoek is tucked away amid craggy mountains and rolling vineyards. Neighboring some of the country’s best wine farms, the pretty town of Franschhoek, known for its Cape Dutch architecture, is also one of the epicurean capitals of South Africa, with fine-dining restaurants a stone’s throw from your suite. Start with breakfast in bed and after a day in the Winelands, return to the hotel’s bougainvillea-filled gardens for some downtime by the pool or an in-suite hot stone massage. - A World Travel Awards finalist for South Africa’s Leading Boutique Hotel - Outdoor spaces of the eight guestrooms and two pool suites are a pleasant way to enjoy the Western Cape’s pastoral landscapes - Start the day with breakfast in bed; Eggs Benedict, orange juice, and coffee can be delivered directly to your room - All beverages, including wine and premium spirits, are inclusive of your stay - Lounge in wicker furniture by a serene pool - Tour the area’s wineries in style, courtesy of the in-house chauffeur service The Last Word Franschhoek’s location is its premier advantage. A former French Huguenot village, Franschhoek is famed for its historic charm and superb dining options. Try the pork belly with fynbos honey at Reuben’s — which turns out creative cuisine with global twists - and the Mexican-inspired shared plates at Tuk Tuk Microbrewery, along with a frosty craft brew. Many eateries are within a short walking distance of the hotel, while the region’s wineries are just a chauffeur-driven ride away.

MQPLW.name: Last Word Kitara
MQPLW.description: This ultra-exclusive, ultra-secluded boutique hotel is set on the savanna of South Africa's Greater Kruger National Park. An oasis of green against the rugged and wild bushveld of Klaserie Private Nature Reserve, Last Word Kitara's luxurious lodge and camp is at the center of South Africa's safari country — a place where elephants roam, leopards lounge, and lions roar. - Set out on safari to spot Africa's Big Five: Lions, leopards, elephants, rhinoceros, and buffalo - Dine on three-course dinners from decks overlooking the Klaserie river - Soak in savanna views from the resort's infinity-edge pool And because 'Kitara' is the word for a traditional guitar in the local Xitsonga language, you'll also experience authentic African tribal arts and culture through song, dance, and ceremony. Enjoy an unforgettable evening under the South African stars and sample authentic local cuisine during dinner in a boma, a traditional African enclosure originally intended to keep animals in (or out) and now serves as a center for eating and entertainment.

CPTTL.name: Last Word Long Beach
CPTTL.description: Recognized in 2020 as #7 among ‘Top 30 Hotels in Africa’ by Condé Nast Traveler Readers' Choice Awards, this boutique charmer is set on an expanse of white-sand beach in the Cape Town suburb of Kommetjie. With terraces that face the white-capped waters, a pale blue and green color scheme, and a location right on the sandy shores of Long Beach, Last Word is the perfect place to relax and connect with nature. Sip fine South African wine by the pool and delight in chef-prepared meals on your breezy balcony. The hotel’s courteous and attentive service only makes your stay more exquisite. - Six guestrooms and suites overlook the Atlantic Ocean - Breakfast, beverages, and snacks are inclusive of your stay - Dine on made-to-order meals on your private ocean-view patio - Enjoy chilled South African wine around the pool - Wander down the length of Long Beach and watch surfers ride the waves - Decompress with a full-body massage in the privacy of your suite On the scenic Cape Peninsula, Last Word Long Beach is within easy driving distance of the False Bay penguin colonies and famous Chapman’s Peak coastal drive. Here, you are approximately an hour from Cape Town, where you can explore the city’s booming culinary scene and provocative museums such as the Zeitz Museum of Contemporary African Art and District Six.

JNBLW.name: Last Word Madikwe
JNBLW.description: Experience the wonder of South Africa’s iconic wildlife at Last Word Madikwe, a luxurious safari lodge set just steps from a watering hole teeming with an impressive array of wildlife such as elephants, lions, leopards, buffalo, and white and black rhinoceroses. Other highlights of this stunning destination include: - Six guest suites featuring ensuite baths and traditional South African décor - A unique underground wildlife watching and photography blind near the watering hole - Twice-daily game drives, a fenced nature trail, and relaxing spots with water hole views - Three daily meals of traditional South African cuisine, plus snacks, sundowners, and more For wildlife lovers, photographers, adventurers, and anyone seeking an immersive safari experience, Last Word Madikwe offers the thrill and excitement of a spectacular location within a thriving game reserve paired with contemporary amenities, warm hospitality, and thoughtful luxuries of a world-class hotel.

PARBC.name: Le Belmont Paris
PARBC.description: Located in a traditionally upper-crust neighborhood studded with high-end boutiques and fashion houses, the four-star Le Belmont Paris has the ‎Champs-Élysées, Arc de Triomphe, Avenue George V, and Avenue Montaigne on its doorstep. After a day exploring Paris' most iconic sites, enjoy the hotel's luxurious and peaceful settings: unwind in the hotel’s spa or sip a bespoke cocktail, a glass of Champagne, or French Grand Cru Wine at The Bar before retiring to your room. - Stay in an extraordinary location with iconic Haussmann-style architecture and luxury shopping experiences within easy walking distance - Indulge in a room or suite inspired by the romanticism of the Napoleonic era with an artistic interpretation of the Opera Garnier curtain as a headboard - Relax with a treatment in the spacious Spa Carita Decléor and enjoy all the benefits of an Oriental scrub after a hammam session or unwind in the tea room - Work out in the hotel's light-flooded fitness room under a glass roof - Upgrade to the Imperial Suite and look out across the typical Parisian buildings and rooftops from your own private terrace Taking inspiration from the grandeur of French palaces, award-winning designer Alexandre Danan tastefully refurbished the 19th-century Haussmann-style hotel with incredible attention to detail and a touch of Orientalism. From the rich mahogany front desk and the deep leather-and-velvet armchairs to the striking fireplaces and polished wood walls, Le Belmont Paris is a symbol of the French 'Art de Vivre'.

PARLJ.name: Les Jardins du Marais
PARLJ.description: Located in the heart of the Marais, just steps from Place des Vosges, Les Jardins du Marais enjoys a privileged setting in one of Paris’s most iconic neighborhoods. Behind its elegant carriage entrance lies a vast inner courtyard: a true haven of peace, sheltered from the bustle of the city. The hotel offers beautiful guestrooms and suites spread across seven historic buildings surrounding the garden, with architecture that harmoniously blends Art Deco and contemporary design. Each morning, an American buffet breakfast is served in a warm and welcoming atmosphere, while the restaurant offers eclectic cuisine in a peaceful setting for both lunch and dinner. A wellness area with a fitness room, sauna, and relaxing treatments completes the experience at this discreet Parisian retreat. Highlights of the hotel include: - 263 Art Deco-inspired guestrooms and suites, all with kitchenettes - Savor French classics such as leek pie at the sophisticated Les Jardins du Marais restaurant - Indulge in PAYOT face and body treatments in the vaulted basement spa - Stay in the heart of Le Marais, one of Paris’s most historic and charming neighborhoods - Dine and relax in an enchanting private courtyard garden, one of the largest in Paris - Watch your favorite movie in an eight-person cinema with deep double armchairs Les Jardins du Marais’ gardens are an oasis of natural beauty among the busy streets of the city’s medieval quarter. Gazebos create space to hide away, mature trees and wrought iron canopies provide shade, and lavender and herbs perfume the air. It is the perfect escape, whether for a relaxed morning coffee or an intimate evening meal.

MYDLS.name: Lion in the Sun Boutique Hotel & Spa
MYDLS.description: Slow down and reconnect with nature amid majestic landscapes at this intimate Kenyan hotel. Nestled along Africa’s eastern coastline, Lion in the Sun Boutique Hotel & Spa offers a timeless escape characterized by elegant colonial-era architecture, natural materials, and distinctly African artistry. With only 16 accommodations, every stay has an air of exclusivity as well, pairing chic guestrooms and suites with a private beach, spa sanctuary, saltwater swimming pools, and dining that offers a sense of place. Aside from peaceful moments near the sea, guests can embark on an array of thrilling experiences to create an African adventure to remember. Highlights of the hotel include: - 16 guestrooms and suites encouraging connection to culture, nature, and rhythms of the ocean - A restaurant serving African, Mediterranean, and global cuisines, plus a seasonal beachside grill - Spa sanctuary offering thalassotherapy treatments, massages, skin care rituals, and more - Activities ranging from gym sessions, tennis, and padel to pool swimming and yoga classes - Unparalleled experiences, including boat cruises, wildlife safaris, guided hikes, and ruin visits

CUNLA.name: Live Aqua Cancun All Inclusive Adults Only
CUNLA.description: Live Aqua Beach Resort Cancun is a relaxed luxury resort designed for modern adults who seek to awaken the senses. Its modern architectural designs become the canvas for Mexico’s finest experiences. Exquisite restaurants, stylish guestrooms, refreshing infinity pools, contemporary art, and authentic elements meet harmoniously to create an exclusive getaway of the Mexican Caribbean. - Feel the warm sea breeze through the open windows in one of the 371 guestrooms and suites - Dive into one of the adults-only hotel’s seven heated swimming pools - Host a conference or a wedding in dynamic and colorful meeting spaces - Unwind in the tranquil shade of a palapa on the private beach - Pamper your senses with sprinkler hydro-reflexology at Feel Harmony Spa by Live Aqua With the visual delight of its architecture and views of the Mexican Caribbean ocean, the signature aromatherapy collection gives off hints of scents like eucalyptus and citrus, evoking different moods as you move to different areas in the resort. All around the resort, you'll discover music, flavors, and turquoise colors.

CMBMB.name: Marino Beach Colombo
CMBMB.description: Masterfully combining contemporary design with luxurious hospitality, Marino Beach, Colombo welcomes travelers to Sri Lanka’s capital city with a modern, bright, and amenity-rich oceanside escape. Featuring sea views, a rooftop pool and garden, bars and restaurants, and an ideal location, this hotel is perfect for both vacationers and business travelers alike. Other highlights of the hotel include: - 289 rooms offering natural light, clean, contemporary design, and private balconies - A zero-edge, rooftop infinity pool with terrace and garden offering panoramic ocean views - Six restaurants and bars serving a variety of international cuisines and cocktails - The on-site Spa at Marino, offers body and face treatments in a soothing atmosphere One final benefit that a stay with Marino Beach, Colombo offers is an included city tour for all guests, providing a truly immersive coastal Sri Lankan experience from check-in to check-out.

MIAMA.name: Mayfair House Hotel & Garden
MIAMA.description: Escape to Mayfair House Hotel & Garden, a lush Eden nestled in the heart of Miami’s Coconut Grove neighborhood. Refreshingly eclectic and rooted in the arts, this tropical retreat offers enduring design paired with elegance and pure comfort. Elevated guestrooms and suites offer a cozy respite from the bustle of the city while in-room spa treatments add to the hotel’s tranquility. Relax by the rooftop pool, enjoy grilled dishes at the signature restaurant, and take charge with activities like yoga and bicycling. Within walking distance from the city’s Biscayne Bay waterfront, this is also the ideal base for exploring Miami. Highlights of the hotel include: - 179 guestrooms and suites with private terraces, including some with outdoor shower - An all-day restaurant that celebrates the spirit of Miami with open-flame grilling - Refreshing rooftop pool deck with umbrellas, lounge chairs, and a rum bar with tropical drinks - Soothing in-room massages and facials from a local on-demand wellness provider - Amenities ranging from Moke and bicycle rentals to yoga, meditation, and a fitness center Designed by renowned architect Kenneth Treister, Mayfair House Hotel & Garden embraces creativity with lavish ornamentation and Spanish-style inspiration.

MILMV.name: Milano Verticale UNA Esperienze
MILMV.description: Enter the ultimate hub for contemporary Milanese design and dining at the Milano Verticale UNA Esperienze. Be enthralled by every detail during your stay whether you lounge in your guestroom or suite on the elegant V-Floors or order from a Michelin-starred menu. With a sophisticated business center and easy access to downtown, as well as historic highlights, travelers of all stripes will love this elevated destination. - Choose one of 173 contemporary guestrooms and suites spread across 12 floors - Dine at the Michelin star restaurant or grab a drink in the quiet garden tavern - Unwind with a spa treatment or a session at the gym Embrace modern fineries and warm Italian hospitality all within this hotel’s exceptional central Milan location.

NYCMS.name: ModernHaus SoHo
NYCMS.description: Inspired by the original artistic heritage of Manhattan’s SoHo neighborhood, ModernHaus SoHo connects guests with the New York City art, society, and tech scene through its contemporary and forward-looking atmosphere underscored by curated art, culinary, and social programs -- all just steps away from the city’s best sights and attractions. While at ModernHaus SoHo, guests can: Sleep in sleek, light-filled rooms with unbelievably expansive city and skyline views Enjoy an evening of dinner and drinks in a glamorous retractable greenhouse at Veranda Enjoy a swim at the pool, indulge in an in-room massage, or have a drink at the 18th-floor sky bar Host a business meeting, wedding, or celebratory event at the Signature Room at Veranda Influenced by the clean lines, geometric emphasis, and large windows of the Bauhaus art movement from the beginning of the 20th century, this SoHo hotel offers a soothing design aesthetic, perfect for winding down amid the Big Apple’s high energy.

IBZMI.name: Mongibello Ibiza
IBZMI.description: Spend sunny days in Ibiza relaxing by the pool with a cocktail or lounging on the sand listening to the sound of waves crashing. Mongibello Ibiza, a luxurious seasonal hotel on the Spanish island’s eastern coastline, blends chic interiors with the retro spirit that echoes throughout Ibiza. Find comfort in Mediterranean-style guestrooms and suites, inspired by the “dolce vita” – or sweet life – found along the Amalfi Coast circa the 1960s, and enjoy Italian cuisine at the signature restaurant. Elsewhere, exercise in the contemporary gym, enjoy a lineup of on-site activities, or venture out to explore the fortified hilltop citadel of Dalt Vila and the island’s stunning natural landscapes. Highlights of the hotel include: - 168 guestrooms and suites inspired by the Italian coastline with touches of Ibiza intertwined - Traditional Italian cuisine crafted with the freshness and flavors of the Mediterranean - A refreshing, blue-and-white-tiled resort swimming pool surrounded by loungers and umbrellas - Warm, inviting fitness center with state-of-the-art equipment overlooking the hotel gardens - A partnership with nearby Golf Ibiza, offering the chance to play on both 9- and 18-hole courses

MCMMC.name: Monte-Carlo Bay Hotel & Resort
MCMMC.description: At Monaco’s eastern tip, Monte-Carlo Bay Hotel & Resort offers everything you need for a memorable stay, whether for leisure or business. Life at the resort is all about refined relaxation. Enjoy elevated Caribbean and Mediterranean-influenced dishes on the terrace at an award-winning restaurant and choose from accommodations offering views overlooking the Mediterranean Sea or the French Riviera’s mountain backdrop. Take a stroll around the sprawling grounds designed by legendary Mediterranean landscape gardener Jean Mus. Highlights of the hotel include: - 334 guestrooms and suites, many with spacious balconies offering sea views - Four restaurants serving fresh coastal fare, including a two-time Michelin-starred restaurant - Unique sand-bottom lagoon, open sea, heated swimming pools, and hot tubs for swimming - A serene yet innovative spa with personalized treatments, sauna, hammam, and more - A luxe casino offering games ranging from poker, roulette, and blackjack to slot machines - Four hectares of verdant gardens designed by Jean Mus with waterfalls and solariums

STONL.name: Nordic Light Hotel
STONL.description: Based near the heart of Stockholm in the district of Normalm, Nordic Light Hotel is where minimalist elegance meets luxurious simplicity. Step into light-filled, beautifully renovated guestrooms showcasing classic Scandinavian décor and Nordic design, and feel immediately calmed by the tranquil ambiance. Enjoy Swedish cocktails and local cuisine at restaurant Lykke, equally serene in the atmosphere. With a 24-hour gym and a lobby that regularly plays host to a mix of cultural events, Nordic Light Hotel is an absolute pleasure to experience. - 169 elegantly appointed guestrooms and suites showcase chic Scandinavian design - Benefit from a great location — the hotel is close to Stockholm's Old Town and other major tourist attractions - Savor Nordic cuisine with a twist, delicious Swedish cocktails, and refined local craft beer at Lykke - Impress by holding your next meeting or event here in one of 15 Light Meetings conference rooms with innovative lighting designed to set a mood In an unbeatable location near the Old Town, and in Stockholm’s commercial heart, Nordic Light Hotel is the perfect place to explore the city. Head out and discover Stockholm's best bits, from its fascinating history to its exciting dining scene.

BILNH.name: Northern Hotel
BILNH.description: In the heart of downtown Billings, the Northern Hotel has been welcoming guests since 1904. Restored to its former glory by award-winning designer Mitch Thompson, the hotel combines elegance with playful Western touches. Sink into a cowhide armchair next to the fireplace in the lobby adorned with vases of fresh flowers. Retreat to your charming guestroom and slip into a plush bed, triple sheets, and piles of pillows. Work out at the fitness center, dine at two restaurants, and sip your favorite drink at the lounge. It’s historic luxury at its best. Choose from one of 160 lavishly appointed guestrooms, including 47 suites, and snooze soundly on a Serta Elite 1000 Plush mattress. - Treat yourself to a milkshake at Bernie’s Diner, with its soda fountain and cozy couches - Enjoy dinner and drinks at Ten restaurant and lounge, serving libations and American dishes using fresh, locally sourced produce - Go shopping in Billings, or hiking in the wilderness of Custer Gallatin National Forest - Get work done at the business center or hold your next meeting or event here - Shop for locally-made goods and gifts at the on-site gift shop After a redesign by award-winning Mitch Thompson, the Northern Hotel has retained its Western charm and has second-to-none amenities and services. You will be staying in an area steeped in history — the land of Sitting Bull and General Custer — and close to the vast wilderness of Montana, its vast blue skies, and its two national parks.

MADOD.name: Ocean Drive Madrid
MADOD.description: Capturing the lively spirit of the surrounding neighborhood, Ocean Drive Madrid is calm, chic, and in one of the city’s most immersive locations. Designed with simple, sleek architectural elements meant to resemble the Mediterranean, this hotel boasts relaxed yet vibrant spaces that encourage gathering, connection, and tranquility all at once. Dine on fresh fare, unwind by the pool with views of Madrid, tackle your workday in a shared space, enjoy a lineup of special events, or explore the city before retreating to bright, effortless guestrooms for a good night’s rest. Highlights of the hotel include: - 72 sleek guestrooms with luxe amenities like a vinyl record player or beer dispenser - Mediterranean-inspired dining crafted with fresh ingredients in a chic urban setting - A rooftop terrace with a seasonal swimming pool, solarium, and bar offering stunning views - Co-working space near a garden terrace, combining productivity with much-needed tranquility - Activities including yoga, art viewing, painting classes, and tastings of wine, beer, and cheese

IBZOT.name: Ocean Drive Talamanca
IBZOT.description: Ocean Drive Talamanca is a stylish boutique hotel located on the serene shores of Talamanca Bay on the Spanish island of Ibiza. Known for its modern design and relaxed luxury, the property offers panoramic views of the Mediterranean Sea and Ibiza’s historic Dalt Vila. Guests can unwind in spacious guestrooms with contemporary décor, lounge by one of four swimming pools (including one on a rooftop terrace with a bar nearby), and vibrant dining options that blend local flavors with international cuisine. Just minutes from Ibiza Town and the island’s famous nightlife, Ocean Drive Talamanca provides the perfect balance of relaxation and sophistication for travelers seeking an upscale escape. Highlights of the hotel include: - 117 stylish guestrooms and suites, with most designed to face the sea - A restaurant serving artfully plated Mediterranean dishes with Asian fusion influence - Wellness experiences ranging from body treatments and massages to yoga and a gym - Seasonal rooftop sundeck with a swimming pool, sky bar, and views of Talamanca Bay - Wide range of water sports, including paddleboarding, snorkeling, fishing, and sailing - A tantalizing nightclub inspired by the 1960s and ’70s, available to host private parties

EYWOE.name: Oceans Edge Resort & Marina Key West
EYWOE.description: Located directly on the Atlantic Ocean amid beautiful tropical gardens, Oceans Edge Resort & Marina, Key West combines luxury with an authentic Key West experience. Relax or be active in this slice of paradise. Swim in six pools. Fish or try an array of water sports from the marina. Savor fresh seafood at the Yellowfin Bar and Grill and sip cocktails on the waterfront. Explore the local charm and vibrancy of Stock Island, “the new old Key West,” or take the resort's shuttle downtown to the famous Duval Street. - The resort's 175 guest rooms and suites all include stunning ocean views and private balconies - Lounge poolside at one of six swimming pools or choose from their endless water activities including complimentary kayaks or paddle boards - Get coffee at the café or dine at the waterside restaurant with Asian-Caribbean-inspired cuisine - Gather with friends and family for a scenic wedding on the waterfront - Work out at the fitness center or take a breezy ride on a loaner bike - Take an island-wide jet ski tour or play poolside games like life-sized Jenga and chess - Take your furry friend — the resort is pet-friendly and even has a dog park Deep water access from the onsite marina, an array of activities, a picturesque harbor walk, guestrooms and suites with ocean views, and lush tropical surroundings make this luxury waterfront resort an ideal Florida Keys destination. From fishing charters and snorkeling trips to complimentary kayaks and paddleboards, this resort is the ideal base for your amazing Key West adventures.

ISTOH.name: Opera Hotel Bosphorus
ISTOH.address_raw: Ömer Avni, İnönü Cd. No:26,, Istanbul
ISTOH.description: From couples, friends, and family to business travelers, there is something for every traveler at Opera Hotel Bosphorus. The stylish hotel, located in Istanbul, Turkey, overlooks the scenic Bosphorus Strait and the Sea of Marmara, ensuring stunning views at every turn. Rest in comfort in the elegant accommodations, discover international cuisine at one of two restaurants, pamper yourself at the on-site spa, or soak up the sun at the outdoor pool. Highlights of the hotel include: - 75 modern guestrooms and suites with luxury bedding and marble bathrooms - Distinct dining, including a relaxed global restaurant, an elegant sushi spot, and a coffee shop - A rejuvenating spa offering signature treatments, a sauna, and both steam and Turkish baths - A seasonal outdoor swimming pool and a fully equipped fitness center - Close proximity to iconic landmarks and public transportation to aid in exploration

AMSPC.name: Park Centraal Amsterdam
AMSPC.description: Explore and experience the culture and community of central Amsterdam when you book a stay at Park Centraal Amsterdam – a gorgeous hotel in a historic building just steps from museums, shops, parks, and more.
