From the moment you check in to the minute you check out, Park Centraal Amsterdam offers the epitome of Dutch hospitality. While at the hotel you can: - Sleep in deluxe rooms or suites with ultra-soft mattresses and spacious rain showers - Savor Amsterdam’s favorite Asian fusion food at MOMO restaurant - Enjoy a beer or cocktail at Bar Claes in the ground-floor lobby - Spend your days discovering the delights of the surrounding neighborhood’s corners and cafes With a prime location in the center of it all, a stay at Park Centraal Amsterdam means quick and easy access to The Van Gogh Museum, the famed Rijksmuseum, the lush and green Vondelpark, and the canal district of Jordaan.

SHAPH.name: Parkyard Hotel Shanghai
SHAPH.address_raw: 699 Bi Bo Road, Pudong Shanghai, Shanghai
SHAPH.description: Find solace in the middle of the city’s bustling business district the moment you arrive at Parkyard Hotel Shanghai. This smart and sleek hotel makes the most of its urban garden atmosphere, from a jogging trail that winds around the property to a charming outdoor café offering coffee and cake. Discover a sanctuary-like stay in contemporary accommodations featuring sleek marble bathrooms, along with access to a relaxed all-day restaurant and a fitness center with an indoor pool and spa. Between the hotel’s stylish design, impeccable service, and attention to detail, you have no concerns, except deciding what to eat and where to explore. - Enjoy views of the lush garden from each of the 300 modern guestrooms and suites - Plan the perfect event in the 12,000-sq-ft ballroom, featuring a giant LED screen - Head to the fitness center, offering a whole range of Life Fitness workout equipment - Start each day right with a breakfast buffet featuring patio dining with garden views - Swim laps in the 1,345-sq-ft indoor pool, heated year-round - Explore authentic Thai therapies and traditional massages at The Saibai Spa With an enviable location, the hotel gives you the chance to step out and immediately find yourself on exciting shopping streets, in sophisticated bars, or before some of the city’s most illustrious landmarks. At the end of each day of exploring, come home to the hotel garden to find tranquility among the bamboo. Parkyard Hotel Shanghai offers a classy retreat in the heart of an awe-inspiring city.

OPOPD.name: Pestana Douro Riverside Porto Premium Hotel
OPOPD.description: Making its home in a former soap and candle factory, Pestana Douro Riverside, Porto Premium Hotel pays homage to its heritage by naming each floor after one of the flowers used as fragrance for the soaps that were once made there. Set just outside Porto on the Douro River, the hotel offers travelers to Portugal an inspiring location with amazing amenities, great for everyone from solo travelers to groups and conferences. Highlights of the hotel include: - A rooftop bar delivering delicious drinks paired with sweeping river views - An infinity pool and a full gym for working out and relaxing while away from home - The Magic Spa with multiple treatment options and an indulgent indoor pool - A riverside location on Portugal’s northern coast, just ten minutes from Porto’s city center Guests of Pestana Douro also have access to a variety of onsite activities as well as those available for an additional charge, including cultural tours, river cruises, local food tastings, and more. Take a Virtual Tour - Pestana Douro Riverside

CORPP.name: Pinares Panorama Suites Spa & Convention Center
CORPP.description: The only resort in Argentina with a private nature reserve exclusively for its guests, Pinares Panorama Suites, Spa & Convention Center is an ideal destination to connect with nature. All of the 100 guestrooms and suites offer dazzling sunrises, sunsets, and panoramic views of Villa Carlos Paz. This stunning hotel is among an exclusive collection of hotels in Argentina awarded the highest level of green hotel certification, the Gold Level Ecolabel. - Dine in a historic 18th-century building at El Casco Restaurant & Bistro or its intimate stone terrace - Relax in spacious accommodations with a private terrace equipped with a Jacuzzi spa - Escape to an indoor heated pool with hydromassage jets or an indoor/outdoor pool, equipped with a thermal-efficient material, that can be enjoyed year-round regardless of the weather - Indulge in holistic treatments that restore balance to your body and mind at Pinares Aqua Spa & Health Club, while your youngest companions enjoy sports, crafts, and other activities at the Kids Club

MDEPP.name: Poblado Plaza Hotel
MDEPP.address_raw: Carrera 43 A No 4 Sur 75, Av., Medellin
MDEPP.description: Business travelers can relax in luxury at this Colombian hotel, set in a prime location for both corporate and leisure experiences. During your stay, take advantage of the resources offered, from a business center and shared co-working areas to meeting spaces that can accommodate groups both indoors and out. During your stay, indulge in comfort in several different guestrooms and suites, each with a desk, and savor global fare in the signature restaurant. Guests can also enjoy exclusive access to a private nearby golf club on the weekends. Highlights of the hotel include: - 84 comfortably furnished guestrooms and suites, each with a personal work desk - A restaurant serving mouthwatering local and international cuisines - Co-working spaces that encourage productivity throughout your stay - Salons, meeting rooms, and an outdoor garden area for business meetings and social gatherings

GUAPA.name: Porta Hotel Antigua
GUAPA.description: Step through upscale Porta Hotel Antigua’s charming wooden door and discover an oasis in the heart of Guatemala’s most enchanting city. Once part of a coffee plantation, the hotel's central buildings exude colonial charm, with stone pathways, carved wooden beams, and hand-woven rugs. There is an emphasis on sustainability, and the lush grounds afford spectacular views of La Antigua's three volcanoes. Relax in traditionally decorated guestrooms, enjoy attentive Guatemalan hospitality, and dine on authentic local cuisine in Los Moros Restaurant. - Named a top ten hotel in the Caribbean and Centra lAmerica in Condé Nast Traveler’s Readers’ Choice Awards in 2017 - 112 colonial-style guestrooms and suites feature wooden floors and handmade tiles; most have fireplaces, and suites have hot tubs and living rooms - Lounge by the two pools, work out at the fitness center and explore the tropical garden - Relax with a traditional temazcal sauna or a two-hour Ayurveda-inspired massage at Ceiba Spa - Hold your next gathering here, with eight meeting rooms with 14,220 sq ft / 1,321 sq m of indoor and outdoor space, including garden and patio areas - Discover La Antigua's cobbled avenues, colonial architecture, and vibrant markets with tips from expert concierges Ceiba Spa is the therapeutic sanctuary of Porta Hotel Antigua, where treatments range from Swedish anti-stress massages to sacred rituals using Mayan numerology and aromatic spices. Combine these with a visit to the sauna, fitness center, tropical garden with exotic birds, and relaxation area for a perfect retreat at the end of a day out in historic La Antigua, or from a visit to the Santa Catalina Arch, a 17th-century landmark just a 10-minute walk from the hotel.

LASRR.name: Red Rock Casino Resort Spa
LASRR.description: An enticing retreat close to the glitz and glamor of the world-famous Las Vegas Strip, the AAA Four Diamond-rated Red Rock Casino Resort Spa is next to the natural wonder of Red Rock Canyon. Designed with a nod to mid-century modern, the hotel is in the cool, classic style evoking the Rat Pack era of 1950s Vegas. Relax in 19 acres of space featuring pools with swim-up gaming tables and a waterfall island. Sip cocktails in your cabana or catch a sunset movie. Join one of the popular Silent Savasana yoga classes, or soak up some pampering at the spa and enjoy vast vistas over the Canyon from your spacious guestroom or suite. - Winner of a AAA Four Diamond Award and named one of the best new hotels by Condé Nast Traveler - Book a suite overlooking the stunning Red Rock Canyon and admire the sublime sunsets - Catch a live rock, country, blues, or jazz concert at the hotel’s amphitheater - Dine in one of the hotel’s award-winning restaurants, including the Italian Masso Osteria run by top chef and author Scott Conant - Organize a business conference in one of the four ballrooms or 10 breakout rooms - Learn how to play poker, blackjack, or craps with the help of an expert card player Experience the other side of Vegas at this resort, which combines the vibrancy of the Strip with desert oasis serenity. Luxuriate in the huge guestrooms and suites and try your luck at the hotel’s vast casino, which includes 2,700 of the latest slot machines and games. When the mood for adventure strikes you, the trails of the beautiful Red Rock Canyon await.

ORLRH.name: Rosen Centre Hotel
ORLRH.description: The multi-award-winning Rosen Centre Hotel spans 24 stories of beautiful accommodations and top-class facilities. Connected to the Orange County Convention Center and a short distance from the top attractions and theme parks of the Orlando area, this huge hotel is equally suited for business or pleasure. Dine on-site with a different cuisine choice each day, make the most of the Florida sunshine by the large, resort-style pool, or host an outstanding event in one of 35 meeting rooms. - A total of 1,334 guestrooms and suites span 24 stories at this resort-style hotel - Voted one of the U.S.’s 75 best meeting hotels, with 150,000 sq ft of meeting space, including three ballrooms - Upgrade to VIP Level for access to a concierge lounge and two floors of VIP rooms - Indulge in a massage, a facial, or a beauty treatment in the full-service Spa at Rosen Centre and work out at the 24-hour gym - Choose from Caribbean or Floridian cuisine, sushi, New York deli delights, and more The Rosen Centre Hotel sets an exceptionally high standard when it comes to services, from the valet parking to the helpful concierge team, the top chefs serving multinational cuisine, and the world-class meeting facilities.

ORLRZ.name: Rosen Plaza Hotel
ORLRZ.description: Rosen Plaza Hotel is on International Drive, right in the midst of the action near Orlando's major attractions and directly connected to the Orange County Convention Center via a covered walkway. Just a few miles from Florida's thrilling theme parks and in a prime setting for business events, Rosen Plaza Hotel complements a winning location with a luxurious retreat from the surrounding buzz. Bright, refined guestrooms provide a relaxing ambiance, and the tropical swimming pool and whirlpool spa, state-of-the-art gym, chic nightclub, and more will keep you entertained. - Step away from the bustle of Orlando into one of 800 guestrooms and suites, with wide city views - Cut into a perfectly prepared steak in Jack's Place, then meet friends for drinks at '39 Poolside Bar and Grill - Work out using Life Fitness equipment and free weights in the state-of-the-art fitness center - Plan events in one of the hotel’s 22 meeting rooms or impress in the grand ballroom - Tap into the expert knowledge of the Guest Services team to make the most of your time in Florida

ORLRS.name: Rosen Shingle Creek
ORLRS.description: With more than 30 awards to its name, Rosen Shingle Creek’s reputation for delivering a preeminent hotel experience precedes itself. Located along the headwaters of the Everglades, Rosen Shingle Creek offers 225 acres of pure luxury — tee off on a championship golf course, wine and dine in one of its many acclaimed restaurants, bars, and cafés, and be pampered in the spa. With four swimming pools, a first-class fitness center, and basketball, tennis, and sand volleyball courts, each day at the AAA Four Diamond Hotel offers endless potential. - Awarded a Certificate of Excellence by TripAdvisor in 2017 - Every one of the 1,501 Spanish revival-style guestrooms overlooks the greens, swimming pools, and cypress trees - Feast on prime cuts at A Land Remembered or grab a bite to go at 18 Monroe Street Market - Enjoy a round of golf at the 18-hole championship golf course, designed by the Arnold Palmer Design Company - Unwind with a massage, facial, or sauna at the award-winning Spa at Shingle Creek Conveniently located on Universal Boulevard, Rosen Shingle Creek is close to the Orange County Convention Center and all of Orlando’s best shopping, restaurants, and entertainment venues. The city’s famous theme parks are a short drive away.

NRTRP.name: Royal Park Hotel
NRTRP.description: Tokyo is an enticing mix of ancient sites and futuristic cityscapes, and Royal Park Hotel combines modern sophistication with timeless Japanese traditions just steps from the Tokyo City Terminal (T-CAT), making arrival and departure from Tokyo airports effortless. This flawless hotel is right in the heart of the action — close to businesses headquartered in the Marunouchi district, Ginza where the world’s most famous fashion designers can be found along 5th Avenue, and Ningyocho where traditional shops and restaurants line the streets. Join the tea ceremonies at Royal Park Hotel by a tranquil garden and savor the finest Kobe steaks overlooking the dazzling city skyline while you plan your next adventure among the towers and temples of sprawling Tokyo. - Slip into the lovely yukata robe provided for you as you relax in one of 419 stylish guestrooms and suites, including the opulent Royal Suite - Upgrade to the executive levels for late check-out — depending on availability — cocktails, and daily breakfast - Reserve a spot in the Japanese Garden and Teahouse for a unique experience - Host an elegant event in one of the flexible meeting rooms with stunning city views - Spoil yourself at Japan’s only La Prairie day spa or keep active in the fitness center - Enjoy limitless access to the city and tourist attractions via Suitengūmae Station, conveniently connected to the hotel

SINRP.name: Royal Plaza on Scotts
SINRP.description: Escape to a sophisticated, modern retreat at Royal Plaza on Scotts in central Singapore. The hotel features an airy and elegant lobby, 511 tastefully appointed rooms and suites, and an award-winning buffet restaurant with up to 17 food and dessert stations. Keep an eye out for pops of color and nods to local heritage throughout the hotel, including wall pieces from Singapore's old shophouses, which add a nostalgic, yet contemporary, graphic element. Relax on a secluded outdoor pool deck, work out in a well-equipped fitness center, and do business in 11,653 sq ft / 1,076 sq m of meeting space. - Relax in one of 511 rooms and suites, with Simmons Dream beds and a selection of coffee and organic tea (refilled daily) - Enjoy complimentary breakfast for two with any booking - Stay connected 24/7 with complimentary high-speed Wi-Fi in rooms - Feast on freshly cooked seafood, as well as local and international dishes - Work out in the gym and take a dip in the outdoor swimming pool - Stay on the doorstep of Singapore's Orchard Road shopping district - Meet and work at the internet lounge or organize a successful conference in nine state-of-the-art event spaces Royal Plaza on Scotts puts you adjacent to Orchard Road, one of Asia’s premier shopping streets. Stretching for 1.3 miles / 2.2 km, this spacious boulevard is lined with glitzy malls and chic boutiques. Visit the futuristic ION Orchard Mall featuring an art gallery and a 56th-floor observation deck with 360-degree views of Singapore.

NYCRP.name: Royalton Park Avenue
NYCRP.description: For an incredible New York City experience, stay at the Royalton Park Avenue. Located in the heart of midtown Manhattan’s trendy NoMad district, this chic boutique retreat is just steps away from trendy restaurants, Broadway shows, and iconic attractions, including Times Square and the Empire State Building. Its swanky guestrooms, rooftop bar & pool, upscale amenities, and luxury service make staying in as alluring as going out. There are many reasons it is a TripAdvisor Travelers’ Choice favorite and on the Condé Nast Traveler Gold List — come and experience it for yourself. - Stay in one of 249 guestrooms and suites, some of the most spacious in Manhattan and many with step-out Juliette balconies or terraces - Rest and recharge on a luxurious mattress with Egyptian cotton sheets - Enjoy a bevy of fitness options both inside the hotel and with partners in the neighborhood - Indulge in 24-hour in-room dining - The Park Avenue location makes it easy to explore the magic of Manhattan - Spend a sizzling evening at the trendy Rooftop Bar and Lounge

LIRLC.name: Santarena Hotel
LIRLC.description: The Santarena Hotel is a magnificent escape that seamlessly blends the best of luxury and the natural world. Set in between two picturesque Pacific beaches in Costa Rica, this upscale oasis lives in Las Catalinas, a tropical town, which allows no cars and aims to inspire visitors to connect with the land and bohemian culture. This dreamlike destination offers the best of both worlds, with the sprawling sea to one side and lush forestry to the other. With gorgeous accommodations, a lively lounge, access to the area’s famed beaches, and a rooftop pool, your visit will be one to remember. Highlights of the resort include: - 45 guestrooms equipped with modern designs meant to inspire and ease the soul - A rooftop terrace next to a swimming pool, with breathtaking views and a gin cart - Opportunities to swim, paddleboard, kayak, or snorkel at the region’s best beaches - A magical landscape offering hiking, biking, and horseback riding trails surrounding the resort - Urban spa experience across the street, where guests can enjoy a massage or manicure - Walking distance from Las Catalinas and its shops, plazas, parks, and restaurants Living by the mantra “pura vida,” Santarena Hotel encourages a lifestyle where wellness is a top priority and where nature is cared for and enjoyed by all. The authentic, laid-back warmth throughout the resort makes this the ideal home base.

LINSA.name: Savona 18 Suites
LINSA.description: Relax in luxury at this boutique hotel in Milan, Italy, where vintage charm, elegance, and modern amenities merge in tranquil accommodations bathed in natural light. During your stay at Savona 18 Suites, indulge in buffet-style breakfasts, light meals, and decadent libations at the all-day cafe. Enjoy moments of relaxation in the lush courtyard, where guests can unwind solo, gather together, or dine in the open air. The hotel’s location makes it a great location for travelers seeking art, design, and fashion experiences as well as meals at luxe bistros. Highlights of the hotel include: - 42 guestrooms and suites that combine contemporary comfort with vintage elegance and charm - Fitness Deluxe Suites designed with a private gym for those who can’t skip a workout - A relaxed, all-day dining space serving American breakfasts, light lunches, and late-night bites - Scenic inner courtyard ideal for gathering, whether for cultural events or corporate meetings - Prime location in a dynamic part of Milan, known for its design, art, and fashion

QSRSH.name: SAVOY HOTEL & SPA
QSRSH.description: Located between the Archaeological Park of Paestum and the pine forest-lined beaches of the Mediterranean Sea, SAVOY HOTEL & SPA welcomes visitors to this southern Italian landscape where ancient Greek temples and pastoral fields meet modern-day seaside retreats. Designed to resemble and honor this part of Italy’s ancient Greek heritage, the hotel harkens back to the Hellenistic world with a white-washed exterior accented by contemporary columns and a series of gardens reminiscent of Greek villas. During your stay, embrace the leisurely lifestyle of the Mediterranean with an elevated spa, a beach club, Michelin dining, and more. Highlights of the hotel include: - 44 guestrooms, suites, and villas decorated with colors inspired by the landscape - A Michelin-starred restaurant embracing the flavors, aromas, and colors of the Mediterranean - Dedicated beach club with cabanas, a restaurant, and space for luxe beachfront massages - A full-service spa with swimming pools, a salt cave, an ice room, a sauna, a Turkish bath, and more - Prime location near historic sites, natural wonders, picturesque ruins, and seaside villages

ZNZSC.name: Sea Cliff Resort & Spa Zanzibar
ZNZSC.description: Surrounded by bright green coconut plantations and set on a cliff overlooking the Indian Ocean, Sea Cliff Resort & Spa Zanzibar is the perfect island escape. With clean, blue waters as an idyllic backdrop, this extraordinary resort feels like something out of a dream. Lounge by one of the infinity pools or enjoy a hot stone massage at Zuri Rituals Spa. Indulge in the resort’s lineup of relaxed restaurants and beachside bars. Tee off at the island’s only golf course, then go windsurfing, sailing, or snorkeling. Hang out in the huge recreation area to play billiards and table tennis or take a complimentary rental bike out for a spin. You will have no trouble keeping kids entertained here, as the resort is home to trampolines, a splash pool, a mini golf course, and a kids' club with a climbing wall. Highlights of the hotel include: - 120 stunning guestrooms with private balconies overlooking the ocean or hotel gardens - Dining options range from international delights to casual bites next to the sea - Two sparkling infinity pools with stunning views, flanked by comfortable daybeds for relaxing - A private beach, tennis and pickleball courts, a golf course, and endless other activities - Horse stables offering safari experiences with scenic rides through the ocean waves

SGNSW.name: Sherwood Suites
SGNSW.address_raw: 192 Nam Ky Khoi Nghia, Ho Chi Minh City
SGNSW.description: Spacious and impeccably designed, the apartment residences of Sherwood Suites combine the top-class amenities of a hotel with the independence of a private residence. With their Italian furniture and marble bathrooms, these chic serviced apartments provide the perfect base to explore the city’s intriguing and complex history, as well as its burgeoning business opportunities and exciting nightlife. Catch the complimentary shuttle to major cultural and business attractions, then unwind with a relaxing dip in the pool or soak in the sauna. - Stay in the downtown business district, conveniently located near landmarks and hot spots - Unwind in one of 157 studio, one-bedroom, and two-bedroom apartments with floor-to-ceiling windows - Take a dip in the swimming pool, or relax in the Jacuzzi, the steam room, or the sauna - Dine on Vietnamese specialties and Mediterranean favorites at the hotel’s private restaurant - Benefit from complimentary shuttle service, able to transfer you to key attractions With the diverse attractions of dynamic Ho Chi Minh City surrounding you, Sherwood Suites gives you the proper starting place to explore the city, while also presenting the opportunity to live out a hotel-meets-home experience. Order a noodle soup from the on-site restaurant, or do as the locals do and head to the market, pick up some fresh ingredients, and cook a delicious meal in your residence’s own kitchen.

BERSL.name: sly Berlin
BERSL.description: Set in the hip Friedrichshain neighborhood in Berlin’s city center, sly Berlin is a modern hotel housed within four modernized buildings, all connected by an inviting and architecturally stunning conservatory courtyard. In addition to a prime location, other highlights of the hotel include: - 150 guest accommodations offering an array of amenities, with some featuring balconies - An in-house restaurant serving the best in contemporary cuisine in an ultra-modern setting - The option to stay healthy and active with a state-of-the-art fitness center and rooftop sauna - Quick access to the city center, along with a short drive to Berlin Brandenburg Airport

NYCSM.name: Smyth Tribeca
NYCSM.description: Tucked among cobblestone streets, modern architecture, spectacular dining options, and some of New York City’s best cultural and historic treasures, Smyth Tribeca occupies a place of honor between industrial-era buildings and the lower Manhattan modern towers hosting powerhouse fashion, finance, and media offices. Guest staying at this 14-story hotel can: Relax in soothing accommodations designed with neutral tones and spa-like baths Enjoy a coffee, cocktail, or meal in Smyth Tavern or Galerie Bar Maintain your fitness routine with a workout at the 24-hour fitness center Walk to the city’s best sights such as the World Trade Center, Battery Park, and Brooklyn Bridge With an enviable location just steps away from everything that makes New York one of the great global cities, Smyth Tribeca is the perfect place to stay when you want to experience cosmopolitan beauty and gracious hospitality.

ORDSH.name: SOPHY® Hyde Park
ORDSH.description: Its name is derived from the Greek word for wisdom, but SOPHY® Hyde Park is a hotel deeply rooted in the culture, legacy, and diversity of its Hyde Park locale. Spaces are designed to celebrate neighborhood residents’ contributions to the arts and science, with an impressive collection of artworks throughout the hotel, record players in guestrooms, and the restaurant's imaginative book-themed décor. Metal fixtures pay homage to Chicago's industrial era, and every detail combines perfectly to capture the spirit of this eclectic, illustrious neighborhood. - Step into the hotel lobby and lounge with design and details inspired by famed singer and “Queen of Gospel” Mahalia Jackson - Select one of 98 spacious industrial-chic guestrooms with generous marble baths and large walk-in showers - Mix and mingle at Mesler Kitchen, where each plate draws inspiration from the diverse neighborhood - Explore Hyde Park’s museums, university, and public parks, or catch a train for a quick ride to Chicago’s Museum Campus and Millennium Park - End your day with a craft cocktail or a local brew at the library-inspired bar - Wander the hotel and take in the thought-provoking art collection and delightful details Discover Hyde Park through the design details of the hotel; it is infused with the community’s academic and artistic contributions and embodies its passion for art, science, literature, and music. Take a break in the lobby’s plush seating with a book and a drink beside the crackling, double-sided fireplace. If you can’t bear to leave your stylish room, there is plenty of room to work, or select from the Mesler menu for in-room dining.

LHRSH.name: Sopwell House
LHRSH.description: Whether you seek a romantic weekend away, a family vacation, a spa break, or an impressive business retreat, the grand and inviting Sopwell House delivers. Housed in a striking Georgian country estate with a rich history that dates back to 1603, the charming and graceful hotel is nestled within the tranquil Hertfordshire countryside. Located amid 12 acres of lush grounds just a half hour from London, it is the perfect hideaway. The expansive spa is designed to complement the dynamic needs of modern living and, combined with two restaurants and afternoon tea service, Sopwell House is a veritable treat. Highlights of the hotel include: - 126 guestrooms and suites offering varying sizes and sophisticated designs - Four restaurants and bars offering a sampling of food and drink options - An adults-only spa that serves as a haven for indulgent rest and relaxation - Cultural experiences, including afternoon tea with fresh scones and Devonshire clotted cream

BRUTB.name: Tangla Hotel Brussels
BRUTB.description: An ode to the design, style, charm, and hospitality of Asian culture, Tangla Hotel Brussels exudes the best of the East, welcoming guests with original art, spacious accommodations, custom-made chandeliers, authentic Chinese cuisine, and other thoughtful details that reflect and reinterpret traditional handcrafted Asian details. Other highlights of the hotel include: - 187 inviting accommodations ranging from standard king rooms to grand suites - Two restaurants with traditional Chinese cuisine and locally inspired dishes, and a bar - A refreshing wellness center with an indoor pool, sauna, and modern fitness center - Easy access to Brussel’s city center and other nearby attractions and activities Set on the edge of the Belgian capital, Tangla Hotel Brussels is far enough from the hustle and bustle of downtown to be a relaxing retreat where rest comes easily, yet close enough to it all that traveling in the area is simple and quick.

MIAAH.name: The Altair Hotel Bay Harbor Miami
MIAAH.address_raw: 9540 W Bay Harbor Drive, Bay Harbor Islands
MIAAH.description: The Altair Hotel Bay Harbor, Miami welcomes guests into an ultra-modern building designed with a nod to the art deco origins of many of Miami’s first hotels. Within its glass and white-washed walls, you’re invited to live the indoor/outdoor lifestyle that South Florida is famous for with a rooftop pool, airy balconies, and water views. While staying at The Altair Hotel Bay Harbor, Miami you can: - Relax in an array of accommodations ranging from King Rooms to Grand One Bedroom Suites - Soak up the sun before taking a dip at the hotel’s rooftop pool deck offering spectacular views - Spend an evening chatting with friends or family at the lobby’s inviting indoor/outdoor lounge - Stroll the beautiful beach or take a short walk to the shops and restaurants at Bal Harbour

YILTE.name: The Archipelago
YILTE.description: Escape to the island of Taiwan, where The Archipelago welcomes guests to a cruise-inspired hotel overlooking the harbor. Vibrant blue waters shimmer in the distance, visible from many of the guestrooms and suites. During your visit, enjoy a sampling of international cuisines, relax in an open-air onsen, indulge in a spa treatment, or lounge by one of the two swimming pools in the water zone. Activities for kids are also available nearby beaches are perfect for surfing, paddleboarding, and more. Highlights of the hotel include: - 285 vibrant guestrooms and suites, with more than half offering ocean views - A variety of dining destinations offering tastes of global cuisines - Relaxing thermal club and spa offering treatments that blend Eastern and Western techniques - Outdoor water zone with multiple swimming pools, a lazy river, water beds, and more - Activities for kids and families, ranging from cooking classes to ocean-themed experiences

DENBH.name: The Benson Hotel & Faculty Club
DENBH.description: Locally immersed and globally inspired, Aurora’s newest boutique hotel, The Benson Hotel & Faculty Club, offers 106 thoughtfully designed guestrooms and apartment-style suites inspired by the spirit of the American West and the energy of Aurora – a vibrant community, biotech hub, and the area’s health and life science research center. Gathering places include The Common Good restaurant, 7,300 square feet of flexible, high-tech event space, and an exclusive Faculty Club and Lounge on the University of Colorado Anschutz Medical Campus. - Dine among the university’s big thinkers at The Common Good where the menu focuses on comfort food created with local, seasonal ingredients - Rest and recover in stunning, spacious accommodations, including apartment options that provide kitchens and separate living rooms - Say “I do” in the elegant ballroom, rose garden, or intimate indoor space - Named after the University of Colorado’s longest-serving president, The Benson Hotel & Faculty Club celebrates Bruce Dave Benson’s vision for breakthroughs in biotechnology, health care, and renewable and sustainable energy

CMHTB.name: The Blackwell Inn and Pfahl Conference Center
CMHTB.description: Centrally located on Ohio State University’s campus, close to downtown Columbus, The Blackwell Inn and Pfahl Conference Center offers fine dining, meeting and event spaces, and modern accommodations for visiting families, academics, and business travelers. Its public areas, from a relaxed fireside bar to the high-spec executive boardroom and expansive ballroom, create space for discussion, knowledge-sharing, and networking. Dine at the on-site restaurants and enjoy discounted access to OSU’s state-of-the-art sports facilities. Guests can also make use of the hotel’s complimentary car service, whisking you anywhere within a 3-mile radius, to visit the bohemian Short North district full of art galleries, quirky shops, pubs, and nightclubs. Highlights of the hotel include: - 151 light, spacious guestrooms and suites featuring Craftsman-style furnishings - Weeknight happy hours as well as a fireside lobby lounge offering various beers and wines - Flexible, high-tech meeting space, perfect for conferences, seminars, and board meetings - Access to the university’s recreation facility with an indoor jogging track and aquatic center - A prime location idea for riverside strolls or jogs into downtown along the Olentangy Trail

ULNBS.name: The Blue Sky Hotel & Tower
ULNBS.description: In a sailboat-shaped skyscraper sheathed in blue glass, The Blue Sky Hotel & Tower brings something entirely different to Ulaanbaatar. This striking landmark frames vistas of the sacred mountains that surround the Mongolian capital, from the second-floor spa to the spectacular glass-ceiling bar on the top level. Besides dazzling views and a location overlooking the city’s main square, it offers beautifully appointed rooms and six wonderful restaurants serving everything from Cantonese hot pot and Korean short ribs to freshly sliced sushi and sashimi. - Choose from 200 guestrooms and suites with floor-to-ceiling windows - Keep fit and active with a workout in the state-of-the-art gym - Marvel at the stunning views of the city from Mongolia’s tallest skyscraper - Keep in touch with colleagues at the on-site business center - Savor the abundance of choice at the international breakfast buffet - Take laps in the pool, detox in the sauna, and relax in the Jacuzzi at the Health Club When you enter The Blue Sky Hotel & Tower’s dramatic lobby, you’ll see a pair of twin pillars that resemble the entrance of a traditional Mongol ger (domed white hut). After you’ve settled into your gorgeous guestroom, wander outside and explore the surrounding area, which brims with museums, temples, and shops.

TLVTC.name: The Carlton Tel Aviv
TLVTC.description: Overlooking the marina, flanked by sandy beaches, and close to the Tel Aviv business center, The Carlton Tel Aviv is a haven of style and luxury in Israel’s cosmopolitan city. Whether you are lounging by the rooftop pool, gazing at the yachts from your balcony, or indulging in the acclaimed buffet breakfast — complete with champagne and caviar — the shimmering Mediterranean Sea serves as an idyllic backdrop throughout your stay. Endlessly elegant, The Carlton Tel Alviv is a premium choice. - Choose from 270 guestrooms and suites, all with private balconies - Unwind in the sauna and have an aromatherapy massage in the spa - Work out in the gym, surrounded by contemporary art - Stroll or cycle along the seaside promenade, moments from the hotel - Admire spectacular city views from the outdoor rooftop hot tub The Carlton Tel Aviv pairs unforgettable views with discerning personalized services. Staff will hand out homemade popsicles around the pool, give you the insider track on the city’s legendary nightlife, and help you create a bespoke itinerary to make the most of your time in this fun-loving city.

DELNR.name: The Claridges Nabha Residence Mussoorie
DELNR.description: Experience the charm and magic of the British era at The Claridges Nabha Residence, Mussoorie. The former summer retreat of the Maharaja of Nabha, the hotel is set amid 13 acres of a lush green private estate covered in cedar and oak forest. The romantic, single-story colonial building has sweeping views of the hills and valleys of the region. Dine indoors at Nabha restaurant or al fresco with views overlooking 'the queen of hills' Soul lightening therapies and treatments from the hotel's holistic and healing spa Hike and trek the hotel's lush forests for a memorable natural experience

BOSCO.name: The Colonnade Hotel Boston
BOSCO.description: Located in Boston’s historic Back Bay neighborhood, The Colonnade Hotel, Boston is an urban retreat with contemporary style and convenience for business or leisure travelers. Upscale amenities include flexible meeting and event spaces, pet-friendly guestrooms with pillow-top mattresses, and a fully-equipped fitness center with yoga and kickboxing classes. The rooftop pool and lounge area, the social hub of the AAA Four Diamond hotel, provides a touch of glamour, while the brasserie mixes classic French fare with New England hospitality. - Check in to one of 285 guestrooms and suites, many with views of the city, including the historic South End - Have a cocktail and lounge by the rooftop pool with panoramic views of Boston - Organize a meeting or event in one of the capacious meeting rooms or ballrooms - Work out in the fully equipped fitness center while enjoying downtown vistas - Treat your pet to a luxury experience, with “fluffy” beds, treats, and grooming services - Explore Boston in style The rooftop pool, referred to as the RTP, is one of the standout features of The Colonnade Hotel, Boston. Book a private cabana or daybed, enjoy delicious salads or sandwiches poolside, and sip on an organic strawberry margarita as the sun sets. Alternatively, arrive here early for a lively sunrise kickboxing class or soothing morning yoga session.

LISER.name: The Editory Riverside Hotel
LISER.description: Immerse yourself in the heart of Lisbon with a stay at The Editory Riverside Santa Apolónia Lisboa, housed in the oldest train station in Portugal. Embrace modern hospitality in timeless spaces that are sure to transport guests back in time with railway-inspired decor and artistic photographs of local train stations. Visit the hotel restaurant to savor local recipes with a modern twist, sip drinks at the bar, and exercise in the fitness room before setting out to explore the city, either through a staff-led tour or on your own. Highlights of the hotel include: - 126 guestrooms and suites reflecting a blend of historical charm and modern amenities - A signature restaurant and bar reminiscent of a train car celebrating Portuguese flavors - A 24-hour fitness room featuring a treadmill, elliptical, stationary bike, and strength machines - Photography by Jordi Llorella showcasing Portugal’s train stations and stopovers - Walking tour led by hotel staff highlighting points of interest in the Alfama neighborhood

BOSEL.name: The Eliot Hotel
BOSEL.description: For a premier stay in the heart of Downtown Boston, The Eliot Hotel is the ideal choice with its enviable Back Bay location. This historic boutique beauty offers modern guestrooms and luxurious one- and two-bedroom suites reminiscent of an elegant Parisian hotel. Set on one of America’s most beautiful boulevards, it is a short stroll from iconic landmarks, lush parks, major art galleries, dynamic restaurants, universities, nightlife, and other cultural attractions. Stay and experience the many remarkable reasons it has won awards for superb service, international dining, and elevated accommodations. Highlights of the hotel include: - 95 tastefully decorated guestrooms and suites filled with elegant details - Award-winning restaurant serving makimono, nigiri, sashimi, and ramen, plus a breakfast buffet - Dry cleaning services, a business center, meeting spaces, and concierge assistance - Scenic location near the Charles River esplanade and Boston’s most iconic sights Built in 1925 by the family of then-Harvard University President Charles William Eliot, the hotel originally housed semi-retired professors. The Ullian family purchased it in 1939 and has owned and operated it ever since. Its residential feel, personalized service, and beautiful blend of historic beauty and modern amenities draw guests from around the world.

PRGEP.name: The Emblem Prague
PRGEP.description: When you step out of Prague’s enchanting Old Town and into The Emblem Prague, you won't stand at a desk. Instead, you'll be invited to check in while lounging on one of the comfortable couches in the stylish M Lounge — and that thoughtful, welcoming touch will set the tone for the rest of your stay. Everything is designed to make you feel at home, with accommodations that evoke the feel of an intimate bedroom and a lounge area with the warmth and comfort of an inviting living room. Treat yourself to an afternoon at M Spa, savor a succulent steak dinner, and then head out into Prague’s historic Old Town for a memorable experience. Highlights of the hotel include: - 59 guestrooms and suites with luxurious beds covered in duck-feather blankets - An elegant Library Suite with a secret passageway that leads to a hidden attic bedroom - An American-style steakhouse serving delicious meals paired with California wines - Tranquil spa oasis with a 24-hour gym, sauna, steam room, and hot/cold Kneipp path - Rooftop terrace with a hot tub offering views of the sunset and Prague Castle in the distance - Elegant Drawing Room, designed for business meetings inside the leather-paneled walls Admire the work of acclaimed designers throughout this boutique hotel, from hand-picked Elitis wallpaper to Jakub Polanka staff uniforms. The result is a unique aesthetic embellished with an ever-changing gallery of contemporary works by local artists. It all comes together to create a stylish gateway in one of Europe's most historic and cultured capital cities.

MHTTG.name: The Grand at Bedford Village Inn
MHTTG.description: Formerly the site of a working farm, The Grand at Bedford Village Inn marries rustic charm with modern elegance in the heart of New Hampshire’s countryside. This beautiful and graceful retreat offers picturesque wisteria-studded acres to explore, tranquil guestrooms to relax in, and some of the best farm-to-table fare in the Granite State. After you’ve sampled rare vintages in the wine bar and soaked in the saltwater pool, you can rest assured that you’ve experienced pastoral life at its finest at The Grand at Bedford Village Inn. - Book one of 50 elegant guestrooms and suites with cozy countryside décor - Work out in the state-of-the-art fitness center, then rejuvenate in the LUXE Salon & Spa - Organize a seamless function in 8,000 sq ft of meeting space or host an event in the Charolais Room - Order personal blends or barrel samples from Corks Wine Bar and enjoy by the fireplace Get back to nature at this clapboard boutique hotel, nestled on a lush 10-acre estate in the sweeping New England countryside. Soak up the rusty hues of the leaves during fall, the dense greenery in the summer, and snow-blanketed pastures in the winter.

MEMTG.name: The Guest House at Graceland
MEMTG.description: Have an Elvis-inspired stay at this AAA Four Diamond hotel just steps from the famous singer’s Memphis mansion, Graceland. Everything reflects the charm, stylistic flair, and warm hospitality of “the King” himself. Located on the same campus as Elvis' famous Graceland Mansion, guests can enjoy Elvis movies in the 464-seat house auditorium; the on-site restaurants cook up some of the best Southern-style cuisine in town. In premium suites curated by Priscilla Presley, décor reflects some of The King's own favorite places. Enjoy poolside cocktails and games, chats by the fire pits, and quick trips to nearby Beale Street. - Feel like royalty in one of the 450 guestrooms and one- and two-bedroom suites - Work out in the fitness room, and take a dip in the outdoor pool - Sing like the king at weekly karaoke nights - Do business in 25,600 sq ft of meeting space, including lawns, theaters, and a ballroom - Walk to Graceland mansion and Elvis Presley's Memphis exhibition - Savor Southern cuisine and Tennessee whiskey at the on-site restaurants and bars - Explore Memphis The Guest House at Graceland's two King's Suites might be the closest you can get to living like Elvis. While one draws inspiration from Vegas, the other is modeled on the Graceland master bedroom, featuring a canopy bed with overhead TVs. The grounds reflect elegant Southern charm and you can even have your wedding at the on-site chapel. From live music in the lobby to films and live performances in the auditorium, the love Elvis has for music lives on here.

LAXHR.name: The Hollywood Roosevelt
LAXHR.description: Host of the very first Academy Awards in 1929, The Hollywood Roosevelt reigns as one of the most iconic hotels in America. Step over the Walk of Fame to enter the glamorous lobby — a temple to the Golden Age of Hollywood, with marble columns, a tiered fountain, a dramatic chandelier, and a stunning painted ceiling — and you're in the L.A. hideaway where Marilyn, Charlie Chaplin, and Clark Gable felt perfectly at home. Impeccably presented guestrooms and suites pay homage to the stars of yesteryear while entertaining the biggest names of today. - Book one of the 300 guestrooms or suites in The Tower or The Cabana, poolside - Enjoy the pool and a restored David Hockney mural - Check out pop ups and happenings — from yoga to guest DJ nights — across the hotel - Order cocktails in the Spare Room speakeasy and enjoy two-lane retro bowling - Hang out with stars having perfect burgers, available at 25 Degrees

AUOAU.name: The Hotel at Auburn University & Dixon Conference Center
AUOAU.description: The Hotel at Auburn University & Dixon Conference Center welcomes guests to Auburn, Alabama with Southern charm and celebrated hospitality. The place to stay for anyone visiting Auburn University – from Alumni to parents and visiting professionals – this hotel offers a variety of amenities including: - More than 200 guestrooms ranging from Double Queens to One Bedroom Suites - A signature restaurant serving delicious Italian classics like pasta and porchetta - An all-season pool with accompanying bar for refreshing beverages poolside anytime - Craft coffee served from an on-site café also offering options for on-the-go eats With a prime location within feet of Auburn University and the city’s charming downtown, The Hotel at Auburn University & Dixon Conference Center is the perfect place to stay for visiting parents, Auburn athletics fans, and any other traveler to one of the American South’s best small cities.

CIDHK.name: The Hotel at Kirkwood Center
CIDHK.description: Newly renovated in 2020 with completely refreshed accommodations, public areas, and private seating areas, The Hotel at Kirkwood in Cedar Rapids, Iowa, is even more impressive than before. With a one-to-one service employee-to-guest ratio, the hotel’s outstanding personalized service is second to none – and now its environment is reflective of those exceptional expectations. Along with its AAA Four Diamond status, the hotel is also a teaching facility, meaning its vision and execution are the height of hospitality, offering would-be professionals a paradigm for perfection. Guests of The Hotel at Kirkwood Center can: - Relax in newly-updated accommodations with original artwork and floor-to-ceiling windows - Dine at The Class Act Restaurant or enjoy a classic cocktail at Maikka Lobby Bar - Host a business event or wedding at one of the hotel’s multiple event spaces - Work out at the fitness center or enjoy complimentary access at the nearby health club - Admire more than 100 pieces of local and artisan art displayed throughout the property The perfect place for both business and pleasure, The Hotel at Kirkwood offers a Culinary Lab Space for team-building events where you can have your own cooking competition or lesson with the use of the Lab’s eight cooking stations.

BKKLB.name: The Landmark Bangkok
BKKLB.description: Conveniently located in the bustling center of Bangkok, with colorful street life outside the door and a calm elegance inside, this contemporary Thai hotel has every detail beautifully worked out. Bask in The Landmark Bangkok’s luxury accommodations, enjoy a lavish breakfast, and sip cocktails on the terrace of this elegant hotel. Be inspired in the private business lounge offering stunning skyline vistas. Take a culinary journey around the world at the many restaurants and cafés or unwind in the serene, tropical surroundings of the outdoor pool. Whatever you choose, you’re certain to savor every moment at The Landmark Bangkok. Highlights of the hotel include: - 399 spacious guestrooms and suites with IG Glass frameless room dividers - Gourmet dining, from award-winning steaks and Cantonese specialties to Italian and burgers - Shimmering outdoor pool with relaxing lounge chairs and a tranquil spa - A superbly equipped gym and fitness club with a wide range of group classes - Workspaces in a business lounge with private places for meetings and fabulous city views This hotel is named The Landmark Bangkok for a reason – it is one of the best luxury hotels on Thailand’s longest thoroughfare, the famous Sukhumvit Road. Browse the colorful markets for rare finds or take a short train ride to Terminal 21 mall for some shopping before retreating to this regal hotel.

ROATL.name: The Liberty Trust
ROATL.description: Calling Roanoke’s former First National Bank Building home, The Liberty Trust Hotel takes you back in time as you enter through massive copper doors into an opulent, marble-clad lobby lined with imposing pillars reaching upward toward a soaring ceiling. This innovative and refined atmosphere, combined with a great location near the city center, makes The Liberty Trust an ideal place to stay while in Southwestern Virginia. As a guest of the hotel, you’ll enjoy: - A choice of more than 54 rooms across seven stories of elegantly restored architecture - Delicious dining and drinks at the hotel's elegant The Liberty Vault restaurant - Step into the building’s original bank vault-turned-tasting room for a refreshing drink - Exploring Roanoke’s historic sites, entertaining attractions, and cultural landmarks Outside the hotel, you’ll love wandering the historic Roanoke City Market, the ease of access to Virginia Tech Carilion Biomedical Research campus, and the vibrant surrounding neighborhood.

LONMH.name: The Mandeville Hotel
LONMH.description: Located in the heart of London’s West End, in the ever-so-fashionable Marylebone neighborhood, The Mandeville Hotel is brimming with character. The four-star boutique hotel welcomes you with a marble floor, bold patterned armchairs, bright red leather sofas, an eye-catching chandelier, and a large red toy sports car. Playful touches extend into the elevators with London-themed wallpaper. Designers from around the world have also made their mark on the comfortable guestrooms, as well as in the Reform Social & Grill eatery, inspired by the classic British gentleman’s club. - Book one of the gorgeous Maison Christian Lacroix-styled Riviera Rooms - Try one of the many imaginative varieties of afternoon tea at the hotel - Settle into one of 142 chic, individually designed guestrooms - Sink into an armchair with a drink in the Chesterfield chair-lined lounge - Make use of the knowledgeable concierge who will help you explore the chic area Set amid the Victorian architecture of Marylebone Village, The Mandeville Hotel delivers its service with a large helping of style and considered panache. A mix of Old World comfort and modern luxuries, it has Selfridges and the high-end shops of Bond Street around the corner, as well as all the delights of London’s theaters, parks, restaurants, and world-renowned sights.

NYCMT.name: The Maritime Hotel
NYCMT.description: Formerly home to the National Maritime Union, The Maritime Hotel pays homage to its nautical past with an instantly recognizable façade of round portholes in place of standard windows. Within walking distance of the Meatpacking District’s lively nightlife, this imaginative hotel offers rooms that are cozy, quiet, and never kitschy. Sink into a buttery leather club chair in the wood-paneled lobby alongside a roaring fireplace with a book from the large library. Retreat to one of the 126 guestrooms and look out over the Hudson River through your large porthole window. - Explore the vibrant neighborhood or take a tour of the High Line on a complimentary bicycle - Check in to one of the 126 guestrooms, each offers an extra-long work desk, artisanal minibar, and a complimentary daily newspaper - Dine at CATCH STEAK, featuring a curated collection of the world's best cuts and globally influenced dishes - Sip a grapefruit vodka Ruby Red Dragon cocktail in subterranean TAO Downtown - Step onto the subway nearby to easily access all of New York City’s attractions Feel like you are in the pulsing heart of Manhattan without ever leaving the comfort of The Maritime Hotel. You will be in the middle of some of the city’s best shopping and art, but if you prefer more culinary indulgences, stroll up to Chelsea Market, where you can gather essentials for a picnic to share while watching the sunset over the Hudson from the High Line. The hotel’s nautical theme has substance as well as style, creating a unique boutique ambiance that makes a truly memorable experience.

SFOTM.name: The Marker Union Square San Francisco
SFOTM.description: Designed to delight and inspire, The Marker Union Square San Francisco is housed in a century-old building that provides guests with a polished, cosmopolitan interior. The grand staircase, high ceilings, and timeless jewel-toned decor complement its classic Beaux-Arts exterior, paralleling the vibrant spirit of the city. Stay in luxuriously modern guestrooms and suites, indulge in Italian cuisine paired with top-tier vintages, work out in the hotel gym, and relax by one of the original fireplaces in the lobby. With an emphasis on high-end hospitality and a central location blocks away from Union Square, The Marker is the perfect base from which to explore San Francisco. Highlights of the hotel include: - 208 guestrooms and suites with modern furnishings, designed with convenience in mind - Bar-driven restaurant offering rustic Italian fare plus fine wines, spirits, and craft cocktails - On-site 24-hour fitness center filled with weightlifting and cardio machines - A business center and co-working spaces designed for business travelers to stay connected - Prime location in the heart of San Francisco’s walkable downtown district

NYCMH.name: The Michelangelo New York - Starhotels Collezione
NYCMH.description: In the heart of Manhattan, The Michelangelo New York – Starhotels Collezione is a AAA Four Diamond hotel, exuding gracious hospitality and Italian elegance. Step in under the signature red awning to the hotel's opulent neoclassical lobby, full of marble, Italian art, and velvet couches. Up the red-carpeted staircase, guestrooms are some of the most spacious in New York City. From the classic cherrywood furnishings to the hotel's lounge menu, every detail at The Michelangelo New York – Starhotels Collezione combines Italian flair with New York luxury. - One of Condé Nast Traveler ’s 50 Best Hotels in New York City in 2017 - Retreat to one of the 179 charming guestrooms, among the largest in NYC - Walk to iconic sights, such as Broadway and Times Square, Rockefeller Center, 5th Avenue, and Central Park - Begin your day with fresh pastries and cappuccino in The Lounge at The Michelangelo Hotel - Ask the concierge team for assistance with theater and sports tickets, sightseeing tours, day trips, or dinner reservations

NYCMN.name: The Muse New York
NYCMN.description: The Muse New York is a stylish boutique hotel that blends modern sophistication with the vibrant spirit of New York City. Not far from Midtown Manhattan’s energetic Times Square, a stay here puts travelers in the heart of the city with easy access to all of the iconic landmarks that also call this area home. Whether visiting for entertainment, leisure, or business, The Muse New York has something to offer, with chic guestrooms and suites, an all-day dining venue that shifts with the sun, a round-the-clock fitness center, and an expert concierge that can assist with booking Broadway shows, renowned restaurant reservations, and sought-after experiences. Highlights of the resort include: - 201 chic guestrooms and suites that pair comfort with luxury amenities and city views - A New York-inspired café offering espresso drinks, light bites, dinner service, and cocktails - A well-equipped fitness center with cardio machines, strength training equipment, and more - Pet-friendly amenities, including bedding, bowls, and recommendations for walking routes - Unbeatable location that places guests in the heart of Manhattan amid famous landmarks

BNABH.name: The Nash
BNABH.description: Hidden in the heart of the city, The Nash invites travelers to embrace the art, culture, and creativity of Nashville, Tennessee, from a prime location near Printer’s Alley. Enjoy a welcome drink upon arrival before scoping out your travel-inspired guestroom or suite, each designed with bold hues that reflect the energy of the city. From the stunning lobby to the hip rooftop, complete with a swimming pool, games, and a retro bus serving drinks, this trending boutique hotel is filled with intriguing details and playful moments. Rounded out by a restaurant made for lingering and a gym that is open all hours of the day, The Nash is a place to unwind, gather, and socialize before escaping into the city to create memories that play on in your memory long after the music ends. Charming, unique, and full of fun, it is perfectly in tune with Nashville’s distinctive musical heritage. Highlights of the hotel include: - 144 striking guestrooms and suites inspired by the world’s most captivating travel destinations - A gently illuminated restaurant serving bold shared plates in a warm and welcoming setting - Refreshing rooftop swimming pool with chic cabanas and views of the city skyline, plus a gym - Elevated rooftop lounge with a vintage bus serving cocktails and backyard games like cornhole - Dynamic location near the Ryman Auditorium and bars along Nashville’s Honky Tonk Highway

MIATP.name: The Palms Hotel & Spa
MIATP.description: A tropical escape amidst the hustle and bustle of Miami Beach, The Palms Hotel & Spa offers genuine service and laid-back sophistication in the heart of the city. Inspired by nature, the oceanfront resort places a unique emphasis on health and total wellness, with green practices and environmental awareness at the center of every experience, from holistic Ayurvedic treatments at the spa to celebrated farm-to-table cuisine with an emphasis on premium local and sustainable ingredients. Step into a bright, fern-filled lobby reminiscent of a Caribbean manor and feel every hint of stress begin to evaporate. By the time you reach your poolside tiki cabana for an outdoor massage, you will feel more at ease than ever at this award-winning, AAA Four Diamond hotel. Highlights of the hotel include: - 247 guestrooms and suites, many with oceanfront accommodations featuring panoramic views - Direct access to the beach, as well as Miami Beach’s four-mile boardwalk - Sustainable cuisine on the breezy dining terrace at Essensia Restaurant - Poolside cocktails and casual beach fare at the tropical-inspired Tiki Bar - Indulgent treatments and therapies at the calming and restorative spa While The Palms Hotel & Spa provides you with a sense of tranquility, from the soothing décor of its spacious guestrooms and suites to its gourmet dining experiences, the hotel is also ideally located for you to participate in the area’s numerous annual events, such as Art Basel, the International Coastal Cleanup, the Miami International Boat Show, and the South Beach Wine & Food Festival.

LONPH.name: The Pelham London - Starhotels Collezione
LONPH.description: Extravagant, modern, and quintessentially English, The Pelham London – Starhotels Collezione is a glamorous and intimate townhouse retreat in the heart of Kensington. Designer Kit Kemp’s signature look — a vivid color scheme meets vintage furnishings — is displayed throughout, from the one-of-a-kind guestrooms to the sumptuous sitting areas. The location is ideal for shopping or sightseeing — you’re within walking distance of Harrods and the V&A — and the restaurant, helmed by Chef Alfred Russo, is waiting to restore you with Italian sharing plates on your return. - Book one of 51 unique guestrooms to enjoy the comfort of a country house in the heart of the capital - Plan an event with vintage panache in one of five characterful meeting rooms - Book into the expansive, opulent King Suite with possibilities of connecting with the Executive Double room for more space It’s not what you know; it’s who you know. The hotel’s Les Clefs d’Or concierge team can open all the doors you need in London, including tickets, reservations, recommendations, and arrangements.

NYCKN.name: The Prince Kitano New York
NYCKN.description: Discover an oasis of tranquility in fast-moving Midtown Manhattan, where guests are immersed in luxury. The Prince Kitano New York looks to the future while honoring the past, welcoming guests from around the world in a setting that blends the traditional East with the modern West. With the style and character of a private home, attentive service, elegant suites and guestrooms, an enchanting rooftop bar, and unique cultural experiences, the hotel serves as a liberating space where travelers can find themselves. Highlights of the hotel include: - 149 spacious guestrooms and suites, some with views of the New York skyline - Chef-curated, multi-course meals of award-winning Japanese kaiseki cuisine - Rooftop bar offering signature cocktails with views of the Empire State Building - MarieBelle chocolate shop is onsite - Impressive art collection, with paintings and sculptures throughout the hotel

BOMRM.name: The Resort Mumbai
BOMRM.address_raw: Aksa Beach 11, Madh – Marve Rd., Mumbai
BOMRM.description: Feel your stress melt away with a visit to The Resort, Mumbai, located above sunny Aksa Beach along India’s western coastline. This relaxing retreat offers stunning guestrooms and suites designed in a contemporary style with the ocean environment in mind. Visit the resort’s signature restaurant to try Indian classics or Western dishes and stay active with activities that range from a swimming pool, restful spa, and board games to sports like volleyball, basketball, and table tennis. Highlights of the resort include: - The resort is currently undergoing a phased renovation while remaining open with limited accommodations available. - 95 sleek guestrooms and suites, most of which have garden or ocean views - A restaurant offering Indian food and Western classics plus panoramic ocean views - A soothing spa that incorporates natural herbs and spices in its treatments - Interactive activities, including table tennis, volleyball, basketball, board games, and more

TYOST.name: The Royal Park Hotel Iconic Tokyo Shiodome
TYOST.description: Occupying the 24th–38th floors of Shiodome Tower, The Royal Park Hotel Iconic Tokyo Shiodome is a magnificent retreat from the electric energy of Tokyo below. Boasting stunning skyline views, the hotel is conveniently located near the upscale Ginza district and several transportation hubs, making it the ideal home base for sightseeing and exploring. Renovated guestrooms, including the addition of an Executive Floor with its own private lounge, provide comfortable places to rest. Savor a signature cocktail with a view of the pulsating city or dine on delectable Western dishes at Harmony. Highlights of the hotel include: - 490 guestrooms and suites that exude modern elegance, including an exclusive Executive Floor - Delectable Western cuisine prepared in an open kitchen - Executive Lounge with a breakfast buffet or hors d'oeuvres, depending on the time of day - Well-equipped fitness center offering invigorating workouts even while traveling - Prime location near the Ginza district, ensuring guests experience the magic of Tokyo with ease

NBOSO.name: The Social House
NBOSO.description: Opened in February 2020, The Social House in Nairobi, Kenya, is a future-oriented and fresh property so tech-savvy that it's the first hotel on the African continent without a reception desk. Yes – you can check in, access your room, and order a post-check-in pick-me-up all from your smartphone. Great for business travelers, busy families, or solo explorers, The Social House mixes a melting pot of Kenyan culture with an equally vibrant array of activities. - Stay in one of the hotel's 83 rooms and suites featuring state-of-the-art tech - Savor French, Japanese, or Scandinavian-style foods at one of four restaurants - Take a dip in the outdoor pool or relax under the shade of the terrace - Experience an ever-changing line-up of cultural events, entertainment, and art - Control all in-room amenities from your room's smart TV If you're planning a party, destination wedding, or other event, the hotel's event spaces can cater anything from an intimate conference to a 100-person cocktail reception, while the onsite wedding planner and free flower service round out the hotel's event amenities.

DENTS.name: The Source Hotel
DENTS.description: Formerly home to an 1880s ironworks foundry, The Source Hotel stands at the crossroads of industrial heritage and modern minimalism in River North, or RiNo, effortlessly combining its industrial roots with elevated hospitality and a design-driven setting. Raw concrete, steel, and glass are softened by warm wood tones and Scandinavian-inspired interiors, creating a striking yet serene retreat. Rooftop dining introduces vibrant Pan-Latin cuisine crafted with local ingredients framed by sweeping views of the Denver skyline and Rocky Mountains. The boutique hotel also rises above The Source Market Hall, a European-style marketplace that anchors the neighborhood’s creative energy with award-winning restaurants, artisan purveyors, curated retail spaces, and a craft brewery. Highlights of the hotel include: - 100 tasteful guestrooms and suites blending Japanese and Scandinavian minimalism - Floor-to-ceiling windows with views of the Rocky Mountains or downtown skyline - A Pan-Latin rooftop restaurant featuring wood fired plates, local ingredients, and agave cocktails - Heated rooftop plunge pools overlooking the city, plus a well-equipped fitness center - Access to The Source Market Hall, offering independent dining, an artisan bakery, and retail

MILTS.name: The Square Milano Duomo
MILTS.description: Flashes of gold add a touch of classic Milan opulence to the refined minimalist aesthetic throughout the elegantly Italian The Square Milano Duomo. Just a few minutes walk from the Duomo cathedral, this glamorous four-star hotel's location is fittingly prestigious and select guestrooms have views of the nearby modernist masterpiece Torre Velasca, while others look out over the rooftops of historic Milan. See the whole city unfold from the rooftop terrace in summer and relax in guestrooms with sumptuous leather furnishings and dark wood flooring. - Choose from 126 elegant guestrooms, ranging from deluxe to junior suites - Stay just a five-minute walk from the Duomo cathedral - See Milan from above, as you unwind with a drink on the rooftop terrace - Book theater, opera, or cabaret tickets with the help of the expert concierge team - Enjoy gourmet Italian cuisine at Arya restaurant on the 10th floor, or a signature cocktail at the lounge bar Step outside the doors of this exquisite 1940s building and you are in the heart of Milan, walking distance from the city's major attractions, surrounded by fine-dining restaurants, and landmark fashion boutiques. Here, luxury accommodations come with a location to match.

BLRTZ.name: The Zuri Whitefield Bengaluru
BLRTZ.description: A lavish five-star deluxe hotel, The Zuri Whitefield Bengaluru is both a sanctuary from the buzz of India’s Silicon Valley and an enticing space to conduct business in. The hotel offers a multitude of delicious all-day dining options and appealing amenities from the tranquil Maya Spa to the heated outdoor pool. Add high-tech business facilities, all entirely customizable, and a convenient location, moments from the International Tech Park, and this all-embracing hotel makes for a compelling destination. - Rest and find your focus in one of 162 richly furnished guestrooms - Dine on fresh sushi with panoramic city views from the rooftop restaurant, Sake - Stay late and watch as the lounge bar Bling transforms into a nightclub - Decompress with an aromatherapy massage at the tranquil Maya Spa - Swim in the heated, second-floor pool, or start your day with a professional trainer The expert massage, reflexology, aromatherapy, and facial treatments of the luxury Maya Spa are not only personalized just for you but they can also be provided in the comfort of your guestroom.

ZNZTO.name: TOA Hotel & Spa
ZNZTO.description: Sweet Indian Ocean breezes greet guests of TOA Hotel & Spa on the eastern coast of Zanzibar. A crescent-shaped, white-sand beach backed by turquoise waters serves as the setting for this tropical retreat where guests are enveloped by a sensuous atmosphere with an authentic sense of place. Highlights of the property include: - A selection of spacious and comfortable accommodations, some with private pools - Two refreshing swimming pools with sweeping Indian Ocean views - A café and two bars to satisfy even the most discerning of diners - A full-service spa offering a variety of treatments to soothe and restore TOA Hotel & Spa’s location in the small village of Pongwe allows guests to truly get away from it all, while still being within an hour of an international airport.

FCORU.name: Trastevere Roma UNA Esperienze
FCORU.description: With seven floors, this palazzo-turned-hotel inspires. Built in the 19th century and renovated in 2022, Trastevere Roma UNA Esperienze makes visitors feel right at home, inspired by nearby Italian houses that wrap guests in warmth and comfort. A variety of accommodations abound so that you can find the best fit and all feature modern amenities in chic settings. With a courtyard cocktail bar and restaurant on the roof, there are two unique places to gather and unwind for a drink or a meal – with the heart of Rome mere steps away, beckoning visitors to Trastevere night and day. Highlights of the hotel include: - 94 guestrooms and suites designed with the personality of authentic Roman homes - Dining on a rooftop terrace, where guests can delight in Roman and Mediterranean flavors - An intimate courtyard cocktail bar offering mid-afternoon coffees, evening aperitivos, and more - Personalized shopping experiences and wine tastings with retail partner Rinascente - Downtown location that is perfect for exploring the city of Rome and its iconic landmarks

KMGFL.name: Treasure Bay Fuxian Lake
KMGFL.description: Designed to embody the spirit of the south China landscape while integrating international aesthetics, a stay at Treasure Bay Fuxian Lake combines effortless style and unrivaled hospitality with scenic beauty. Situated between the tranquil Fuxian Lake and a fossil-filled geological park, and filled with cultural elements and workshops, the hotel immerses guests in the best of the Yunnan province. Relax each night in a guestroom or suite with stunning views, sample regional cuisine, wander the beautiful grounds, swim in the pool, or venture off property to experience the splendor of rural China. Highlights of the hotel include: - 464 guestrooms and suites housed in a sprawling, well-lit building with peaked towers - Two restaurants, one serving Yunnan cuisine and the other with Western-inspired meals - A swimming pool with an outdoor terrace suitable for hosting parties and other events - Miniature golf course just steps away from the guestrooms that offers family-friendly fun - Picturesque garden where guests can unwind in the midst of natural beauty

MIATT.name: Trump International Beach Resort Miami
MIATT.description: Trump International Beach Resort is the ideal destination for a Florida getaway. With access to the glitz and glam of Miami, guests can enjoy a night out on the town and a restful night’s sleep. Its bright guestrooms and suites overlook the Atlantic Ocean or Intracoastal Waterway from floor-to-ceiling windows and some feature balconies with private patio hot tubs. Decompress at the 8,000-square-foot oceanfront spa, enjoy drinks and live music or jump into fun activities throughout the property. Highlights of the resort include: - 360 coastal-chic guestrooms and suites featuring full kitchens and laundry - A two-level pool deck with multiple pools, hot tubs, air-conditioned cabanas, and more - An array of delicious on-site restaurants and bars for dining and refreshing drinks - Ocean-inspired facials or massage at the award-winning Aquanox Spa - A dedication to fun with live music, recreation, and sports activities for all ages The prime location of Trump International Beach Resort makes it the ideal spot for luxury seaside living, whether you prefer relaxing by the ocean, swimming in the grotto-style pool, or engaging in high-octane water sports.

MAATC.name: Turyaa Chennai
MAATC.description: Located in Chennai’s equivalent to Silicon Valley, the IT Corridor, the five-star Turyaa Chennai is a welcome sanctuary that keeps you close to all the action. After a day of business or leisurely excursions, head to the rooftop for some energizing laps in the swimming pool; follow with a cleanse in the steam room; and finish with a soothing treatment in the spa. Replenish at the intrepid Samasa before wrapping up your evening with a late night drink at Twist. Retire to the warming comfort of your ochre- and gold-toned guestroom, confident in the knowledge that you’re more than ready for another day of activity. - Check into one of the 140 cozy guestrooms and suites with media hubs and workstations - Book a professional meeting room or conference space, tailored to your specifications - Take a dip in the rooftop pool or enjoy a siesta on a sun lounger - Stay on top of your fitness routine at the in-house gym, with cardio and strength-building machines - Brighten up your guestroom with fresh bouquets from the in-house florist - Treat yourself to a relaxing massage or moisturizing facial at Aayu, the on-site spa If you’re here with the family or a larger group, upgrade to the Sundara Suite, featuring traditional Indian hues, gilt-edged furnishings, and classical paintings. Make yourself completely comfortable – the living and dining rooms provide plenty of extra space to do so.

TRNVC.name: Valtur Cervinia Cristallo Ski Resort
TRNVC.description: This charming mountain resort situated at the foot of the Matterhorn welcomes visitors with stunning sunset views of the peak throughout every season. During your stay at Valtur Cervinia Cristallo Ski Resort, gourmet international cuisine abounds at diverse dining venues while four wellness zones at the spa provide ample offerings. Elsewhere, embrace the hotel’s many activities, from a gaming room and movie theater to live entertainment. Venture out to enjoy golf, winter sports, and hiking nearby as well. Highlights of the hotel include: - 131 harmonious guestrooms and suites, with large windows showcasing the Italian Alps - Varied dining venues with a focus on international cuisine from Italy and beyond - A wellness center with treatment rooms, a gym, a swimming pool, and the Honey Wellness path - Entertainment, including premium shows, movies at the pool, a gaming room, and kids clubs - Plenty of spaces for relaxation, including a movie theater and outdoor terrace with fire pits

SJDVA.name: Villa La Valencia Beach Resort & Spa Los Cabos
SJDVA.address_raw: Carr. Transpeninsular Km. 18.5, San Jose del Cabo
SJDVA.description: Mexico is a land of warm hospitality, mindful relaxation, and vibrant culture, and this all-inclusive property on the Sea of Cortez reveals exactly why. At Villa La Valencia Beach Resort & Spa Los Cabos, moments under the sun await as you float along the lazy river or practice surfing at nearby beaches. A tranquil spa provides moments of serenity while a kids club provides families with a place for little ones to learn and play. Diverse restaurants serve various styles of gourmet food while a boundless list of activities ensure you never run out of experiences to enjoy during your vacation. By night, watch live entertainment before retreating to your contemporary suite. Highlights of the hotel include: - 304 modern suites, each offering a pristine view of the ocean waves or swimming pools - Eclectic dining venues ranging from Mexican to Italian, each part of the all-inclusive plan - A wellness spa offering treatments as well as a hydrotherapy circuit, beauty salon, and gym - An intricate pool complex with infinity and adult-only options, hot tubs, a lazy river, and more - Activities ranging from dance lessons and aqua fitness classes to movie nights and beach parties - Vibrant kids club program featuring art, movement, games, water sports, and movie screenings

STSVR.name: Vinarosa Resort & Spa
STSVR.description: Soak up a state of pure bliss at this Sonoma County retreat that offers intimate seclusion and quiet sophistication in a scenic wine country landscape. Just beyond the Vinarosa Resort & Spa grounds, guests can indulge in tours and tastings at nearby vineyards. But you’ll also be content never leaving the hotel, where time seems to slow down and tranquility abounds around every corner. Set on 92 acres of vineyards, with intimate tours through the vines offered regularly, the resort is a one-stop getaway that features accommodations that are close to nature, diverse dining options designed for lingering, a rejuvenating spa, and a sustainably minded ethos. Highlights of the resort include: - 78 guestrooms and suites that blend modern elegance with rustic wine country charm - Dining venues that allow you to savor the flavors of Sonoma while relaxing simultaneously - A serene wellness retreat with signature treatments, a thermal area, outdoor pool, and more - Both guided and unguided tours of the hotel’s vineyard and gardens, plus on-site tastings - Amenities ranging from a resort-style swimming pool to a fitness center and bocce courts

ACCFY.name: Fiesta Residences
ACCFY.description: Offering both guestrooms and suites, as well as private two-bedroom apartments, Fiesta Residences sets a high standard for comfort and luxury in Ghana's capital, Accra. This home away from home stands out for its contemporary aesthetic and five-star facilities – including an outdoor pool, fitness center, and spa stocked with Dermalogica and Africology products – and one of the best steak restaurants in Accra.
